authors_text: Heng Zhang,Haoyi Song,Wenhang Liu,Xinjun Sheng,Zhenhua Xiong,Xiangyang Zhu
title: A Novel Semi-Coupled Hierarchical Motion Planning Framework for Cooperative Transportation of Multiple Mobile Manipulators
title_zh: 一种用于多个移动机械手协同运输的新型半耦合分层运动规划框架
abstract: Multiple mobile manipulators show superiority in the tasks requiring mobility and dexterity compared with a single robot, especially when manipulating/transporting bulky objects. However, closed-chain of the system, redundancy of each mobile manipulator and obstacles in the environment bring challenges to the motion planning problem. In this paper, we propose a novel semi-coupled hierarchical framework (SCHF), which decomposes the problem into two semi-coupled sub-problems.To be specific, the centralized layer plans the object's motion first and then the decentralized layer independently explores the redundancy of each robot in real-time. A notable feature is that the lower bound of the redundancy constraint metric is ensured besides the closed-chain and obstacle-avoidance constraints in the centralized layer, which ensures the object's motion can be executed by each robot in the decentralized layer. Simulated results show that the success rate and time cost of SCHF outperforms the fully centralized planner and fully decoupled hierarchical planner significantly. In addition, cluttered real-world experiments also show the feasibility of the SCHF in the transportation tasks. A video clip in various scenarios can be found at https://youtu.be/Y8ZrnspIuBg.
summary: Multiple mobile manipulators show superiority in the tasks requiring mobility and dexterity compared with a single robot, especially when manipulating/transporting bulky objects. However, closed-chain of the system, redundancy of each mobile manipulator and obstacles in the environment bring challenges to the motion planning problem. In this paper, we propose a novel semi-coupled hierarchical framework (SCHF), which decomposes the problem into two semi-coupled sub-problems.To be specific, the centralized layer plans the object's motion first and then the decentralized layer independently explores the redundancy of each robot in real-time. A notable feature is that the lower bound of the redundancy constraint metric is ensured besides the closed-chain and obstacle-avoidance constraints in the centralized layer, which ensures the object's motion can be executed by each robot in the decentralized layer. Simulated results show that the success rate and time cost of SCHF outperforms the fully centralized planner and fully decoupled hierarchical planner significantly. In addition, cluttered real-world experiments also show the feasibility of the SCHF in the transportation tasks. A video clip in various scenarios can be found at https://youtu.be/Y8ZrnspIuBg.
abstract_zh: 与单个机器人相比，多个移动机械手在需要移动性和灵活性的任务中表现出优越性，特别是在操纵/运输笨重物体时。然而，系统的闭链、各个移动机械臂的冗余以及环境中的障碍物给运动规划问题带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的半耦合分层框架（SCHF），它将问题分解为两个半耦合子问题。具体来说，集中层首先规划物体的运动，然后分散层实时独立地探索每个机器人的冗余。一个显着的特点是，除了集中层的闭链和避障约束之外，还保证了冗余约束度量的下界，这保证了分散层中的每个机器人都可以执行物体的运动。仿真结果表明，SCHF的成功率和时间成本显着优于完全集中式规划器和完全解耦的分层规划器。此外，杂乱的现实世界实验也证明了SCHF在运输任务中的可行性。各种场景的视频剪辑可以在 https://youtu.be/Y8ZrnspIuBg 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半耦合分层框架（SCHF），用于解决多移动机械臂协同搬运大型物体时的运动规划问题，通过分解为集中层和分散层子问题实现高效规划。
AI.motivation: 多移动机械臂在搬运大型物体时具有优势，但系统闭环结构、机械臂冗余度及环境障碍物导致运动规划困难，需设计兼顾协调性与冗余度的新型框架。
AI.method: SCHF框架分为集中层与分散层：集中层优先规划物体运动轨迹并确保冗余度约束下限，分散层实时独立探索各机械臂冗余度，满足闭环与避障约束。
AI.result: 仿真与复杂真实环境实验表明，SCHF在成功率和时间成本上显著优于全集中式和全解耦分层规划方法，验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: SCHF通过半耦合分层策略有效平衡了系统协调性与冗余度利用，为多机械臂协同搬运任务提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Xukun Luo,Ping Wang
title: A Sequence Tagging based Framework for Few-Shot Relation Extraction
title_zh: 基于序列标记的少样本关系提取框架
abstract: Relation Extraction (RE) refers to extracting the relation triples in the input text. Existing neural work based systems for RE rely heavily on manually labeled training data, but there are still a lot of domains where sufficient labeled data does not exist. Inspired by the distance-based few-shot named entity recognition methods, we put forward the definition of the few-shot RE task based on the sequence tagging joint extraction approaches, and propose a few-shot RE framework for the task. Besides, we apply two actual sequence tagging models to our framework (called Few-shot TPLinker and Few-shot BiTT), and achieves solid results on two few-shot RE tasks constructed from a public dataset.
summary: Relation Extraction (RE) refers to extracting the relation triples in the input text. Existing neural work based systems for RE rely heavily on manually labeled training data, but there are still a lot of domains where sufficient labeled data does not exist. Inspired by the distance-based few-shot named entity recognition methods, we put forward the definition of the few-shot RE task based on the sequence tagging joint extraction approaches, and propose a few-shot RE framework for the task. Besides, we apply two actual sequence tagging models to our framework (called Few-shot TPLinker and Few-shot BiTT), and achieves solid results on two few-shot RE tasks constructed from a public dataset.
abstract_zh: 关系提取（RE）是指提取输入文本中的关系三元组。现有的基于神经工作的 RE 系统严重依赖于手动标记的训练数据，但仍然有很多领域不存在足够的标记数据。受基于距离的少样本命名实体识别方法的启发，我们提出了基于序列标记联合提取方法的少样本RE任务的定义，并提出了该任务的少样本RE框架。此外，我们将两个实际的序列标记模型应用于我们的框架（称为Few-shot TPLinker和Few-shot BiTT），并在从公共数据集构建的两个few-shot RE任务上取得了可靠的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于序列标注的少样本关系抽取框架，解决标注数据不足领域的关系抽取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有关系抽取方法依赖大量标注数据，但许多领域缺乏足够标注数据，需探索少样本学习方法。
AI.method: 受距离-based少样本命名实体识别启发，构建序列标注联合抽取框架，应用TPLinker和BiTT模型实现少样本RE。
AI.result: 在公开数据集构建的两个少样本RE任务中，两种模型均取得稳固的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为少样本关系抽取提供了有效解决方案，验证了序列标注方法在低资源场景下的可行性。

authors_text: Kuofeng Gao,Jiawang Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Mengxi Ya,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Imperceptible and Robust Backdoor Attack in 3D Point Cloud
title_zh: 3D 点云中难以察觉且稳健的后门攻击
abstract: With the thriving of deep learning in processing point cloud data, recent works show that backdoor attacks pose a severe security threat to 3D vision applications. The attacker injects the backdoor into the 3D model by poisoning a few training samples with trigger, such that the backdoored model performs well on clean samples but behaves maliciously when the trigger pattern appears. Existing attacks often insert some additional points into the point cloud as the trigger, or utilize a linear transformation (e.g., rotation) to construct the poisoned point cloud. However, the effects of these poisoned samples are likely to be weakened or even eliminated by some commonly used pre-processing techniques for 3D point cloud, e.g., outlier removal or rotation augmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel imperceptible and robust backdoor attack (IRBA) to tackle this challenge. We utilize a nonlinear and local transformation, called weighted local transformation (WLT), to construct poisoned samples with unique transformations. As there are several hyper-parameters and randomness in WLT, it is difficult to produce two similar transformations. Consequently, poisoned samples with unique transformations are likely to be resistant to aforementioned pre-processing techniques. Besides, as the controllability and smoothness of the distortion caused by a fixed WLT, the generated poisoned samples are also imperceptible to human inspection. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets and four models show that IRBA achieves 80%+ ASR in most cases even with pre-processing techniques, which is significantly higher than previous state-of-the-art attacks.
summary: With the thriving of deep learning in processing point cloud data, recent works show that backdoor attacks pose a severe security threat to 3D vision applications. The attacker injects the backdoor into the 3D model by poisoning a few training samples with trigger, such that the backdoored model performs well on clean samples but behaves maliciously when the trigger pattern appears. Existing attacks often insert some additional points into the point cloud as the trigger, or utilize a linear transformation (e.g., rotation) to construct the poisoned point cloud. However, the effects of these poisoned samples are likely to be weakened or even eliminated by some commonly used pre-processing techniques for 3D point cloud, e.g., outlier removal or rotation augmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel imperceptible and robust backdoor attack (IRBA) to tackle this challenge. We utilize a nonlinear and local transformation, called weighted local transformation (WLT), to construct poisoned samples with unique transformations. As there are several hyper-parameters and randomness in WLT, it is difficult to produce two similar transformations. Consequently, poisoned samples with unique transformations are likely to be resistant to aforementioned pre-processing techniques. Besides, as the controllability and smoothness of the distortion caused by a fixed WLT, the generated poisoned samples are also imperceptible to human inspection. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets and four models show that IRBA achieves 80%+ ASR in most cases even with pre-processing techniques, which is significantly higher than previous state-of-the-art attacks.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在处理点云数据方面的蓬勃发展，最近的研究表明后门攻击对 3D 视觉应用构成了严重的安全威胁。攻击者通过用触发器毒害一些训练样本，将后门注入到 3D 模型中，使得后门模型在干净的样本上表现良好，但在触发模式出现时表现出恶意。现有的攻击通常会在点云中插入一些额外的点作为触发器，或者利用线性变换（例如旋转）来构建中毒点云。然而，这些中毒样本的影响可能会被一些常用的 3D 点云预处理技术（例如异常值去除或旋转增强）削弱甚至消除。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的难以察觉且强大的后门攻击（IRBA）来应对这一挑战。我们利用非线性局部变换（称为加权局部变换（WLT））来构建具有独特变换的中毒样本。由于WLT中存在多个超参数和随机性，因此很难产生两个相似的变换。因此，具有独特转化的中毒样品可能对上述预处理技术具有抵抗力。此外，由于固定WLT引起的失真的可控性和平滑性，生成的中毒样本对于人类检查来说也是难以察觉的。对三个基准数据集和四个模型的大量实验表明，即使使用预处理技术，IRBA 在大多数情况下也能实现 80% 以上的 ASR，这明显高于以前最先进的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对3D点云的不可感知且鲁棒的后门攻击方法IRBA，通过非线性局部变换构造独特触发模式，解决现有攻击在预处理技术下的失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云后门攻击方法通过添加额外点或线性变换构造触发器，但易被异常点去除或旋转增强等预处理技术削弱，存在安全漏洞。
AI.method: 设计可控制的非线性加权局部变换（WLT），利用超参数和随机性生成独特变形样本，使触发模式在预处理后仍保持有效且难以被察觉。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集和四个模型上实验显示，即使应用预处理技术，IRBA在多数情况下仍达到80%以上的攻击成功率（ASR），显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: IRBA通过独特变形机制有效抵御预处理技术，为3D点云模型提供了更隐蔽且鲁棒的后门攻击方案，提升了攻击实用性与隐蔽性。

search_text: Imperceptible and Robust Backdoor Attack in 3D Point Cloud 3D 点云中难以察觉且稳健的后门攻击 With the thriving of deep learning in processing point cloud data, recent works show that backdoor attacks pose a severe security threat to 3D vision applications. The attacker injects the backdoor into the 3D model by poisoning a few training samples with trigger, such that the backdoored model performs well on clean samples but behaves maliciously when the trigger pattern appears. Existing attacks often insert some additional points into the point cloud as the trigger, or utilize a linear transformation (e.g., rotation) to construct the poisoned point cloud. However, the effects of these poisoned samples are likely to be weakened or even eliminated by some commonly used pre-processing techniques for 3D point cloud, e.g., outlier removal or rotation augmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel imperceptible and robust backdoor attack (IRBA) to tackle this challenge. We utilize a nonlinear and local transformation, called weighted local transformation (WLT), to construct poisoned samples with unique transformations. As there are several hyper-parameters and randomness in WLT, it is difficult to produce two similar transformations. Consequently, poisoned samples with unique transformations are likely to be resistant to aforementioned pre-processing techniques. Besides, as the controllability and smoothness of the distortion caused by a fixed WLT, the generated poisoned samples are also imperceptible to human inspection. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets and four models show that IRBA achieves 80%+ ASR in most cases even with pre-processing techniques, which is significantly higher than previous state-of-the-art attacks. 随着深度学习在处理点云数据方面的蓬勃发展，最近的研究表明后门攻击对 3D 视觉应用构成了严重的安全威胁。攻击者通过用触发器毒害一些训练样本，将后门注入到 3D 模型中，使得后门模型在干净的样本上表现良好，但在触发模式出现时表现出恶意。现有的攻击通常会在点云中插入一些额外的点作为触发器，或者利用线性变换（例如旋转）来构建中毒点云。然而，这些中毒样本的影响可能会被一些常用的 3D 点云预处理技术（例如异常值去除或旋转增强）削弱甚至消除。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的难以察觉且强大的后门攻击（IRBA）来应对这一挑战。我们利用非线性局部变换（称为加权局部变换（WLT））来构建具有独特变换的中毒样本。由于WLT中存在多个超参数和随机性，因此很难产生两个相似的变换。因此，具有独特转化的中毒样品可能对上述预处理技术具有抵抗力。此外，由于固定WLT引起的失真的可控性和平滑性，生成的中毒样本对于人类检查来说也是难以察觉的。对三个基准数据集和四个模型的大量实验表明，即使使用预处理技术，IRBA 在大多数情况下也能实现 80% 以上的 ASR，这明显高于以前最先进的攻击。 本文提出一种针对3D点云的不可感知且鲁棒的后门攻击方法IRBA，通过非线性局部变换构造独特触发模式，解决现有攻击在预处理技术下的失效问题。 Kuofeng Gao,Jiawang Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Mengxi Ya,Shu-Tao Xia cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Cheng Peng,Rama Chellappa
title: PDRF: Progressively Deblurring Radiance Field for Fast and Robust Scene Reconstruction from Blurry Images
title_zh: PDRF：逐步去模糊辐射场，从模糊图像中快速、稳健地重建场景
abstract: We present Progressively Deblurring Radiance Field (PDRF), a novel approach to efficiently reconstruct high quality radiance fields from blurry images. While current State-of-The-Art (SoTA) scene reconstruction methods achieve photo-realistic rendering results from clean source views, their performances suffer when the source views are affected by blur, which is commonly observed for images in the wild. Previous deblurring methods either do not account for 3D geometry, or are computationally intense. To addresses these issues, PDRF, a progressively deblurring scheme in radiance field modeling, accurately models blur by incorporating 3D scene context. PDRF further uses an efficient importance sampling scheme, which results in fast scene optimization. Specifically, PDRF proposes a Coarse Ray Renderer to quickly estimate voxel density and feature; a Fine Voxel Renderer is then used to achieve high quality ray tracing. We perform extensive experiments and show that PDRF is 15X faster than previous SoTA while achieving better performance on both synthetic and real scenes.
summary: We present Progressively Deblurring Radiance Field (PDRF), a novel approach to efficiently reconstruct high quality radiance fields from blurry images. While current State-of-The-Art (SoTA) scene reconstruction methods achieve photo-realistic rendering results from clean source views, their performances suffer when the source views are affected by blur, which is commonly observed for images in the wild. Previous deblurring methods either do not account for 3D geometry, or are computationally intense. To addresses these issues, PDRF, a progressively deblurring scheme in radiance field modeling, accurately models blur by incorporating 3D scene context. PDRF further uses an efficient importance sampling scheme, which results in fast scene optimization. Specifically, PDRF proposes a Coarse Ray Renderer to quickly estimate voxel density and feature; a Fine Voxel Renderer is then used to achieve high quality ray tracing. We perform extensive experiments and show that PDRF is 15X faster than previous SoTA while achieving better performance on both synthetic and real scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了渐进式去模糊辐射场（PDRF），这是一种从模糊图像中有效重建高质量辐射场的新颖方法。虽然当前最先进的 (SoTA) 场景重建方法可以从干净的源视图中实现照片级真实感渲染结果，但当源视图受到模糊影响时，它们的性能就会受到影响，这种情况在野外图像中很常见。以前的去模糊方法要么不考虑 3D 几何形状，要么计算量很大。为了解决这些问题，PDRF（一种辐射场建模中的渐进式去模糊方案）通过结合 3D 场景上下文来准确建模模糊。 PDRF 进一步使用有效的重要性采样方案，从而实现快速场景优化。具体来说，PDRF提出了Coarse Ray Renderer来快速估计体素密度和特征；然后使用精细体素渲染器来实现高质量的光线追踪。我们进行了大量的实验，结果表明 PDRF 比之前的 SoTA 快 15 倍，同时在合成场景和真实场景上都实现了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PDRF的方法，用于从模糊图像中高效重建高质量的辐射场，以解决现有方法在处理模糊图像时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的场景重建方法在处理模糊图像时表现不佳，而现有去模糊方法要么不考虑3D几何信息，要么计算成本过高，因此需要一种结合3D场景上下文并提升效率的解决方案。
AI.method: PDRF采用渐进式去模糊方案，在辐射场建模中引入3D场景上下文以准确建模模糊效果，并通过高效的重采样策略加速场景优化。具体包括：粗略射线渲染器快速估计体素密度和特征，以及精细体素渲染器实现高质量射线追踪。
AI.result: 实验表明，PDRF相比现有最先进方法速度提升15倍，在合成和真实场景中均取得更优的重建效果。
AI.conclusion: PDRF通过结合3D几何信息与高效采样策略，有效解决了模糊图像场景重建中的速度与质量矛盾，为鲁棒的辐射场重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Cheng Peng,Haofu Liao,S. Kevin Zhou,Rama Chellappa
title: REGAS: REspiratory-GAted Synthesis of Views for Multi-Phase CBCT Reconstruction from a single 3D CBCT Acquisition
title_zh: REGAS：通过单次 3D CBCT 采集进行多相 CBCT 重建的呼吸门控视图合成
abstract: It is a long-standing challenge to reconstruct Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) of the lung under respiratory motion. This work takes a step further to address a challenging setting in reconstructing a multi-phase}4D lung image from just a single}3D CBCT acquisition. To this end, we introduce REpiratory-GAted Synthesis of views, or REGAS. REGAS proposes a self-supervised method to synthesize the undersampled tomographic views and mitigate aliasing artifacts in reconstructed images. This method allows a much better estimation of between-phase Deformation Vector Fields (DVFs), which are used to enhance reconstruction quality from direct observations without synthesis. To address the large memory cost of deep neural networks on high resolution 4D data, REGAS introduces a novel Ray Path Transformation (RPT) that allows for distributed, differentiable forward projections. REGAS require no additional measurements like prior scans, air-flow volume, or breathing velocity. Our extensive experiments show that REGAS significantly outperforms comparable methods in quantitative metrics and visual quality.
summary: It is a long-standing challenge to reconstruct Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) of the lung under respiratory motion. This work takes a step further to address a challenging setting in reconstructing a multi-phase}4D lung image from just a single}3D CBCT acquisition. To this end, we introduce REpiratory-GAted Synthesis of views, or REGAS. REGAS proposes a self-supervised method to synthesize the undersampled tomographic views and mitigate aliasing artifacts in reconstructed images. This method allows a much better estimation of between-phase Deformation Vector Fields (DVFs), which are used to enhance reconstruction quality from direct observations without synthesis. To address the large memory cost of deep neural networks on high resolution 4D data, REGAS introduces a novel Ray Path Transformation (RPT) that allows for distributed, differentiable forward projections. REGAS require no additional measurements like prior scans, air-flow volume, or breathing velocity. Our extensive experiments show that REGAS significantly outperforms comparable methods in quantitative metrics and visual quality.
abstract_zh: 在呼吸运动下重建肺部的锥形束计算机断层扫描（CBCT）是一个长期存在的挑战。这项工作进一步解决了从单次 3D CBCT 采集重建多相 4D 肺部图像的挑战性设置。为此，我们引入 REpiratory-Gated 视图综合（REGAS）。 REGAS 提出了一种自监督方法来合成欠采样断层扫描视图并减轻重建图像中的混叠伪影。该方法可以更好地估计相间变形矢量场 (DVF)，用于提高直接观测的重建质量，无需合成。为了解决高分辨率 4D 数据上深度神经网络的大量内存成本问题，REGAS 引入了一种新颖的射线路径变换 (RPT)，它允许分布式、可微分的前向投影。 REGAS 不需要额外的测量，例如先前的扫描、气流量或呼吸速度。我们的大量实验表明，REGAS 在定量指标和视觉质量方面明显优于同类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REGAS方法，从单次3D CBCT扫描中重建多相位4D肺部CBCT图像，解决呼吸运动带来的重建挑战。
AI.motivation: 肺部CBCT重建受呼吸运动影响显著，现有方法难以从单次扫描中生成多相位图像且需依赖额外测量数据。
AI.method: REGAS通过自监督合成欠采样断层视图，结合呼吸门控技术生成变形场，并引入Ray Path Transformation（RPT）降低内存消耗，无需额外测量数据。
AI.result: 实验表明REGAS在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有方法，有效减少伪影并提升多相位重建精度。
AI.conclusion: REGAS为单次3D CBCT获取多相位4D肺部图像提供了无需额外数据的有效解决方案，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: REGAS: REspiratory-GAted Synthesis of Views for Multi-Phase CBCT Reconstruction from a single 3D CBCT Acquisition REGAS：通过单次 3D CBCT 采集进行多相 CBCT 重建的呼吸门控视图合成 It is a long-standing challenge to reconstruct Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) of the lung under respiratory motion. This work takes a step further to address a challenging setting in reconstructing a multi-phase}4D lung image from just a single}3D CBCT acquisition. To this end, we introduce REpiratory-GAted Synthesis of views, or REGAS. REGAS proposes a self-supervised method to synthesize the undersampled tomographic views and mitigate aliasing artifacts in reconstructed images. This method allows a much better estimation of between-phase Deformation Vector Fields (DVFs), which are used to enhance reconstruction quality from direct observations without synthesis. To address the large memory cost of deep neural networks on high resolution 4D data, REGAS introduces a novel Ray Path Transformation (RPT) that allows for distributed, differentiable forward projections. REGAS require no additional measurements like prior scans, air-flow volume, or breathing velocity. Our extensive experiments show that REGAS significantly outperforms comparable methods in quantitative metrics and visual quality. 在呼吸运动下重建肺部的锥形束计算机断层扫描（CBCT）是一个长期存在的挑战。这项工作进一步解决了从单次 3D CBCT 采集重建多相 4D 肺部图像的挑战性设置。为此，我们引入 REpiratory-Gated 视图综合（REGAS）。 REGAS 提出了一种自监督方法来合成欠采样断层扫描视图并减轻重建图像中的混叠伪影。该方法可以更好地估计相间变形矢量场 (DVF)，用于提高直接观测的重建质量，无需合成。为了解决高分辨率 4D 数据上深度神经网络的大量内存成本问题，REGAS 引入了一种新颖的射线路径变换 (RPT)，它允许分布式、可微分的前向投影。 REGAS 不需要额外的测量，例如先前的扫描、气流量或呼吸速度。我们的大量实验表明，REGAS 在定量指标和视觉质量方面明显优于同类方法。 本文提出REGAS方法，从单次3D CBCT扫描中重建多相位4D肺部CBCT图像，解决呼吸运动带来的重建挑战。 Cheng Peng,Haofu Liao,S. Kevin Zhou,Rama Chellappa eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sachith Seneviratne,Jasper S. Wijnands,Kerry Nice,Haifeng Zhao,Branislava Godic,Suzanne Mavoa,Rajith Vidanaarachchi,Mark Stevenson,Leandro Garcia,Ruth F. Hunter,Jason Thompson
title: Urban feature analysis from aerial remote sensing imagery using self-supervised and semi-supervised computer vision
title_zh: 使用自监督和半监督计算机视觉对航空遥感图像进行城市特征分析
comment: Submitted to journal 'Sustainable Cities and Society'
comments: Submitted to journal 'Sustainable Cities and Society'
abstract: Analysis of overhead imagery using computer vision is a problem that has received considerable attention in academic literature. Most techniques that operate in this space are both highly specialised and require expensive manual annotation of large datasets. These problems are addressed here through the development of a more generic framework, incorporating advances in representation learning which allows for more flexibility in analysing new categories of imagery with limited labeled data. First, a robust representation of an unlabeled aerial imagery dataset was created based on the momentum contrast mechanism. This was subsequently specialised for different tasks by building accurate classifiers with as few as 200 labeled images. The successful low-level detection of urban infrastructure evolution over a 10-year period from 60 million unlabeled images, exemplifies the substantial potential of our approach to advance quantitative urban research.

abstract_zh: 使用计算机视觉分析俯视图像是一个在学术文献中受到广泛关注的问题。在这个领域运行的大多数技术都是高度专业化的，并且需要对大型数据集进行昂贵的手动注释。这些问题在这里通过开发一个更通用的框架来解决，该框架结合了表示学习的进步，使得在分析具有有限标记数据的新图像类别时具有更大的灵活性。首先，基于动量对比机制创建了未标记航空图像数据集的鲁棒表示。随后，它通过使用少至 200 个标记图像构建准确的分类器，专门用于不同的任务。从 6000 万张未标记图像中成功地对 10 年来的城市基础设施演变进行低水平检测，证明了我们的方法在推进定量城市研究方面的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督与半监督学习的框架，用于分析航拍遥感影像中的城市特征，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有城市影像分析方法依赖昂贵的手动标注和高度专业化的模型，难以灵活处理新类别影像且成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于动量对比机制构建未标注航拍影像的鲁棒表示，再通过少量标注数据（如200张图像）训练专用分类器。
AI.result: 成功从6000万张未标注影像中检测出10年间城市基础设施演变，验证了方法在定量城市研究中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过自监督学习降低标注需求，为城市动态分析提供了高效、灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Gaofeng Cheng,Yifan Chen,Runyan Yang,Qingxuan Li,Zehui Yang,Lingxuan Ye,Pengyuan Zhang,Qingqing Zhang,Lei Xie,Yanmin Qian,Kong Aik Lee,Yonghong Yan
title: The Conversational Short-phrase Speaker Diarization (CSSD) Task: Dataset, Evaluation Metric and Baselines
title_zh: 会话短短语说话者分类 (CSSD) 任务：数据集、评估指标和基线
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.16844
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.16844
abstract: The conversation scenario is one of the most important and most challenging scenarios for speech processing technologies because people in conversation respond to each other in a casual style. Detecting the speech activities of each person in a conversation is vital to downstream tasks, like natural language processing, machine translation, etc. People refer to the detection technology of "who speak when" as speaker diarization (SD). Traditionally, diarization error rate (DER) has been used as the standard evaluation metric of SD systems for a long time. However, DER fails to give enough importance to short conversational phrases, which are short but important on the semantic level. Also, a carefully and accurately manually-annotated testing dataset suitable for evaluating the conversational SD technologies is still unavailable in the speech community. In this paper, we design and describe the Conversational Short-phrases Speaker Diarization (CSSD) task, which consists of training and testing datasets, evaluation metric and baselines. In the dataset aspect, despite the previously open-sourced 180-hour conversational MagicData-RAMC dataset, we prepare an individual 20-hour conversational speech test dataset with carefully and artificially verified speakers timestamps annotations for the CSSD task. In the metric aspect, we design the new conversational DER (CDER) evaluation metric, which calculates the SD accuracy at the utterance level. In the baseline aspect, we adopt a commonly used method: Variational Bayes HMM x-vector system, as the baseline of the CSSD task. Our evaluation metric is publicly available at https://github.com/SpeechClub/CDER_Metric.

However, DER fails to give enough importance to short conversational phrases, which are short but important on the semantic level. Also, a carefully and accurately manually-annotated testing dataset suitable for evaluating the conversational SD technologies is still unavailable in the speech community. In this paper, we design and describe the Conversational Short-phrases Speaker Diarization (CSSD) task, which consists of training and testing datasets, evaluation metric and baselines. In the dataset aspect, despite the previously open-sourced 180-hour conversational MagicData-RAMC dataset, we prepare an individual 20-hour conversational speech test dataset with carefully and artificially verified speakers timestamps annotations for the CSSD task. In the metric aspect, we design the new conversational DER (CDER) evaluation metric, which calculates the SD accuracy at the utterance level. In the baseline aspect, we adopt a commonly used method: Variational Bayes HMM x-vector system, as the baseline of the CSSD task. Our evaluation metric is publicly available at https://github.com/SpeechClub/CDER_Metric.
abstract_zh: 对话场景是语音处理技术最重要和最具挑战性的场景之一，因为对话中的人们以随意的方式相互回应。检测对话中每个人的言语活动对于自然语言处理、机器翻译等下游任务至关重要。人们将“谁在何时说话”的检测技术称为说话人分类（SD）。传统上，二值化错误率（DER）长期以来一直被用作SD系统的标准评估指标。然而，DER 未能对简短的会话短语给予足够的重视，这些短语虽然简短，但在语义层面上很重要。此外，语音社区中仍然无法获得适合评估会话 SD 技术的仔细且准确的手动注释测试数据集。在本文中，我们设计并描述了会话短短语说话者分类（CSSD）任务，该任务由训练和测试数据集、评估指标和基线组成。在数据集方面，尽管之前开源了 180 小时会话 MagicData-RAMC 数据集，但我们为 CSSD 任务准备了单独的 20 小时会话语音测试数据集，其中包含经过仔细和人工验证的说话人时间戳注释。在度量方面，我们设计了新的会话DER（CDER）评估度量，该度量计算话语级别的SD准确性。在基线方面，我们采用常用的方法：变分贝叶斯HMM x向量系统，作为CSSD任务的基线。我们的评估指标可在 https://github.com/SpeechClub/CDER_Metric 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对对话场景的短语级说话人分割任务（CSSD），包括数据集、评估指标和基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人分割（SD）评估指标DER对语义重要的短对话片段关注不足，且缺乏精确标注的对话场景测试数据集。
AI.method: 构建20小时人工验证的对话测试数据集，设计基于话语级的CDER评估指标，并采用变分贝叶斯HMM-xvector系统作为基线方法。
AI.result: 发布了CSSD数据集和CDER评估工具，为对话场景的说话人分割研究提供了标准化评测框架。
AI.conclusion: CSSD任务通过关注短语级分割和专用评估指标，为对话场景下的说话人分割技术发展提供了新方向。

Our evaluation metric is publicly available at https://github.com/SpeechClub/CDER_Metric. 对话场景是语音处理技术最重要和最具挑战性的场景之一，因为对话中的人们以随意的方式相互回应。检测对话中每个人的言语活动对于自然语言处理、机器翻译等下游任务至关重要。人们将“谁在何时说话”的检测技术称为说话人分类（SD）。传统上，二值化错误率（DER）长期以来一直被用作SD系统的标准评估指标。然而，DER 未能对简短的会话短语给予足够的重视，这些短语虽然简短，但在语义层面上很重要。此外，语音社区中仍然无法获得适合评估会话 SD 技术的仔细且准确的手动注释测试数据集。在本文中，我们设计并描述了会话短短语说话者分类（CSSD）任务，该任务由训练和测试数据集、评估指标和基线组成。在数据集方面，尽管之前开源了 180 小时会话 MagicData-RAMC 数据集，但我们为 CSSD 任务准备了单独的 20 小时会话语音测试数据集，其中包含经过仔细和人工验证的说话人时间戳注释。在度量方面，我们设计了新的会话DER（CDER）评估度量，该度量计算话语级别的SD准确性。在基线方面，我们采用常用的方法：变分贝叶斯HMM x向量系统，作为CSSD任务的基线。我们的评估指标可在 https://github.com/SpeechClub/CDER_Metric 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种针对对话场景的短语级说话人分割任务（CSSD），包括数据集、评估指标和基线方法。 Gaofeng Cheng,Yifan Chen,Runyan Yang,Qingxuan Li,Zehui Yang,Lingxuan Ye,Pengyuan Zhang,Qingqing Zhang,Lei Xie,Yanmin Qian,Kong Aik Lee,Yonghong Yan cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: John Willes,Cody Reading,Steven L. Waslander
title: InterTrack: Interaction Transformer for 3D Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: InterTrack：用于 3D 多对象跟踪的交互转换器
abstract: 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) is a key problem for autonomous vehicles, required to perform well-informed motion planning in dynamic environments. Particularly for densely occupied scenes, associating existing tracks to new detections remains challenging as existing systems tend to omit critical contextual information. Our proposed solution, InterTrack, introduces the Interaction Transformer for 3D MOT to generate discriminative object representations for data association. We extract state and shape features for each track and detection, and efficiently aggregate global information via attention. We then perform a learned regression on each track/detection feature pair to estimate affinities, and use a robust two-stage data association and track management approach to produce the final tracks. We validate our approach on the nuScenes 3D MOT benchmark, where we observe significant improvements, particularly on classes with small physical sizes and clustered objects. As of submission, InterTrack ranks 1st in overall AMOTA among methods using CenterPoint detections.
summary: 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) is a key problem for autonomous vehicles, required to perform well-informed motion planning in dynamic environments. Particularly for densely occupied scenes, associating existing tracks to new detections remains challenging as existing systems tend to omit critical contextual information. Our proposed solution, InterTrack, introduces the Interaction Transformer for 3D MOT to generate discriminative object representations for data association. We extract state and shape features for each track and detection, and efficiently aggregate global information via attention. We then perform a learned regression on each track/detection feature pair to estimate affinities, and use a robust two-stage data association and track management approach to produce the final tracks. We validate our approach on the nuScenes 3D MOT benchmark, where we observe significant improvements, particularly on classes with small physical sizes and clustered objects. As of submission, InterTrack ranks 1st in overall AMOTA among methods using CenterPoint detections.
abstract_zh: 3D 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 是自动驾驶车辆的一个关键问题，需要在动态环境中执行明智的运动规划。特别是对于人口密集的场景，将现有轨迹与新检测相关联仍然具有挑战性，因为现有系统往往会忽略关键的上下文信息。我们提出的解决方案 InterTrack 引入了 3D MOT 的交互转换器，以生成用于数据关联的有区别的对象表示。我们为每个跟踪和检测提取状态和形状特征，并通过注意力有效聚合全局信息。然后，我们对每个轨迹/检测特征对执行学习回归以估计相似性，并使用强大的两阶段数据关联和轨迹管理方法来生成最终轨迹。我们在 nuScenes 3D MOT 基准上验证了我们的方法，我们观察到显着的改进，特别是在物理尺寸较小和聚集对象的类上。截至提交时，InterTrack 在使用 CenterPoint 检测的方法中总体 AMOTA 排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterTrack方法，利用交互式Transformer网络解决三维多目标跟踪中的数据关联问题，提升密集场景下的跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D多目标跟踪系统在密集场景中难以有效关联轨迹与检测结果，因缺乏对关键上下文信息的建模导致跟踪精度不足。
AI.method: 通过提取轨迹与检测的状态和形状特征，采用Transformer注意力机制聚合全局信息，利用回归模型估计对象间亲和力，并结合两阶段数据关联策略实现跟踪。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，InterTrack在小尺寸物体和集群物体跟踪任务中表现显著提升，提交时以CenterPoint检测器为基础的AMOTA指标排名第一。
AI.conclusion: InterTrack通过引入交互式Transformer有效增强了3D MOT中对象表示的判别性，为复杂动态场景下的跟踪提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Waslander cs.CV

authors_text: Alexandros-Apostolos A. Boulogeorgos,Edwin Yaqub,Rachana Desai,Tachporn Sanguanpuak,Nikos Katzouris,Fotis Lazarakis,Angeliki Alexiou,Marco Di Renzo
title: Artificial Intelligence Empowered Multiple Access for Ultra Reliable and Low Latency THz Wireless Networks
title_zh: 人工智能支持超可靠和低延迟太赫兹无线网络的多路访问
abstract: Terahertz (THz) wireless networks are expected to catalyze the beyond fifth generation (B5G) era. However, due to the directional nature and the line-of-sight demand of THz links, as well as the ultra-dense deployment of THz networks, a number of challenges that the medium access control (MAC) layer needs to face are created. In more detail, the need of rethinking user association and resource allocation strategies by incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) capable of providing "real-time" solutions in complex and frequently changing environments becomes evident. Moreover, to satisfy the ultra-reliability and low-latency demands of several B5G applications, novel mobility management approaches are required. Motivated by this, this article presents a holistic MAC layer approach that enables intelligent user association and resource allocation, as well as flexible and adaptive mobility management, while maximizing systems' reliability through blockage minimization. In more detail, a fast and centralized joint user association, radio resource allocation, and blockage avoidance by means of a novel metaheuristic-machine learning framework is documented, that maximizes the THz networks performance, while minimizing the association latency by approximately three orders of magnitude. To support, within the access point (AP) coverage area, mobility management and blockage avoidance, a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach for beam-selection is discussed. Finally, to support user mobility between coverage areas of neighbor APs, a proactive hand-over mechanism based on AI-assisted fast channel prediction is~reported.
summary: Terahertz (THz) wireless networks are expected to catalyze the beyond fifth generation (B5G) era. However, due to the directional nature and the line-of-sight demand of THz links, as well as the ultra-dense deployment of THz networks, a number of challenges that the medium access control (MAC) layer needs to face are created. In more detail, the need of rethinking user association and resource allocation strategies by incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) capable of providing "real-time" solutions in complex and frequently changing environments becomes evident. Moreover, to satisfy the ultra-reliability and low-latency demands of several B5G applications, novel mobility management approaches are required. Motivated by this, this article presents a holistic MAC layer approach that enables intelligent user association and resource allocation, as well as flexible and adaptive mobility management, while maximizing systems' reliability through blockage minimization. In more detail, a fast and centralized joint user association, radio resource allocation, and blockage avoidance by means of a novel metaheuristic-machine learning framework is documented, that maximizes the THz networks performance, while minimizing the association latency by approximately three orders of magnitude. To support, within the access point (AP) coverage area, mobility management and blockage avoidance, a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach for beam-selection is discussed. Finally, to support user mobility between coverage areas of neighbor APs, a proactive hand-over mechanism based on AI-assisted fast channel prediction is~reported.
abstract_zh: 太赫兹 (THz) 无线网络有望推动超第五代 (B5G) 时代的到来。然而，由于太赫兹链路的方向性和视距需求，以及太赫兹网络的超密集部署，给介质访问控制（MAC）层带来了许多挑战。更详细地说，通过结合能够在复杂且频繁变化的环境中提供“实时”解决方案的人工智能（AI）来重新思考用户关联和资源分配策略的需求变得显而易见。此外，为了满足多种 B5G 应用的超可靠性和低延迟需求，需要新颖的移动管理方法。受此启发，本文提出了一种整体 MAC 层方法，该方法能够实现智能用户关联和资源分配，以及灵活和自适应的移动性管理，同时通过阻塞最小化来最大限度地提高系统的可靠性。更详细地说，记录了通过新颖的元启发式机器学习框架实现的快速集中式联合用户关联、无线电资源分配和阻塞避免，从而最大限度地提高了太赫兹网络性能，同时将关联延迟最小化了大约三个数量级。为了支持接入点 (AP) 覆盖区域内的移动性管理和阻塞避免，讨论了用于波束选择的深度强化学习 (DRL) 方法。最后，为了支持相邻 AP 覆盖区域之间的用户移动性，提出了一种基于人工智能辅助快速信道预测的主动切换机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的多址接入方法，以解决太赫兹（THz）无线网络中的超可靠低时延通信挑战。
AI.motivation: THz网络因定向传播特性、视距需求及超密集部署面临MAC层挑战，需通过AI实现动态用户关联、资源分配及移动性管理以满足B5G应用需求。
AI.method: 采用元启发式-机器学习框架实现联合用户关联与资源分配，结合深度强化学习进行波束选择，并提出基于AI的预测性切换机制以避免阻塞。
AI.result: 系统性能显著提升，关联时延降低约三个数量级，同时通过阻塞最小化最大化网络可靠性并支持跨接入点移动性管理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过AI赋能的智能MAC层设计，有效应对THz网络的可靠性与时延挑战，为B5G时代提供可行的技术路径。

In more detail, a fast and centralized joint user association, radio resource allocation, and blockage avoidance by means of a novel metaheuristic-machine learning framework is documented, that maximizes the THz networks performance, while minimizing the association latency by approximately three orders of magnitude. To support, within the access point (AP) coverage area, mobility management and blockage avoidance, a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach for beam-selection is discussed. Finally, to support user mobility between coverage areas of neighbor APs, a proactive hand-over mechanism based on AI-assisted fast channel prediction is~reported. 太赫兹 (THz) 无线网络有望推动超第五代 (B5G) 时代的到来。然而，由于太赫兹链路的方向性和视距需求，以及太赫兹网络的超密集部署，给介质访问控制（MAC）层带来了许多挑战。更详细地说，通过结合能够在复杂且频繁变化的环境中提供“实时”解决方案的人工智能（AI）来重新思考用户关联和资源分配策略的需求变得显而易见。此外，为了满足多种 B5G 应用的超可靠性和低延迟需求，需要新颖的移动管理方法。受此启发，本文提出了一种整体 MAC 层方法，该方法能够实现智能用户关联和资源分配，以及灵活和自适应的移动性管理，同时通过阻塞最小化来最大限度地提高系统的可靠性。更详细地说，记录了通过新颖的元启发式机器学习框架实现的快速集中式联合用户关联、无线电资源分配和阻塞避免，从而最大限度地提高了太赫兹网络性能，同时将关联延迟最小化了大约三个数量级。为了支持接入点 (AP) 覆盖区域内的移动性管理和阻塞避免，讨论了用于波束选择的深度强化学习 (DRL) 方法。最后，为了支持相邻 AP 覆盖区域之间的用户移动性，提出了一种基于人工智能辅助快速信道预测的主动切换机制。 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的多址接入方法，以解决太赫兹（THz）无线网络中的超可靠低时延通信挑战。 Alexandros-Apostolos A. Boulogeorgos,Edwin Yaqub,Rachana Desai,Tachporn Sanguanpuak,Nikos Katzouris,Fotis Lazarakis,Angeliki Alexiou,Marco Di Renzo eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NI

authors_text: Zhaoyun Jiang,Jiaqi Guo,Shizhao Sun,Huayu Deng,Zhongkai Wu,Vuksan Mijovic,Zijiang James Yang,Jian-Guang Lou,Dongmei Zhang
title: LayoutFormer++: Conditional Graphic Layout Generation via Constraint Serialization and Decoding Space Restriction
title_zh: LayoutFormer++：通过约束序列化和解码空间限制生成条件图形布局
abstract: Conditional graphic layout generation, which generates realistic layouts according to user constraints, is a challenging task that has not been well-studied yet. First, there is limited discussion about how to handle diverse user constraints flexibly and uniformly. Second, to make the layouts conform to user constraints, existing work often sacrifices generation quality significantly. In this work, we propose LayoutFormer++ to tackle the above problems. First, to flexibly handle diverse constraints, we propose a constraint serialization scheme, which represents different user constraints as sequences of tokens with a predefined format. Then, we formulate conditional layout generation as a sequence-to-sequence transformation, and leverage encoder-decoder framework with Transformer as the basic architecture. Furthermore, to make the layout better meet user requirements without harming quality, we propose a decoding space restriction strategy. Specifically, we prune the predicted distribution by ignoring the options that definitely violate user constraints and likely result in low-quality layouts, and make the model samples from the restricted distribution. Experiments demonstrate that LayoutFormer++ outperforms existing approaches on all the tasks in terms of both better generation quality and less constraint violation.
summary: Conditional graphic layout generation, which generates realistic layouts according to user constraints, is a challenging task that has not been well-studied yet. First, there is limited discussion about how to handle diverse user constraints flexibly and uniformly. Second, to make the layouts conform to user constraints, existing work often sacrifices generation quality significantly. In this work, we propose LayoutFormer++ to tackle the above problems. First, to flexibly handle diverse constraints, we propose a constraint serialization scheme, which represents different user constraints as sequences of tokens with a predefined format. Then, we formulate conditional layout generation as a sequence-to-sequence transformation, and leverage encoder-decoder framework with Transformer as the basic architecture. Furthermore, to make the layout better meet user requirements without harming quality, we propose a decoding space restriction strategy. Specifically, we prune the predicted distribution by ignoring the options that definitely violate user constraints and likely result in low-quality layouts, and make the model samples from the restricted distribution. Experiments demonstrate that LayoutFormer++ outperforms existing approaches on all the tasks in terms of both better generation quality and less constraint violation.
abstract_zh: 条件图形布局生成，根据用户约束生成逼真的布局，是一项具有挑战性的任务，尚未得到充分研究。首先，关于如何灵活、统一地处理不同的用户约束的讨论有限。其次，为了使布局符合用户限制，现有工作通常会显着牺牲生成质量。在这项工作中，我们提出 LayoutFormer++ 来解决上述问题。首先，为了灵活处理不同的约束，我们提出了一种约束序列化方案，它将不同的用户约束表示为具有预定义格式的令牌序列。然后，我们将条件布局生成制定为序列到序列的转换，并利用以 Transformer 作为基本架构的编码器-解码器框架。此外，为了使布局更好地满足用户要求而不损害质量，我们提出了解码空间限制策略。具体来说，我们通过忽略肯定违反用户约束并可能导致低质量布局的选项来修剪预测分布，并从受限分布中制作模型样本。实验表明，LayoutFormer++ 在所有任务上都优于现有方法，无论是在更好的生成质量还是更少的约束违规方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LayoutFormer++模型，通过约束序列化和解码空间限制策略，解决条件图形布局生成中约束处理不灵活及生成质量下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以灵活处理多样化用户约束，且为满足约束常牺牲生成质量，亟需兼顾约束满足与生成质量的新方案。
AI.method: 设计约束序列化方案将用户约束转化为标记序列，采用编码器-解码器框架结合Transformer架构，并通过解码空间限制策略修剪预测分布以避免约束冲突。
AI.result: 实验表明LayoutFormer++在生成质量与约束遵守度上均优于现有方法，有效平衡了二者关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束序列化与解码空间限制的联合优化，成功实现了高质量且符合用户约束的条件图形布局生成。

authors_text: Bingbing Wen,Xiaoning Bu,Chirag Shah
title: EGCR: Explanation Generation for Conversational Recommendation
title_zh: EGCR：对话式推荐的解释生成
abstract: Growing attention has been paid in Conversational Recommendation System (CRS), which works as a conversation-based and recommendation task-oriented tool to provide items of interest and explore user preference. However, existing work in CRS fails to explicitly show the reasoning logic to users and the whole CRS still remains a black box. Therefore we propose a novel end-to-end framework named Explanation Generation for Conversational Recommendation (EGCR) based on generating explanations for conversational agents to explain why they make the action. EGCR incorporates user reviews to enhance the item representation and increase the informativeness of the whole conversation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first framework for explainable conversational recommendation on real-world datasets. Moreover, we evaluate EGCR on one benchmark conversational recommendation datasets and achieve better performance on both recommendation accuracy and conversation quality than other state-of-the art models. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that generated explanations are not only having high quality and explainability, but also making CRS more trustworthy. We will make our code available to contribute to the CRS community
summary: Growing attention has been paid in Conversational Recommendation System (CRS), which works as a conversation-based and recommendation task-oriented tool to provide items of interest and explore user preference. However, existing work in CRS fails to explicitly show the reasoning logic to users and the whole CRS still remains a black box. Therefore we propose a novel end-to-end framework named Explanation Generation for Conversational Recommendation (EGCR) based on generating explanations for conversational agents to explain why they make the action. EGCR incorporates user reviews to enhance the item representation and increase the informativeness of the whole conversation. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first framework for explainable conversational recommendation on real-world datasets. Moreover, we evaluate EGCR on one benchmark conversational recommendation datasets and achieve better performance on both recommendation accuracy and conversation quality than other state-of-the art models. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that generated explanations are not only having high quality and explainability, but also making CRS more trustworthy. We will make our code available to contribute to the CRS community
abstract_zh: 会话推荐系统（CRS）越来越受到人们的关注，它作为一种基于会话和面向推荐任务的工具来提供感兴趣的项目并探索用户偏好。然而，CRS的现有工作未能向用户明确地展示推理逻辑，整个CRS仍然是一个黑匣子。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，名为对话推荐解释生成（EGCR），该框架基于为对话代理生成解释来解释他们为什么要采取行动。 EGCR 结合了用户评论来增强项目表示并增加整个对话的信息量。据我们所知，这是第一个针对现实世界数据集进行可解释的对话推荐的框架。此外，我们在一个基准会话推荐数据集上评估 EGCR，并且在推荐准确性和会话质量方面比其他最先进的模型取得了更好的性能。最后，大量的实验表明，生成的解释不仅具有高质量和可解释性，而且使 CRS 更值得信赖。我们将提供我们的代码来为 CRS 社区做出贡献

AI.tldr: 提出EGCR框架，通过生成解释提升对话推荐系统的透明度和可信度
AI.motivation: 现有CRS缺乏明确的推理逻辑，难以让用户理解推荐原因，系统透明度不足
AI.method: 基于生成解释的端到端框架，整合用户评论优化物品表示，提升对话信息量
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，EGCR在推荐准确性和对话质量上优于现有模型，生成的解释具有高质量和可解释性，提升系统可信度
AI.conclusion: EGCR是首个面向真实数据集的可解释对话推荐框架，有效提升了系统透明度和可信度

authors_text: Neşet Ünver Akmandor,Hongyu Li,Gary Lvov,Eric Dusel,Taşkın Padır
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning based Robot Navigation in Dynamic Environments using Occupancy Values of Motion Primitives
title_zh: 使用运动原语的占用值在动态环境中基于深度强化学习的机器人导航
comment: Accepted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: This paper presents a Deep Reinforcement Learning based navigation approach in which we define the occupancy observations as heuristic evaluations of motion primitives, rather than using raw sensor data. Our method enables fast mapping of the occupancy data, generated by multi-sensor fusion, into trajectory values in 3D workspace. The computationally efficient trajectory evaluation allows dense sampling of the action space. We utilize our occupancy observations in different data structures to analyze their effects on both training process and navigation performance. We train and test our methodology on two different robots within challenging physics-based simulation environments including static and dynamic obstacles. We benchmark our occupancy representations with other conventional data structures from state-of-the-art methods. The trained navigation policies are also validated successfully with physical robots in dynamic environments. The results show that our method not only decreases the required training time but also improves the navigation performance as compared to other occupancy representations. The open-source implementation of our work and all related info are available at \url{https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/tentabot}.
summary: This paper presents a Deep Reinforcement Learning based navigation approach in which we define the occupancy observations as heuristic evaluations of motion primitives, rather than using raw sensor data. Our method enables fast mapping of the occupancy data, generated by multi-sensor fusion, into trajectory values in 3D workspace. The computationally efficient trajectory evaluation allows dense sampling of the action space. We utilize our occupancy observations in different data structures to analyze their effects on both training process and navigation performance. We train and test our methodology on two different robots within challenging physics-based simulation environments including static and dynamic obstacles. We benchmark our occupancy representations with other conventional data structures from state-of-the-art methods. The trained navigation policies are also validated successfully with physical robots in dynamic environments. The results show that our method not only decreases the required training time but also improves the navigation performance as compared to other occupancy representations. The open-source implementation of our work and all related info are available at \url{https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/tentabot}.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的导航方法，其中我们将占用观察定义为运动基元的启发式评估，而不是使用原始传感器数据。我们的方法能够将多传感器融合生成的占用数据快速映射到 3D 工作空间中的轨迹值。计算高效的轨迹评估允许对动作空间进行密集采样。我们利用不同数据结构中的占用观察来分析它们对训练过程和导航性能的影响。我们在具有挑战性的基于物理的模拟环境（包括静态和动态障碍）中在两种不同的机器人上训练和测试我们的方法。我们将我们的占用表示与来自最先进方法的其他传统数据结构进行基准测试。经过训练的导航策略也通过动态环境中的物理机器人成功验证。结果表明，与其他占用表示相比，我们的方法不仅减少了所需的训练时间，而且还提高了导航性能。我们工作的开源实现和所有相关信息可在 \url{https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/tentabot} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的机器人导航方法，通过运动原语的占用值而非原始传感器数据进行环境建模。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法依赖原始传感器数据处理复杂且训练效率低，需探索更高效的环境表征方式以提升动态环境中的导航性能。
AI.method: 利用多传感器融合生成占用数据，将其映射为3D工作空间的轨迹值；通过不同数据结构分析对训练和导航的影响，并在物理仿真环境中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 相比传统方法，训练时间减少且导航成功率提升，在静态和动态障碍环境中均表现优异，物理机器人实测验证成功。
AI.conclusion: 占用值表征方法显著优化了导航效率与性能，开源实现为后续研究提供基础，适用于复杂动态环境的机器人自主导航。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning based Robot Navigation in Dynamic Environments using Occupancy Values of Motion Primitives 使用运动原语的占用值在动态环境中基于深度强化学习的机器人导航 This paper presents a Deep Reinforcement Learning based navigation approach in which we define the occupancy observations as heuristic evaluations of motion primitives, rather than using raw sensor data. Our method enables fast mapping of the occupancy data, generated by multi-sensor fusion, into trajectory values in 3D workspace. The computationally efficient trajectory evaluation allows dense sampling of the action space. We utilize our occupancy observations in different data structures to analyze their effects on both training process and navigation performance. We train and test our methodology on two different robots within challenging physics-based simulation environments including static and dynamic obstacles. We benchmark our occupancy representations with other conventional data structures from state-of-the-art methods. The trained navigation policies are also validated successfully with physical robots in dynamic environments. The results show that our method not only decreases the required training time but also improves the navigation performance as compared to other occupancy representations. The open-source implementation of our work and all related info are available at \url{https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/tentabot}. 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的导航方法，其中我们将占用观察定义为运动基元的启发式评估，而不是使用原始传感器数据。我们的方法能够将多传感器融合生成的占用数据快速映射到 3D 工作空间中的轨迹值。计算高效的轨迹评估允许对动作空间进行密集采样。我们利用不同数据结构中的占用观察来分析它们对训练过程和导航性能的影响。我们在具有挑战性的基于物理的模拟环境（包括静态和动态障碍）中在两种不同的机器人上训练和测试我们的方法。我们将我们的占用表示与来自最先进方法的其他传统数据结构进行基准测试。经过训练的导航策略也通过动态环境中的物理机器人成功验证。结果表明，与其他占用表示相比，我们的方法不仅减少了所需的训练时间，而且还提高了导航性能。我们工作的开源实现和所有相关信息可在 \url{https://github.com/RIVeR-Lab/tentabot} 获取。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的机器人导航方法，通过运动原语的占用值而非原始传感器数据进行环境建模。 Neşet Ünver Akmandor,Hongyu Li,Gary Lvov,Eric Dusel,Taşkın Padır cs.RO

authors_text: Shaojie Tang,Jing Yuan
title: Streaming Adaptive Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 流自适应子模最大化
comment: This paper has been accepted at The 16th International Conference on Algorithmic Aspects in Information and Management (AAIM 2022)
comments: This paper has been accepted at The 16th International Conference on Algorithmic Aspects in Information and Management (AAIM 2022)
abstract: Many sequential decision making problems can be formulated as an adaptive submodular maximization problem. However, most of existing studies in this field focus on pool-based setting, where one can pick items in any order, and there have been few studies for the stream-based setting where items arrive in an arbitrary order and one must immediately decide whether to select an item or not upon its arrival. In this paper, we introduce a new class of utility functions, semi-policywise submodular functions. We develop a series of effective algorithms to maximize a semi-policywise submodular function under the stream-based setting.
summary: Many sequential decision making problems can be formulated as an adaptive submodular maximization problem. However, most of existing studies in this field focus on pool-based setting, where one can pick items in any order, and there have been few studies for the stream-based setting where items arrive in an arbitrary order and one must immediately decide whether to select an item or not upon its arrival. In this paper, we introduce a new class of utility functions, semi-policywise submodular functions. We develop a series of effective algorithms to maximize a semi-policywise submodular function under the stream-based setting.
abstract_zh: 许多顺序决策问题可以表述为自适应子模最大化问题。然而，该领域现有的大多数研究都集中在基于池的设置，在该设置中，人们可以按任意顺序选择项目，而对于基于流的设置的研究很少，在该设置中，项目以任意顺序到达，并且必须在项目到达时立即决定是否选择该项目。在本文中，我们介绍了一类新的效用函数，半策略子模函数。我们开发了一系列有效的算法，以在基于流的设置下最大化半策略子模函数。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在流式设置下如何有效最大化半策略子模函数，以解决顺序决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注池设置，而流式设置下需即时决策的研究较少，因此本文旨在填补这一空白，提出适用于流式数据的算法。
AI.method: 提出半策略子模函数的新类别，并设计相应的算法以在流式设置中最大化该类函数。
AI.result: 所提出的算法在流式设置下能有效最大化半策略子模函数，具有较高的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了流式设置下的自适应子模最大化挑战，为相关领域提供了新的方法和理论基础。

authors_text: Hung T. Nguyen,Steven Bottone,Kwang Taik Kim,Mung Chiang,H. Vincent Poor
title: Interference Cancellation GAN Framework for Dynamic Channels
title_zh: 动态通道的干扰消除 GAN 框架
abstract: Symbol detection is a fundamental and challenging problem in modern communication systems, e.g., multiuser multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) setting. Iterative Soft Interference Cancellation (SIC) is a state-of-the-art method for this task and recently motivated data-driven neural network models, e.g. DeepSIC, that can deal with unknown non-linear channels. However, these neural network models require thorough timeconsuming training of the networks before applying, and is thus not readily suitable for highly dynamic channels in practice. We introduce an online training framework that can swiftly adapt to any changes in the channel. Our proposed framework unifies the recent deep unfolding approaches with the emerging generative adversarial networks (GANs) to capture any changes in the channel and quickly adjust the networks to maintain the top performance of the model. We demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms recent neural network models on highly dynamic channels and even surpasses those on the static channel in our experiments.
summary: Symbol detection is a fundamental and challenging problem in modern communication systems, e.g., multiuser multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) setting. Iterative Soft Interference Cancellation (SIC) is a state-of-the-art method for this task and recently motivated data-driven neural network models, e.g. DeepSIC, that can deal with unknown non-linear channels. However, these neural network models require thorough timeconsuming training of the networks before applying, and is thus not readily suitable for highly dynamic channels in practice. We introduce an online training framework that can swiftly adapt to any changes in the channel. Our proposed framework unifies the recent deep unfolding approaches with the emerging generative adversarial networks (GANs) to capture any changes in the channel and quickly adjust the networks to maintain the top performance of the model. We demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms recent neural network models on highly dynamic channels and even surpasses those on the static channel in our experiments.
abstract_zh: 符号检测是现代通信系统中的一个基本且具有挑战性的问题，例如多用户多输入多输出（MIMO）设置。迭代软干扰消除（SIC）是完成这项任务的最先进的方法，也是最近兴起的数据驱动神经网络模型，例如DeepSIC，可以处理未知的非线性通道。然而，这些神经网络模型在应用之前需要对网络进行彻底且耗时的训练，因此在实践中不太适合高度动态的通道。我们引入了一个在线培训框架，可以快速适应渠道的任何变化。我们提出的框架将最近的深度展开方法与新兴的生成对抗网络（GAN）相结合，以捕获通道中的任何变化并快速调整网络以保持模型的最佳性能。我们证明，在我们的实验中，我们的框架在高度动态通道上显着优于最新的神经网络模型，甚至超过了静态通道上的模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的干扰消除框架，以解决动态信道中的符号检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型训练耗时，难以适应动态信道变化，需快速适应的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合深度展开与GANs的在线训练框架，快速适应信道变化。
AI.result: 在动态信道中显著优于现有模型，静态信道性能亦超越对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了动态适应性与检测性能，适用于实时通信场景。

authors_text: Bingbing Wen,Yunhe Feng,Yongfeng Zhang,Chirag Shah
title: Towards Generating Robust, Fair, and Emotion-Aware Explanations for Recommender Systems
title_zh: 为推荐系统生成稳健、公平和情感感知的解释
abstract: As recommender systems become increasingly sophisticated and complex, they often suffer from lack of fairness and transparency. Providing robust and unbiased explanations for recommendations has been drawing more and more attention as it can help address these issues and improve trustworthiness and informativeness of recommender systems. However, despite the fact that such explanations are generated for humans who respond more strongly to messages with appropriate emotions, there is a lack of consideration for emotions when generating explanations for recommendations. Current explanation generation models are found to exaggerate certain emotions without accurately capturing the underlying tone or the meaning. In this paper, we propose a novel method based on a multi-head transformer, called Emotion-aware Transformer for Explainable Recommendation (EmoTER), to generate more robust, fair, and emotion-enhanced explanations. To measure the linguistic quality and emotion fairness of the generated explanations, we adopt both automatic text metrics and human perceptions for evaluation. Experiments on three widely-used benchmark datasets with multiple evaluation metrics demonstrate that EmoTER consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art explanation generation models in terms of text quality, explainability, and consideration for fairness to emotion distribution. Implementation of EmoTER will be released as an open-source toolkit to support further research.
summary: As recommender systems become increasingly sophisticated and complex, they often suffer from lack of fairness and transparency. Providing robust and unbiased explanations for recommendations has been drawing more and more attention as it can help address these issues and improve trustworthiness and informativeness of recommender systems. However, despite the fact that such explanations are generated for humans who respond more strongly to messages with appropriate emotions, there is a lack of consideration for emotions when generating explanations for recommendations. Current explanation generation models are found to exaggerate certain emotions without accurately capturing the underlying tone or the meaning. In this paper, we propose a novel method based on a multi-head transformer, called Emotion-aware Transformer for Explainable Recommendation (EmoTER), to generate more robust, fair, and emotion-enhanced explanations. To measure the linguistic quality and emotion fairness of the generated explanations, we adopt both automatic text metrics and human perceptions for evaluation. Experiments on three widely-used benchmark datasets with multiple evaluation metrics demonstrate that EmoTER consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art explanation generation models in terms of text quality, explainability, and consideration for fairness to emotion distribution. Implementation of EmoTER will be released as an open-source toolkit to support further research.
abstract_zh: 随着推荐系统变得越来越复杂，它们常常缺乏公平性和透明度。为推荐提供可靠且公正的解释已引起越来越多的关注，因为它可以帮助解决这些问题并提高推荐系统的可信度和信息量。然而，尽管事实上这种解释是为对具有适当情绪的消息做出更强烈反应的人类生成的，但在生成推荐解释时缺乏对情绪的考虑。目前的解释生成模型被发现夸大了某些情绪，而没有准确捕捉潜在的语气或含义。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多头变压器的新颖方法，称为可解释推荐的情感感知变压器（EmoTER），以生成更稳健、公平和情感增强的解释。为了衡量生成的解释的语言质量和情感公平性，我们采用自动文本度量和人类感知进行评估。在具有多个评估指标的三个广泛使用的基准数据集上进行的实验表明，EmoTER 在文本质量、可解释性和对情感分布公平性的考虑方面始终优于现有的最先进的解释生成模型。 EmoTER 的实施将作为开源工具包发布，以支持进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头Transformer的新型模型EmoTER，用于生成更稳健、公平且富有情感感知的推荐系统解释。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统解释生成模型存在情感偏差、忽视用户情绪需求的问题，导致解释效果欠佳且影响系统公平性。
AI.method: 设计多头Transformer架构EmoTER，通过融合情感感知机制与公平性约束，生成兼顾文本质量与情绪分布均衡的解释内容。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，EmoTER在文本质量、可解释性和情感公平性指标上均优于现有最优模型，且开源发布工具包。
AI.conclusion: EmoTER有效解决了推荐系统解释生成中的情感偏差问题，为构建更可信的推荐系统提供了新方法。

authors_text: Huali Xu,Shuaifeng Zhi,Li Liu
title: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Classification via Inter-Source Stylization
title_zh: 通过源间风格化进行跨域少样本分类
abstract: The goal of Cross-Domain Few-Shot Classification (CDFSC) is to accurately classify a target dataset with limited labelled data by exploiting the knowledge of a richly labelled auxiliary dataset, despite the differences between the domains of the two datasets. Some existing approaches require labelled samples from multiple domains for model training. However, these methods fail when the sample labels are scarce. To overcome this challenge, this paper proposes a solution that makes use of multiple source domains without the need for additional labeling costs. Specifically, one of the source domains is completely tagged, while the others are untagged. An Inter-Source Stylization Network (ISSNet) is then introduced to enhance stylisation across multiple source domains, enriching data distribution and model's generalization capabilities. Experiments on 8 target datasets show that ISSNet leverages unlabelled data from multiple source data and significantly reduces the negative impact of domain gaps on classification performance compared to several baseline methods.
summary: The goal of Cross-Domain Few-Shot Classification (CDFSC) is to accurately classify a target dataset with limited labelled data by exploiting the knowledge of a richly labelled auxiliary dataset, despite the differences between the domains of the two datasets. Some existing approaches require labelled samples from multiple domains for model training. However, these methods fail when the sample labels are scarce. To overcome this challenge, this paper proposes a solution that makes use of multiple source domains without the need for additional labeling costs. Specifically, one of the source domains is completely tagged, while the others are untagged. An Inter-Source Stylization Network (ISSNet) is then introduced to enhance stylisation across multiple source domains, enriching data distribution and model's generalization capabilities. Experiments on 8 target datasets show that ISSNet leverages unlabelled data from multiple source data and significantly reduces the negative impact of domain gaps on classification performance compared to several baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 跨域少样本分类（CDFSC）的目标是通过利用丰富标记的辅助数据集的知识，对具有有限标记数据的目标数据集进行准确分类，尽管两个数据集的域之间存在差异。一些现有方法需要来自多个领域的标记样本来进行模型训练。然而，当样本标签稀缺时，这些方法就会失败。为了克服这一挑战，本文提出了一种利用多个源域而不需要额外标签成本的解决方案。具体来说，其中一个源域已完全标记，而其他源域则未标记。然后引入源间风格化网络（ISSNet）来增强跨多个源域的风格化，丰富数据分布和模型的泛化能力。对 8 个目标数据集的实验表明，ISSNet 利用来自多个源数据的未标记数据，与几种基线方法相比，显着减少了域间隙对分类性能的负面影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨领域少样本分类方法，通过多源域风格化网络（ISSNet）利用未标记的源域数据减少领域差异对分类性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有跨领域少样本分类方法依赖多个领域的标记样本，但在标记数据稀缺时效果不佳。本文旨在无需额外标记成本的情况下利用多源域数据提升分类性能。
AI.method: 设计Inter-Source Stylization Network（ISSNet），通过一个完全标记的源域和其他未标记源域进行跨域风格化，增强数据分布多样性与模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在8个目标数据集上的实验表明，ISSNet相比基线方法显著降低了领域差异对分类性能的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: ISSNet通过有效利用多源域未标记数据，为跨领域少样本分类提供了无需额外标注的解决方案，提升了模型在领域差异下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sung Hwan Mun,Min Hyun Han,Minchan Kim,Dongjune Lee,Nam Soo Kim
title: Disentangled Speaker Representation Learning via Mutual Information Minimization
title_zh: 通过互信息最小化解开说话人表示学习
comment: Accepted by APSIPA ASC 2022. Camera-ready. 8 pages, 4 figures, and 1 table
comments: Accepted by APSIPA ASC 2022. Camera-ready. 8 pages, 4 figures, and 1 table
abstract: Domain mismatch problem caused by speaker-unrelated feature has been a major topic in speaker recognition. In this paper, we propose an explicit disentanglement framework to unravel speaker-relevant features from speaker-unrelated features via mutual information (MI) minimization. To achieve our goal of minimizing MI between speaker-related and speaker-unrelated features, we adopt a contrastive log-ratio upper bound (CLUB), which exploits the upper bound of MI. Our framework is constructed in a 3-stage structure. First, in the front-end encoder, input speech is encoded into shared initial embedding. Next, in the decoupling block, shared initial embedding is split into separate speaker-related and speaker-unrelated embeddings. Finally, disentanglement is conducted by MI minimization in the last stage. Experiments on Far-Field Speaker Verification Challenge 2022 (FFSVC2022) demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for disentanglement. Also, to utilize domain-unknown datasets containing numerous speakers, we pre-trained the front-end encoder with VoxCeleb datasets. We then fine-tuned the speaker embedding model in the disentanglement framework with FFSVC 2022 dataset. The experimental results show that fine-tuning with a disentanglement framework on a existing pre-trained model is valid and can further improve performance.
summary: Domain mismatch problem caused by speaker-unrelated feature has been a major topic in speaker recognition. In this paper, we propose an explicit disentanglement framework to unravel speaker-relevant features from speaker-unrelated features via mutual information (MI) minimization. To achieve our goal of minimizing MI between speaker-related and speaker-unrelated features, we adopt a contrastive log-ratio upper bound (CLUB), which exploits the upper bound of MI. Our framework is constructed in a 3-stage structure. First, in the front-end encoder, input speech is encoded into shared initial embedding. Next, in the decoupling block, shared initial embedding is split into separate speaker-related and speaker-unrelated embeddings. Finally, disentanglement is conducted by MI minimization in the last stage. Experiments on Far-Field Speaker Verification Challenge 2022 (FFSVC2022) demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for disentanglement. Also, to utilize domain-unknown datasets containing numerous speakers, we pre-trained the front-end encoder with VoxCeleb datasets. We then fine-tuned the speaker embedding model in the disentanglement framework with FFSVC 2022 dataset. The experimental results show that fine-tuning with a disentanglement framework on a existing pre-trained model is valid and can further improve performance.
abstract_zh: 由与说话人无关的特征引起的域失配问题一直是说话人识别中的一个主要课题。在本文中，我们提出了一个明确的解开框架，通过互信息（MI）最小化从与说话人无关的特征中解开与说话人相关的特征。为了实现最小化与说话人相关和与说话人无关的特征之间的 MI 的目标，我们采用了对比对数比上限 (CLUB)，它利用了 MI 的上限。我们的框架采用三阶段结构构建。首先，在前端编码器中，输入语音被编码为共享初始嵌入。接下来，在解耦块中，共享的初始嵌入被分成单独的与说话者相关的嵌入和与说话者无关的嵌入。最后，在最后阶段通过MI最小化来进行解缠结。 2022 年远场扬声器验证挑战赛 (FFSVC2022) 的实验表明，我们提出的框架对于解缠结是有效的。此外，为了利用包含大量说话者的未知领域数据集，我们使用 VoxCeleb 数据集对前端编码器进行了预训练。然后，我们使用 FFSVC 2022 数据集对解纠缠框架中的说话者嵌入模型进行微调。实验结果表明，在现有预训练模型上使用解缠框架进行微调是有效的，并且可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过最小化互信息来分离说话人相关特征和无关特征的显式解耦框架，以解决说话人识别中的领域不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 在说话人识别任务中，由于说话人无关特征导致的领域不匹配问题是一个主要挑战，因此需要一种有效的方法来分离说话人相关和无关特征以提高模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文采用对比对数比上界（CLUB）来最小化说话人相关和无关特征之间的互信息，并构建了一个三阶段结构：前端编码器将语音编码为共享初始嵌入，解耦模块将其拆分为说话人相关和无关嵌入，最后通过互信息最小化实现解耦。
AI.result: 在FFSVC2022数据集上的实验表明，所提出的框架在解耦任务上是有效的，且使用预训练的VoxCeleb数据集进行微调可以进一步提高性能。
AI.conclusion: 该解耦框架能够有效分离说话人相关和无关特征，从而提高说话人识别任务的性能，且结合预训练模型的微调方法是可行且有效的。

search_text: Disentangled Speaker Representation Learning via Mutual Information Minimization 通过互信息最小化解开说话人表示学习 Domain mismatch problem caused by speaker-unrelated feature has been a major topic in speaker recognition. In this paper, we propose an explicit disentanglement framework to unravel speaker-relevant features from speaker-unrelated features via mutual information (MI) minimization. To achieve our goal of minimizing MI between speaker-related and speaker-unrelated features, we adopt a contrastive log-ratio upper bound (CLUB), which exploits the upper bound of MI. Our framework is constructed in a 3-stage structure. First, in the front-end encoder, input speech is encoded into shared initial embedding. Next, in the decoupling block, shared initial embedding is split into separate speaker-related and speaker-unrelated embeddings. Finally, disentanglement is conducted by MI minimization in the last stage. Experiments on Far-Field Speaker Verification Challenge 2022 (FFSVC2022) demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for disentanglement. Also, to utilize domain-unknown datasets containing numerous speakers, we pre-trained the front-end encoder with VoxCeleb datasets. We then fine-tuned the speaker embedding model in the disentanglement framework with FFSVC 2022 dataset. The experimental results show that fine-tuning with a disentanglement framework on a existing pre-trained model is valid and can further improve performance. 由与说话人无关的特征引起的域失配问题一直是说话人识别中的一个主要课题。在本文中，我们提出了一个明确的解开框架，通过互信息（MI）最小化从与说话人无关的特征中解开与说话人相关的特征。为了实现最小化与说话人相关和与说话人无关的特征之间的 MI 的目标，我们采用了对比对数比上限 (CLUB)，它利用了 MI 的上限。我们的框架采用三阶段结构构建。首先，在前端编码器中，输入语音被编码为共享初始嵌入。接下来，在解耦块中，共享的初始嵌入被分成单独的与说话者相关的嵌入和与说话者无关的嵌入。最后，在最后阶段通过MI最小化来进行解缠结。 2022 年远场扬声器验证挑战赛 (FFSVC2022) 的实验表明，我们提出的框架对于解缠结是有效的。此外，为了利用包含大量说话者的未知领域数据集，我们使用 VoxCeleb 数据集对前端编码器进行了预训练。然后，我们使用 FFSVC 2022 数据集对解纠缠框架中的说话者嵌入模型进行微调。实验结果表明，在现有预训练模型上使用解缠框架进行微调是有效的，并且可以进一步提高性能。 本文提出了一种通过最小化互信息来分离说话人相关特征和无关特征的显式解耦框架，以解决说话人识别中的领域不匹配问题。 Sung Hwan Mun,Min Hyun Han,Minchan Kim,Dongjune Lee,Nam Soo Kim eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zhihua Jin,Xingbo Wang,Furui Cheng,Chunhui Sun,Qun Liu,Huamin Qu
title: ShortcutLens: A Visual Analytics Approach for Exploring Shortcuts in Natural Language Understanding Dataset
title_zh: ShortcutLens：一种探索自然语言理解数据集中快捷方式的可视化分析方法
abstract: Benchmark datasets play an important role in evaluating Natural Language Understanding (NLU) models. However, shortcuts -- unwanted biases in the benchmark datasets -- can damage the effectiveness of benchmark datasets in revealing models' real capabilities. Since shortcuts vary in coverage, productivity, and semantic meaning, it is challenging for NLU experts to systematically understand and avoid them when creating benchmark datasets. In this paper, we develop a visual analytics system, ShortcutLens, to help NLU experts explore shortcuts in NLU benchmark datasets. The system allows users to conduct multi-level exploration of shortcuts. Specifically, Statistics View helps users grasp the statistics such as coverage and productivity of shortcuts in the benchmark dataset. Template View employs hierarchical and interpretable templates to summarize different types of shortcuts. Instance View allows users to check the corresponding instances covered by the shortcuts. We conduct case studies and expert interviews to evaluate the effectiveness and usability of the system. The results demonstrate that ShortcutLens supports users in gaining a better understanding of benchmark dataset issues through shortcuts, inspiring them to create challenging and pertinent benchmark datasets.
summary: Benchmark datasets play an important role in evaluating Natural Language Understanding (NLU) models. However, shortcuts -- unwanted biases in the benchmark datasets -- can damage the effectiveness of benchmark datasets in revealing models' real capabilities. Since shortcuts vary in coverage, productivity, and semantic meaning, it is challenging for NLU experts to systematically understand and avoid them when creating benchmark datasets. In this paper, we develop a visual analytics system, ShortcutLens, to help NLU experts explore shortcuts in NLU benchmark datasets. The system allows users to conduct multi-level exploration of shortcuts. Specifically, Statistics View helps users grasp the statistics such as coverage and productivity of shortcuts in the benchmark dataset. Template View employs hierarchical and interpretable templates to summarize different types of shortcuts. Instance View allows users to check the corresponding instances covered by the shortcuts. We conduct case studies and expert interviews to evaluate the effectiveness and usability of the system. The results demonstrate that ShortcutLens supports users in gaining a better understanding of benchmark dataset issues through shortcuts, inspiring them to create challenging and pertinent benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 基准数据集在评估自然语言理解（NLU）模型中发挥着重要作用。然而，捷径——基准数据集中不必要的偏差——可能会损害基准数据集在揭示模型真实能力方面的有效性。由于捷径在覆盖范围、生产力和语义方面各不相同，因此 NLU 专家在创建基准数据集时系统地理解和避免它们是一项挑战。在本文中，我们开发了一个可视化分析系统 ShortcutLens，以帮助 NLU 专家探索 NLU 基准数据集中的快捷方式。系统允许用户对快捷方式进行多层次的探索。具体来说，统计视图可以帮助用户掌握基准数据集中快捷方式的覆盖率和生产率等统计数据。模板视图采用分层且可解释的模板来总结不同类型的快捷方式。实例视图允许用户查看快捷方式所覆盖的相应实例。我们进行案例研究和专家访谈来评估系统的有效性和可用性。结果表明，ShortcutLens 支持用户通过快捷方式更好地理解基准数据集问题，激励他们创建具有挑战性和相关性的基准数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShortcutLens可视化分析系统，帮助NLU专家系统探索和理解自然语言理解数据集中的shortcut偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 基准数据集中的shortcut偏差会损害模型评估的有效性，但现有方法难以系统识别和分析这些偏差，阻碍了高质量数据集的构建。
AI.method: 开发ShortcutLens系统，包含统计视图（分析shortcut覆盖率/生产力）、模板视图（分层可解释模板归纳shortcut类型）和实例视图（展示具体样本），支持多层级探索。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和专家访谈验证，系统有效帮助用户识别数据集问题，激发创建更具挑战性和相关性的基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: ShortcutLens为NLU领域提供了系统分析数据集shortcut的新工具，有助于提升基准测试的公平性和模型评估的准确性。

authors_text: Haosen Ge,In Young Park,Xuancheng Qian,Grace Zeng
title: Transformer Encoder for Social Science
title_zh: 社会科学 Transformer 编码器
abstract: High-quality text data has become an important data source for social scientists. We have witnessed the success of pretrained deep neural network models, such as BERT and RoBERTa, in recent social science research. In this paper, we propose a compact pretrained deep neural network, Transformer Encoder for Social Science (TESS), explicitly designed to tackle text processing tasks in social science research. Using two validation tests, we demonstrate that TESS outperforms BERT and RoBERTa by 16.7% on average when the number of training samples is limited (<1,000 training instances). The results display the superiority of TESS over BERT and RoBERTa on social science text processing tasks. Lastly, we discuss the limitation of our model and present advice for future researchers.
summary: High-quality text data has become an important data source for social scientists. We have witnessed the success of pretrained deep neural network models, such as BERT and RoBERTa, in recent social science research. In this paper, we propose a compact pretrained deep neural network, Transformer Encoder for Social Science (TESS), explicitly designed to tackle text processing tasks in social science research. Using two validation tests, we demonstrate that TESS outperforms BERT and RoBERTa by 16.7% on average when the number of training samples is limited (<1,000 training instances). The results display the superiority of TESS over BERT and RoBERTa on social science text processing tasks. Lastly, we discuss the limitation of our model and present advice for future researchers.
abstract_zh: 高质量的文本数据已成为社会科学家的重要数据源。在最近的社会科学研究中，我们见证了预训练深度神经网络模型（例如 BERT 和 RoBERTa）的成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种紧凑的预训练深度神经网络，即社会科学变压器编码器（TESS），专门用于解决社会科学研究中的文本处理任务。通过两次验证测试，我们证明，当训练样本数量有限（<1,000 个训练实例）时，TESS 的性能平均优于 BERT 和 RoBERTa 16.7%。结果显示了 TESS 在社会科学文本处理任务上相对于 BERT 和 RoBERTa 的优越性。最后，我们讨论了我们模型的局限性，并为未来的研究人员提出了建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个专为社会科学研究设计的预训练Transformer编码器模型TESS，用于解决文本处理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型（如BERT）在社会科学研究中面临小样本场景下性能不足的问题，需针对性优化模型结构。
AI.method: 设计紧凑型Transformer Encoder架构，通过两个验证测试评估模型在有限训练样本（<1000实例）下的性能表现。
AI.result: TESS在训练样本有限时平均超越BERT和RoBERTa 16.7%，展现对社会科学文本处理任务的优越性。
AI.conclusion: TESS在小样本社会科学研究任务中表现优异，但模型仍存在局限性，需未来研究进一步改进。

In this paper, we propose a compact pretrained deep neural network, Transformer Encoder for Social Science (TESS), explicitly designed to tackle text processing tasks in social science research. Using two validation tests, we demonstrate that TESS outperforms BERT and RoBERTa by 16.7% on average when the number of training samples is limited (<1,000 training instances). The results display the superiority of TESS over BERT and RoBERTa on social science text processing tasks. Lastly, we discuss the limitation of our model and present advice for future researchers. 高质量的文本数据已成为社会科学家的重要数据源。在最近的社会科学研究中，我们见证了预训练深度神经网络模型（例如 BERT 和 RoBERTa）的成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种紧凑的预训练深度神经网络，即社会科学变压器编码器（TESS），专门用于解决社会科学研究中的文本处理任务。通过两次验证测试，我们证明，当训练样本数量有限（<1,000 个训练实例）时，TESS 的性能平均优于 BERT 和 RoBERTa 16.7%。结果显示了 TESS 在社会科学文本处理任务上相对于 BERT 和 RoBERTa 的优越性。最后，我们讨论了我们模型的局限性，并为未来的研究人员提出了建议。 本文提出一个专为社会科学研究设计的预训练Transformer编码器模型TESS，用于解决文本处理任务。 Haosen Ge,In Young Park,Xuancheng Qian,Grace Zeng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shili Sheng,Erfan Pakdamanian,Kyungtae Han,Ziran Wang,Lu Feng
title: A Study on Learning and Simulating Personalized Car-Following Driving Style
title_zh: 个性化跟车驾驶风格的学习与模拟研究
abstract: Automated vehicles are gradually entering people's daily life to provide a comfortable driving experience for the users. The generic and user-agnostic automated vehicles have limited ability to accommodate the different driving styles of different users. This limitation not only impacts users' satisfaction but also causes safety concerns. Learning from user demonstrations can provide direct insights regarding users' driving preferences. However, it is difficult to understand a driver's preference with limited data. In this study, we use a model-free inverse reinforcement learning method to study drivers' characteristics in the car-following scenario from a naturalistic driving dataset, and show this method is capable of representing users' preferences with reward functions. In order to predict the driving styles for drivers with limited data, we apply Gaussian Mixture Models and compute the similarity of a specific driver to the clusters of drivers. We design a personalized adaptive cruise control (P-ACC) system through a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) model. The reward function with the model to mimic drivers' driving style is integrated, with a constraint on the relative distance to ensure driving safety. Prediction of the driving styles achieves 85.7% accuracy with the data of less than 10 car-following events. The model-based experimental driving trajectories demonstrate that the P-ACC system can provide a personalized driving experience.

However, it is difficult to understand a driver's preference with limited data. The reward function with the model to mimic drivers' driving style is integrated, with a constraint on the relative distance to ensure driving safety. The model-based experimental driving trajectories demonstrate that the P-ACC system can provide a personalized driving experience.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车正逐渐走进人们的日常生活，为用户提供舒适的驾驶体验。通用且与用户无关的自动车辆适应不同用户的不同驾驶风格的能力有限。这种限制不仅影响用户的满意度，而且还引起安全问题。从用户演示中学习可以提供有关用户驾驶偏好的直接见解。然而，利用有限的数据很难了解驾驶员的偏好。在本研究中，我们使用无模型逆强化学习方法从自然驾驶数据集中研究跟车场景中的驾驶员特征，并表明该方法能够用奖励函数表示用户的偏好。为了用有限的数据预测驾驶员的驾驶风格，我们应用高斯混合模型并计算特定驾驶员与驾驶员集群的相似度。我们通过部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）模型设计了个性化自适应巡航控制（P-ACC）系统。该模型将奖励函数与模仿驾驶员驾驶风格的模型相结合，并限制相对距离以确保驾驶安全。在少于10次跟车事件的数据下，驾驶风格预测准确率达到85.7%。基于模型的实验驾驶轨迹表明P-ACC系统可以提供个性化的驾驶体验。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在通过学习和模拟个性化跟车驾驶风格，提升自动驾驶车辆的用户体验和安全性。
AI.motivation: 通用型自动驾驶车辆无法适配不同用户的驾驶风格，导致用户满意度下降及安全隐患。
AI.method: 采用无模型逆强化学习方法从真实驾驶数据中学习驾驶员特征，结合高斯混合模型进行聚类分析，并基于POMDP设计个性化自适应巡航控制系统（P-ACC）。
AI.result: 在少于10次跟车事件的数据下，驾驶风格预测准确率达85.7%，模型实验验证了P-ACC系统可提供个性化驾驶体验。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效利用有限数据表征用户偏好，通过安全约束的P-ACC系统实现个性化驾驶风格模拟，提升自动驾驶的适应性与安全性。
