authors_text: Jiaxiang Jiang,Amil Khan,S. Shailja,Samuel A. Belteton,Michael Goebel,Daniel B. Szymanski,B. S. Manjunath
title: Deep Learning Enabled Time-Lapse 3D Cell Analysis
title_zh: 深度学习支持延时 3D 细胞分析
abstract: This paper presents a method for time-lapse 3D cell analysis. Specifically, we consider the problem of accurately localizing and quantitatively analyzing sub-cellular features, and for tracking individual cells from time-lapse 3D confocal cell image stacks. The heterogeneity of cells and the volume of multi-dimensional images presents a major challenge for fully automated analysis of morphogenesis and development of cells. This paper is motivated by the pavement cell growth process, and building a quantitative morphogenesis model. We propose a deep feature based segmentation method to accurately detect and label each cell region. An adjacency graph based method is used to extract sub-cellular features of the segmented cells. Finally, the robust graph based tracking algorithm using multiple cell features is proposed for associating cells at different time instances. Extensive experiment results are provided and demonstrate the robustness of the proposed method. The code is available on Github and the method is available as a service through the BisQue portal.
summary: This paper presents a method for time-lapse 3D cell analysis. Specifically, we consider the problem of accurately localizing and quantitatively analyzing sub-cellular features, and for tracking individual cells from time-lapse 3D confocal cell image stacks. The heterogeneity of cells and the volume of multi-dimensional images presents a major challenge for fully automated analysis of morphogenesis and development of cells. This paper is motivated by the pavement cell growth process, and building a quantitative morphogenesis model. We propose a deep feature based segmentation method to accurately detect and label each cell region. An adjacency graph based method is used to extract sub-cellular features of the segmented cells. Finally, the robust graph based tracking algorithm using multiple cell features is proposed for associating cells at different time instances. Extensive experiment results are provided and demonstrate the robustness of the proposed method. The code is available on Github and the method is available as a service through the BisQue portal.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种延时 3D 细胞分析方法。具体来说，我们考虑准确定位和定量分析亚细胞特征的问题，以及从延时 3D 共焦细胞图像堆栈中跟踪单个细胞的问题。细胞的异质性和多维图像的体积对细胞形态发生和发育的全自动分析提出了重大挑战。本文受到路面细胞生长过程的启发，建立了定量的形态发生模型。我们提出了一种基于深度特征的分割方法来准确检测和标记每个细胞区域。使用基于邻接图的方法来提取分段细胞的亚细胞特征。最后，提出了使用多个细胞特征的基于鲁棒图的跟踪算法，用于关联不同时间实例的细胞。提供了广泛的实验结果并证明了所提出方法的鲁棒性。该代码可在 Github 上获取，并且该方法可通过 BisQue 门户作为服务提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的时序3D细胞分析方法，解决亚细胞特征定位与细胞追踪问题。
AI.motivation: 细胞异质性与多维图像数据量大导致形态发生过程自动化分析困难，需建立定量模型研究细胞生长过程。
AI.method: 采用深度特征分割定位细胞区域，通过邻接图提取亚细胞特征，结合多特征图算法实现跨时间点细胞追踪。
AI.result: 实验验证方法鲁棒性，代码开源且通过BisQue平台提供服务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习方法有效解决了3D时序细胞分析难题，为形态发生研究提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Prateek Verma,Jonathan Berger
title: Enhancing Audio Perception of Music By AI Picked Room Acoustics
title_zh: 通过 AI 选择室内声学增强音乐的音频感知
comment: 24th International Congress on Acoustics, Gyeongju, South Korea
comments: 24th International Congress on Acoustics, Gyeongju, South Korea
abstract: Every sound that we hear is the result of successive convolutional operations (e.g. room acoustics, microphone characteristics, resonant properties of the instrument itself, not to mention characteristics and limitations of the sound reproduction system). In this work we seek to determine the best room in which to perform a particular piece using AI. Additionally, we use room acoustics as a way to enhance the perceptual qualities of a given sound. Historically, rooms (particularly Churches and concert halls) were designed to host and serve specific musical functions. In some cases the architectural acoustical qualities enhanced the music performed there. We try to mimic this, as a first step, by designating room impulse responses that would correlate to producing enhanced sound quality for particular music. A convolutional architecture is first trained to take in an audio sample and mimic the ratings of experts with about 78 % accuracy for various instrument families and notes for perceptual qualities. This gives us a scoring function for any audio sample which can rate the perceptual pleasantness of a note automatically. Now, via a library of about 60,000 synthetic impulse responses mimicking all kinds of room, materials, etc, we use a simple convolution operation, to transform the sound as if it was played in a particular room. The perceptual evaluator is used to rank the musical sounds, and yield the "best room or the concert hall" to play a sound. As a byproduct it can also use room acoustics to turn a poor quality sound into a "good" sound.

The perceptual evaluator is used to rank the musical sounds, and yield the "best room or the concert hall" to play a sound. As a byproduct it can also use room acoustics to turn a poor quality sound into a "good" sound.
abstract_zh: 我们听到的每一个声音都是连续卷积运算的结果（例如室内声学、麦克风特性、乐器本身的谐振特性，更不用说声音再现系统的特性和局限性）。在这项工作中，我们寻求使用人工智能来确定演奏特定作品的最佳房间。此外，我们使用室内声学来增强给定声音的感知质量。从历史上看，房间（特别是教堂和音乐厅）被设计用来举办和服务特定的音乐功能。在某些情况下，建筑的声学质量增强了在那里演奏的音乐。作为第一步，我们尝试通过指定与为特定音乐产生增强音质相关的房间脉冲响应来模仿这一点。首先对卷积架构进行训练，以获取音频样本并模仿专家对各种乐器系列和感知质量注释的评级，准确率约为 78%。这为我们提供了任何音频样本的评分函数，可以自动评估音符的感知愉悦度。现在，通过一个包含约 60,000 个模拟各种房间、材料等的合成脉冲响应的库，我们使用简单的卷积运算来转换声音，就像在特定房间中播放一样。感知评估器用于对音乐声音进行排名，并产生播放声音的“最佳房间或音乐厅”。作为副产品，它还可以利用室内声学将质量差的声音变成“好”的声音。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过AI选择最佳房间声学环境以增强音乐感知质量。
AI.motivation: 历史上特定建筑（如教堂、音乐厅）的声学设计能提升音乐表现，论文旨在利用AI模拟这种声学优化效果。
AI.method: 训练卷积网络评估音频感知质量（准确率78%），结合6万条合成房间脉冲响应库，通过卷积运算模拟不同房间声学效果。
AI.result: 实现自动评分音乐感知质量，并确定最佳演奏房间；可将低质量音频转换为高质量声音。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的声学优化方法能有效提升音乐感知体验，为音频制作提供新思路。

search_text: Enhancing Audio Perception of Music By AI Picked Room Acoustics 通过 AI 选择室内声学增强音乐的音频感知 Every sound that we hear is the result of successive convolutional operations (e.g. room acoustics, microphone characteristics, resonant properties of the instrument itself, not to mention characteristics and limitations of the sound reproduction system). In this work we seek to determine the best room in which to perform a particular piece using AI. Additionally, we use room acoustics as a way to enhance the perceptual qualities of a given sound. Historically, rooms (particularly Churches and concert halls) were designed to host and serve specific musical functions. In some cases the architectural acoustical qualities enhanced the music performed there. We try to mimic this, as a first step, by designating room impulse responses that would correlate to producing enhanced sound quality for particular music. A convolutional architecture is first trained to take in an audio sample and mimic the ratings of experts with about 78 % accuracy for various instrument families and notes for perceptual qualities. This gives us a scoring function for any audio sample which can rate the perceptual pleasantness of a note automatically. Now, via a library of about 60,000 synthetic impulse responses mimicking all kinds of room, materials, etc, we use a simple convolution operation, to transform the sound as if it was played in a particular room. The perceptual evaluator is used to rank the musical sounds, and yield the "best room or the concert hall" to play a sound. As a byproduct it can also use room acoustics to turn a poor quality sound into a "good" sound. 我们听到的每一个声音都是连续卷积运算的结果（例如室内声学、麦克风特性、乐器本身的谐振特性，更不用说声音再现系统的特性和局限性）。在这项工作中，我们寻求使用人工智能来确定演奏特定作品的最佳房间。此外，我们使用室内声学来增强给定声音的感知质量。从历史上看，房间（特别是教堂和音乐厅）被设计用来举办和服务特定的音乐功能。在某些情况下，建筑的声学质量增强了在那里演奏的音乐。作为第一步，我们尝试通过指定与为特定音乐产生增强音质相关的房间脉冲响应来模仿这一点。首先对卷积架构进行训练，以获取音频样本并模仿专家对各种乐器系列和感知质量注释的评级，准确率约为 78%。这为我们提供了任何音频样本的评分函数，可以自动评估音符的感知愉悦度。现在，通过一个包含约 60,000 个模拟各种房间、材料等的合成脉冲响应的库，我们使用简单的卷积运算来转换声音，就像在特定房间中播放一样。感知评估器用于对音乐声音进行排名，并产生播放声音的“最佳房间或音乐厅”。作为副产品，它还可以利用室内声学将质量差的声音变成“好”的声音。 本论文通过AI选择最佳房间声学环境以增强音乐感知质量。 Prateek Verma,Jonathan Berger cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Mingyu Derek Ma,Alexander K. Taylor,Wei Wang,Nanyun Peng
title: DICE: Data-Efficient Clinical Event Extraction with Generative Models
title_zh: DICE：使用生成模型进行数据高效的临床事件提取
abstract: Event extraction for the clinical domain is an under-explored research area. The lack of training data along with the high volume of domain-specific terminologies with vague entity boundaries makes the task especially challenging. In this paper, we introduce DICE, a robust and data-efficient generative model for clinical event extraction. DICE frames event extraction as a conditional generation problem and introduces a contrastive learning objective to accurately decide the boundaries of biomedical mentions. DICE also trains an auxiliary mention identification task jointly with event extraction tasks to better identify entity mention boundaries, and further introduces special markers to incorporate identified entity mentions as trigger and argument candidates for their respective tasks. To benchmark clinical event extraction, we compose MACCROBAT-EE, the first clinical event extraction dataset with argument annotation, based on an existing clinical information extraction dataset MACCROBAT. Our experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performances of DICE for clinical and news domain event extraction, especially under low data settings.
summary: Event extraction for the clinical domain is an under-explored research area. The lack of training data along with the high volume of domain-specific terminologies with vague entity boundaries makes the task especially challenging. In this paper, we introduce DICE, a robust and data-efficient generative model for clinical event extraction. DICE frames event extraction as a conditional generation problem and introduces a contrastive learning objective to accurately decide the boundaries of biomedical mentions. DICE also trains an auxiliary mention identification task jointly with event extraction tasks to better identify entity mention boundaries, and further introduces special markers to incorporate identified entity mentions as trigger and argument candidates for their respective tasks. To benchmark clinical event extraction, we compose MACCROBAT-EE, the first clinical event extraction dataset with argument annotation, based on an existing clinical information extraction dataset MACCROBAT. Our experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performances of DICE for clinical and news domain event extraction, especially under low data settings.
abstract_zh: 临床领域的事件提取是一个尚未充分探索的研究领域。缺乏训练数据以及大量具有模糊实体边界的特定领域术语使得这项任务特别具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 DICE，这是一种用于临床事件提取的稳健且数据高效的生成模型。 DICE 将事件提取构建为条件生成问题，并引入对比学习目标来准确确定生物医学提及的边界。 DICE 还与事件提取任务联合训练辅助提及识别任务，以更好地识别实体提及边界，并进一步引入特殊标记来将识别的实体提及合并为各自任务的触发器和参数候选者。为了对临床事件提取进行基准测试，我们基于现有的临床信息提取数据集 MACCROBAT 构建了 MACCROBAT-EE，这是第一个带有参数注释的临床事件提取数据集。我们的实验证明了 DICE 在临床和新闻领域事件提取方面的最先进的性能，特别是在低数据设置下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DICE模型，通过生成式方法解决临床事件抽取中的数据不足和领域术语模糊边界问题。
AI.motivation: 临床事件抽取因训练数据匮乏及医学术语边界模糊而面临挑战，现有方法难以高效处理该任务。
AI.method: 将事件抽取建模为条件生成问题，引入对比学习目标识别生物医学实体边界，并通过辅助任务与特殊标记联合优化触发词和论元抽取。
AI.result: DICE在临床和新闻领域事件抽取任务中均达到最先进水平，尤其在低数据场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DICE通过生成式框架和多任务联合学习有效解决了临床事件抽取的难题，同时构建了首个带论元标注的临床事件抽取数据集MACCROBAT-EE。

authors_text: Preetam Anbukarasu,Shailesh Nanisetty,Ganesh Tata,Nilanjan Ray
title: Tiny-HR: Towards an interpretable machine learning pipeline for heart rate estimation on edge devices
title_zh: Tiny-HR：走向可解释的机器学习管道，用于边缘设备上的心率估计
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, Preprint Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, Preprint Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics
abstract: The focus of this paper is a proof of concept, machine learning (ML) pipeline that extracts heart rate from pressure sensor data acquired on low-power edge devices. The ML pipeline consists an upsampler neural network, a signal quality classifier, and a 1D-convolutional neural network optimized for efficient and accurate heart rate estimation. The models were designed so the pipeline was less than 40 kB. Further, a hybrid pipeline consisting of the upsampler and classifier, followed by a peak detection algorithm was developed. The pipelines were deployed on ESP32 edge device and benchmarked against signal processing to determine the energy usage, and inference times. The results indicate that the proposed ML and hybrid pipeline reduces energy and time per inference by 82% and 28% compared to traditional algorithms. The main trade-off for ML pipeline was accuracy, with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 3.28, compared to 2.39 and 1.17 for the hybrid and signal processing pipelines. The ML models thus show promise for deployment in energy and computationally constrained devices. Further, the lower sampling rate and computational requirements for the ML pipeline could enable custom hardware solutions to reduce the cost and energy needs of wearable devices.
summary: The focus of this paper is a proof of concept, machine learning (ML) pipeline that extracts heart rate from pressure sensor data acquired on low-power edge devices. The ML pipeline consists an upsampler neural network, a signal quality classifier, and a 1D-convolutional neural network optimized for efficient and accurate heart rate estimation. The models were designed so the pipeline was less than 40 kB. Further, a hybrid pipeline consisting of the upsampler and classifier, followed by a peak detection algorithm was developed. The pipelines were deployed on ESP32 edge device and benchmarked against signal processing to determine the energy usage, and inference times. The results indicate that the proposed ML and hybrid pipeline reduces energy and time per inference by 82% and 28% compared to traditional algorithms. The main trade-off for ML pipeline was accuracy, with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 3.28, compared to 2.39 and 1.17 for the hybrid and signal processing pipelines. The ML models thus show promise for deployment in energy and computationally constrained devices. Further, the lower sampling rate and computational requirements for the ML pipeline could enable custom hardware solutions to reduce the cost and energy needs of wearable devices.
abstract_zh: 本文的重点是概念验证，机器学习 (ML) 管道可从低功耗边缘设备上获取的压力传感器数据中提取心率。 ML 管道由上采样器神经网络、信号质量分类器和针对高效、准确的心率估计而优化的一维卷积神经网络组成。模型的设计使得管道小于 40 kB。此外，还开发了一种由上采样器和分类器组成的混合管道，然后是峰值检测算法。这些管道部署在 ESP32 边缘设备上，并针对信号处理进行基准测试，以确定能源使用情况和推理时间。结果表明，与传统算法相比，所提出的 ML 和混合管道将每次推理的能量和时间减少了 82% 和 28%。 ML 管道的主要权衡是准确性，平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 3.28，而混合和信号处理管道的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 2.39 和 1.17。因此，机器学习模型显示出在能源和计算受限设备中部署的前景。此外，机器学习管道的采样率和计算要求较低，可以实现定制硬件解决方案，从而降低可穿戴设备的成本和能源需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于边缘设备的心率估计可解释机器学习管道Tiny-HR。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在开发一种低功耗、轻量级的机器学习管道，用于在边缘设备上高效、准确地估计心率。
AI.method: 该管道包括一个上采样神经网络、一个信号质量分类器和一个优化的1D卷积神经网络，整体大小小于40 kB。还开发了一种混合管道，结合上采样器、分类器和峰值检测算法，并在ESP32设备上进行部署和基准测试。
AI.result: 与传统算法相比，所提出的机器学习和混合管道分别减少了82%和28%的能耗和推理时间，但机器学习管道的平均绝对误差（MAE）为3.28，高于混合管道和信号处理管道的误差。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习管道在能量和计算受限设备上具有应用前景，其较低的采样率和计算需求可促进定制硬件解决方案，以降低可穿戴设备的成本和能耗。

search_text: Tiny-HR: Towards an interpretable machine learning pipeline for heart rate estimation on edge devices Tiny-HR：走向可解释的机器学习管道，用于边缘设备上的心率估计 The focus of this paper is a proof of concept, machine learning (ML) pipeline that extracts heart rate from pressure sensor data acquired on low-power edge devices. The ML pipeline consists an upsampler neural network, a signal quality classifier, and a 1D-convolutional neural network optimized for efficient and accurate heart rate estimation. The models were designed so the pipeline was less than 40 kB. Further, a hybrid pipeline consisting of the upsampler and classifier, followed by a peak detection algorithm was developed. The pipelines were deployed on ESP32 edge device and benchmarked against signal processing to determine the energy usage, and inference times. The results indicate that the proposed ML and hybrid pipeline reduces energy and time per inference by 82% and 28% compared to traditional algorithms. The main trade-off for ML pipeline was accuracy, with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 3.28, compared to 2.39 and 1.17 for the hybrid and signal processing pipelines. The ML models thus show promise for deployment in energy and computationally constrained devices. Further, the lower sampling rate and computational requirements for the ML pipeline could enable custom hardware solutions to reduce the cost and energy needs of wearable devices. 本文的重点是概念验证，机器学习 (ML) 管道可从低功耗边缘设备上获取的压力传感器数据中提取心率。 ML 管道由上采样器神经网络、信号质量分类器和针对高效、准确的心率估计而优化的一维卷积神经网络组成。模型的设计使得管道小于 40 kB。此外，还开发了一种由上采样器和分类器组成的混合管道，然后是峰值检测算法。这些管道部署在 ESP32 边缘设备上，并针对信号处理进行基准测试，以确定能源使用情况和推理时间。结果表明，与传统算法相比，所提出的 ML 和混合管道将每次推理的能量和时间减少了 82% 和 28%。 ML 管道的主要权衡是准确性，平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 3.28，而混合和信号处理管道的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 2.39 和 1.17。因此，机器学习模型显示出在能源和计算受限设备中部署的前景。此外，机器学习管道的采样率和计算要求较低，可以实现定制硬件解决方案，从而降低可穿戴设备的成本和能源需求。 本文提出了一种用于边缘设备的心率估计可解释机器学习管道Tiny-HR。 Preetam Anbukarasu,Shailesh Nanisetty,Ganesh Tata,Nilanjan Ray cs.LG,cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Amir Salimi Lafmejani,Spring Berman,Georgios Fainekos
title: NMPC-LBF: Nonlinear MPC with Learned Barrier Function for Decentralized Safe Navigation of Multiple Robots in Unknown Environments
title_zh: NMPC-LBF：具有学习障碍函数的非线性 MPC，用于未知环境中多个机器人的分散式安全导航
abstract: In this paper, we present a decentralized control approach based on a Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) method that employs barrier certificates for safe navigation of multiple nonholonomic wheeled mobile robots in unknown environments with static and/or dynamic obstacles. This method incorporates a Learned Barrier Function (LBF) into the NMPC design in order to guarantee safe robot navigation, i.e., prevent robot collisions with other robots and the obstacles. We refer to our proposed control approach as NMPC-LBF. Since each robot does not have a priori knowledge about the obstacles and other robots, we use a Deep Neural Network (DeepNN) running in real-time on each robot to learn the Barrier Function (BF) only from the robot's LiDAR and odometry measurements. The DeepNN is trained to learn the BF that separates safe and unsafe regions. We implemented our proposed method on simulated and actual Turtlebot3 Burger robot(s) in different scenarios. The implementation results show the effectiveness of the NMPC-LBF method at ensuring safe navigation of the robots.
summary: In this paper, we present a decentralized control approach based on a Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) method that employs barrier certificates for safe navigation of multiple nonholonomic wheeled mobile robots in unknown environments with static and/or dynamic obstacles. This method incorporates a Learned Barrier Function (LBF) into the NMPC design in order to guarantee safe robot navigation, i.e., prevent robot collisions with other robots and the obstacles. We refer to our proposed control approach as NMPC-LBF. Since each robot does not have a priori knowledge about the obstacles and other robots, we use a Deep Neural Network (DeepNN) running in real-time on each robot to learn the Barrier Function (BF) only from the robot's LiDAR and odometry measurements. The DeepNN is trained to learn the BF that separates safe and unsafe regions. We implemented our proposed method on simulated and actual Turtlebot3 Burger robot(s) in different scenarios. The implementation results show the effectiveness of the NMPC-LBF method at ensuring safe navigation of the robots.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）方法的分散控制方法，该方法采用障碍证书在具有静态和/或动态障碍物的未知环境中安全导航多个非完整轮式移动机器人。该方法将学习障碍函数（LBF）纳入 NMPC 设计中，以保证机器人导航安全，即防止机器人与其他机器人和障碍物发生碰撞。我们将我们提出的控制方法称为 NMPC-LBF。由于每个机器人都没有关于障碍物和其他机器人的先验知识，因此我们使用在每个机器人上实时运行的深度神经网络 (DeepNN)，仅根据机器人的 LiDAR 和里程测量来学习障碍函数 (BF)。 DeepNN 经过训练来学习区分安全区域和不安全区域的 BF。我们在不同场景下的模拟和实际 Turtlebot3 Burger 机器人上实现了我们提出的方法。实施结果表明了NMPC-LBF方法在确保机器人安全导航方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）和学习屏障函数（LBF）的分布式多机器人安全导航方法，用于未知环境中的静态和动态障碍物避障。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在未知环境中难以保证多机器人系统的安全性，尤其是在缺乏先验障碍物信息和动态障碍物的情况下，需要一种无需全局信息的分布式控制策略。
AI.method: 将学习屏障函数（LBF）嵌入NMPC框架，利用深度神经网络（DeepNN）实时学习安全区域与危险区域的分割函数，结合LiDAR和里程计数据实现分布式避障控制。
AI.result: 在仿真和实际Turtlebot3 Burger机器人平台上验证了NMPC-LBF方法的有效性，成功避免了机器人间及与障碍物的碰撞。
AI.conclusion: NMPC-LBF通过学习屏障函数实现了多机器人在未知环境中的安全导航，验证了其在模拟和实际场景中的有效性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jonggi Hong,Jaina Gandhi,Ernest Essuah Mensah,Farnaz Zamiri Zeraati,Ebrima Haddy Jarjue,Kyungjun Lee,Hernisa Kacorri
title: Blind Users Accessing Their Training Images in Teachable Object Recognizers
title_zh: 盲人用户在可教对象识别器中访问他们的训练图像
abstract: Iteration of training and evaluating a machine learning model is an important process to improve its performance. However, while teachable interfaces enable blind users to train and test an object recognizer with photos taken in their distinctive environment, accessibility of training iteration and evaluation steps has received little attention. Iteration assumes visual inspection of the training photos, which is inaccessible for blind users. We explore this challenge through MyCam, a mobile app that incorporates automatically estimated descriptors for non-visual access to the photos in the users' training sets. We explore how blind participants (N=12) interact with MyCam and the descriptors through an evaluation study in their homes. We demonstrate that the real-time photo-level descriptors enabled blind users to reduce photos with cropped objects, and that participants could add more variations by iterating through and accessing the quality of their training sets. Also, Participants found the app simple to use indicating that they could effectively train it and that the descriptors were useful. However, subjective responses were not reflected in the performance of their models, partially due to little variation in training and cluttered backgrounds.
summary: Iteration of training and evaluating a machine learning model is an important process to improve its performance. However, while teachable interfaces enable blind users to train and test an object recognizer with photos taken in their distinctive environment, accessibility of training iteration and evaluation steps has received little attention. Iteration assumes visual inspection of the training photos, which is inaccessible for blind users. We explore this challenge through MyCam, a mobile app that incorporates automatically estimated descriptors for non-visual access to the photos in the users' training sets. We explore how blind participants (N=12) interact with MyCam and the descriptors through an evaluation study in their homes. We demonstrate that the real-time photo-level descriptors enabled blind users to reduce photos with cropped objects, and that participants could add more variations by iterating through and accessing the quality of their training sets. Also, Participants found the app simple to use indicating that they could effectively train it and that the descriptors were useful. However, subjective responses were not reflected in the performance of their models, partially due to little variation in training and cluttered backgrounds.
abstract_zh: 迭代训练和评估机器学习模型是提高其性能的重要过程。然而，虽然可教学界面使盲人用户能够使用在其独特环境中拍摄的照片来训练和测试对象识别器，但训练迭代和评估步骤的可访问性却很少受到关注。迭代假设对训练照片进行目视检查，这对于盲人用户来说是无法访问的。我们通过 MyCam 探索这一挑战，这是一款移动应用程序，它包含自动估计的描述符，以便以非视觉方式访问用户训练集中的照片。我们通过在家中进行评估研究，探讨盲人参与者 (N=12) 如何与 MyCam 和描述符进行交互。我们证明，实时照片级描述符使盲人用户能够减少带有裁剪对象的照片，并且参与者可以通过迭代和访问训练集的质量来添加更多变化。此外，参与者发现该应用程序易于使用，表明他们可以有效地训练它并且描述符很有用。然而，主观反应并未反映在模型的性能中，部分原因是训练变化不大和背景混乱。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MyCam移动应用，通过自动估计的非视觉描述符帮助盲人用户访问和管理训练图像，以改进可教学物体识别器的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有可教学界面忽视了盲人用户在训练迭代和评估步骤中的可访问性需求，而传统方法依赖视觉检查训练图像，盲人用户无法直接获取反馈。
AI.method: 开发MyCam应用，利用实时图像描述符提供非视觉访问，并通过12名盲人用户在家中的评估研究，分析其与描述符的互动及训练效果。
AI.result: 描述符帮助用户减少裁剪物体的照片并增加训练集多样性，用户认为应用易用，但模型性能提升有限，可能因训练数据变化不足及背景杂乱。
AI.conclusion: 非视觉描述符能有效辅助盲人用户管理训练数据，但需进一步优化数据多样性和背景处理以提升模型性能。

result: 描述符帮助用户减少裁剪物体的照片并增加训练集多样性，用户认为应用易用，但模型性能提升有限，可能因训练数据变化不足及背景杂乱。
conclusion: 非视觉描述符能有效辅助盲人用户管理训练数据，但需进一步优化数据多样性和背景处理以提升模型性能。
search_text: Blind Users Accessing Their Training Images in Teachable Object Recognizers 盲人用户在可教对象识别器中访问他们的训练图像 Iteration of training and evaluating a machine learning model is an important process to improve its performance. However, while teachable interfaces enable blind users to train and test an object recognizer with photos taken in their distinctive environment, accessibility of training iteration and evaluation steps has received little attention. Iteration assumes visual inspection of the training photos, which is inaccessible for blind users. We explore this challenge through MyCam, a mobile app that incorporates automatically estimated descriptors for non-visual access to the photos in the users' training sets. We explore how blind participants (N=12) interact with MyCam and the descriptors through an evaluation study in their homes. We demonstrate that the real-time photo-level descriptors enabled blind users to reduce photos with cropped objects, and that participants could add more variations by iterating through and accessing the quality of their training sets. Also, Participants found the app simple to use indicating that they could effectively train it and that the descriptors were useful. However, subjective responses were not reflected in the performance of their models, partially due to little variation in training and cluttered backgrounds. 迭代训练和评估机器学习模型是提高其性能的重要过程。然而，虽然可教学界面使盲人用户能够使用在其独特环境中拍摄的照片来训练和测试对象识别器，但训练迭代和评估步骤的可访问性却很少受到关注。迭代假设对训练照片进行目视检查，这对于盲人用户来说是无法访问的。我们通过 MyCam 探索这一挑战，这是一款移动应用程序，它包含自动估计的描述符，以便以非视觉方式访问用户训练集中的照片。我们通过在家中进行评估研究，探讨盲人参与者 (N=12) 如何与 MyCam 和描述符进行交互。我们证明，实时照片级描述符使盲人用户能够减少带有裁剪对象的照片，并且参与者可以通过迭代和访问训练集的质量来添加更多变化。此外，参与者发现该应用程序易于使用，表明他们可以有效地训练它并且描述符很有用。然而，主观反应并未反映在模型的性能中，部分原因是训练变化不大和背景混乱。 本文提出MyCam移动应用，通过自动估计的非视觉描述符帮助盲人用户访问和管理训练图像，以改进可教学物体识别器的训练过程。 Jonggi Hong,Jaina Gandhi,Ernest Essuah Mensah,Farnaz Zamiri Zeraati,Ebrima Haddy Jarjue,Kyungjun Lee,Hernisa Kacorri cs.HC,cs.CV

authors_text: Kori Inkpen,Shreya Chappidi,Keri Mallari,Besmira Nushi,Divya Ramesh,Pietro Michelucci,Vani Mandava,Libuše Hannah Vepřek,Gabrielle Quinn
title: Advancing Human-AI Complementarity: The Impact of User Expertise and Algorithmic Tuning on Joint Decision Making
title_zh: 促进人类与人工智能的互补性：用户专业知识和算法调整对联合决策的影响
comment: Paper accepted and to be published in Transactions on Computer Human Interaction
comments: Paper accepted and to be published in Transactions on Computer Human Interaction
abstract: Human-AI collaboration for decision-making strives to achieve team performance that exceeds the performance of humans or AI alone. However, many factors can impact success of Human-AI teams, including a user's domain expertise, mental models of an AI system, trust in recommendations, and more. This work examines users' interaction with three simulated algorithmic models, all with similar accuracy but different tuning on their true positive and true negative rates. Our study examined user performance in a non-trivial blood vessel labeling task where participants indicated whether a given blood vessel was flowing or stalled. Our results show that while recommendations from an AI-Assistant can aid user decision making, factors such as users' baseline performance relative to the AI and complementary tuning of AI error types significantly impact overall team performance. Novice users improved, but not to the accuracy level of the AI. Highly proficient users were generally able to discern when they should follow the AI recommendation and typically maintained or improved their performance. Mid-performers, who had a similar level of accuracy to the AI, were most variable in terms of whether the AI recommendations helped or hurt their performance. In addition, we found that users' perception of the AI's performance relative on their own also had a significant impact on whether their accuracy improved when given AI recommendations. This work provides insights on the complexity of factors related to Human-AI collaboration and provides recommendations on how to develop human-centered AI algorithms to complement users in decision-making tasks.

abstract_zh: 人机协作决策致力于实现超越人类或人工智能单独表现的团队绩效。然而，许多因素会影响人类人工智能团队的成功，包括用户的领域专业知识、人工智能系统的心理模型、对建议的信任等等。这项工作检查了用户与三个模拟算法模型的交互，所有模型的准确度相似，但对真阳性率和真阴性率的调整不同。我们的研究检查了用户在一项重要的血管标记任务中的表现，其中参与者指示给定的血管是流动还是停滞。我们的结果表明，虽然人工智能助手的建议可以帮助用户决策，但用户相对于人工智能的基准性能以及人工智能错误类型的补充调整等因素会显着影响团队的整体绩效。新手用户有所提高，但还没有达到人工智能的准确度水平。高度熟练的用户通常能够辨别何时应该遵循人工智能的建议，并且通常能够维持或提高他们的表现。中等绩效者的准确度与人工智能相似，但在人工智能建议是否有助于或损害他们的绩效方面变化最大。此外，我们发现，用户对人工智能相对自身性能的看法也对他们在接受人工智能建议时准确性是否提高有重大影响。这项工作提供了对人机协作相关因素复杂性的见解，并就如何开发以人为中心的人工智能算法来补充用户的决策任务提供了建议。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了用户专业知识与算法调参对人机协作决策表现的影响，通过模拟不同调参的AI模型与用户在血管标注任务中的互动进行实验分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管人机协作旨在超越单一人类或AI的表现，但用户领域知识、对AI的信任及算法误差类型等复杂因素可能显著影响协作效果，现有研究缺乏对这些因素的系统分析。
AI.method: 设计三个准确率相近但真阳率/真阴率调参不同的AI模型，招募用户完成血管流动状态标注任务，根据用户基础表现水平（新手/中等/高技能）分组，分析AI建议对决策的影响。
AI.result: AI建议可提升新手表现但未达AI水平；高技能用户能有效识别何时采纳AI建议并保持/提升表现；中等水平用户表现波动最大。用户对AI性能的感知显著影响其准确性提升。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作效果受用户能力差异与AI误差类型互补性的双重影响，需开发更贴合用户需求的算法调参策略，以实现高效的人机协同决策。

authors_text: Shubham Dokania,Anbumani Subramanian,Manmohan Chandraker,C. V. Jawahar
title: TRoVE: Transforming Road Scene Datasets into Photorealistic Virtual Environments
title_zh: TRoVE：将道路场景数据集转换为逼真的虚拟环境
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: 18 pages, 5 figures, Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: High-quality structured data with rich annotations are critical components in intelligent vehicle systems dealing with road scenes. However, data curation and annotation require intensive investments and yield low-diversity scenarios. The recently growing interest in synthetic data raises questions about the scope of improvement in such systems and the amount of manual work still required to produce high volumes and variations of simulated data. This work proposes a synthetic data generation pipeline that utilizes existing datasets, like nuScenes, to address the difficulties and domain-gaps present in simulated datasets. We show that using annotations and visual cues from existing datasets, we can facilitate automated multi-modal data generation, mimicking real scene properties with high-fidelity, along with mechanisms to diversify samples in a physically meaningful way. We demonstrate improvements in mIoU metrics by presenting qualitative and quantitative experiments with real and synthetic data for semantic segmentation on the Cityscapes and KITTI-STEP datasets. All relevant code and data is released on github (https://github.com/shubham1810/trove_toolkit).
summary: High-quality structured data with rich annotations are critical components in intelligent vehicle systems dealing with road scenes. However, data curation and annotation require intensive investments and yield low-diversity scenarios. The recently growing interest in synthetic data raises questions about the scope of improvement in such systems and the amount of manual work still required to produce high volumes and variations of simulated data. This work proposes a synthetic data generation pipeline that utilizes existing datasets, like nuScenes, to address the difficulties and domain-gaps present in simulated datasets. We show that using annotations and visual cues from existing datasets, we can facilitate automated multi-modal data generation, mimicking real scene properties with high-fidelity, along with mechanisms to diversify samples in a physically meaningful way. We demonstrate improvements in mIoU metrics by presenting qualitative and quantitative experiments with real and synthetic data for semantic segmentation on the Cityscapes and KITTI-STEP datasets. All relevant code and data is released on github (https://github.com/shubham1810/trove_toolkit).
abstract_zh: 具有丰富注释的高质量结构化数据是处理道路场景的智能车辆系统的关键组成部分。然而，数据管理和注释需要大量投资并且产生低多样性场景。最近人们对合成数据的兴趣日益浓厚，引发了人们对此类系统的改进范围以及生成大量和变化的模拟数据仍然需要的手动工作量的疑问。这项工作提出了一种综合数据生成管道，利用现有数据集（如 nuScenes）来解决模拟数据集中存在的困难和领域差距。我们表明，使用现有数据集中的注释和视觉提示，我们可以促进自动多模式数据生成，以高保真度模仿真实场景属性，以及以物理上有意义的方式使样本多样化的机制。我们通过使用真实和合成数据对 Cityscapes 和 KITTI-STEP 数据集进行语义分割进行定性和定量实验，展示了 mIoU 指标的改进。所有相关代码和数据均发布在github上（https://github.com/shubham1810/trove_toolkit）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRoVE方法，通过现有道路场景数据集生成高保真虚拟环境，解决合成数据集的领域差距和多样性问题。
AI.motivation: 高质量标注数据获取成本高且场景多样性不足，合成数据虽具潜力但需大量人工干预，亟需自动化生成方法。
AI.method: 利用现有数据集（如nuScenes）的标注与视觉线索，自动化生成多模态合成数据，并通过物理规则增强样本多样性。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和KITTI-STEP数据集上，合成数据的语义分割mIoU指标显著提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TRoVE方法可高效生成高质量合成数据，降低人工成本，提升智能驾驶系统性能，相关资源已开源。

search_text: TRoVE: Transforming Road Scene Datasets into Photorealistic Virtual Environments TRoVE：将道路场景数据集转换为逼真的虚拟环境 High-quality structured data with rich annotations are critical components in intelligent vehicle systems dealing with road scenes. However, data curation and annotation require intensive investments and yield low-diversity scenarios. The recently growing interest in synthetic data raises questions about the scope of improvement in such systems and the amount of manual work still required to produce high volumes and variations of simulated data. This work proposes a synthetic data generation pipeline that utilizes existing datasets, like nuScenes, to address the difficulties and domain-gaps present in simulated datasets. We show that using annotations and visual cues from existing datasets, we can facilitate automated multi-modal data generation, mimicking real scene properties with high-fidelity, along with mechanisms to diversify samples in a physically meaningful way. We demonstrate improvements in mIoU metrics by presenting qualitative and quantitative experiments with real and synthetic data for semantic segmentation on the Cityscapes and KITTI-STEP datasets. All relevant code and data is released on github (https://github.com/shubham1810/trove_toolkit). 具有丰富注释的高质量结构化数据是处理道路场景的智能车辆系统的关键组成部分。然而，数据管理和注释需要大量投资并且产生低多样性场景。最近人们对合成数据的兴趣日益浓厚，引发了人们对此类系统的改进范围以及生成大量和变化的模拟数据仍然需要的手动工作量的疑问。这项工作提出了一种综合数据生成管道，利用现有数据集（如 nuScenes）来解决模拟数据集中存在的困难和领域差距。我们表明，使用现有数据集中的注释和视觉提示，我们可以促进自动多模式数据生成，以高保真度模仿真实场景属性，以及以物理上有意义的方式使样本多样化的机制。我们通过使用真实和合成数据对 Cityscapes 和 KITTI-STEP 数据集进行语义分割进行定性和定量实验，展示了 mIoU 指标的改进。所有相关代码和数据均发布在github上（https://github.com/shubham1810/trove_toolkit）。 本文提出TRoVE方法，通过现有道路场景数据集生成高保真虚拟环境，解决合成数据集的领域差距和多样性问题。 Shubham Dokania,Anbumani Subramanian,Manmohan Chandraker,C. V. Jawahar cs.CV

authors_text: Povilas Daniušis,Shubham Juneja,Lukas Kuzma,Virginijus Marcinkevičius
title: Measuring Statistical Dependencies via Maximum Norm and Characteristic Functions
title_zh: 通过最大范数和特征函数测量统计依赖性
abstract: In this paper, we focus on the problem of statistical dependence estimation using characteristic functions. We propose a statistical dependence measure, based on the maximum-norm of the difference between joint and product-marginal characteristic functions. The proposed measure can detect arbitrary statistical dependence between two random vectors of possibly different dimensions, is differentiable, and easily integrable into modern machine learning and deep learning pipelines. We also conduct experiments both with simulated and real data. Our simulations show, that the proposed method can measure statistical dependencies in high-dimensional, non-linear data, and is less affected by the curse of dimensionality, compared to the previous work in this line of research. The experiments with real data demonstrate the potential applicability of our statistical measure for two different empirical inference scenarios, showing statistically significant improvement in the performance characteristics when applied for supervised feature extraction and deep neural network regularization. In addition, we provide a link to the accompanying open-source repository https://bit.ly/3d4ch5I.
summary: In this paper, we focus on the problem of statistical dependence estimation using characteristic functions. We propose a statistical dependence measure, based on the maximum-norm of the difference between joint and product-marginal characteristic functions. The proposed measure can detect arbitrary statistical dependence between two random vectors of possibly different dimensions, is differentiable, and easily integrable into modern machine learning and deep learning pipelines. We also conduct experiments both with simulated and real data. Our simulations show, that the proposed method can measure statistical dependencies in high-dimensional, non-linear data, and is less affected by the curse of dimensionality, compared to the previous work in this line of research. The experiments with real data demonstrate the potential applicability of our statistical measure for two different empirical inference scenarios, showing statistically significant improvement in the performance characteristics when applied for supervised feature extraction and deep neural network regularization. In addition, we provide a link to the accompanying open-source repository https://bit.ly/3d4ch5I.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重点研究使用特征函数的统计依赖性估计问题。我们提出了一种基于联合特征函数和乘积边际特征函数之间差异的最大范数的统计依赖性度量。所提出的方法可以检测可能不同维度的两个随机向量之间的任意统计依赖性，是可微分的，并且可以轻松集成到现代机器学习和深度学习管道中。我们还使用模拟数据和真实数据进行实验。我们的模拟表明，与该研究领域的先前工作相比，所提出的方法可以测量高维非线性数据中的统计依赖性，并且受维数灾难的影响较小。真实数据的实验证明了我们的统计测量对于两种不同的经验推理场景的潜在适用性，表明当应用于监督特征提取和深度神经网络正则化时，性能特征在统计上显着改善。此外，我们还提供了随附的开源存储库的链接 https://bit.ly/3d4ch5I。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征函数最大范数差异的统计依赖性度量方法，用于检测高维非线性数据中的任意统计依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 现有统计依赖性度量方法在高维数据中易受维度灾难影响，且难以集成到现代机器学习流程中。
AI.method: 通过计算联合特征函数与边缘特征函数乘积之间的最大范数差异，构建可微分的依赖性度量指标，并验证其在机器学习管道中的适用性。
AI.result: 模拟和真实数据实验表明，该方法在高维非线性数据中表现优异，优于传统方法，且在监督特征提取和神经网络正则化任务中显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统计依赖性度量方法有效缓解了维度灾难问题，为高维数据分析和机器学习应用提供了新的工具。

authors_text: James Wensel,Hayat Ullah,Arslan Munir
title: ViT-ReT: Vision and Recurrent Transformer Neural Networks for Human Activity Recognition in Videos
title_zh: ViT-ReT：用于视频中人类活动识别的视觉和循环变压器神经网络
abstract: Human activity recognition is an emerging and important area in computer vision which seeks to determine the activity an individual or group of individuals are performing. The applications of this field ranges from generating highlight videos in sports, to intelligent surveillance and gesture recognition. Most activity recognition systems rely on a combination of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to perform feature extraction from the data and recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to determine the time dependent nature of the data. This paper proposes and designs two transformer neural networks for human activity recognition: a recurrent transformer (ReT), a specialized neural network used to make predictions on sequences of data, as well as a vision transformer (ViT), a transformer optimized for extracting salient features from images, to improve speed and scalability of activity recognition. We have provided an extensive comparison of the proposed transformer neural networks with the contemporary CNN and RNN-based human activity recognition models in terms of speed and accuracy.
summary: Human activity recognition is an emerging and important area in computer vision which seeks to determine the activity an individual or group of individuals are performing. The applications of this field ranges from generating highlight videos in sports, to intelligent surveillance and gesture recognition. Most activity recognition systems rely on a combination of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to perform feature extraction from the data and recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to determine the time dependent nature of the data. This paper proposes and designs two transformer neural networks for human activity recognition: a recurrent transformer (ReT), a specialized neural network used to make predictions on sequences of data, as well as a vision transformer (ViT), a transformer optimized for extracting salient features from images, to improve speed and scalability of activity recognition. We have provided an extensive comparison of the proposed transformer neural networks with the contemporary CNN and RNN-based human activity recognition models in terms of speed and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别是计算机视觉中一个新兴且重要的领域，旨在确定个人或群体正在执行的活动。该领域的应用范围从生成体育赛事精彩视频到智能监控和手势识别。大多数活动识别系统依靠卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN) 的组合来从数据中执行特征提取，以确定数据的时间相关性质。本文提出并设计了两种用于人类活动识别的变压器神经网络：循环变压器（ReT），一种用于对数据序列进行预测的专用神经网络；以及视觉变压器（ViT），一种针对从图像中提取显着特征进行优化的变压器，以提高活动识别的速度和可扩展性。我们对所提出的 Transformer 神经网络与当代 CNN 和基于 RNN 的人类活动识别模型在速度和准确性方面进行了广泛的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉Transformer（ViT）和循环Transformer（ReT）的新型神经网络架构，用于改进视频中的人类活动识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的人类活动识别系统依赖CNN和RNN的组合，但存在速度和可扩展性不足的问题。Transformer架构在特征提取和序列建模方面表现出潜力，值得探索其在该领域的应用。
AI.method: 设计了两个专用Transformer模型：ViT用于图像显著特征提取，ReT用于序列数据预测，并与现有CNN/RNN模型进行速度和准确率的对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的Transformer模型在保持高识别准确率的同时，显著提升了活动识别的速度和模型可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ViT-ReT架构通过引入Transformer机制，有效解决了传统方法在速度与规模上的局限性，为视频人类活动识别提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Toygun Basaklar,Suat Gumussoy,Umit Y. Ogras
title: PD-MORL: Preference-Driven Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Algorithm
title_zh: PD-MORL：偏好驱动的多目标强化学习算法
comment: 24 pages, 8 Figures, 9 Tables, Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023, https://openreview.net/forum?id=zS9sRyaPFlJ
comments: 24 pages, 8 Figures, 9 Tables, Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023, https://openreview.net/forum?id=zS9sRyaPFlJ
abstract: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) approaches have emerged to tackle many real-world problems with multiple conflicting objectives by maximizing a joint objective function weighted by a preference vector. These approaches find fixed customized policies corresponding to preference vectors specified during training. However, the design constraints and objectives typically change dynamically in real-life scenarios. Furthermore, storing a policy for each potential preference is not scalable. Hence, obtaining a set of Pareto front solutions for the entire preference space in a given domain with a single training is critical. To this end, we propose a novel MORL algorithm that trains a single universal network to cover the entire preference space scalable to continuous robotic tasks. The proposed approach, Preference-Driven MORL (PD-MORL), utilizes the preferences as guidance to update the network parameters. It also employs a novel parallelization approach to increase sample efficiency. We show that PD-MORL achieves up to 25% larger hypervolume for challenging continuous control tasks and uses an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters compared to prior approaches.
summary: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) approaches have emerged to tackle many real-world problems with multiple conflicting objectives by maximizing a joint objective function weighted by a preference vector. These approaches find fixed customized policies corresponding to preference vectors specified during training. However, the design constraints and objectives typically change dynamically in real-life scenarios. Furthermore, storing a policy for each potential preference is not scalable. Hence, obtaining a set of Pareto front solutions for the entire preference space in a given domain with a single training is critical. To this end, we propose a novel MORL algorithm that trains a single universal network to cover the entire preference space scalable to continuous robotic tasks. The proposed approach, Preference-Driven MORL (PD-MORL), utilizes the preferences as guidance to update the network parameters. It also employs a novel parallelization approach to increase sample efficiency. We show that PD-MORL achieves up to 25% larger hypervolume for challenging continuous control tasks and uses an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters compared to prior approaches.
abstract_zh: 多目标强化学习（MORL）方法已经出现，通过最大化由偏好向量加权的联合目标函数来解决许多具有多个相互冲突目标的现实问题。这些方法找到与训练期间指定的偏好向量相对应的固定定制策略。然而，设计约束和目标通常在现实生活场景中动态变化。此外，为每个潜在偏好存储策略是不可扩展的。因此，通过一次训练获得给定域中整个偏好空间的一组帕累托前沿解至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的 MORL 算法，该算法训练单个通用网络以覆盖可扩展至连续机器人任务的整个偏好空间。所提出的方法是偏好驱动的 MORL (PD-MORL)，利用偏好作为更新网络参数的指导。它还采用了一种新颖的并行化方法来提高样本效率。我们表明，与之前的方法相比，PD-MORL 在处理具有挑战性的连续控制任务时实现了高达 25% 的大体积，并且使用的可训练参数少了一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PD-MORL的多目标强化学习算法，旨在通过单次训练覆盖整个偏好空间，解决动态偏好和策略存储可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标强化学习方法需为每个偏好向量单独训练策略，难以适应动态变化的现实场景，且存储所有偏好策略的可行性较低。
AI.method: PD-MORL通过将偏好作为指导更新网络参数，并采用并行化方法提升样本效率，使用单一通用网络覆盖连续机器人任务的整个偏好空间。
AI.result: 在复杂连续控制任务中，PD-MORL的超体积指标比现有方法提升25%，且可训练参数数量减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: PD-MORL通过高效网络结构和偏好驱动机制，在动态多目标场景下实现了更优的性能与可扩展性。

search_text: PD-MORL: Preference-Driven Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Algorithm PD-MORL：偏好驱动的多目标强化学习算法 Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) approaches have emerged to tackle many real-world problems with multiple conflicting objectives by maximizing a joint objective function weighted by a preference vector. These approaches find fixed customized policies corresponding to preference vectors specified during training. However, the design constraints and objectives typically change dynamically in real-life scenarios. Furthermore, storing a policy for each potential preference is not scalable. Hence, obtaining a set of Pareto front solutions for the entire preference space in a given domain with a single training is critical. To this end, we propose a novel MORL algorithm that trains a single universal network to cover the entire preference space scalable to continuous robotic tasks. The proposed approach, Preference-Driven MORL (PD-MORL), utilizes the preferences as guidance to update the network parameters. It also employs a novel parallelization approach to increase sample efficiency. We show that PD-MORL achieves up to 25% larger hypervolume for challenging continuous control tasks and uses an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters compared to prior approaches. 多目标强化学习（MORL）方法已经出现，通过最大化由偏好向量加权的联合目标函数来解决许多具有多个相互冲突目标的现实问题。这些方法找到与训练期间指定的偏好向量相对应的固定定制策略。然而，设计约束和目标通常在现实生活场景中动态变化。此外，为每个潜在偏好存储策略是不可扩展的。因此，通过一次训练获得给定域中整个偏好空间的一组帕累托前沿解至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的 MORL 算法，该算法训练单个通用网络以覆盖可扩展至连续机器人任务的整个偏好空间。所提出的方法是偏好驱动的 MORL (PD-MORL)，利用偏好作为更新网络参数的指导。它还采用了一种新颖的并行化方法来提高样本效率。我们表明，与之前的方法相比，PD-MORL 在处理具有挑战性的连续控制任务时实现了高达 25% 的大体积，并且使用的可训练参数少了一个数量级。 本文提出了一种名为PD-MORL的多目标强化学习算法，旨在通过单次训练覆盖整个偏好空间，解决动态偏好和策略存储可扩展性问题。 Toygun Basaklar,Suat Gumussoy,Umit Y. authors_text: Pulkit Gera,Mohammad Reza Karimi Dastjerdi,Charles Renaud,P. J. Narayanan,Jean-François Lalonde
title: Casual Indoor HDR Radiance Capture from Omnidirectional Images
title_zh: 从全向图像中捕捉休闲室内 HDR 辐射亮度
abstract: We present PanoHDR-NeRF, a neural representation of the full HDR radiance field of an indoor scene, and a pipeline to capture it casually, without elaborate setups or complex capture protocols. First, a user captures a low dynamic range (LDR) omnidirectional video of the scene by freely waving an off-the-shelf camera around the scene. Then, an LDR2HDR network uplifts the captured LDR frames to HDR, which are used to train a tailored NeRF++ model. The resulting PanoHDR-NeRF can render full HDR images from any location of the scene. Through experiments on a novel test dataset of real scenes with the ground truth HDR radiance captured at locations not seen during training, we show that PanoHDR-NeRF predicts plausible HDR radiance from any scene point. We also show that the predicted radiance can synthesize correct lighting effects, enabling the augmentation of indoor scenes with synthetic objects that are lit correctly. Datasets and code are available at https://lvsn.github.io/PanoHDR-NeRF/.
summary: We present PanoHDR-NeRF, a neural representation of the full HDR radiance field of an indoor scene, and a pipeline to capture it casually, without elaborate setups or complex capture protocols. First, a user captures a low dynamic range (LDR) omnidirectional video of the scene by freely waving an off-the-shelf camera around the scene. Then, an LDR2HDR network uplifts the captured LDR frames to HDR, which are used to train a tailored NeRF++ model. The resulting PanoHDR-NeRF can render full HDR images from any location of the scene. Through experiments on a novel test dataset of real scenes with the ground truth HDR radiance captured at locations not seen during training, we show that PanoHDR-NeRF predicts plausible HDR radiance from any scene point. We also show that the predicted radiance can synthesize correct lighting effects, enabling the augmentation of indoor scenes with synthetic objects that are lit correctly. Datasets and code are available at https://lvsn.github.io/PanoHDR-NeRF/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PanoHDR-NeRF，这是室内场景的完整 HDR 辐射场的神经表示，以及随意捕获它的管道，无需复杂的设置或复杂的捕获协议。首先，用户通过在场景周围自由挥动现成的相机来捕获场景的低动态范围（LDR）全向视频。然后，LDR2HDR 网络将捕获的 LDR 帧提升为 HDR，用于训练定制的 NeRF++ 模型。由此产生的 PanoHDR-NeRF 可以从场景的任何位置渲染完整的 HDR 图像。通过在真实场景的新颖测试数据集上进行实验，并在训练期间未看到的位置捕获地面实况 HDR 辐射率，我们表明 PanoHDR-NeRF 可以预测任何场景点的合理 HDR 辐射率。我们还表明，预测的辐射可以合成正确的照明效果，从而能够使用正确照明的合成对象来增强室内场景。数据集和代码可在 https://lvsn.github.io/PanoHDR-NeRF/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过全景图像随意捕捉室内高动态范围（HDR）辐射场的方法PanoHDR-NeRF。
AI.motivation: 传统HDR捕捉需要复杂设备和严格协议，本文旨在实现无需专业设备的随意室内HDR采集。
AI.method: 使用普通相机拍摄LDR全景视频，通过LDR2HDR网络提升动态范围，训练NeRF++模型重建场景HDR辐射场。
AI.result: 在真实场景数据集验证中，模型可准确预测未见位置的HDR辐射，并实现合成物体的光照一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了从随意拍摄的全景图像中生成完整室内HDR辐射场，支持真实感光照合成。

authors_text: Bu Jin,Beiwen Tian,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou
title: Language-guided Semantic Style Transfer of 3D Indoor Scenes
title_zh: 3D 室内场景的语言引导语义风格迁移
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia PIES-ME 2022. Code: https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia PIES-ME 2022. Code: https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST
abstract: We address the new problem of language-guided semantic style transfer of 3D indoor scenes. The input is a 3D indoor scene mesh and several phrases that describe the target scene. Firstly, 3D vertex coordinates are mapped to RGB residues by a multi-layer perceptron. Secondly, colored 3D meshes are differentiablly rendered into 2D images, via a viewpoint sampling strategy tailored for indoor scenes. Thirdly, rendered 2D images are compared to phrases, via pre-trained vision-language models. Lastly, errors are back-propagated to the multi-layer perceptron to update vertex colors corresponding to certain semantic categories. We did large-scale qualitative analyses and A/B user tests, with the public ScanNet and SceneNN datasets. We demonstrate: (1) visually pleasing results that are potentially useful for multimedia applications. (2) rendering 3D indoor scenes from viewpoints consistent with human priors is important. (3) incorporating semantics significantly improve style transfer quality. (4) an HSV regularization term leads to results that are more consistent with inputs and generally rated better. Codes and user study toolbox are available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST
summary: We address the new problem of language-guided semantic style transfer of 3D indoor scenes. The input is a 3D indoor scene mesh and several phrases that describe the target scene. Firstly, 3D vertex coordinates are mapped to RGB residues by a multi-layer perceptron. Secondly, colored 3D meshes are differentiablly rendered into 2D images, via a viewpoint sampling strategy tailored for indoor scenes. Thirdly, rendered 2D images are compared to phrases, via pre-trained vision-language models. Lastly, errors are back-propagated to the multi-layer perceptron to update vertex colors corresponding to certain semantic categories. We did large-scale qualitative analyses and A/B user tests, with the public ScanNet and SceneNN datasets. We demonstrate: (1) visually pleasing results that are potentially useful for multimedia applications. (2) rendering 3D indoor scenes from viewpoints consistent with human priors is important. (3) incorporating semantics significantly improve style transfer quality. (4) an HSV regularization term leads to results that are more consistent with inputs and generally rated better. Codes and user study toolbox are available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST
abstract_zh: 我们解决了 3D 室内场景的语言引导语义风格迁移的新问题。输入是 3D 室内场景网格和描述目标场景的几个短语。首先，通过多层感知器将 3D 顶点坐标映射到 RGB 残差。其次，通过针对室内场景定制的视点采样策略，将彩色 3D 网格以可区分的方式渲染为 2D 图像。第三，通过预先训练的视觉语言模型将渲染的 2D 图像与短语进行比较。最后，错误被反向传播到多层感知器，以更新与某些语义类别相对应的顶点颜色。我们使用公共 ScanNet 和 SceneNN 数据集进行了大规模定性分析和 A/B 用户测试。我们证明：（1）视觉上令人愉悦的结果对多媒体应用程序可能有用。 (2) 从与人类先验一致的视角渲染 3D 室内场景非常重要。 (3)合并语义显着提高风格转换质量。 (4) HSV 正则化项导致的结果与输入更一致，并且通常评价更好。代码和用户研究工具箱可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言描述的3D室内场景语义风格迁移方法，通过将语言指令转化为视觉特征调整3D模型颜色。
AI.motivation: 现有3D风格迁移方法缺乏对语言指令的直接理解，难以实现精准的语义级风格转换，且忽视了视角一致性与语义信息的结合。
AI.method: 通过多层感知机将3D顶点坐标映射为RGB残差，采用室内场景定制视角采样策略渲染2D图像，利用预训练视觉-语言模型对齐图像与语言描述，最后通过反向传播优化顶点颜色，结合HSV正则化项提升结果一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法可生成视觉吸引力强的场景，视角一致性显著提升效果，语义信息整合使风格迁移质量提高，HSV正则化项获得更优用户评价。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的语义风格迁移需结合视角先验与语义信息，HSV正则化有效增强结果合理性，为多媒体应用提供新思路。

search_text: Language-guided Semantic Style Transfer of 3D Indoor Scenes 3D 室内场景的语言引导语义风格迁移 We address the new problem of language-guided semantic style transfer of 3D indoor scenes. The input is a 3D indoor scene mesh and several phrases that describe the target scene. Firstly, 3D vertex coordinates are mapped to RGB residues by a multi-layer perceptron. Secondly, colored 3D meshes are differentiablly rendered into 2D images, via a viewpoint sampling strategy tailored for indoor scenes. Thirdly, rendered 2D images are compared to phrases, via pre-trained vision-language models. Lastly, errors are back-propagated to the multi-layer perceptron to update vertex colors corresponding to certain semantic categories. We did large-scale qualitative analyses and A/B user tests, with the public ScanNet and SceneNN datasets. We demonstrate: (1) visually pleasing results that are potentially useful for multimedia applications. (2) rendering 3D indoor scenes from viewpoints consistent with human priors is important. (3) incorporating semantics significantly improve style transfer quality. (4) an HSV regularization term leads to results that are more consistent with inputs and generally rated better. Codes and user study toolbox are available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST 我们解决了 3D 室内场景的语言引导语义风格迁移的新问题。输入是 3D 室内场景网格和描述目标场景的几个短语。首先，通过多层感知器将 3D 顶点坐标映射到 RGB 残差。其次，通过针对室内场景定制的视点采样策略，将彩色 3D 网格以可区分的方式渲染为 2D 图像。第三，通过预先训练的视觉语言模型将渲染的 2D 图像与短语进行比较。最后，错误被反向传播到多层感知器，以更新与某些语义类别相对应的顶点颜色。我们使用公共 ScanNet 和 SceneNN 数据集进行了大规模定性分析和 A/B 用户测试。我们证明：（1）视觉上令人愉悦的结果对多媒体应用程序可能有用。 (2) 从与人类先验一致的视角渲染 3D 室内场景非常重要。 (3)合并语义显着提高风格转换质量。 (4) HSV 正则化项导致的结果与输入更一致，并且通常评价更好。代码和用户研究工具箱可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/LASST 获取 本文提出一种基于语言描述的3D室内场景语义风格迁移方法，通过将语言指令转化为视觉特征调整3D模型颜色。 Bu Jin,Beiwen Tian,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haonan Qiu,Yuming Jiang,Hang Zhou,Wayne Wu,Ziwei Liu
title: StyleFaceV: Face Video Generation via Decomposing and Recomposing Pretrained StyleGAN3
title_zh: StyleFaceV：通过分解和重组预训练的 StyleGAN3 生成人脸视频
abstract: Realistic generative face video synthesis has long been a pursuit in both computer vision and graphics community. However, existing face video generation methods tend to produce low-quality frames with drifted facial identities and unnatural movements. To tackle these challenges, we propose a principled framework named StyleFaceV, which produces high-fidelity identity-preserving face videos with vivid movements. Our core insight is to decompose appearance and pose information and recompose them in the latent space of StyleGAN3 to produce stable and dynamic results. Specifically, StyleGAN3 provides strong priors for high-fidelity facial image generation, but the latent space is intrinsically entangled. By carefully examining its latent properties, we propose our decomposition and recomposition designs which allow for the disentangled combination of facial appearance and movements. Moreover, a temporal-dependent model is built upon the decomposed latent features, and samples reasonable sequences of motions that are capable of generating realistic and temporally coherent face videos. Particularly, our pipeline is trained with a joint training strategy on both static images and high-quality video data, which is of higher data efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art face video generation results both qualitatively and quantitatively. Notably, StyleFaceV is capable of generating realistic $1024\times1024$ face videos even without high-resolution training videos.
summary: Realistic generative face video synthesis has long been a pursuit in both computer vision and graphics community. However, existing face video generation methods tend to produce low-quality frames with drifted facial identities and unnatural movements. To tackle these challenges, we propose a principled framework named StyleFaceV, which produces high-fidelity identity-preserving face videos with vivid movements. Our core insight is to decompose appearance and pose information and recompose them in the latent space of StyleGAN3 to produce stable and dynamic results. Specifically, StyleGAN3 provides strong priors for high-fidelity facial image generation, but the latent space is intrinsically entangled. By carefully examining its latent properties, we propose our decomposition and recomposition designs which allow for the disentangled combination of facial appearance and movements. Moreover, a temporal-dependent model is built upon the decomposed latent features, and samples reasonable sequences of motions that are capable of generating realistic and temporally coherent face videos. Particularly, our pipeline is trained with a joint training strategy on both static images and high-quality video data, which is of higher data efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art face video generation results both qualitatively and quantitatively. Notably, StyleFaceV is capable of generating realistic $1024\times1024$ face videos even without high-resolution training videos.
abstract_zh: 逼真的生成人脸视频合成长期以来一直是计算机视觉和图形界的追求。然而，现有的面部视频生成方法往往会产生低质量的帧，具有面部身份漂移和不自然的动作。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个名为 StyleFaceV 的原则框架，它可以生成具有生动动作的高保真身份保留面部视频。我们的核心见解是分解外观和姿势信息，并在 StyleGAN3 的潜在空间中重新组合它们，以产生稳定和动态的结果。具体来说，StyleGAN3 为高保真面部图像生成提供了强大的先验，但潜在空间本质上是纠缠的。通过仔细检查其潜在特性，我们提出了分解和重组设计，允许面部外观和动作的解开组合。此外，时间相关模型建立在分解的潜在特征的基础上，并对合理的运动序列进行采样，这些运动序列能够生成逼真且时间连贯的面部视频。特别是，我们的管道采用静态图像和高质量视频数据的联合训练策略进行训练，具有更高的数据效率。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在定性和定量上都实现了最先进的人脸视频生成结果。值得注意的是，即使没有高分辨率训练视频，StyleFaceV 也能够生成逼真的 $1024\times1024$ 人脸视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StyleFaceV的框架，用于生成高质量、身份保持且动态自然的面部视频。
AI.motivation: 现有的面部视频生成方法通常会产生低质量的帧，面部身份漂移且动作不自然，因此需要一种更有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过分解和重组StyleGAN3的潜在空间中的外观和姿态信息，构建了一个时间依赖模型，以生成高质量的面部视频。
AI.result: 实验表明，StyleFaceV在定性和定量上都取得了最先进的面部视频生成效果，甚至可以在没有高分辨率训练视频的情况下生成1024×1024的高质量面部视频。
AI.conclusion: StyleFaceV通过分解和重组潜在空间信息，成功解决了面部视频生成中的身份漂移和自然动作问题，具有较高的数据效率和生成质量。

search_text: StyleFaceV: Face Video Generation via Decomposing and Recomposing Pretrained StyleGAN3 StyleFaceV：通过分解和重组预训练的 StyleGAN3 生成人脸视频 Realistic generative face video synthesis has long been a pursuit in both computer vision and graphics community. However, existing face video generation methods tend to produce low-quality frames with drifted facial identities and unnatural movements. To tackle these challenges, we propose a principled framework named StyleFaceV, which produces high-fidelity identity-preserving face videos with vivid movements. Our core insight is to decompose appearance and pose information and recompose them in the latent space of StyleGAN3 to produce stable and dynamic results. Specifically, StyleGAN3 provides strong priors for high-fidelity facial image generation, but the latent space is intrinsically entangled. By carefully examining its latent properties, we propose our decomposition and recomposition designs which allow for the disentangled combination of facial appearance and movements. Moreover, a temporal-dependent model is built upon the decomposed latent features, and samples reasonable sequences of motions that are capable of generating realistic and temporally coherent face videos. Particularly, our pipeline is trained with a joint training strategy on both static images and high-quality video data, which is of higher data efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art face video generation results both qualitatively and quantitatively. Notably, StyleFaceV is capable of generating realistic $1024\times1024$ face videos even without high-resolution training videos. 逼真的生成人脸视频合成长期以来一直是计算机视觉和图形界的追求。然而，现有的面部视频生成方法往往会产生低质量的帧，具有面部身份漂移和不自然的动作。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个名为 StyleFaceV 的原则框架，它可以生成具有生动动作的高保真身份保留面部视频。我们的核心见解是分解外观和姿势信息，并在 StyleGAN3 的潜在空间中重新组合它们，以产生稳定和动态的结果。具体来说，StyleGAN3 为高保真面部图像生成提供了强大的先验，但潜在空间本质上是纠缠的。通过仔细检查其潜在特性，我们提出了分解和重组设计，允许面部外观和动作的解开组合。此外，时间相关模型建立在分解的潜在特征的基础上，并对合理的运动序列进行采样，这些运动序列能够生成逼真且时间连贯的面部视频。特别是，我们的管道采用静态图像和高质量视频数据的联合训练策略进行训练，具有更高的数据效率。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在定性和定量上都实现了最先进的人脸视频生成结果。值得注意的是，即使没有高分辨率训练视频，StyleFaceV 也能够生成逼真的 $1024\times1024$ 人脸视频。 本文提出了一种名为StyleFaceV的框架，用于生成高质量、身份保持且动态自然的面部视频。 Haonan Qiu,Yuming Jiang,Hang Zhou,Wayne Wu,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Laura Smith,Ilya Kostrikov,Sergey Levine
title: A Walk in the Park: Learning to Walk in 20 Minutes With Model-Free Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 在公园散步：通过无模型强化学习在 20 分钟内学会走路
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/walk-in-the-park
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/walk-in-the-park
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning is a promising approach to learning policies in uncontrolled environments that do not require domain knowledge. Unfortunately, due to sample inefficiency, deep RL applications have primarily focused on simulated environments. In this work, we demonstrate that the recent advancements in machine learning algorithms and libraries combined with a carefully tuned robot controller lead to learning quadruped locomotion in only 20 minutes in the real world. We evaluate our approach on several indoor and outdoor terrains which are known to be challenging for classical model-based controllers. We observe the robot to be able to learn walking gait consistently on all of these terrains. Finally, we evaluate our design decisions in a simulated environment.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning is a promising approach to learning policies in uncontrolled environments that do not require domain knowledge. Unfortunately, due to sample inefficiency, deep RL applications have primarily focused on simulated environments. In this work, we demonstrate that the recent advancements in machine learning algorithms and libraries combined with a carefully tuned robot controller lead to learning quadruped locomotion in only 20 minutes in the real world. We evaluate our approach on several indoor and outdoor terrains which are known to be challenging for classical model-based controllers. We observe the robot to be able to learn walking gait consistently on all of these terrains. Finally, we evaluate our design decisions in a simulated environment.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习是一种在不需要领域知识的不受控制的环境中学习策略的有前途的方法。不幸的是，由于样本效率低下，深度强化学习应用主要集中在模拟环境上。在这项工作中，我们证明了机器学习算法和库的最新进展与精心调整的机器人控制器相结合，可以在现实世界中仅用 20 分钟即可学习四足动物的运动。我们在几种室内和室外地形上评估了我们的方法，这些地形对于经典的基于模型的控制器来说是具有挑战性的。我们观察到机器人能够在所有这些地形上一致地学习行走步态。最后，我们在模拟环境中评估我们的设计决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无模型强化学习的方法，使四足机器人能在现实世界中20分钟内学会行走。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习因样本效率低难以直接应用于现实世界，而传统模型控制器在复杂地形中表现不足。
AI.method: 结合最新机器学习算法库与定制化机器人控制器，采用无模型强化学习框架进行快速训练。
AI.result: 机器人成功在多种室内外复杂地形中稳定学习行走步态，模拟环境验证了设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了无模型强化学习在现实世界快速训练机器人运动能力的可行性，为实际应用提供新思路。

We evaluate our approach on several indoor and outdoor terrains which are known to be challenging for classical model-based controllers. We observe the robot to be able to learn walking gait consistently on all of these terrains. Finally, we evaluate our design decisions in a simulated environment. 深度强化学习是一种在不需要领域知识的不受控制的环境中学习策略的有前途的方法。不幸的是，由于样本效率低下，深度强化学习应用主要集中在模拟环境上。在这项工作中，我们证明了机器学习算法和库的最新进展与精心调整的机器人控制器相结合，可以在现实世界中仅用 20 分钟即可学习四足动物的运动。我们在几种室内和室外地形上评估了我们的方法，这些地形对于经典的基于模型的控制器来说是具有挑战性的。我们观察到机器人能够在所有这些地形上一致地学习行走步态。最后，我们在模拟环境中评估我们的设计决策。 本文提出一种基于无模型强化学习的方法，使四足机器人能在现实世界中20分钟内学会行走。 Laura Smith,Ilya Kostrikov,Sergey Levine cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Prakrit Joshi,Omar Hisham Alsadoon,Abeer Alsadoon,Nada AlSallami,Tarik A. Rashid,P. W. C. Prasad,Sami Haddad
title: Deep Learning for Size and Microscope Feature Extraction and Classification in Oral Cancer: Enhanced Convolution Neural Network
title_zh: 口腔癌大小和显微镜特征提取和分类的深度学习：增强型卷积神经网络
abstract: Background and Aim: Over-fitting issue has been the reason behind deep learning technology not being successfully implemented in oral cancer images classification. The aims of this research were reducing overfitting for accurately producing the required dimension reduction feature map through Deep Learning algorithm using Convolutional Neural Network. Methodology: The proposed system consists of Enhanced Convolutional Neural Network that uses an autoencoder technique to increase the efficiency of the feature extraction process and compresses information. In this technique, unpooling and deconvolution is done to generate the input data to minimize the difference between input and output data. Moreover, it extracts characteristic features from the input data set to regenerate input data from those features by learning a network to reduce overfitting. Results: Different accuracy and processing time value is achieved while using different sample image group of Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy (CLE) images. The results showed that the proposed solution is better than the current system. Moreover, the proposed system has improved the classification accuracy by 5~ 5.5% on average and reduced the average processing time by 20 ~ 30 milliseconds. Conclusion: The proposed system focuses on the accurate classification of oral cancer cells of different anatomical locations from the CLE images. Finally, this study enhances the accuracy and processing time using the autoencoder method that solves the overfitting problem.
summary: Background and Aim: Over-fitting issue has been the reason behind deep learning technology not being successfully implemented in oral cancer images classification. The aims of this research were reducing overfitting for accurately producing the required dimension reduction feature map through Deep Learning algorithm using Convolutional Neural Network. In this technique, unpooling and deconvolution is done to generate the input data to minimize the difference between input and output data. Moreover, it extracts characteristic features from the input data set to regenerate input data from those features by learning a network to reduce overfitting. Results: Different accuracy and processing time value is achieved while using different sample image group of Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy (CLE) images. The results showed that the proposed solution is better than the current system. Moreover, the proposed system has improved the classification accuracy by 5~ 5.5% on average and reduced the average processing time by 20 ~ 30 milliseconds. Conclusion: The proposed system focuses on the accurate classification of oral cancer cells of different anatomical locations from the CLE images. Finally, this study enhances the accuracy and processing time using the autoencoder method that solves the overfitting problem.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：过度拟合问题一直是深度学习技术未能成功应用于口腔癌图像分类的原因。本研究的目的是通过使用卷积神经网络的深度学习算法减少过度拟合，以准确生成所需的降维特征图。方法：所提出的系统由增强型卷积神经网络组成，该网络使用自动编码器技术来提高特征提取过程的效率并压缩信息。在该技术中，进行反池化和反卷积来生成输入数据，以最小化输入和输出数据之间的差异。此外，它从输入数据集中提取特征特征，通过学习网络从这些特征重新生成输入数据以减少过度拟合。结果：使用不同的共焦激光内窥镜（CLE）图像样本图像组时，获得了不同的精度和处理时间值。结果表明，所提出的解决方案优于当前系统。此外，该系统的分类精度平均提高了5~5.5%，平均处理时间减少了20~30毫秒。结论：所提出的系统侧重于从 CLE 图像中对不同解剖位置的口腔癌细胞进行准确分类。最后，本研究使用解决过度拟合问题的自动编码器方法提高了准确性和处理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强型卷积神经网络（CNN），通过自编码器技术解决口腔癌图像分类中的过拟合问题，并提升分类准确率和处理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在口腔癌图像分类中因过拟合问题导致效果不佳，需通过特征提取和降维优化模型性能。
AI.method: 采用自编码器技术结合反池化和反卷积操作，压缩信息并重建输入数据，以提取关键特征并减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在共聚焦激光内镜（CLE）图像上，分类准确率平均提升5~5.5%，处理时间平均减少20~30毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自编码器有效解决了过拟合问题，显著提升了口腔癌细胞分类的准确性和处理效率。

authors_text: Jeova Farias Sales Rocha Neto
title: Estimating Appearance Models for Image Segmentation via Tensor Factorization
title_zh: 通过张量分解估计图像分割的外观模型
abstract: Image Segmentation is one of the core tasks in Computer Vision and solving it often depends on modeling the image appearance data via the color distributions of each it its constituent regions. Whereas many segmentation algorithms handle the appearance models dependence using alternation or implicit methods, we propose here a new approach to directly estimate them from the image without prior information on the underlying segmentation. Our method uses local high order color statistics from the image as an input to tensor factorization-based estimator for latent variable models. This approach is able to estimate models in multiregion images and automatically output the regions proportions without prior user interaction, overcoming the drawbacks from a prior attempt to this problem. We also demonstrate the performance of our proposed method in many challenging synthetic and real imaging scenarios and show that it leads to an efficient segmentation algorithm.
summary: Image Segmentation is one of the core tasks in Computer Vision and solving it often depends on modeling the image appearance data via the color distributions of each it its constituent regions. Whereas many segmentation algorithms handle the appearance models dependence using alternation or implicit methods, we propose here a new approach to directly estimate them from the image without prior information on the underlying segmentation. Our method uses local high order color statistics from the image as an input to tensor factorization-based estimator for latent variable models. This approach is able to estimate models in multiregion images and automatically output the regions proportions without prior user interaction, overcoming the drawbacks from a prior attempt to this problem. We also demonstrate the performance of our proposed method in many challenging synthetic and real imaging scenarios and show that it leads to an efficient segmentation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是计算机视觉的核心任务之一，解决它通常取决于通过每个组成区域的颜色分布对图像外观数据进行建模。尽管许多分割算法使用交替或隐式方法处理外观模型依赖性，但我们在这里提出了一种新方法，可以直接从图像中估计它们，而无需有关基础分割的先验信息。我们的方法使用图像中的局部高阶颜色统计数据作为潜变量模型的基于张量分解的估计器的输入。这种方法能够估计多区域图像中的模型并自动输出区域比例，无需事先用户交互，克服了先前尝试解决此问题的缺点。我们还展示了我们提出的方法在许多具有挑战性的合成和真实成像场景中的性能，并表明它可以产生有效的分割算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过张量分解直接估计图像分割中外观模型的新方法，无需先验分割信息。
AI.motivation: 现有分割算法依赖交替或隐式方法处理外观模型依赖，存在效率低、需人工交互等缺陷，需更直接的估计方法。
AI.method: 利用图像局部高阶颜色统计量作为输入，通过张量分解构建潜在变量模型估计器，自动输出多区域比例。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像场景中验证方法有效性，证明其能高效实现图像分割。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了传统方法的不足，通过直接估计外观模型实现无需人工交互的自动分割，具有较高实用性。

authors_text: Hendrik Strobelt,Albert Webson,Victor Sanh,Benjamin Hoover,Johanna Beyer,Hanspeter Pfister,Alexander M. Rush
title: Interactive and Visual Prompt Engineering for Ad-hoc Task Adaptation with Large Language Models
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型进行临时任务适应的交互式和视觉提示工程
abstract: State-of-the-art neural language models can now be used to solve ad-hoc language tasks through zero-shot prompting without the need for supervised training. This approach has gained popularity in recent years, and researchers have demonstrated prompts that achieve strong accuracy on specific NLP tasks. However, finding a prompt for new tasks requires experimentation. Different prompt templates with different wording choices lead to significant accuracy differences. PromptIDE allows users to experiment with prompt variations, visualize prompt performance, and iteratively optimize prompts. We developed a workflow that allows users to first focus on model feedback using small data before moving on to a large data regime that allows empirical grounding of promising prompts using quantitative measures of the task. The tool then allows easy deployment of the newly created ad-hoc models. We demonstrate the utility of PromptIDE (demo at http://prompt.vizhub.ai) and our workflow using several real-world use cases.
summary: State-of-the-art neural language models can now be used to solve ad-hoc language tasks through zero-shot prompting without the need for supervised training. This approach has gained popularity in recent years, and researchers have demonstrated prompts that achieve strong accuracy on specific NLP tasks. However, finding a prompt for new tasks requires experimentation. Different prompt templates with different wording choices lead to significant accuracy differences. PromptIDE allows users to experiment with prompt variations, visualize prompt performance, and iteratively optimize prompts. We developed a workflow that allows users to first focus on model feedback using small data before moving on to a large data regime that allows empirical grounding of promising prompts using quantitative measures of the task. The tool then allows easy deployment of the newly created ad-hoc models. We demonstrate the utility of PromptIDE (demo at http://prompt.vizhub.ai) and our workflow using several real-world use cases.
abstract_zh: 最先进的神经语言模型现在可用于通过零样本提示来解决临时语言任务，而无需监督训练。这种方法近年来越来越受欢迎，研究人员已经展示了在特定 NLP 任务上实现极高准确性的提示。然而，找到新任务的提示需要进行实验。不同的提示模板和不同的措辞选择会导致显着的准确性差异。 PromptIDE 允许用户试验提示变化、可视化提示性能并迭代优化提示。我们开发了一个工作流程，允许用户首先使用小数据关注模型反馈，然后再转向大数据体系，该体系允许使用任务的定量测量来对有希望的提示进行经验基础。然后，该工具可以轻松部署新创建的临时模型。我们使用几个实际用例演示了 PromptIDE 的实用性（演示位于 http://prompt.vizhub.ai）和我们的工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式和可视化提示工程工具PromptIDE，用于通过零样本提示快速适应新任务，并优化大型语言模型的即兴任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本提示方法在解决新任务时需大量人工实验，不同提示模板效果差异显著，缺乏系统化工具支持高效优化。
AI.method: 开发PromptIDE工具，采用两阶段工作流：先基于小数据集通过模型反馈迭代优化提示，再利用大数据集量化验证，最终部署优化后的提示模型。
AI.result: 通过多个实际案例验证PromptIDE的有效性，工具可显著提升提示优化效率并实现新任务的快速适配。
AI.conclusion: PromptIDE为大型语言模型的即兴任务适应提供了交互式、可视化的系统化解决方案，有效降低了提示工程的实验成本。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式和可视化提示工程工具PromptIDE，用于通过零样本提示快速适应新任务，并优化大型语言模型的即兴任务表现。
ai_content.motivation: 现有零样本提示方法在解决新任务时需大量人工实验，不同提示模板效果差异显著，缺乏系统化工具支持高效优化。

search_text: Interactive and Visual Prompt Engineering for Ad-hoc Task Adaptation with Large Language Models 使用大型语言模型进行临时任务适应的交互式和视觉提示工程 State-of-the-art neural language models can now be used to solve ad-hoc language tasks through zero-shot prompting without the need for supervised training. This approach has gained popularity in recent years, and researchers have demonstrated prompts that achieve strong accuracy on specific NLP tasks. However, finding a prompt for new tasks requires experimentation. Different prompt templates with different wording choices lead to significant accuracy differences. PromptIDE allows users to experiment with prompt variations, visualize prompt performance, and iteratively optimize prompts. We developed a workflow that allows users to first focus on model feedback using small data before moving on to a large data regime that allows empirical grounding of promising prompts using quantitative measures of the task. The tool then allows easy deployment of the newly created ad-hoc models. We demonstrate the utility of PromptIDE (demo at http://prompt.vizhub.ai) and our workflow using several real-world use cases. 最先进的神经语言模型现在可用于通过零样本提示来解决临时语言任务，而无需监督训练。这种方法近年来越来越受欢迎，研究人员已经展示了在特定 NLP 任务上实现极高准确性的提示。然而，找到新任务的提示需要进行实验。不同的提示模板和不同的措辞选择会导致显着的准确性差异。 PromptIDE 允许用户试验提示变化、可视化提示性能并迭代优化提示。我们开发了一个工作流程，允许用户首先使用小数据关注模型反馈，然后再转向大数据体系，该体系允许使用任务的定量测量来对有希望的提示进行经验基础。然后，该工具可以轻松部署新创建的临时模型。我们使用几个实际用例演示了 PromptIDE 的实用性（演示位于 http://prompt.vizhub.ai）和我们的工作流程。 本文提出一种交互式和可视化提示工程工具PromptIDE，用于通过零样本提示快速适应新任务，并优化大型语言模型的即兴任务表现。 Hendrik Strobelt,Albert Webson,Victor Sanh,Benjamin Hoover,Johanna Beyer,Hanspeter Pfister,Alexander M. Rush cs.CL,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Srinivasan Arunachalam,Sergey Bravyi,Arkopal Dutt,Theodore J. Yoder
title: Optimal algorithms for learning quantum phase states
title_zh: 学习量子相态的最佳算法
comment: 39 pages, corrected proof on learning phase states with PGMs, accepted to TQC 2023
comments: 39 pages, corrected proof on learning phase states with PGMs, accepted to TQC 2023
abstract: We analyze the complexity of learning $n$-qubit quantum phase states. A degree-$d$ phase state is defined as a superposition of all $2^n$ basis vectors $x$ with amplitudes proportional to $(-1)^{f(x)}$, where $f$ is a degree-$d$ Boolean polynomial over $n$ variables. We show that the sample complexity of learning an unknown degree-$d$ phase state is $Θ(n^d)$ if we allow separable measurements and $Θ(n^{d-1})$ if we allow entangled measurements. Our learning algorithm based on separable measurements has runtime $\textsf{poly}(n)$ (for constant $d$) and is well-suited for near-term demonstrations as it requires only single-qubit measurements in the Pauli $X$ and $Z$ bases. We show similar bounds on the sample complexity for learning generalized phase states with complex-valued amplitudes. We further consider learning phase states when $f$ has sparsity-$s$, degree-$d$ in its $\mathbb{F}_2$ representation (with sample complexity $O(2^d sn)$), $f$ has Fourier-degree-$t$ (with sample complexity $O(2^{2t})$), and learning quadratic phase states with $\varepsilon$-global depolarizing noise (with sample complexity $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$). These learning algorithms give us a procedure to learn the diagonal unitaries of the Clifford hierarchy and IQP~circuits.
summary: We analyze the complexity of learning $n$-qubit quantum phase states. A degree-$d$ phase state is defined as a superposition of all $2^n$ basis vectors $x$ with amplitudes proportional to $(-1)^{f(x)}$, where $f$ is a degree-$d$ Boolean polynomial over $n$ variables. We show that the sample complexity of learning an unknown degree-$d$ phase state is $Θ(n^d)$ if we allow separable measurements and $Θ(n^{d-1})$ if we allow entangled measurements. Our learning algorithm based on separable measurements has runtime $\textsf{poly}(n)$ (for constant $d$) and is well-suited for near-term demonstrations as it requires only single-qubit measurements in the Pauli $X$ and $Z$ bases. We show similar bounds on the sample complexity for learning generalized phase states with complex-valued amplitudes. We further consider learning phase states when $f$ has sparsity-$s$, degree-$d$ in its $\mathbb{F}_2$ representation (with sample complexity $O(2^d sn)$), $f$ has Fourier-degree-$t$ (with sample complexity $O(2^{2t})$), and learning quadratic phase states with $\varepsilon$-global depolarizing noise (with sample complexity $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$). These learning algorithms give us a procedure to learn the diagonal unitaries of the Clifford hierarchy and IQP~circuits.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了学习 $n$-qubit 量子相态的复杂性。 $d$ 度相态定义为所有 $2^n$ 基向量 $x$ 的叠加，其幅度与 $(-1)^{f(x)}$ 成比例，其中 $f$ 是 $n$ 变量上的 $d$ 度布尔多项式。我们表明，如果我们允许可分离测量，学习未知度-$d$ 相状态的样本复杂度为 $θ(n^d)$，如果我们允许纠缠测量，则学习复杂度为 $θ(n^{d-1})$。我们基于可分离测量的学习算法具有运行时 $\textsf{poly}(n)$ （对于常数 $d$），并且非常适合近期演示，因为它只需要泡利 $X$ 和 $Z$ 基中的单量子位测量。我们展示了学习具有复值幅度的广义相态的样本复杂性的类似界限。我们进一步考虑当$f$在其$\mathbb{F}_2$表示中具有稀疏度-$s$、度数-$d$（样本复杂度为$O(2^d sn)$）、$f$具有傅立叶度-$t$（样本复杂度为$O(2^{2t})$）时学习相态，以及学习具有$\varepsilon$-全局去极化噪声的二次相态（样本复杂度为$O(2^{2t})$） $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$)。这些学习算法为我们提供了学习 Clifford 层次结构和 IQP~电路的对角幺正的过程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了学习n量子位量子相位态的复杂度，分析了在不同测量方式下的样本复杂度并提出了相应的学习算法。
AI.motivation: 量子相位态在量子计算中具有重要应用，但其学习复杂度尚未明确，需探索高效的学习算法以支持近期量子实验。
AI.method: 通过分析布尔多项式定义的相位态结构，结合分离测量与纠缠测量的样本复杂度差异，设计多项式时间算法并考虑稀疏性、傅里叶度及噪声等扩展场景。
AI.result: 分离测量下样本复杂度为Θ(n^d)，纠缠测量为Θ(n^{d-1})；针对稀疏性、傅里叶度及噪声场景给出具体复杂度界，并可应用于学习克利福德层级和IQP电路的对角酉矩阵。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为学习量子相位态提供了理论保证和实用方法，为近期量子计算演示奠定了基础。
