authors_text: Ye Ma,Lu Zong
title: Parallel Hierarchical Transformer with Attention Alignment for Abstractive Multi-Document Summarization
title_zh: 用于抽象多文档摘要的具有注意力对齐的并行分层变压器
comment: A work in 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.06891
comments: A work in 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.06891
abstract: In comparison to single-document summarization, abstractive Multi-Document Summarization (MDS) brings challenges on the representation and coverage of its lengthy and linked sources. This study develops a Parallel Hierarchical Transformer (PHT) with attention alignment for MDS. By incorporating word- and paragraph-level multi-head attentions, the hierarchical architecture of PHT allows better processing of dependencies at both token and document levels. To guide the decoding towards a better coverage of the source documents, the attention-alignment mechanism is then introduced to calibrate beam search with predicted optimal attention distributions. Based on the WikiSum data, a comprehensive evaluation is conducted to test improvements on MDS by the proposed architecture. By better handling the inner- and cross-document information, results in both ROUGE and human evaluation suggest that our hierarchical model generates summaries of higher quality relative to other Transformer-based baselines at relatively low computational cost.
summary: In comparison to single-document summarization, abstractive Multi-Document Summarization (MDS) brings challenges on the representation and coverage of its lengthy and linked sources. This study develops a Parallel Hierarchical Transformer (PHT) with attention alignment for MDS. By incorporating word- and paragraph-level multi-head attentions, the hierarchical architecture of PHT allows better processing of dependencies at both token and document levels. To guide the decoding towards a better coverage of the source documents, the attention-alignment mechanism is then introduced to calibrate beam search with predicted optimal attention distributions. Based on the WikiSum data, a comprehensive evaluation is conducted to test improvements on MDS by the proposed architecture. By better handling the inner- and cross-document information, results in both ROUGE and human evaluation suggest that our hierarchical model generates summaries of higher quality relative to other Transformer-based baselines at relatively low computational cost.
abstract_zh: 与单文档摘要相比，抽象的多文档摘要（MDS）对其冗长且链接的来源的表示和覆盖带来了挑战。本研究开发了一种具有 MDS 注意力对齐功能的并行分层变压器 (PHT)。通过合并单词级和段落级多头注意力，PHT 的分层架构允许更好地处理标记和文档级别的依赖关系。为了引导解码更好地覆盖源文档，然后引入注意力对齐机制，用预测的最佳注意力分布来校准波束搜索。基于 WikiSum 数据，进行了全面评估，以测试所提出的架构对 MDS 的改进。通过更好地处理内部和跨文档信息，ROUGE 和人类评估的结果表明，我们的分层模型以相对较低的计算成本生成相对于其他基于 Transformer 的基线更高质量的摘要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种并行分层Transformer模型（PHT），通过注意力对齐机制改进多文档摘要生成，解决长文本和跨文档信息处理难题。
AI.motivation: 多文档摘要面临源文本长度长、文档间关联复杂导致的表示与覆盖不足问题，传统方法难以有效处理跨文档信息依赖。
AI.method: 构建分层架构融合词级和段落级多头注意力，引入注意力对齐机制校准束搜索，通过预测最优注意力分布提升解码覆盖性。
AI.result: 在WikiSum数据集上，模型在ROUGE指标和人工评估中均优于其他Transformer基线，在保持较低计算成本下生成更高质量摘要。
AI.conclusion: PHT模型通过分层注意力与对齐机制有效提升了多文档摘要质量，为复杂文档信息整合提供了高效解决方案。

conclusion: PHT模型通过分层注意力与对齐机制有效提升了多文档摘要质量，为复杂文档信息整合提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Parallel Hierarchical Transformer with Attention Alignment for Abstractive Multi-Document Summarization 用于抽象多文档摘要的具有注意力对齐的并行分层变压器 In comparison to single-document summarization, abstractive Multi-Document Summarization (MDS) brings challenges on the representation and coverage of its lengthy and linked sources. This study develops a Parallel Hierarchical Transformer (PHT) with attention alignment for MDS. By incorporating word- and paragraph-level multi-head attentions, the hierarchical architecture of PHT allows better processing of dependencies at both token and document levels. To guide the decoding towards a better coverage of the source documents, the attention-alignment mechanism is then introduced to calibrate beam search with predicted optimal attention distributions. Based on the WikiSum data, a comprehensive evaluation is conducted to test improvements on MDS by the proposed architecture. By better handling the inner- and cross-document information, results in both ROUGE and human evaluation suggest that our hierarchical model generates summaries of higher quality relative to other Transformer-based baselines at relatively low computational cost. 与单文档摘要相比，抽象的多文档摘要（MDS）对其冗长且链接的来源的表示和覆盖带来了挑战。本研究开发了一种具有 MDS 注意力对齐功能的并行分层变压器 (PHT)。通过合并单词级和段落级多头注意力，PHT 的分层架构允许更好地处理标记和文档级别的依赖关系。为了引导解码更好地覆盖源文档，然后引入注意力对齐机制，用预测的最佳注意力分布来校准波束搜索。基于 WikiSum 数据，进行了全面评估，以测试所提出的架构对 MDS 的改进。通过更好地处理内部和跨文档信息，ROUGE 和人类评估的结果表明，我们的分层模型以相对较低的计算成本生成相对于其他基于 Transformer 的基线更高质量的摘要。 本文提出一种并行分层Transformer模型（PHT），通过注意力对齐机制改进多文档摘要生成，解决长文本和跨文档信息处理难题。 Ye Ma,Lu Zong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Pedro C. Neto,Tiago Gonçalves,Marco Huber,Naser Damer,Ana F. Sequeira,Jaime S. Cardoso
title: OrthoMAD: Morphing Attack Detection Through Orthogonal Identity Disentanglement
title_zh: OrthoMAD：通过正交身份解耦改变攻击检测
abstract: Morphing attacks are one of the many threats that are constantly affecting deep face recognition systems. It consists of selecting two faces from different individuals and fusing them into a final image that contains the identity information of both. In this work, we propose a novel regularisation term that takes into account the existent identity information in both and promotes the creation of two orthogonal latent vectors. We evaluate our proposed method (OrthoMAD) in five different types of morphing in the FRLL dataset and evaluate the performance of our model when trained on five distinct datasets. With a small ResNet-18 as the backbone, we achieve state-of-the-art results in the majority of the experiments, and competitive results in the others. The code of this paper will be publicly available.
summary: Morphing attacks are one of the many threats that are constantly affecting deep face recognition systems. It consists of selecting two faces from different individuals and fusing them into a final image that contains the identity information of both. In this work, we propose a novel regularisation term that takes into account the existent identity information in both and promotes the creation of two orthogonal latent vectors. We evaluate our proposed method (OrthoMAD) in five different types of morphing in the FRLL dataset and evaluate the performance of our model when trained on five distinct datasets. With a small ResNet-18 as the backbone, we achieve state-of-the-art results in the majority of the experiments, and competitive results in the others. The code of this paper will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 变形攻击是不断影响深度人脸识别系统的众多威胁之一。它包括从不同的个体中选择两张面孔并将它们融合成包含两者身份信息的最终图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的正则化项，它考虑了两者中现有的身份信息，并促进了两个正交潜在向量的创建。我们在 FRLL 数据集中的五种不同类型的变形中评估我们提出的方法 (OrthoMAD)，并评估我们的模型在五个不同数据集上训练时的性能。以小型 ResNet-18 作为主干，我们在大多数实验中取得了最先进的结果，并在其他实验中取得了有竞争力的结果。本文的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为OrthoMAD的新方法，通过正交身份解耦技术检测形态攻击，利用正则化项生成正交潜在向量以提升深度人脸识别系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 形态攻击通过融合不同个体的面部信息欺骗人脸识别系统，现有方法难以有效检测此类攻击，需探索更鲁棒的防御机制。
AI.method: 设计正则化项分离身份信息，强制生成两个正交的潜在向量，并基于ResNet-18主干网络实现形态攻击检测。
AI.result: 在FRLL数据集五种形态攻击类型上取得多数实验的SOTA结果，在其他数据集上表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 正交身份解耦方法有效提升形态攻击检测性能，未来将公开代码以促进相关研究。

authors_text: Faezeh Amouzegar,Hamid Mirvaziri,Mostafa Ghazizadeh-Ahsaee,Mahdi Shariatzadeh
title: Diagnosis of COVID-19 disease using CT scan images and pre-trained models
title_zh: 使用 CT 扫描图像和预训练模型诊断 COVID-19 疾病
abstract: Diagnosis of COVID-19 is necessary to prevent and control the disease. Deep learning methods have been considered a fast and accurate method. In this paper, by the parallel combination of three well-known pre-trained networks, we attempted to distinguish coronavirus-infected samples from healthy samples. The negative log-likelihood loss function has been used for model training. CT scan images in the SARS-CoV-2 dataset were used for diagnosis. The SARS-CoV-2 dataset contains 2482 images of lung CT scans, of which 1252 images belong to COVID-19-infected samples. The proposed model was close to 97% accurate.
summary: Diagnosis of COVID-19 is necessary to prevent and control the disease. Deep learning methods have been considered a fast and accurate method. In this paper, by the parallel combination of three well-known pre-trained networks, we attempted to distinguish coronavirus-infected samples from healthy samples. The negative log-likelihood loss function has been used for model training. CT scan images in the SARS-CoV-2 dataset were used for diagnosis. The SARS-CoV-2 dataset contains 2482 images of lung CT scans, of which 1252 images belong to COVID-19-infected samples. The proposed model was close to 97% accurate.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 的诊断对于预防和控制该疾病是必要的。深度学习方法被认为是一种快速且准确的方法。在本文中，通过并行组合三个众所周知的预训练网络，我们试图区分冠状病毒感染的样本和健康样本。负对数似然损失函数已用于模型训练。 SARS-CoV-2 数据集中的 CT 扫描图像用于诊断。 SARS-CoV-2数据集包含2482张肺部CT扫描图像，其中1252张图像属于COVID-19感染样本。所提出的模型准确率接近 97%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用CT扫描图像和预训练模型诊断COVID-19疾病。
AI.motivation: 为了有效预防和控制COVID-19，需要快速且准确的诊断方法，而深度学习方法被认为是一种可行的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过并行组合三种知名的预训练网络模型，利用负对数似然损失函数进行训练，并使用SARS-CoV-2数据集中的CT扫描图像进行诊断。
AI.result: 提出的模型在诊断任务中达到了接近97%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，结合预训练网络模型可以有效用于COVID-19的诊断，具有较高的准确性。

authors_text: Zih-Ching Chen,Lin-Hsi Tsao,Chin-Lun Fu,Shang-Fu Chen,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Learning Facial Liveness Representation for Domain Generalized Face Anti-spoofing
title_zh: 学习领域广义人脸反欺骗的面部活度表示
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) aims at distinguishing face spoof attacks from the authentic ones, which is typically approached by learning proper models for performing the associated classification task. In practice, one would expect such models to be generalized to FAS in different image domains. Moreover, it is not practical to assume that the type of spoof attacks would be known in advance. In this paper, we propose a deep learning model for addressing the aforementioned domain-generalized face anti-spoofing task. In particular, our proposed network is able to disentangle facial liveness representation from the irrelevant ones (i.e., facial content and image domain features). The resulting liveness representation exhibits sufficient domain invariant properties, and thus it can be applied for performing domain-generalized FAS. In our experiments, we conduct experiments on five benchmark datasets with various settings, and we verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in identifying novel types of spoof attacks in unseen image domains.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) aims at distinguishing face spoof attacks from the authentic ones, which is typically approached by learning proper models for performing the associated classification task. In practice, one would expect such models to be generalized to FAS in different image domains. Moreover, it is not practical to assume that the type of spoof attacks would be known in advance. In this paper, we propose a deep learning model for addressing the aforementioned domain-generalized face anti-spoofing task. In particular, our proposed network is able to disentangle facial liveness representation from the irrelevant ones (i.e., facial content and image domain features). The resulting liveness representation exhibits sufficient domain invariant properties, and thus it can be applied for performing domain-generalized FAS. In our experiments, we conduct experiments on five benchmark datasets with various settings, and we verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in identifying novel types of spoof attacks in unseen image domains.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗（FAS）旨在区分人脸欺骗攻击与真实攻击，通常通过学习执行相关分类任务的适当模型来实现这一点。在实践中，人们期望此类模型能够推广到不同图像域中的 FAS。此外，假设提前知道欺骗攻击的类型是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习模型来解决上述领域广义人脸反欺骗任务。特别是，我们提出的网络能够将面部活性表示与不相关的表示（即面部内容和图像域特征）分开。由此产生的活性表示表现出足够的域不变特性，因此它可以应用于执行域广义 FAS。在我们的实验中，我们在具有不同设置的五个基准数据集上进行了实验，并验证了我们的模型在识别看不见的图像域中的新型欺骗攻击方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习模型，用于解决跨领域且攻击类型未知的面部反欺骗任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以泛化到不同图像领域或应对未知类型的欺骗攻击，需提升模型的领域适应性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计网络分离面部活体特征与无关特征（如面部内容和图像领域特征），生成领域不变的活体表示以实现跨领域反欺骗。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证，模型在未见过的图像领域和新型欺骗攻击识别中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦活体特征，模型有效提升了面部反欺骗的领域泛化能力，为未知攻击和跨领域场景提供解决方案。

motivation: 现有模型难以泛化到不同图像领域或应对未知类型的欺骗攻击，需提升模型的领域适应性和鲁棒性。
method: 设计网络分离面部活体特征与无关特征（如面部内容和图像领域特征），生成领域不变的活体表示以实现跨领域反欺骗。
result: 在五个基准数据集上验证，模型在未见过的图像领域和新型欺骗攻击识别中优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过解耦活体特征，模型有效提升了面部反欺骗的领域泛化能力，为未知攻击和跨领域场景提供解决方案。
search_text: Learning Facial Liveness Representation for Domain Generalized Face Anti-spoofing 学习领域广义人脸反欺骗的面部活度表示 Face anti-spoofing (FAS) aims at distinguishing face spoof attacks from the authentic ones, which is typically approached by learning proper models for performing the associated classification task. In practice, one would expect such models to be generalized to FAS in different image domains. Moreover, it is not practical to assume that the type of spoof attacks would be known in advance. In this paper, we propose a deep learning model for addressing the aforementioned domain-generalized face anti-spoofing task. In particular, our proposed network is able to disentangle facial liveness representation from the irrelevant ones (i.e., facial content and image domain features). The resulting liveness representation exhibits sufficient domain invariant properties, and thus it can be applied for performing domain-generalized FAS. In our experiments, we conduct experiments on five benchmark datasets with various settings, and we verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in identifying novel types of spoof attacks in unseen image domains. 人脸反欺骗（FAS）旨在区分人脸欺骗攻击与真实攻击，通常通过学习执行相关分类任务的适当模型来实现这一点。在实践中，人们期望此类模型能够推广到不同图像域中的 FAS。此外，假设提前知道欺骗攻击的类型是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习模型来解决上述领域广义人脸反欺骗任务。特别是，我们提出的网络能够将面部活性表示与不相关的表示（即面部内容和图像域特征）分开。由此产生的活性表示表现出足够的域不变特性，因此它可以应用于执行域广义 FAS。在我们的实验中，我们在具有不同设置的五个基准数据集上进行了实验，并验证了我们的模型在识别看不见的图像域中的新型欺骗攻击方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种深度学习模型，用于解决跨领域且攻击类型未知的面部反欺骗任务。 Zih-Ching Chen,Lin-Hsi Tsao,Chin-Lun Fu,Shang-Fu Chen,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Zhi-Han
title: Training Latent Variable Models with Auto-encoding Variational Bayes: A Tutorial
title_zh: 使用自动编码变分贝叶斯训练潜变量模型：教程
abstract: Auto-encoding Variational Bayes (AEVB) is a powerful and general algorithm for fitting latent variable models (a promising direction for unsupervised learning), and is well-known for training the Variational Auto-Encoder (VAE). In this tutorial, we focus on motivating AEVB from the classic Expectation Maximization (EM) algorithm, as opposed to from deterministic auto-encoders. Though natural and somewhat self-evident, the connection between EM and AEVB is not emphasized in the recent deep learning literature, and we believe that emphasizing this connection can improve the community's understanding of AEVB. In particular, we find it especially helpful to view (1) optimizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO) with respect to inference parameters as approximate E-step and (2) optimizing ELBO with respect to generative parameters as approximate M-step; doing both simultaneously as in AEVB is then simply tightening and pushing up ELBO at the same time. We discuss how approximate E-step can be interpreted as performing variational inference. Important concepts such as amortization and the reparametrization trick are discussed in great detail. Finally, we derive from scratch the AEVB training procedures of a non-deep and several deep latent variable models, including VAE, Conditional VAE, Gaussian Mixture VAE and Variational RNN. It is our hope that readers would recognize AEVB as a general algorithm that can be used to fit a wide range of latent variable models (not just VAE), and apply AEVB to such models that arise in their own fields of research. PyTorch code for all included models are publicly available.
summary: Auto-encoding Variational Bayes (AEVB) is a powerful and general algorithm for fitting latent variable models (a promising direction for unsupervised learning), and is well-known for training the Variational Auto-Encoder (VAE). In this tutorial, we focus on motivating AEVB from the classic Expectation Maximization (EM) algorithm, as opposed to from deterministic auto-encoders. Though natural and somewhat self-evident, the connection between EM and AEVB is not emphasized in the recent deep learning literature, and we believe that emphasizing this connection can improve the community's understanding of AEVB. In particular, we find it especially helpful to view (1) optimizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO) with respect to inference parameters as approximate E-step and (2) optimizing ELBO with respect to generative parameters as approximate M-step; doing both simultaneously as in AEVB is then simply tightening and pushing up ELBO at the same time. We discuss how approximate E-step can be interpreted as performing variational inference. Important concepts such as amortization and the reparametrization trick are discussed in great detail. Finally, we derive from scratch the AEVB training procedures of a non-deep and several deep latent variable models, including VAE, Conditional VAE, Gaussian Mixture VAE and Variational RNN. It is our hope that readers would recognize AEVB as a general algorithm that can be used to fit a wide range of latent variable models (not just VAE), and apply AEVB to such models that arise in their own fields of research. PyTorch code for all included models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 自动编码变分贝叶斯 (AEVB) 是一种强大且通用的算法，用于拟合潜在变量模型（无监督学习的一个有前途的方向），并因训练变分自动编码器 (VAE) 而闻名。在本教程中，我们重点关注从经典的期望最大化 (EM) 算法（而不是确定性自动编码器）激发 AEVB。尽管自然且有些不言而喻，但 EM 和 AEVB 之间的联系在最近的深度学习文献中并未得到强调，我们相信强调这种联系可以提高社区对 AEVB 的理解。特别是，我们发现将（1）关于推理参数的证据下界（ELBO）优化作为近似E步和（2）关于生成参数优化ELBO作为近似M步特别有帮助；像在 AEVB 中一样同时进行这两项操作，就是同时收紧并推高 ELBO。我们讨论如何将近似 E-step 解释为执行变分推理。详细讨论了摊销和重新参数化技巧等重要概念。最后，我们从头开始推导出一个非深度和几个深度潜变量模型的AEVB训练过程，包括VAE、条件VAE、高斯混合VAE和变分RNN。我们希望读者能够认识到 AEVB 是一种通用算法，可用于拟合各种潜在变量模型（而不仅仅是 VAE），并将 AEVB 应用于自己研究领域中出现的此类模型。所有包含的模型的 PyTorch 代码都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过与EM算法的联系，系统讲解Auto-encoding Variational Bayes（AEVB）算法如何训练潜在变量模型，并推导多种模型的实现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习文献未充分强调AEVB与EM算法的关联，导致社区对AEVB的理解不足。作者希望通过建立这种联系，帮助读者更直观地理解ELBO优化过程及关键概念。
AI.method: 从EM算法推导AEVB，将ELBO优化分解为近似E步（推断参数优化）和近似M步（生成参数优化），结合变分推断、摊销化与重参数技巧，详细推导VAE、条件VAE等模型的训练过程。
AI.result: 提供了非深度及多种深度潜在变量模型的AEVB训练推导，公开PyTorch代码，帮助读者将AEVB应用于自身研究领域的模型。
AI.conclusion: AEVB是通用算法，适用于广泛潜在变量模型，读者应认识到其通用性并拓展应用。

authors_text: Alessandro Sestini,Joakim Bergdahl,Konrad Tollmar,Andrew D. Bagdanov,Linus Gisslén
title: Towards Informed Design and Validation Assistance in Computer Games Using Imitation Learning
title_zh: 使用模仿学习在计算机游戏中实现知情设计和验证协助
abstract: In games, as in and many other domains, design validation and testing is a huge challenge as systems are growing in size and manual testing is becoming infeasible. This paper proposes a new approach to automated game validation and testing. Our method leverages a data-driven imitation learning technique, which requires little effort and time and no knowledge of machine learning or programming, that designers can use to efficiently train game testing agents. We investigate the validity of our approach through a user study with industry experts. The survey results show that our method is indeed a valid approach to game validation and that data-driven programming would be a useful aid to reducing effort and increasing quality of modern playtesting. The survey also highlights several open challenges. With the help of the most recent literature, we analyze the identified challenges and propose future research directions suitable for supporting and maximizing the utility of our approach.
summary: In games, as in and many other domains, design validation and testing is a huge challenge as systems are growing in size and manual testing is becoming infeasible. This paper proposes a new approach to automated game validation and testing. Our method leverages a data-driven imitation learning technique, which requires little effort and time and no knowledge of machine learning or programming, that designers can use to efficiently train game testing agents. We investigate the validity of our approach through a user study with industry experts. The survey results show that our method is indeed a valid approach to game validation and that data-driven programming would be a useful aid to reducing effort and increasing quality of modern playtesting. The survey also highlights several open challenges. With the help of the most recent literature, we analyze the identified challenges and propose future research directions suitable for supporting and maximizing the utility of our approach.
abstract_zh: 与许多其他领域一样，在游戏中，设计验证和测试是一个巨大的挑战，因为系统规模不断增大，手动测试变得不可行。本文提出了一种自动游戏验证和测试的新方法。我们的方法利用数据驱动的模仿学习技术，该技术需要很少的精力和时间，并且不需要机器学习或编程知识，设计人员可以使用它来有效地训练游戏测试代理。我们通过与行业专家的用户研究来调查我们方法的有效性。调查结果表明，我们的方法确实是一种有效的游戏验证方法，并且数据驱动的编程将有助于减少现代游戏测试的工作量并提高质量。该调查还强调了一些尚未解决的挑战。在最新文献的帮助下，我们分析了已发现的挑战，并提出了适合支持和最大化我们方法效用的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模仿学习的自动化游戏验证与测试方法，旨在减少人工测试的工作量并提高测试效率。
AI.motivation: 随着游戏系统复杂度增加，传统人工测试效率低下且难以覆盖所有场景，亟需自动化工具辅助验证。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的模仿学习技术，无需编程或机器学习知识，通过少量数据训练测试代理以模拟玩家行为。
AI.result: 用户研究验证了方法的有效性，专家认可其减少工作量和提升测试质量的潜力，同时指出数据质量与泛化能力等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为游戏测试提供可行方案，未来需结合最新研究解决数据依赖性和跨场景适应性等关键问题。

authors_text: Nirmalya Thakur
title: A Large-Scale Dataset of Twitter Chatter about Online Learning during the Current COVID-19 Omicron Wave
title_zh: 当前 COVID-19 Omicron 浪潮期间有关在线学习的 Twitter 聊天的大规模数据集
abstract: The COVID-19 Omicron variant, reported to be the most immune evasive variant of COVID-19, is resulting in a surge of COVID-19 cases globally. This has caused schools, colleges, and universities in different parts of the world to transition to online learning. As a result, social media platforms such as Twitter are seeing an increase in conversations related to online learning in the form of tweets. Mining such tweets to develop a dataset can serve as a data resource for different applications and use-cases related to the analysis of interest, views, opinions, perspectives, attitudes, and feedback towards online learning during the current surge of COVID-19 cases caused by the Omicron variant. Therefore, this work presents a large-scale open-access Twitter dataset of conversations about online learning from different parts of the world since the first detected case of the COVID-19 Omicron variant in November 2021. The dataset is compliant with the privacy policy, developer agreement, and guidelines for content redistribution of Twitter, as well as with the FAIR principles (Findability, Accessibility, Interoperability, and Reusability) principles for scientific data management. The paper also briefly outlines some potential applications in the fields of Big Data, Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, and their related disciplines, with a specific focus on online learning during this Omicron wave that may be studied, explored, and investigated by using this dataset.

The paper also briefly outlines some potential applications in the fields of Big Data, Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, and their related disciplines, with a specific focus on online learning during this Omicron wave that may be studied, explored, and investigated by using this dataset.
abstract_zh: 据报道，COVID-19 Omicron 变种是 COVID-19 最具免疫逃避性的变种，导致全球 COVID-19 病例激增。这导致世界各地的学校、学院和大学转向在线学习。因此，Twitter 等社交媒体平台上以推文形式进行的与在线学习相关的对话有所增加。挖掘此类推文来开发数据集可以作为不同应用程序和用例的数据资源，这些应用程序和用例涉及在当前由 Omicron 变体引起的 COVID-19 病例激增期间对在线学习的兴趣、观点、观点、观点、态度和反馈的分析。因此，这项工作提出了自 2021 年 11 月首次检测到 COVID-19 Omicron 变种病例以来世界各地有关在线学习的大规模开放访问 Twitter 对话数据集。该数据集符合 Twitter 的隐私政策、开发者协议和内容重新分发指南，以及科学数据管理的 FAIR 原则（可查找性、可访问性、互操作性和可重用性）原则。本文还简要概述了大数据、数据挖掘、自然语言处理及其相关学科领域的一些潜在应用，特别关注 Omicron 浪潮期间可以使用该数据集进行研究、探索和调查的在线学习。

AI.tldr: 构建一个包含全球疫情期间在线学习相关Twitter讨论的大规模公开数据集
AI.motivation: 由于Omicron变种引发全球疫情反弹，学校转向在线学习，需通过分析社交媒体数据了解相关讨论和观点
AI.method: 通过合规爬取Twitter数据，进行预处理并确保符合隐私政策和FAIR原则
AI.result: 生成一个符合标准的大规模数据集，可用于分析在线学习的多方面影响，并支持大数据、数据挖掘和自然语言处理的研究
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为研究疫情期间在线学习提供了重要资源，有助于推动相关领域的研究和应用

authors_text: John Harwell,Maria Gini
title: SIERRA: A Modular Framework for Research Automation and Reproducibility
title_zh: SIERRA：研究自动化和可重复性的模块化框架
abstract: Modern intelligent systems researchers form hypotheses about system behavior and then run experiments using one or more independent variables to test their hypotheses. We present SIERRA, a novel framework structured around that idea for accelerating research development and improving reproducibility of results. SIERRA accelerates research by automating the process of generating executable experiments from queries over independent variables(s), executing experiments, and processing the results to generate deliverables such as graphs and videos. It shifts the paradigm for testing hypotheses from procedural ("Do these steps to answer the query") to declarative ("Here is the query to test--GO!"), reducing the burden on researchers. It employs a modular architecture enabling easy customization and extension for the needs of individual researchers, thereby eliminating manual configuration and processing via throw-away scripts. SIERRA improves reproducibility of research by providing automation independent of the execution environment (HPC hardware, real robots, etc.) and targeted platform (arbitrary simulator or real robots). This enables exact experiment replication, up to the limit of the execution environment and platform, as well as making it easy for researchers to test hypotheses in different computational environments.
summary: Modern intelligent systems researchers form hypotheses about system behavior and then run experiments using one or more independent variables to test their hypotheses. We present SIERRA, a novel framework structured around that idea for accelerating research development and improving reproducibility of results. SIERRA accelerates research by automating the process of generating executable experiments from queries over independent variables(s), executing experiments, and processing the results to generate deliverables such as graphs and videos. It shifts the paradigm for testing hypotheses from procedural ("Do these steps to answer the query") to declarative ("Here is the query to test--GO!"), reducing the burden on researchers. It employs a modular architecture enabling easy customization and extension for the needs of individual researchers, thereby eliminating manual configuration and processing via throw-away scripts. SIERRA improves reproducibility of research by providing automation independent of the execution environment (HPC hardware, real robots, etc.) and targeted platform (arbitrary simulator or real robots). This enables exact experiment replication, up to the limit of the execution environment and platform, as well as making it easy for researchers to test hypotheses in different computational environments.
abstract_zh: 现代智能系统研究人员提出有关系统行为的假设，然后使用一个或多个自变量进行实验来检验他们的假设。我们推出了 SIERRA，这是一个围绕该理念构建的新颖框架，旨在加速研究开发并提高结果的可重复性。 SIERRA 通过自动化从自变量查询生成可执行实验、执行实验以及处理结果以生成图形和视频等可交付成果的过程来加速研究。它将测试假设的范式从程序性（“执行这些步骤来回答查询”）转变为声明性（“这是要测试的查询 - 开始！”），从而减轻了研究人员的负担。它采用模块化架构，可以根据个别研究人员的需求轻松定制和扩展，从而消除了通过一次性脚本进行的手动配置和处理。 SIERRA 通过提供独立于执行环境（HPC 硬件、真实机器人等）和目标平台（任意模拟器或真实机器人）的自动化来提高研究的可重复性。这使得精确的实验复制成为可能，直至执行环境和平台的限制，并使研究人员可以轻松地在不同的计算环境中测试假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIERRA框架，旨在通过自动化实验生成、执行和结果处理来加速研究开发并提高结果的可重复性。
AI.motivation: 研究人员在测试假设时面临手动配置复杂、实验可重复性差的问题，传统方法依赖繁琐的脚本和特定环境，限制了研究效率与跨平台验证。
AI.method: 设计模块化架构，支持通过声明式查询自动生成实验，自动化执行流程并生成可视化交付物，同时与执行环境和平台解耦以确保跨平台一致性。
AI.result: SIERRA减少了人工干预，提升了实验自动化水平，并实现了在不同计算环境下的精确实验复现。
AI.conclusion: SIERRA通过模块化与自动化设计有效解决了研究流程中的效率与可重复性问题，为智能系统研究提供了通用工具支持。

authors_text: William Anderson,Kaneesha Moore,Jesse Ables,Sudip Mittal,Shahram Rahimi,Ioana Banicescu,Maria Seale
title: Designing an Artificial Immune System inspired Intrusion Detection System
title_zh: 设计受人工免疫系统启发的入侵检测系统
abstract: The Human Immune System (HIS) works to protect a body from infection, illness, and disease. This system can inspire cybersecurity professionals to design an Artificial Immune System (AIS) based Intrusion Detection System (IDS). These biologically inspired algorithms using Self/Nonself and Danger Theory can directly augmentIDS designs and implementations. In this paper, we include an examination into the elements of design necessary for building an AIS-IDS framework and present an architecture to create such systems.
summary: The Human Immune System (HIS) works to protect a body from infection, illness, and disease. This system can inspire cybersecurity professionals to design an Artificial Immune System (AIS) based Intrusion Detection System (IDS). These biologically inspired algorithms using Self/Nonself and Danger Theory can directly augmentIDS designs and implementations. In this paper, we include an examination into the elements of design necessary for building an AIS-IDS framework and present an architecture to create such systems.
abstract_zh: 人体免疫系统 (HIS) 致力于保护身体免受感染、疾病和疾病的侵害。该系统可以激发网络安全专业人员设计基于人工免疫系统（AIS）的入侵检测系统（IDS）。这些使用自我/非自我和危险理论的受生物学启发的算法可以直接增强 IDS 的设计和实现。在本文中，我们对构建 AIS-IDS 框架所需的设计要素进行了检查，并提出了创建此类系统的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一个受人工免疫系统启发的入侵检测系统框架，并提出相应的系统架构。
AI.motivation: 人类免疫系统能够有效识别并抵御病原体，这一生物机制为设计更智能的入侵检测系统提供了灵感，以弥补传统IDS的不足。
AI.method: 基于免疫学中的自/非自理论和危险理论，结合人工免疫系统算法，构建能够动态识别网络威胁的IDS架构。
AI.result: 提出了一种AIS-IDS框架的系统架构，为后续实现和优化提供了理论基础与设计指导。
AI.conclusion: 人工免疫系统理论可有效指导入侵检测系统的创新设计，未来需进一步验证其实际性能与可扩展性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在设计一个受人工免疫系统启发的入侵检测系统框架，并提出相应的系统架构。

search_text: Designing an Artificial Immune System inspired Intrusion Detection System 设计受人工免疫系统启发的入侵检测系统 The Human Immune System (HIS) works to protect a body from infection, illness, and disease. This system can inspire cybersecurity professionals to design an Artificial Immune System (AIS) based Intrusion Detection System (IDS). These biologically inspired algorithms using Self/Nonself and Danger Theory can directly augmentIDS designs and implementations. In this paper, we include an examination into the elements of design necessary for building an AIS-IDS framework and present an architecture to create such systems. 人体免疫系统 (HIS) 致力于保护身体免受感染、疾病和疾病的侵害。该系统可以激发网络安全专业人员设计基于人工免疫系统（AIS）的入侵检测系统（IDS）。这些使用自我/非自我和危险理论的受生物学启发的算法可以直接增强 IDS 的设计和实现。在本文中，我们对构建 AIS-IDS 框架所需的设计要素进行了检查，并提出了创建此类系统的架构。 本文旨在设计一个受人工免疫系统启发的入侵检测系统框架，并提出相应的系统架构。 William Anderson,Kaneesha Moore,Jesse Ables,Sudip Mittal,Shahram Rahimi,Ioana Banicescu,Maria Seale cs.CR,cs.NE

authors_text: Bin Guo,Emil Sekerinski
title: New Concurrent Order Maintenance Data Structure
title_zh: 新的并发订单维护数据结构
abstract: The \emph{Order-Maintenance} (OM) data structure maintains a total order list of items for insertions, deletions, and comparisons. As a basic data structure, OM has many applications, such as maintaining the topological order, core numbers, and truss in graphs, and maintaining ordered sets in Unified Modeling Language (UML) Specification. The prevalence of multicore machines suggests parallelizing such a basic data structure. This paper proposes a new parallel OM data structure that supports insertions, deletions, and comparisons in parallel. Specifically, parallel insertions and deletions are synchronized by using locks efficiently, which achieve up to $7$x and $5.6$x speedups with $64$ workers. One big advantage is that the comparisons are lock-free so that they can execute highly in parallel with other insertions and deletions, which achieve up to $34.4$x speedups with $64$ workers. Typical real applications maintain order lists that always have a much larger portion of comparisons than insertions and deletions. For example, in core maintenance, the number of comparisons is up to 297 times larger compared with insertions and deletions in certain graphs. This is why the lock-free order comparison is a breakthrough in practice.
summary: The \emph{Order-Maintenance} (OM) data structure maintains a total order list of items for insertions, deletions, and comparisons. As a basic data structure, OM has many applications, such as maintaining the topological order, core numbers, and truss in graphs, and maintaining ordered sets in Unified Modeling Language (UML) Specification. The prevalence of multicore machines suggests parallelizing such a basic data structure. This paper proposes a new parallel OM data structure that supports insertions, deletions, and comparisons in parallel. Specifically, parallel insertions and deletions are synchronized by using locks efficiently, which achieve up to $7$x and $5.6$x speedups with $64$ workers. One big advantage is that the comparisons are lock-free so that they can execute highly in parallel with other insertions and deletions, which achieve up to $34.4$x speedups with $64$ workers. Typical real applications maintain order lists that always have a much larger portion of comparisons than insertions and deletions. For example, in core maintenance, the number of comparisons is up to 297 times larger compared with insertions and deletions in certain graphs. This is why the lock-free order comparison is a breakthrough in practice.
abstract_zh: \emph{Order-Maintenance} (OM) 数据结构维护用于插入、删除和比较的项目的总顺序列表。作为一种基本数据结构，OM 有很多应用，例如维护图中的拓扑顺序、核心数和桁架，以及维护统一建模语言 (UML) 规范中的有序集。多核机器的流行表明了这种基本数据结构的并行化。本文提出了一种新的并行 OM 数据结构，支持并行插入、删除和比较。具体来说，并行插入和删除通过有效地使用锁来同步，这使得 64$ 的工作线程可实现高达 $7$x 和 $5.6$x 的加速。一大优点是比较是无锁的，因此它们可以与其他插入和删除高度并行地执行，从而在 64$ 的工作人员的情况下实现高达 34.4$x 的加速。典型的实际应用程序维护的订单列表始终具有比插入和删除更大的比较部分。例如，在核心维护中，与某些图中的插入和删除相比，比较次数高达297倍。这就是为什么无锁顺序比较在实践中是一个突破。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的并行顺序维护数据结构，支持插入、删除和比较操作的并发执行。
AI.motivation: 多核机器的普及需要将基础数据结构并行化，而实际应用中比较操作远多于插入和删除，传统锁机制难以高效处理。
AI.method: 通过锁机制高效同步插入和删除操作，同时采用无锁设计实现比较操作的高并发执行。
AI.result: 在64个线程下，插入和删除分别获得最高7倍和5.6倍加速，比较操作实现34.4倍加速；在核心维护等场景中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 无锁比较机制突破了传统锁的性能瓶颈，为高并发顺序维护场景提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Xiulong Yang,Sheng-Min Shih,Yinlin Fu,Xiaoting Zhao,Shihao Ji
title: Your ViT is Secretly a Hybrid Discriminative-Generative Diffusion Model
title_zh: 你的 ViT 是一个秘密的混合判别-生成扩散模型
abstract: Diffusion Denoising Probability Models (DDPM) and Vision Transformer (ViT) have demonstrated significant progress in generative tasks and discriminative tasks, respectively, and thus far these models have largely been developed in their own domains. In this paper, we establish a direct connection between DDPM and ViT by integrating the ViT architecture into DDPM, and introduce a new generative model called Generative ViT (GenViT). The modeling flexibility of ViT enables us to further extend GenViT to hybrid discriminative-generative modeling, and introduce a Hybrid ViT (HybViT). Our work is among the first to explore a single ViT for image generation and classification jointly. We conduct a series of experiments to analyze the performance of proposed models and demonstrate their superiority over prior state-of-the-arts in both generative and discriminative tasks. Our code and pre-trained models can be found in https://github.com/sndnyang/Diffusion_ViT .
summary: Diffusion Denoising Probability Models (DDPM) and Vision Transformer (ViT) have demonstrated significant progress in generative tasks and discriminative tasks, respectively, and thus far these models have largely been developed in their own domains. In this paper, we establish a direct connection between DDPM and ViT by integrating the ViT architecture into DDPM, and introduce a new generative model called Generative ViT (GenViT). The modeling flexibility of ViT enables us to further extend GenViT to hybrid discriminative-generative modeling, and introduce a Hybrid ViT (HybViT). Our work is among the first to explore a single ViT for image generation and classification jointly. We conduct a series of experiments to analyze the performance of proposed models and demonstrate their superiority over prior state-of-the-arts in both generative and discriminative tasks. Our code and pre-trained models can be found in https://github.com/sndnyang/Diffusion_ViT .
abstract_zh: 扩散去噪概率模型（DDPM）和视觉变换器（ViT）分别在生成任务和判别任务方面取得了显着进展，到目前为止，这些模型主要是在各自的领域中开发的。在本文中，我们通过将ViT架构集成到DDPM中，在DDPM和ViT之间建立了直接连接，并引入了一种称为生成式ViT（GenViT）的新生成模型。 ViT 的建模灵活性使我们能够进一步将 GenViT 扩展到混合判别生成建模，并引入混合 ViT (HybViT)。我们的工作是第一个探索单一 ViT 联合进行图像生成和分类的工作。我们进行了一系列实验来分析所提出模型的性能，并证明它们在生成和判别任务方面优于现有技术。我们的代码和预训练模型可以在 https://github.com/sndnyang/Diffusion_ViT 中找到。

AI.tldr: 将ViT架构整合到扩散去噪概率模型（DDPM）中，提出生成式ViT（GenViT）和混合式ViT（HybViT），实现图像生成与分类的联合建模。
AI.motivation: 现有DDPM和ViT分别专注于生成与判别任务，缺乏统一框架；探索ViT在生成任务中的潜力，并实现图像生成与分类的联合建模。
AI.method: 将ViT架构嵌入扩散模型，设计GenViT用于生成任务，并扩展为HybViT实现生成与分类的混合建模。
AI.result: 在生成和判别任务中均优于现有SOTA方法，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现单个ViT模型同时处理生成与分类任务，验证了其灵活性与优越性，未来可探索更多优化方向。

authors_text: Łukasz Bożyk,Michał Pilipczuk
title: Polynomial kernel for immersion hitting in tournaments
title_zh: 用于锦标赛中沉浸式击球的多项式内核
comment: Full version of a paper accepted to ESA 2022
comments: Full version of a paper accepted to ESA 2022
abstract: For a fixed simple digraph $H$ without isolated vertices, we consider the problem of deleting arcs from a given tournament to get a digraph which does not contain $H$ as an immersion. We prove that for every $H$, this problem admits a polynomial kernel when parameterized by the number of deleted arcs. The degree of the bound on the kernel size depends on $H$.
summary: For a fixed simple digraph $H$ without isolated vertices, we consider the problem of deleting arcs from a given tournament to get a digraph which does not contain $H$ as an immersion. We prove that for every $H$, this problem admits a polynomial kernel when parameterized by the number of deleted arcs. The degree of the bound on the kernel size depends on $H$.
abstract_zh: 对于没有孤立顶点的固定简单有向图 $H$，我们考虑从给定锦标赛中删除弧以获得不包含 $H$ 作为沉浸的有向图的问题。我们证明，对于每个 $H$，当通过删除弧的数量进行参数化时，这个问题承认一个多项式内核。内核大小的限制程度取决于$H$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在竞赛图中通过删除边以消除特定有向图浸入的问题，并证明该问题具有多项式核。
AI.motivation: 竞赛图在理论计算机科学中具有重要地位，而浸入问题与图的结构分析密切相关。参数化核化技术有助于处理复杂问题的计算可行性。
AI.method: 基于图浸入理论及参数化复杂性分析，结合竞赛图的结构特性设计核化方法。
AI.result: 对于任意固定简单有向图H，该问题在边删除数参数下存在多项式核，其大小依赖于H的结构。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为参数化算法设计提供了新思路，并深化了对竞赛图浸入问题的理解。

search_text: Polynomial kernel for immersion hitting in tournaments 用于锦标赛中沉浸式击球的多项式内核 For a fixed simple digraph $H$ without isolated vertices, we consider the problem of deleting arcs from a given tournament to get a digraph which does not contain $H$ as an immersion. We prove that for every $H$, this problem admits a polynomial kernel when parameterized by the number of deleted arcs. The degree of the bound on the kernel size depends on $H$. 对于没有孤立顶点的固定简单有向图 $H$，我们考虑从给定锦标赛中删除弧以获得不包含 $H$ 作为沉浸的有向图的问题。我们证明，对于每个 $H$，当通过删除弧的数量进行参数化时，这个问题承认一个多项式内核。内核大小的限制程度取决于$H$。 本文研究了在竞赛图中通过删除边以消除特定有向图浸入的问题，并证明该问题具有多项式核。 Łukasz Bożyk,Michał Pilipczuk cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Yu Zhang,Witold Pedrycz,Chanjuan Liu,Enqiang Zhu
title: Mining Large Independent Sets on Massive Graphs
title_zh: 在海量图上挖掘大型独立集
abstract: The Maximum Independent Set problem is fundamental for extracting conflict-free structure from large graphs, with applications in scheduling, recommendation, and network analysis. However, existing heuristics can stagnate when search schedules are fixed and information from past solutions is underused, leading to wasted effort in low-quality regions of the search space. We present ARCIS, an efficient algorithm for mining large independent sets on massive graphs. ARCIS couples two main components. The first is an adaptive restart policy that refreshes exploration when progress slows. The second is Consensus-Guided Vertex Fixing, which restricts the search to the non-consensus region of the graph by fixing vertices consistently observed within a round. The consensus is maintained as a running intersection within each round, and because it is recomputed at every restart, the fixing is reversible. Vertices that later lose support are automatically unfixed and their neighborhoods re-enter the working graph, which corrects occasional mistakes while preserving progress. Experiments on 222 graphs from four benchmark suites show that ARCIS attains the best or tied-best solution quality in most instances while delivering competitive runtime and low variability. Ablation studies isolate the impact of each component, indicating that ARCIS is a practical and robust method for large-scale graph mining.
summary: The Maximum Independent Set problem is fundamental for extracting conflict-free structure from large graphs, with applications in scheduling, recommendation, and network analysis. However, existing heuristics can stagnate when search schedules are fixed and information from past solutions is underused, leading to wasted effort in low-quality regions of the search space. We present ARCIS, an efficient algorithm for mining large independent sets on massive graphs. ARCIS couples two main components. The first is an adaptive restart policy that refreshes exploration when progress slows. The second is Consensus-Guided Vertex Fixing, which restricts the search to the non-consensus region of the graph by fixing vertices consistently observed within a round. The consensus is maintained as a running intersection within each round, and because it is recomputed at every restart, the fixing is reversible. Vertices that later lose support are automatically unfixed and their neighborhoods re-enter the working graph, which corrects occasional mistakes while preserving progress. Experiments on 222 graphs from four benchmark suites show that ARCIS attains the best or tied-best solution quality in most instances while delivering competitive runtime and low variability. Ablation studies isolate the impact of each component, indicating that ARCIS is a practical and robust method for large-scale graph mining.
abstract_zh: 最大独立集问题是从大图中提取无冲突结构的基础，在调度、推荐和网络分析中都有应用。然而，当搜索计划固定并且来自过去解决方案的信息未得到充分利用时，现有的启发式方法可能会停滞不前，导致搜索空间的低质量区域浪费精力。我们提出了 ARCIS，一种在海量图上挖掘大型独立集的有效算法。 ARCIS 连接两个主要组件。第一个是自适应重启策略，可在进度放缓时刷新探索。第二个是共识引导的顶点修复，它通过修复一轮内一致观察到的顶点来将搜索限制在图的非共识区域。共识被维持为每轮内的运行交集，并且由于每次重新启动时都会重新计算，因此修复是可逆的。后来失去支持的顶点会自动取消修复，并且它们的邻域会重新进入工作图，这会在保留进度的同时纠正偶尔的错误。对来自四个基准套件的 222 个图表进行的实验表明，ARCIS 在大多数情况下都能获得最佳或并列最佳的解决方案质量，同时提供具有竞争力的运行时间和低可变性。消融研究隔离了每个组件的影响，表明 ARCIS 是一种实用且稳健的大规模图挖掘方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ARCIS的高效算法，用于在大规模图中挖掘大独立集，解决最大独立集问题。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式方法在搜索计划固定且未充分利用历史解决方案信息时容易停滞，导致搜索空间低质量区域的资源浪费。
AI.method: ARCIS包含两个核心组件：适应性重启策略（在进展减缓时刷新探索）和共识引导的顶点固定技术（通过每轮运行交集维护共识，动态固定非共识区域顶点并可逆调整）。
AI.result: 在四个基准套件的222个图上实验表明，ARCIS在多数实例中达到最佳或并列最佳解质量，同时具有竞争力的运行时间和低波动性。
AI.conclusion: ARCIS通过组件协同作用，成为大规模图挖掘中实用且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Chaehwa Yoo,Fangxu Xing,C. -C. Jay Kuo,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Segmentation with Black-box Source Model
title_zh: 使用黑盒源模型进行分割的无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been widely used to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain to counter the difficulty of labeling in a new domain. The training of conventional solutions usually relies on the existence of both source and target domain data. However, privacy of the large-scale and well-labeled data in the source domain and trained model parameters can become the major concern of cross center/domain collaborations. In this work, to address this, we propose a practical solution to UDA for segmentation with a black-box segmentation model trained in the source domain only, rather than original source data or a white-box source model. Specifically, we resort to a knowledge distillation scheme with exponential mixup decay (EMD) to gradually learn target-specific representations. In addition, unsupervised entropy minimization is further applied to regularization of the target domain confidence. We evaluated our framework on the BraTS 2018 database, achieving performance on par with white-box source model adaptation approaches.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been widely used to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain to counter the difficulty of labeling in a new domain. The training of conventional solutions usually relies on the existence of both source and target domain data. However, privacy of the large-scale and well-labeled data in the source domain and trained model parameters can become the major concern of cross center/domain collaborations. In this work, to address this, we propose a practical solution to UDA for segmentation with a black-box segmentation model trained in the source domain only, rather than original source data or a white-box source model. Specifically, we resort to a knowledge distillation scheme with exponential mixup decay (EMD) to gradually learn target-specific representations. In addition, unsupervised entropy minimization is further applied to regularization of the target domain confidence. We evaluated our framework on the BraTS 2018 database, achieving performance on par with white-box source model adaptation approaches.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）已被广泛用于将知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域，以应对新域中标记的困难。传统解决方案的训练通常依赖于源域数据和目标域数据的存在。然而，源域中大规模且标记良好的数据和经过训练的模型参数的隐私可能成为跨中心/域协作的主要问题。在这项工作中，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种实用的 UDA 分割解决方案，使用仅在源域中训练的黑盒分割模型，而不是原始源数据或白盒源模型。具体来说，我们采用具有指数混合衰减（EMD）的知识蒸馏方案来逐渐学习特定于目标的表示。此外，无监督熵最小化进一步应用于目标域置信度的正则化。我们在 BraTS 2018 数据库上评估了我们的框架，实现了与白盒源模型自适应方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需源数据和白盒模型的分割无监督域适应方法
AI.motivation: 传统UDA需源域数据和模型参数，但隐私问题限制跨域协作，需实现隐私保护的知识迁移
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏与指数混合衰减（EMD）学习目标域表示，并结合熵最小化正则化
AI.result: 在BraTS 2018数据集上达到与白盒方法相当的性能
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保障隐私的同时有效实现域适应，适用于实际跨域协作场景

authors_text: Taewoo Kim,Chaeyeon Chung,Yoonseo Kim,Sunghyun Park,Kangyeol Kim,Jaegul Choo
title: Style Your Hair: Latent Optimization for Pose-Invariant Hairstyle Transfer via Local-Style-Aware Hair Alignment
title_zh: 设计你的头发：通过局部风格感知头发对齐实现姿势不变发型转移的潜在优化
abstract: Editing hairstyle is unique and challenging due to the complexity and delicacy of hairstyle. Although recent approaches significantly improved the hair details, these models often produce undesirable outputs when a pose of a source image is considerably different from that of a target hair image, limiting their real-world applications. HairFIT, a pose-invariant hairstyle transfer model, alleviates this limitation yet still shows unsatisfactory quality in preserving delicate hair textures. To solve these limitations, we propose a high-performing pose-invariant hairstyle transfer model equipped with latent optimization and a newly presented local-style-matching loss. In the StyleGAN2 latent space, we first explore a pose-aligned latent code of a target hair with the detailed textures preserved based on local style matching. Then, our model inpaints the occlusions of the source considering the aligned target hair and blends both images to produce a final output. The experimental results demonstrate that our model has strengths in transferring a hairstyle under larger pose differences and preserving local hairstyle textures.
summary: Editing hairstyle is unique and challenging due to the complexity and delicacy of hairstyle. Although recent approaches significantly improved the hair details, these models often produce undesirable outputs when a pose of a source image is considerably different from that of a target hair image, limiting their real-world applications. HairFIT, a pose-invariant hairstyle transfer model, alleviates this limitation yet still shows unsatisfactory quality in preserving delicate hair textures. To solve these limitations, we propose a high-performing pose-invariant hairstyle transfer model equipped with latent optimization and a newly presented local-style-matching loss. In the StyleGAN2 latent space, we first explore a pose-aligned latent code of a target hair with the detailed textures preserved based on local style matching. Then, our model inpaints the occlusions of the source considering the aligned target hair and blends both images to produce a final output. The experimental results demonstrate that our model has strengths in transferring a hairstyle under larger pose differences and preserving local hairstyle textures.
abstract_zh: 由于发型的复杂性和精致性，编辑发型是独特且具有挑战性的。尽管最近的方法显着改善了头发细节，但当源图像的姿势与目标头发图像的姿势显着不同时，这些模型通常会产生不良输出，从而限制了它们的实际应用。 HairFIT 是一种姿势不变的发型转移模型，缓解了这一限制，但在保留精致头发纹理方面仍然表现出不令人满意的质量。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种高性能的姿势不变发型转移模型，配备了潜在优化和新提出的局部风格匹配损失。在 StyleGAN2 潜在空间中，我们首先探索目标头发的姿势对齐潜在代码，并根据局部风格匹配保留详细纹理。然后，我们的模型考虑对齐的目标头发来修复源的遮挡，并将两个图像混合以产生最终输出。实验结果表明，我们的模型在较大姿势差异下转移发型和保留局部发型纹理方面具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在优化和局部风格匹配的姿势不变发型迁移模型，解决源图像与目标发型姿势差异大时的细节丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有发型迁移方法在源图像与目标发型姿势差异较大时易产生失真，且难以保留精细的头发纹理细节。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN2潜在空间中通过局部风格匹配生成姿势对齐的潜在编码，结合遮挡修复与图像融合技术实现发型迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在较大姿势差异场景下能更准确转移发型并保留局部纹理细节，优于现有方法如HairFIT。
AI.conclusion: 提出的局部风格感知对齐方法与潜在优化策略有效提升了姿势不变发型迁移的质量与实用性。

authors_text: Zesen Liu,Meng Guo,Zhongkui Li
title: Time Minimization and Online Synchronization for Multi-agent Systems under Collaborative Temporal Tasks
title_zh: 协作时间任务下多智能体系统的时间最小化和在线同步
abstract: Multi-agent systems can be extremely efficient when solving a team-wide task in a concurrent manner. However, without proper synchronization, the correctness of the combined behavior is hard to guarantee, such as to follow a specific ordering of sub-tasks or to perform a simultaneous collaboration. This work addresses the minimum-time task planning problem for multi-agent systems under complex global tasks stated as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas. These tasks include the temporal and spatial requirements on both independent local actions and direct sub-team collaborations. The proposed solution is an anytime algorithm that combines the partial-ordering analysis of the underlying task automaton for task decomposition, and the branch and bound (BnB) search method for task assignment. Analyses of its soundness, completeness and optimality as the minimal completion time are provided. It is also shown that a feasible and near-optimal solution is quickly reached while the search continues within the time budget. Furthermore, to handle fluctuations in task duration and agent failures during online execution, an adaptation algorithm is proposed to synchronize execution status and re-assign unfinished subtasks dynamically to maintain correctness and optimality. Both algorithms are validated rigorously over large-scale systems via numerical simulations and hardware experiments, against several strong baselines.
summary: Multi-agent systems can be extremely efficient when solving a team-wide task in a concurrent manner. However, without proper synchronization, the correctness of the combined behavior is hard to guarantee, such as to follow a specific ordering of sub-tasks or to perform a simultaneous collaboration. This work addresses the minimum-time task planning problem for multi-agent systems under complex global tasks stated as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas. These tasks include the temporal and spatial requirements on both independent local actions and direct sub-team collaborations. The proposed solution is an anytime algorithm that combines the partial-ordering analysis of the underlying task automaton for task decomposition, and the branch and bound (BnB) search method for task assignment. Analyses of its soundness, completeness and optimality as the minimal completion time are provided. It is also shown that a feasible and near-optimal solution is quickly reached while the search continues within the time budget. Furthermore, to handle fluctuations in task duration and agent failures during online execution, an adaptation algorithm is proposed to synchronize execution status and re-assign unfinished subtasks dynamically to maintain correctness and optimality. Both algorithms are validated rigorously over large-scale systems via numerical simulations and hardware experiments, against several strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 当以并发方式解决团队范围的任务时，多代理系统可以非常高效。然而，如果没有适当的同步，则很难保证组合行为的正确性，例如遵循子任务的特定顺序或执行同时协作。这项工作解决了复杂全局任务下多智能体系统的最短时间任务规划问题，用线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式表示。这些任务包括独立本地行动和直接子团队协作的时间和空间要求。所提出的解决方案是一种随时算法，结合了用于任务分解的底层任务自动机的偏序分析和用于任务分配的分支定界（BnB）搜索方法。分析了其在最短完成时间内的健全性、完整性和最优性。它还表明，在时间预算内继续搜索的同时，可以快速达到可行且接近最优的解决方案。此外，为了处理在线执行期间任务持续时间的波动和代理故障，提出了一种自适应算法来同步执行状态并动态地重新分配未完成的子任务以保持正确性和最优性。这两种算法都通过数值模拟和硬件实验在大型系统上根据几个强大的基线进行了严格验证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多智能体系统在协作时间任务下的最小时间规划与在线同步问题，确保任务正确性和最优性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在并发执行任务时缺乏同步机制，导致子任务顺序或协作正确性难以保证，需解决时间最小化与动态调整难题。
AI.method: 提出结合任务自动机部分排序分析与分支定界搜索的anytime算法，并设计适应算法动态调整任务分配以应对执行波动。
AI.result: 算法通过数值模拟与硬件实验验证，在大型系统中快速生成近优解，优于现有基线方法，且能处理任务时长变化与智能体故障。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效实现多智能体系统的最小时间任务规划与在线同步，适应算法保障了动态环境下的正确性与最优性。

authors_text: Wentao Jiang,Sheng Jin,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Ping Luo,Si Liu
title: PoseTrans: A Simple Yet Effective Pose Transformation Augmentation for Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: PoseTrans：用于人体姿势估计的简单而有效的姿势变换增强
abstract: Human pose estimation aims to accurately estimate a wide variety of human poses. However, existing datasets often follow a long-tailed distribution that unusual poses only occupy a small portion, which further leads to the lack of diversity of rare poses. These issues result in the inferior generalization ability of current pose estimators. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective data augmentation method, termed Pose Transformation (PoseTrans), to alleviate the aforementioned problems. Specifically, we propose Pose Transformation Module (PTM) to create new training samples that have diverse poses and adopt a pose discriminator to ensure the plausibility of the augmented poses. Besides, we propose Pose Clustering Module (PCM) to measure the pose rarity and select the "rarest" poses to help balance the long-tailed distribution. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially on rare poses. Also, our method is efficient and simple to implement, which can be easily integrated into the training pipeline of existing pose estimation models.
summary: Human pose estimation aims to accurately estimate a wide variety of human poses. However, existing datasets often follow a long-tailed distribution that unusual poses only occupy a small portion, which further leads to the lack of diversity of rare poses. These issues result in the inferior generalization ability of current pose estimators. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective data augmentation method, termed Pose Transformation (PoseTrans), to alleviate the aforementioned problems. Specifically, we propose Pose Transformation Module (PTM) to create new training samples that have diverse poses and adopt a pose discriminator to ensure the plausibility of the augmented poses. Besides, we propose Pose Clustering Module (PCM) to measure the pose rarity and select the "rarest" poses to help balance the long-tailed distribution. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially on rare poses. Also, our method is efficient and simple to implement, which can be easily integrated into the training pipeline of existing pose estimation models.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势估计旨在准确估计各种人体姿势。然而，现有的数据集通常遵循长尾分布，不寻常的姿势只占据一小部分，这进一步导致罕见姿势缺乏多样性。这些问题导致当前姿态估计器的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据增强方法，称为姿势变换（PoseTrans），以缓解上述问题。具体来说，我们提出姿势变换模块（PTM）来创建具有不同姿势的新训练样本，并采用姿势鉴别器来确保增强姿势的合理性。此外，我们提出姿势聚类模块（PCM）来测量姿势的稀有性并选择“最稀有”的姿势来帮助平衡长尾分布。对三个基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，特别是在罕见的姿势上。此外，我们的方法高效且易于实现，可以轻松集成到现有姿态估计模型的训练流程中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PoseTrans的简单有效的人体姿态估计数据增强方法，通过生成多样化姿态样本提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在长尾分布问题，罕见姿态样本占比低，导致当前姿态估计模型对罕见姿态的泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计姿态转换模块(PTM)生成多样化姿态样本并使用姿态判别器保证合理性，结合姿态聚类模块(PCM)识别并增强罕见姿态以平衡数据分布。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在罕见姿态上表现显著，且方法高效易集成。

search_text: PoseTrans: A Simple Yet Effective Pose Transformation Augmentation for Human Pose Estimation PoseTrans：用于人体姿势估计的简单而有效的姿势变换增强 Human pose estimation aims to accurately estimate a wide variety of human poses. However, existing datasets often follow a long-tailed distribution that unusual poses only occupy a small portion, which further leads to the lack of diversity of rare poses. These issues result in the inferior generalization ability of current pose estimators. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective data augmentation method, termed Pose Transformation (PoseTrans), to alleviate the aforementioned problems. Specifically, we propose Pose Transformation Module (PTM) to create new training samples that have diverse poses and adopt a pose discriminator to ensure the plausibility of the augmented poses. Besides, we propose Pose Clustering Module (PCM) to measure the pose rarity and select the "rarest" poses to help balance the long-tailed distribution. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, especially on rare poses. Also, our method is efficient and simple to implement, which can be easily integrated into the training pipeline of existing pose estimation models. 人体姿势估计旨在准确估计各种人体姿势。然而，现有的数据集通常遵循长尾分布，不寻常的姿势只占据一小部分，这进一步导致罕见姿势缺乏多样性。这些问题导致当前姿态估计器的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据增强方法，称为姿势变换（PoseTrans），以缓解上述问题。具体来说，我们提出姿势变换模块（PTM）来创建具有不同姿势的新训练样本，并采用姿势鉴别器来确保增强姿势的合理性。此外，我们提出姿势聚类模块（PCM）来测量姿势的稀有性并选择“最稀有”的姿势来帮助平衡长尾分布。对三个基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，特别是在罕见的姿势上。此外，我们的方法高效且易于实现，可以轻松集成到现有姿态估计模型的训练流程中。 本文提出了一种名为PoseTrans的简单有效的人体姿态估计数据增强方法，通过生成多样化姿态样本提升模型泛化能力。 Wentao Jiang,Sheng Jin,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Ping Luo,Si Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Jia You,Jun Lu,C. -C. Jay Kuo,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: Subtype-Aware Dynamic Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 子类型感知动态无监督域适应
comment: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
comments: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been successfully applied to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to target domains without their labels. Recently introduced transferable prototypical networks (TPN) further addresses class-wise conditional alignment. In TPN, while the closeness of class centers between source and target domains is explicitly enforced in a latent space, the underlying fine-grained subtype structure and the cross-domain within-class compactness have not been fully investigated. To counter this, we propose a new approach to adaptively perform a fine-grained subtype-aware alignment to improve performance in the target domain without the subtype label in both domains. The insight of our approach is that the unlabeled subtypes in a class have the local proximity within a subtype, while exhibiting disparate characteristics, because of different conditional and label shifts. Specifically, we propose to simultaneously enforce subtype-wise compactness and class-wise separation, by utilizing intermediate pseudo-labels. In addition, we systematically investigate various scenarios with and without prior knowledge of subtype numbers, and propose to exploit the underlying subtype structure. Furthermore, a dynamic queue framework is developed to evolve the subtype cluster centroids steadily using an alternative processing scheme. Experimental results, carried out with multi-view congenital heart disease data and VisDA and DomainNet, show the effectiveness and validity of our subtype-aware UDA, compared with state-of-the-art UDA methods.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been successfully applied to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to target domains without their labels. Recently introduced transferable prototypical networks (TPN) further addresses class-wise conditional alignment. In TPN, while the closeness of class centers between source and target domains is explicitly enforced in a latent space, the underlying fine-grained subtype structure and the cross-domain within-class compactness have not been fully investigated. To counter this, we propose a new approach to adaptively perform a fine-grained subtype-aware alignment to improve performance in the target domain without the subtype label in both domains. The insight of our approach is that the unlabeled subtypes in a class have the local proximity within a subtype, while exhibiting disparate characteristics, because of different conditional and label shifts. Specifically, we propose to simultaneously enforce subtype-wise compactness and class-wise separation, by utilizing intermediate pseudo-labels. In addition, we systematically investigate various scenarios with and without prior knowledge of subtype numbers, and propose to exploit the underlying subtype structure. Furthermore, a dynamic queue framework is developed to evolve the subtype cluster centroids steadily using an alternative processing scheme. Experimental results, carried out with multi-view congenital heart disease data and VisDA and DomainNet, show the effectiveness and validity of our subtype-aware UDA, compared with state-of-the-art UDA methods.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）已成功应用于将知识从带标签的源域转移到没有标签的目标域。最近引入的可转移原型网络（TPN）进一步解决了类条件对齐问题。在 TPN 中，虽然源域和目标域之间的类中心的紧密度在潜在空间中明确强制，但潜在的细粒度子类型结构和跨域类内紧凑性尚未得到充分研究。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法来自适应地执行细粒度的子类型感知对齐，以提高目标域中的性能，而无需在两个域中使用子类型标签。我们的方法的见解是，类中未标记的子类型在子类型内具有局部接近性，同时由于不同的条件和标签转换而表现出不同的特征。具体来说，我们建议通过利用中间伪标签来同时强制子类型紧凑性和类分离。此外，我们系统地研究了具有或不具有子类型编号先验知识的各种场景，并建议利用底层子类型结构。此外，开发了动态队列框架，以使用替代处理方案稳定地演化子类型簇质心。使用多视图先天性心脏病数据以及 VisDA 和 DomainNet 进行的实验结果表明，与最先进的 UDA 方法相比，我们的亚型感知 UDA 的有效性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种子类型感知的动态无监督域适应方法，通过细粒度对齐提升跨域适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法（如TPN）未充分考虑类内细粒度子类型结构及跨域类内紧致性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 利用中间伪标签同时强化子类型内紧致性与类间分离，结合动态队列框架稳定演化子类型聚类中心，并系统研究不同子类型数量场景。
AI.result: 在多视图先天心脏病数据及VisDA/DomainNet数据集上，该方法优于现有最先进UDA方法，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过子类型感知对齐与动态框架，本文为无监督域适应提供了新思路，有效提升了跨域目标域性能。

In TPN, while the closeness of class centers between source and target domains is explicitly enforced in a latent space, the underlying fine-grained subtype structure and the cross-domain within-class compactness have not been fully investigated. To counter this, we propose a new approach to adaptively perform a fine-grained subtype-aware alignment to improve performance in the target domain without the subtype label in both domains. The insight of our approach is that the unlabeled subtypes in a class have the local proximity within a subtype, while exhibiting disparate characteristics, because of different conditional and label shifts. In addition, we systematically investigate various scenarios with and without prior knowledge of subtype numbers, and propose to exploit the underlying subtype structure. Furthermore, a dynamic queue framework is developed to evolve the subtype cluster centroids steadily using an alternative processing scheme. Experimental results, carried out with multi-view congenital heart disease data and VisDA and DomainNet, show the effectiveness and validity of our subtype-aware UDA, compared with state-of-the-art UDA methods. 无监督域适应（UDA）已成功应用于将知识从带标签的源域转移到没有标签的目标域。最近引入的可转移原型网络（TPN）进一步解决了类条件对齐问题。在 TPN 中，虽然源域和目标域之间的类中心的紧密度在潜在空间中明确强制，但潜在的细粒度子类型结构和跨域类内紧凑性尚未得到充分研究。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法来自适应地执行细粒度的子类型感知对齐，以提高目标域中的性能，而无需在两个域中使用子类型标签。我们的方法的见解是，类中未标记的子类型在子类型内具有局部接近性，同时由于不同的条件和标签转换而表现出不同的特征。具体来说，我们建议通过利用中间伪标签来同时强制子类型紧凑性和类分离。此外，我们系统地研究了具有或不具有子类型编号先验知识的各种场景，并建议利用底层子类型结构。此外，开发了动态队列框架，以使用替代处理方案稳定地演化子类型簇质心。使用多视图先天性心脏病数据以及 VisDA 和 DomainNet 进行的实验结果表明，与最先进的 UDA 方法相比，我们的亚型感知 UDA 的有效性和有效性。 本文提出一种子类型感知的动态无监督域适应方法，通过细粒度对齐提升跨域适应性能。 Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Jia You,Jun Lu,C. -C. authors_text: Qingxu Fu,Tenghai Qiu,Jianqiang Yi,Zhiqiang Pu,Xiaolin Ai,Wanmai Yuan
title: A Policy Resonance Approach to Solve the Problem of Responsibility Diffusion in Multiagent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 解决多主体强化学习中责任扩散问题的策略共振方法
abstract: SOTA multiagent reinforcement algorithms distinguish themselves in many ways from their single-agent equivalences. However, most of them still totally inherit the single-agent exploration-exploitation strategy. Naively inheriting this strategy from single-agent algorithms causes potential collaboration failures, in which the agents blindly follow mainstream behaviors and reject taking minority responsibility. We name this problem the Responsibility Diffusion (RD) as it shares similarities with a same-name social psychology effect. In this work, we start by theoretically analyzing the cause of this RD problem, which can be traced back to the exploration-exploitation dilemma of multiagent systems (especially large-scale multiagent systems). We address this RD problem by proposing a Policy Resonance (PR) approach which modifies the collaborative exploration strategy of agents by refactoring the joint agent policy while keeping individual policies approximately invariant. Next, we show that SOTA algorithms can equip this approach to promote the collaborative performance of agents in complex cooperative tasks. Experiments are performed in multiple test benchmark tasks to illustrate the effectiveness of this approach.
summary: SOTA multiagent reinforcement algorithms distinguish themselves in many ways from their single-agent equivalences. However, most of them still totally inherit the single-agent exploration-exploitation strategy. Naively inheriting this strategy from single-agent algorithms causes potential collaboration failures, in which the agents blindly follow mainstream behaviors and reject taking minority responsibility. We name this problem the Responsibility Diffusion (RD) as it shares similarities with a same-name social psychology effect. In this work, we start by theoretically analyzing the cause of this RD problem, which can be traced back to the exploration-exploitation dilemma of multiagent systems (especially large-scale multiagent systems). We address this RD problem by proposing a Policy Resonance (PR) approach which modifies the collaborative exploration strategy of agents by refactoring the joint agent policy while keeping individual policies approximately invariant. Next, we show that SOTA algorithms can equip this approach to promote the collaborative performance of agents in complex cooperative tasks. Experiments are performed in multiple test benchmark tasks to illustrate the effectiveness of this approach.
abstract_zh: SOTA 多智能体强化算法在很多方面都与单智能体等价算法区分开来。然而，它们中的大多数仍然完全继承了单代理探索-利用策略。天真地从单代理算法继承这种策略会导致潜在的协作失败，其中代理盲目地遵循主流行为并拒绝承担少数责任。我们将这个问题命名为责任扩散（RD），因为它与同名的社会心理学效应有相似之处。在这项工作中，我们首先从理论上分析这个RD问题的原因，这可以追溯到多智能体系统（特别是大规模多智能体系统）的探索-利用困境。我们通过提出策略共振（PR）方法来解决这个 RD 问题，该方法通过重构联合代理策略来修改代理的协作探索策略，同时保持各个策略大致不变。接下来，我们展示了 SOTA 算法可以装备这种方法来提高智能体在复杂协作任务中的协作性能。在多个测试基准任务中进行实验来说明该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出策略共振方法解决多智能体强化学习中的责任扩散问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体算法继承单智能体探索-利用策略，导致协作失败和责任扩散，影响复杂任务表现。
AI.method: 通过重构联合策略实现策略共振（PR），调整协作探索策略同时保持个体策略近似不变。
AI.result: 实验验证PR方法在多个基准任务中有效提升多智能体协作性能。
AI.conclusion: 策略共振方法成功解决责任扩散问题，为多智能体协作提供新思路。

Next, we show that SOTA algorithms can equip this approach to promote the collaborative performance of agents in complex cooperative tasks. Experiments are performed in multiple test benchmark tasks to illustrate the effectiveness of this approach. SOTA 多智能体强化算法在很多方面都与单智能体等价算法区分开来。然而，它们中的大多数仍然完全继承了单代理探索-利用策略。天真地从单代理算法继承这种策略会导致潜在的协作失败，其中代理盲目地遵循主流行为并拒绝承担少数责任。我们将这个问题命名为责任扩散（RD），因为它与同名的社会心理学效应有相似之处。在这项工作中，我们首先从理论上分析这个RD问题的原因，这可以追溯到多智能体系统（特别是大规模多智能体系统）的探索-利用困境。我们通过提出策略共振（PR）方法来解决这个 RD 问题，该方法通过重构联合代理策略来修改代理的协作探索策略，同时保持各个策略大致不变。接下来，我们展示了 SOTA 算法可以装备这种方法来提高智能体在复杂协作任务中的协作性能。在多个测试基准任务中进行实验来说明该方法的有效性。 本文提出策略共振方法解决多智能体强化学习中的责任扩散问题。 Qingxu Fu,Tenghai Qiu,Jianqiang Yi,Zhiqiang Pu,Xiaolin Ai,Wanmai Yuan cs.AI

authors_text: Yuting Ding,Di Wu
title: A Latent Feature Analysis-based Approach for Spatio-Temporal Traffic Data Recovery
title_zh: 基于潜在特征分析的时空交通数据恢复方法
abstract: Missing data is an inevitable and common problem in data-driven intelligent transportation systems (ITS). In the past decade, scholars have done many research on the recovery of missing traffic data, however how to make full use of spatio-temporal traffic patterns to improve the recovery performance is still an open problem. Aiming at the spatio-temporal characteristics of traffic speed data, this paper regards the recovery of missing data as a matrix completion problem, and proposes a spatio-temporal traffic data completion method based on hidden feature analysis, which discovers spatio-temporal patterns and underlying structures from incomplete data to complete the recovery task. Therefore, we introduce spatial and temporal correlation to capture the main underlying features of each dimension. Finally, these latent features are applied to recovery traffic data through latent feature analysis. The experimental and evaluation results show that the evaluation criterion value of the model is small, which indicates that the model has better performance. The results show that the model can accurately estimate the continuous missing data.
summary: Missing data is an inevitable and common problem in data-driven intelligent transportation systems (ITS). In the past decade, scholars have done many research on the recovery of missing traffic data, however how to make full use of spatio-temporal traffic patterns to improve the recovery performance is still an open problem. Aiming at the spatio-temporal characteristics of traffic speed data, this paper regards the recovery of missing data as a matrix completion problem, and proposes a spatio-temporal traffic data completion method based on hidden feature analysis, which discovers spatio-temporal patterns and underlying structures from incomplete data to complete the recovery task. Therefore, we introduce spatial and temporal correlation to capture the main underlying features of each dimension. Finally, these latent features are applied to recovery traffic data through latent feature analysis. The experimental and evaluation results show that the evaluation criterion value of the model is small, which indicates that the model has better performance. The results show that the model can accurately estimate the continuous missing data.
abstract_zh: 数据缺失是数据驱动的智能交通系统（ITS）中不可避免的常见问题。在过去的十年中，学者们在丢失流量数据的恢复方面做了很多研究，但如何充分利用时空流量模式来提高恢复性能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。针对交通速度数据的时空特征，将缺失数据的恢复视为矩阵补全问题，提出一种基于隐含特征分析的时空交通数据补全方法，从不完整数据中发现时空模式和底层结构，完成恢复任务。因此，我们引入空间和时间相关性来捕获每个维度的主要基本特征。最后，通过潜在特征分析将这些潜在特征应用于恢复流量数据。实验和评估结果表明，模型的评估准则值较小，表明模型具有较好的性能。结果表明，该模型能够准确估计连续缺失数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在特征分析的时空交通数据恢复方法，用于解决智能交通系统中缺失数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能充分挖掘交通数据的时空特征，导致缺失数据恢复效果有限，需探索更有效的特征利用方式。
AI.method: 将数据恢复建模为矩阵补全问题，通过引入时空相关性提取潜在特征，并利用隐藏特征分析完成数据恢复。
AI.result: 实验表明模型评估指标值较小，能准确估计连续缺失数据，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过挖掘时空潜在特征，有效提升了交通数据缺失值的恢复性能。

authors_text: Nishanth Kumar,Willie McClinton,Rohan Chitnis,Tom Silver,Tomás Lozano-Pérez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling
title: Learning Efficient Abstract Planning Models that Choose What to Predict
title_zh: 学习选择预测内容的高效抽象规划模型
abstract: An effective approach to solving long-horizon tasks in robotics domains with continuous state and action spaces is bilevel planning, wherein a high-level search over an abstraction of an environment is used to guide low-level decision-making. Recent work has shown how to enable such bilevel planning by learning abstract models in the form of symbolic operators and neural samplers. In this work, we show that existing symbolic operator learning approaches fall short in many robotics domains where a robot's actions tend to cause a large number of irrelevant changes in the abstract state. This is primarily because they attempt to learn operators that exactly predict all observed changes in the abstract state. To overcome this issue, we propose to learn operators that 'choose what to predict' by only modelling changes necessary for abstract planning to achieve specified goals. Experimentally, we show that our approach learns operators that lead to efficient planning across 10 different hybrid robotics domains, including 4 from the challenging BEHAVIOR-100 benchmark, while generalizing to novel initial states, goals, and objects.
summary: An effective approach to solving long-horizon tasks in robotics domains with continuous state and action spaces is bilevel planning, wherein a high-level search over an abstraction of an environment is used to guide low-level decision-making. Recent work has shown how to enable such bilevel planning by learning abstract models in the form of symbolic operators and neural samplers. In this work, we show that existing symbolic operator learning approaches fall short in many robotics domains where a robot's actions tend to cause a large number of irrelevant changes in the abstract state. This is primarily because they attempt to learn operators that exactly predict all observed changes in the abstract state. To overcome this issue, we propose to learn operators that 'choose what to predict' by only modelling changes necessary for abstract planning to achieve specified goals. Experimentally, we show that our approach learns operators that lead to efficient planning across 10 different hybrid robotics domains, including 4 from the challenging BEHAVIOR-100 benchmark, while generalizing to novel initial states, goals, and objects.
abstract_zh: 解决具有连续状态和动作空间的机器人领域中的长视野任务的有效方法是双层规划，其中对环境抽象的高级搜索用于指导低级决策。最近的工作展示了如何通过学习符号运算符和神经采样器形式的抽象模型来实现这种双层规划。在这项工作中，我们表明现有的符号算子学习方法在许多机器人领域中都存在不足，在这些领域中，机器人的动作往往会导致抽象状态中出现大量不相关的变化。这主要是因为他们试图学习能够准确预测抽象状态中所有观察到的变化的运算符。为了克服这个问题，我们建议学习运算符，通过仅对抽象规划实现指定目标所需的更改进行建模来“选择预测内容”。通过实验，我们表明，我们的方法可以学习算子，从而在 10 个不同的混合机器人领域进行高效规划，其中包括来自具有挑战性的 BEHAVIOR-100 基准的 4 个领域，同时推广到新的初始状态、目标和对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习高效抽象规划模型的方法，通过选择性预测必要变化来优化机器人领域的分层规划。
AI.motivation: 现有符号操作符学习方法在机器人领域表现不足，因机器人动作常导致大量无关的抽象状态变化，而传统方法试图精确预测所有变化。
AI.method: 提出学习仅建模实现抽象规划目标所需变化的操作符，通过神经采样器和符号操作符的结合实现选择性预测。
AI.result: 在10个混合机器人领域（包括BEHAVIOR-100基准中的4个）实验验证，方法实现了高效规划并能泛化到新初始状态、目标和物体。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过聚焦必要变化显著提升了抽象规划效率，在复杂机器人任务中展现出良好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Robert A. Marsden,Mario Döbler,Bin Yang
title: Introducing Intermediate Domains for Effective Self-Training during Test-Time
title_zh: 引入中间域以在测试期间进行有效的自我训练
abstract: Experiencing domain shifts during test-time is nearly inevitable in practice and likely results in a severe performance degradation. To overcome this issue, test-time adaptation continues to update the initial source model during deployment. A promising direction are methods based on self-training which have been shown to be well suited for gradual domain adaptation, since reliable pseudo-labels can be provided. In this work, we address two problems that exist when applying self-training in the setting of test-time adaptation. First, adapting a model to long test sequences that contain multiple domains can lead to error accumulation. Second, naturally, not all shifts are gradual in practice. To tackle these challenges, we introduce GTTA. By creating artificial intermediate domains that divide the current domain shift into a more gradual one, effective self-training through high quality pseudo-labels can be performed. To create the intermediate domains, we propose two independent variations: mixup and light-weight style transfer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on the continual and gradual corruption benchmarks, as well as ImageNet-R. To further investigate gradual shifts in the context of urban scene segmentation, we publish a new benchmark: CarlaTTA. It enables the exploration of several non-stationary domain shifts.
summary: Experiencing domain shifts during test-time is nearly inevitable in practice and likely results in a severe performance degradation. To overcome this issue, test-time adaptation continues to update the initial source model during deployment. A promising direction are methods based on self-training which have been shown to be well suited for gradual domain adaptation, since reliable pseudo-labels can be provided. In this work, we address two problems that exist when applying self-training in the setting of test-time adaptation. First, adapting a model to long test sequences that contain multiple domains can lead to error accumulation. Second, naturally, not all shifts are gradual in practice. To tackle these challenges, we introduce GTTA. By creating artificial intermediate domains that divide the current domain shift into a more gradual one, effective self-training through high quality pseudo-labels can be performed. To create the intermediate domains, we propose two independent variations: mixup and light-weight style transfer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on the continual and gradual corruption benchmarks, as well as ImageNet-R. To further investigate gradual shifts in the context of urban scene segmentation, we publish a new benchmark: CarlaTTA. It enables the exploration of several non-stationary domain shifts.
abstract_zh: 在实践中，在测试期间经历域转换几乎是不可避免的，并且可能会导致性能严重下降。为了克服这个问题，测试时适应在部署期间继续更新初始源模型。一个有前途的方向是基于自训练的方法，该方法已被证明非常适合渐进域适应，因为可以提供可靠的伪标签。在这项工作中，我们解决了在测试时间适应环境中应用自我训练时存在的两个问题。首先，使模型适应包含多个域的长测试序列可能会导致错误累积。其次，当然，在实践中并非所有转变都是渐进的。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 GTTA。通过创建人工中间域，将当前的域转换划分为更渐进的域，可以通过高质量的伪标签进行有效的自我训练。为了创建中间域，我们提出了两种独立的变体：混合和轻量级风格转移。我们在持续和渐进的腐败基准以及 ImageNet-R 上证明了我们的方法的有效性。为了进一步研究城市场景分割背景下的逐渐转变，我们发布了一个新的基准：CarlaTTA。它使得能够探索多个非平稳域转移。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在测试时通过引入中间域来有效进行自训练的方法，以应对领域转移带来的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 测试时领域转移会导致模型性能严重下降，现有自训练方法在处理多领域长期测试序列时存在错误累积问题，且实际中并非所有领域转移都是渐进的。
AI.method: 提出GTTA方法，通过创建人工中间域将领域转移分解为渐进过程，并采用mixup和轻量级风格迁移生成中间域以提升伪标签质量。
AI.result: 在持续退化基准、ImageNet-R以及新发布的CarlaTTA基准上验证了方法的有效性，尤其在处理非平稳领域转移时表现优异。
AI.conclusion: GTTA方法通过引入中间域有效缓解了测试时领域适应中的错误累积问题，为处理非平稳领域转移提供了新思路，并推动了城市场景分割等应用的研究。
