authors_text: Mahdi Shariatzadeh,Mahdi Eftekhari,Mohammad Javad Rostami
title: A New Scheme for Image Compression and Encryption Using ECIES, Henon Map, and AEGAN
title_zh: 一种使用 ECIES、Henon Map 和 AEGAN 的图像压缩和加密新方案
abstract: Providing security in the transmission of images and other multimedia data has become one of the most important scientific and practical issues. In this paper, a method for compressing and encryption images is proposed, which can safely transmit images in low-bandwidth data transmission channels. At first, using the autoencoding generative adversarial network (AEGAN) model, the images are mapped to a vector in the latent space with low dimensions. In the next step, the obtained vector is encrypted using public key encryption methods. In the proposed method, Henon chaotic map is used for permutation, which makes information transfer more secure. To evaluate the results of the proposed scheme, three criteria SSIM, PSNR, and execution time have been used.
summary: Providing security in the transmission of images and other multimedia data has become one of the most important scientific and practical issues. In this paper, a method for compressing and encryption images is proposed, which can safely transmit images in low-bandwidth data transmission channels. At first, using the autoencoding generative adversarial network (AEGAN) model, the images are mapped to a vector in the latent space with low dimensions. In the next step, the obtained vector is encrypted using public key encryption methods. In the proposed method, Henon chaotic map is used for permutation, which makes information transfer more secure. To evaluate the results of the proposed scheme, three criteria SSIM, PSNR, and execution time have been used.
abstract_zh: 提供图像和其他多媒体数据传输的安全性已成为最重要的科学和实际问题之一。本文提出了一种图像压缩和加密方法，可以在低带宽数据传输通道中安全地传输图像。首先，使用自动编码生成对抗网络（AEGAN）模型，将图像映射到低维潜在空间中的向量。下一步，使用公钥加密方法对获得的向量进行加密。该方法利用Henon混沌映射进行排列，使得信息传输更加安全。为了评估所提出方案的结果，使用了三个标准 SSIM、PSNR 和执行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合AEGAN、Henon混沌映射和ECIES公钥加密的图像压缩加密新方案，用于低带宽环境下的安全图像传输。
AI.motivation: 多媒体数据传输安全需求日益增长，尤其在低带宽场景下需兼顾压缩效率与加密安全性。
AI.method: 分三步实现：1) 使用AEGAN将图像映射至低维潜空间向量；2) 通过Henon混沌映射进行像素置乱；3) 采用ECIES公钥算法加密处理后的数据。
AI.result: 通过SSIM、PSNR指标验证图像质量，执行时间评估方案效率，实验结果符合安全传输要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在保证图像重构质量的同时实现有效加密，为低带宽环境下的多媒体安全传输提供新思路。

authors_text: Tilman Hinnerichs,Zhenwei Tang,Xi Peng,Xiangliang Zhang,Robert Hoehndorf
title: FALCON: Scalable Reasoning over Inconsistent ALC Ontologies
title_zh: FALCON：针对不一致的 ALC 本体的可扩展推理
abstract: Ontologies are one of the richest sources of knowledge. Real-world ontologies often contain thousands of axioms and are often human-made. Hence, they may contain inconsistency and incomplete information which may impair classical reasoners to compute entailments that are considered as useful. To overcome these two challenges, we propose FALCON, a Fuzzy Ontology Neural reasoner to approximate reasoning over ALC ontologies. We provide an approximate technique for the model generation step in classical ALC reasoners. Our approximation is not guaranteed to construct exact logical models, but can approximate arbitrary models, which is notably faster for some large ontologies. Moreover, by sampling multiple approximate logical models, our technique supports approximate entailment also over inconsistent ontologies. Theoretical results show that more models generated lead to closer, i.e., faithful approximation of entailment over ALC entailments. Experimental results show that FALCON enables approximate reasoning and reasoning in the presence of inconsistency. Our experiments further demonstrate how ontologies can improve knowledge base completion in biomedicine by incorporating knowledge expressed in ALC.
summary: Ontologies are one of the richest sources of knowledge. Real-world ontologies often contain thousands of axioms and are often human-made. Hence, they may contain inconsistency and incomplete information which may impair classical reasoners to compute entailments that are considered as useful. To overcome these two challenges, we propose FALCON, a Fuzzy Ontology Neural reasoner to approximate reasoning over ALC ontologies. We provide an approximate technique for the model generation step in classical ALC reasoners. Our approximation is not guaranteed to construct exact logical models, but can approximate arbitrary models, which is notably faster for some large ontologies. Moreover, by sampling multiple approximate logical models, our technique supports approximate entailment also over inconsistent ontologies. Theoretical results show that more models generated lead to closer, i.e., faithful approximation of entailment over ALC entailments. Experimental results show that FALCON enables approximate reasoning and reasoning in the presence of inconsistency. Our experiments further demonstrate how ontologies can improve knowledge base completion in biomedicine by incorporating knowledge expressed in ALC.
abstract_zh: 本体论是最丰富的知识来源之一。现实世界的本体通常包含数千个公理，并且通常是人造的。因此，它们可能包含不一致和不完整的信息，这可能会损害经典推理机计算被认为有用的蕴涵。为了克服这两个挑战，我们提出了 FALCON，一种模糊本体神经推理器，用于对 ALC 本体进行近似推理。我们为经典 ALC 推理机中的模型生成步骤提供了一种近似技术。我们的近似不能保证构造精确的逻辑模型，但可以近似任意模型，这对于某些大型本体来说明显更快。此外，通过对多个近似逻辑模型进行采样，我们的技术还支​​持不一致本体的近似蕴涵。理论结果表明，生成的模型越多，蕴涵就越接近，即对 ALC 蕴涵的忠实近似。实验结果表明，FALCON能够实现近似推理以及存在不一致的情况下的推理。我们的实验进一步证明了本体论如何通过整合 ALC 中表达的知识来提高生物医学知识库的完成度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FALCON，一种用于处理不一致ALC本体的可扩展模糊神经推理方法，通过近似模型生成实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 现实世界本体存在不一致性与规模庞大问题，传统精确推理方法效率低下且无法处理矛盾信息。
AI.method: 设计模糊神经推理框架，采用近似模型生成技术并结合多模型采样，支持不一致本体的近似推理。
AI.result: 理论证明模型数量与近似精度正相关，实验验证FALCON在大规模本体推理与生物医学知识补全中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FALCON通过牺牲精确性换取效率，为处理现实本体的不一致性与规模问题提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: FALCON: Scalable Reasoning over Inconsistent ALC Ontologies FALCON：针对不一致的 ALC 本体的可扩展推理 Ontologies are one of the richest sources of knowledge. Real-world ontologies often contain thousands of axioms and are often human-made. Hence, they may contain inconsistency and incomplete information which may impair classical reasoners to compute entailments that are considered as useful. To overcome these two challenges, we propose FALCON, a Fuzzy Ontology Neural reasoner to approximate reasoning over ALC ontologies. We provide an approximate technique for the model generation step in classical ALC reasoners. Our approximation is not guaranteed to construct exact logical models, but can approximate arbitrary models, which is notably faster for some large ontologies. Moreover, by sampling multiple approximate logical models, our technique supports approximate entailment also over inconsistent ontologies. Theoretical results show that more models generated lead to closer, i.e., faithful approximation of entailment over ALC entailments. Experimental results show that FALCON enables approximate reasoning and reasoning in the presence of inconsistency. Our experiments further demonstrate how ontologies can improve knowledge base completion in biomedicine by incorporating knowledge expressed in ALC. 本体论是最丰富的知识来源之一。现实世界的本体通常包含数千个公理，并且通常是人造的。因此，它们可能包含不一致和不完整的信息，这可能会损害经典推理机计算被认为有用的蕴涵。为了克服这两个挑战，我们提出了 FALCON，一种模糊本体神经推理器，用于对 ALC 本体进行近似推理。我们为经典 ALC 推理机中的模型生成步骤提供了一种近似技术。我们的近似不能保证构造精确的逻辑模型，但可以近似任意模型，这对于某些大型本体来说明显更快。此外，通过对多个近似逻辑模型进行采样，我们的技术还支​​持不一致本体的近似蕴涵。理论结果表明，生成的模型越多，蕴涵就越接近，即对 ALC 蕴涵的忠实近似。实验结果表明，FALCON能够实现近似推理以及存在不一致的情况下的推理。我们的实验进一步证明了本体论如何通过整合 ALC 中表达的知识来提高生物医学知识库的完成度。 本文提出FALCON，一种用于处理不一致ALC本体的可扩展模糊神经推理方法，通过近似模型生成实现高效推理。 Tilman Hinnerichs,Zhenwei Tang,Xi Peng,Xiangliang Zhang,Robert Hoehndorf cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Bryce McLaughlin,Jann Spiess
title: Algorithmic Assistance with Recommendation-Dependent Preferences
title_zh: 具有推荐相关首选项的算法协助
abstract: When an algorithm provides risk assessments, we typically think of them as helpful inputs to human decisions, such as when risk scores are presented to judges or doctors. However, a decision-maker may react not only to the information provided by the algorithm. The decision-maker may also view the algorithmic recommendation as a default action, making it costly for them to deviate, such as when a judge is reluctant to overrule a high-risk assessment for a defendant or a doctor fears the consequences of deviating from recommended procedures. To address such unintended consequences of algorithmic assistance, we propose a model of joint human-machine decision-making. Within this model, we consider the effect and design of algorithmic recommendations when they affect choices not just by shifting beliefs, but also by altering preferences. We motivate this assumption from institutional factors, such as a desire to avoid audits, as well as from well-established models in behavioral science that predict loss aversion relative to a reference point. We show that recommendation-dependent preferences create inefficiencies where the decision-maker is overly responsive to the recommendation. As a remedy, we discuss algorithms that strategically withhold recommendations and show how they can improve the quality of final decisions. Concretely, we prove that an intuitive algorithm achieves minimax optimality by sending recommendations only when it is confident that their implementation would improve over an unassisted baseline decision.
summary: When an algorithm provides risk assessments, we typically think of them as helpful inputs to human decisions, such as when risk scores are presented to judges or doctors. However, a decision-maker may react not only to the information provided by the algorithm. The decision-maker may also view the algorithmic recommendation as a default action, making it costly for them to deviate, such as when a judge is reluctant to overrule a high-risk assessment for a defendant or a doctor fears the consequences of deviating from recommended procedures. To address such unintended consequences of algorithmic assistance, we propose a model of joint human-machine decision-making. Within this model, we consider the effect and design of algorithmic recommendations when they affect choices not just by shifting beliefs, but also by altering preferences. We motivate this assumption from institutional factors, such as a desire to avoid audits, as well as from well-established models in behavioral science that predict loss aversion relative to a reference point. We show that recommendation-dependent preferences create inefficiencies where the decision-maker is overly responsive to the recommendation. As a remedy, we discuss algorithms that strategically withhold recommendations and show how they can improve the quality of final decisions. Concretely, we prove that an intuitive algorithm achieves minimax optimality by sending recommendations only when it is confident that their implementation would improve over an unassisted baseline decision.
abstract_zh: 当算法提供风险评估时，我们通常将其视为对人类决策有用的输入，例如将风险评分呈现给法官或医生时。然而，决策者可能不仅会对算法提供的信息做出反应。决策者还可能将算法建议视为默认行为，使他们偏离建议的代价高昂，例如当法官不愿意否决对被告的高风险评估或医生担心偏离推荐程序的后果时。为了解决算法辅助的此类意外后果，我们提出了一种人机联合决策模型。在这个模型中，我们考虑算法推荐的效果和设计，当它们不仅通过改变信念，而且通过改变偏好来影响选择时。我们从制度因素（例如避免审计的愿望）以及行为科学中预测相对于参考点的损失厌恶的完善模型中激发了这一假设。我们表明，当决策者对推荐过度敏感时，依赖推荐的偏好会导致效率低下。作为一种补救措施，我们讨论了策略性地保留建议的算法，并展示了它们如何提高最终决策的质量。具体来说，我们证明直观算法只有在确信其实施会比无辅助基线决策有所改进时才发送建议，从而实现极小极大最优性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究算法推荐如何通过影响决策者的偏好而不仅仅是提供信息，提出了一种联合人机决策模型，并设计策略性隐藏推荐的算法以提升决策质量。
AI.motivation: 算法推荐可能使决策者过度依赖默认选项（如法官不愿推翻高风险评估），导致非效率结果，需解决这种算法辅助的副作用。
AI.method: 构建人机联合决策模型，考虑推荐通过改变参考点（如规避审查）和损失厌恶等行为因素影响偏好，设计仅在高置信度时提供推荐的算法。
AI.result: 证明推荐依赖偏好会导致决策者过度响应推荐，提出策略性隐藏推荐的算法可实现最小最大优化，提升最终决策质量。
AI.conclusion: 算法推荐需平衡信息提供与避免偏好扭曲，策略性隐藏推荐可减少非效率，未来应设计更智能的辅助机制以优化人机协作决策。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究算法推荐如何通过影响决策者的偏好而不仅仅是提供信息，提出了一种联合人机决策模型，并设计策略性隐藏推荐的算法以提升决策质量。

authors_text: Zhaoxuan Tan,Zilong Chen,Shangbin Feng,Qingyue Zhang,Qinghua Zheng,Jundong Li,Minnan Luo
title: KRACL: Contrastive Learning with Graph Context Modeling for Sparse Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: KRACL：使用图上下文建模进行稀疏知识图补全的对比学习
abstract: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) aim to map entities and relations to low dimensional spaces and have become the \textit{de-facto} standard for knowledge graph completion. Most existing KGE methods suffer from the sparsity challenge, where it is harder to predict entities that appear less frequently in knowledge graphs. In this work, we propose a novel framework KRACL to alleviate the widespread sparsity in KGs with graph context and contrastive learning. Firstly, we propose the Knowledge Relational Attention Network (KRAT) to leverage the graph context by simultaneously projecting neighboring triples to different latent spaces and jointly aggregating messages with the attention mechanism. KRAT is capable of capturing the subtle semantic information and importance of different context triples as well as leveraging multi-hop information in knowledge graphs. Secondly, we propose the knowledge contrastive loss by combining the contrastive loss with cross entropy loss, which introduces more negative samples and thus enriches the feedback to sparse entities. Our experiments demonstrate that KRACL achieves superior results across various standard knowledge graph benchmarks, especially on WN18RR and NELL-995 which have large numbers of low in-degree entities. Extensive experiments also bear out KRACL's effectiveness in handling sparse knowledge graphs and robustness against noisy triples.
summary: Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) aim to map entities and relations to low dimensional spaces and have become the \textit{de-facto} standard for knowledge graph completion. Most existing KGE methods suffer from the sparsity challenge, where it is harder to predict entities that appear less frequently in knowledge graphs. In this work, we propose a novel framework KRACL to alleviate the widespread sparsity in KGs with graph context and contrastive learning. Firstly, we propose the Knowledge Relational Attention Network (KRAT) to leverage the graph context by simultaneously projecting neighboring triples to different latent spaces and jointly aggregating messages with the attention mechanism. KRAT is capable of capturing the subtle semantic information and importance of different context triples as well as leveraging multi-hop information in knowledge graphs. Secondly, we propose the knowledge contrastive loss by combining the contrastive loss with cross entropy loss, which introduces more negative samples and thus enriches the feedback to sparse entities. Our experiments demonstrate that KRACL achieves superior results across various standard knowledge graph benchmarks, especially on WN18RR and NELL-995 which have large numbers of low in-degree entities. Extensive experiments also bear out KRACL's effectiveness in handling sparse knowledge graphs and robustness against noisy triples.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）旨在将实体和关系映射到低维空间，并已成为知识图补全的 \textit{de-facto} 标准。大多数现有的 KGE 方法都面临着稀疏性挑战，即很难预测知识图中出现频率较低的实体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 KRACL，通过图上下文和对比学习来缓解 KG 中普遍存在的稀疏性。首先，我们提出知识关系注意力网络（KRAT），通过同时将相邻三元组投影到不同的潜在空间并利用注意力机制联合聚合消息来利用图上下文。 KRAT 能够捕获不同上下文三元组的微妙语义信息和重要性，并利用知识图中的多跳信息。其次，我们将对比损失与交叉熵损失相结合，提出了知识对比损失，引入了更多的负样本，从而丰富了对稀疏实体的反馈。我们的实验表明，KRACL 在各种标准知识图基准测试中取得了优异的结果，特别是在具有大量低入度实体的 WN18RR 和 NELL-995 上。大量的实验也证明了 KRACL 在处理稀疏知识图方面的有效性以及对噪声三元组的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KRACL框架，通过图上下文建模和对比学习解决知识图谱补全中的稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法在处理低频实体时面临稀疏性挑战，难以有效预测出现次数较少的实体。
AI.method: 设计知识关系注意力网络（KRAT）利用图上下文信息，并结合对比损失与交叉熵损失构建知识对比损失函数，增强对稀疏实体的反馈。
AI.result: 在WN18RR和NELL-995等基准测试中表现优异，尤其在低入度实体较多的数据集上效果显著，且对噪声三元组具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: KRACL通过图上下文建模和对比学习有效缓解了知识图谱的稀疏性问题，为稀疏场景下的知识补全提供了新思路。

search_text: KRACL: Contrastive Learning with Graph Context Modeling for Sparse Knowledge Graph Completion KRACL：使用图上下文建模进行稀疏知识图补全的对比学习 Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) aim to map entities and relations to low dimensional spaces and have become the \textit{de-facto} standard for knowledge graph completion. Most existing KGE methods suffer from the sparsity challenge, where it is harder to predict entities that appear less frequently in knowledge graphs. In this work, we propose a novel framework KRACL to alleviate the widespread sparsity in KGs with graph context and contrastive learning. Firstly, we propose the Knowledge Relational Attention Network (KRAT) to leverage the graph context by simultaneously projecting neighboring triples to different latent spaces and jointly aggregating messages with the attention mechanism. KRAT is capable of capturing the subtle semantic information and importance of different context triples as well as leveraging multi-hop information in knowledge graphs. Secondly, we propose the knowledge contrastive loss by combining the contrastive loss with cross entropy loss, which introduces more negative samples and thus enriches the feedback to sparse entities. Our experiments demonstrate that KRACL achieves superior results across various standard knowledge graph benchmarks, especially on WN18RR and NELL-995 which have large numbers of low in-degree entities. Extensive experiments also bear out KRACL's effectiveness in handling sparse knowledge graphs and robustness against noisy triples. 知识图嵌入（KGE）旨在将实体和关系映射到低维空间，并已成为知识图补全的 \textit{de-facto} 标准。大多数现有的 KGE 方法都面临着稀疏性挑战，即很难预测知识图中出现频率较低的实体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 KRACL，通过图上下文和对比学习来缓解 KG 中普遍存在的稀疏性。首先，我们提出知识关系注意力网络（KRAT），通过同时将相邻三元组投影到不同的潜在空间并利用注意力机制联合聚合消息来利用图上下文。 KRAT 能够捕获不同上下文三元组的微妙语义信息和重要性，并利用知识图中的多跳信息。其次，我们将对比损失与交叉熵损失相结合，提出了知识对比损失，引入了更多的负样本，从而丰富了对稀疏实体的反馈。我们的实验表明，KRACL 在各种标准知识图基准测试中取得了优异的结果，特别是在具有大量低入度实体的 WN18RR 和 NELL-995 上。大量的实验也证明了 KRACL 在处理稀疏知识图方面的有效性以及对噪声三元组的鲁棒性。 本文提出KRACL框架，通过图上下文建模和对比学习解决知识图谱补全中的稀疏性问题。 Zhaoxuan Tan,Zilong Chen,Shangbin Feng,Qingyue Zhang,Qinghua Zheng,Jundong Li,Minnan Luo cs.AI

authors_text: Seyma Yucer,Matt Poyser,Noura Al Moubayed,Toby P. Breckon
title: Does lossy image compression affect racial bias within face recognition?
title_zh: 有损图像压缩会影响人脸识别中的种族偏见吗？
abstract: Yes - This study investigates the impact of commonplace lossy image compression on face recognition algorithms with regard to the racial characteristics of the subject. We adopt a recently proposed racial phenotype-based bias analysis methodology to measure the effect of varying levels of lossy compression across racial phenotype categories. Additionally, we determine the relationship between chroma-subsampling and race-related phenotypes for recognition performance. Prior work investigates the impact of lossy JPEG compression algorithm on contemporary face recognition performance. However, there is a gap in how this impact varies with different race-related inter-sectional groups and the cause of this impact. Via an extensive experimental setup, we demonstrate that common lossy image compression approaches have a more pronounced negative impact on facial recognition performance for specific racial phenotype categories such as darker skin tones (by up to 34.55\%). Furthermore, removing chroma-subsampling during compression improves the false matching rate (up to 15.95\%) across all phenotype categories affected by the compression, including darker skin tones, wide noses, big lips, and monolid eye categories. In addition, we outline the characteristics that may be attributable as the underlying cause of such phenomenon for lossy compression algorithms such as JPEG.
summary: Yes - This study investigates the impact of commonplace lossy image compression on face recognition algorithms with regard to the racial characteristics of the subject. We adopt a recently proposed racial phenotype-based bias analysis methodology to measure the effect of varying levels of lossy compression across racial phenotype categories. Additionally, we determine the relationship between chroma-subsampling and race-related phenotypes for recognition performance. Prior work investigates the impact of lossy JPEG compression algorithm on contemporary face recognition performance. However, there is a gap in how this impact varies with different race-related inter-sectional groups and the cause of this impact. Via an extensive experimental setup, we demonstrate that common lossy image compression approaches have a more pronounced negative impact on facial recognition performance for specific racial phenotype categories such as darker skin tones (by up to 34.55\%). Furthermore, removing chroma-subsampling during compression improves the false matching rate (up to 15.95\%) across all phenotype categories affected by the compression, including darker skin tones, wide noses, big lips, and monolid eye categories. In addition, we outline the characteristics that may be attributable as the underlying cause of such phenomenon for lossy compression algorithms such as JPEG.
abstract_zh: 是的 - 这项研究调查了常见的有损图像压缩对人脸识别算法在受试者种族特征方面的影响。我们采用最近提出的基于种族表型的偏差分析方法来衡量不同种族表型类别的有损压缩水平的影响。此外，我们还确定了色度二次采样和种族相关表型之间的关系以提高识别性能。先前的工作研究了有损 JPEG 压缩算法对当代人脸识别性能的影响。然而，这种影响如何随不同种族相关的交叉群体的变化以及这种影响的原因存在差异。通过广泛的实验设置，我们证明常见的有损图像压缩方法对特定种族表型类别（例如较深的肤色）的面部识别性能具有更明显的负面影响（高达 34.55%）。此外，在压缩过程中删除色度子采样可以提高受压缩影响的所有表型类别的错误匹配率（高达 15.95%），包括较深的肤色、宽鼻子、大嘴唇和单眼皮眼睛类别。此外，我们还概述了有损压缩算法（例如 JPEG）可能导致这种现象的根本原因的特征。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了常见的有损图像压缩对人脸识别算法中种族偏见的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究探讨了有损JPEG压缩对人脸识别性能的影响，但尚未明确这种影响在不同种族相关交叉群体中的变化及原因。
AI.method: 该研究采用基于种族表型的偏差分析方法，测量不同压缩水平对不同种族表型类别识别性能的影响，并分析色度子采样与种族相关表型之间的关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，常见的有损图像压缩方法对特定种族表型类别（如较深肤色）的面部识别性能有更显著的负面影响（最高达34.55%）。去除压缩过程中的色度子采样可改善所有受影响表型类别的误匹配率（最高达15.95%）。
AI.conclusion: 有损压缩算法（如JPEG）对某些种族表型类别的人脸识别性能有显著负面影响，而去除色度子采样可缓解这一问题。

authors_text: Ryuichi Takanobu,Hao Zhou,Yankai Lin,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Minlie Huang
title: Manual-Guided Dialogue for Flexible Conversational Agents
title_zh: 灵活对话代理的手动引导对话
abstract: How to build and use dialogue data efficiently, and how to deploy models in different domains at scale can be two critical issues in building a task-oriented dialogue system. In this paper, we propose a novel manual-guided dialogue scheme to alleviate these problems, where the agent learns the tasks from both dialogue and manuals. The manual is an unstructured textual document that guides the agent in interacting with users and the database during the conversation. Our proposed scheme reduces the dependence of dialogue models on fine-grained domain ontology, and makes them more flexible to adapt to various domains. We then contribute a fully-annotated multi-domain dataset MagDial to support our scheme. It introduces three dialogue modeling subtasks: instruction matching, argument filling, and response generation. Modeling these subtasks is consistent with the human agent's behavior patterns. Experiments demonstrate that the manual-guided dialogue scheme improves data efficiency and domain scalability in building dialogue systems. The dataset and benchmark will be publicly available for promoting future research.
summary: How to build and use dialogue data efficiently, and how to deploy models in different domains at scale can be two critical issues in building a task-oriented dialogue system. In this paper, we propose a novel manual-guided dialogue scheme to alleviate these problems, where the agent learns the tasks from both dialogue and manuals. The manual is an unstructured textual document that guides the agent in interacting with users and the database during the conversation. Our proposed scheme reduces the dependence of dialogue models on fine-grained domain ontology, and makes them more flexible to adapt to various domains. We then contribute a fully-annotated multi-domain dataset MagDial to support our scheme. It introduces three dialogue modeling subtasks: instruction matching, argument filling, and response generation. Modeling these subtasks is consistent with the human agent's behavior patterns. Experiments demonstrate that the manual-guided dialogue scheme improves data efficiency and domain scalability in building dialogue systems. The dataset and benchmark will be publicly available for promoting future research.
abstract_zh: 如何高效地构建和使用对话数据，以及如何在不同领域大规模部署模型，可能是构建面向任务的对话系统的两个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的手动引导对话方案来缓解这些问题，其中代理从对话和手册中学习任务。手册是一种非结构化文本文档，指导代理在对话过程中与用户和数据库进行交互。我们提出的方案减少了对话模型对细粒度领域本体的依赖，并使它们更灵活地适应各种领域。然后，我们贡献一个完整注释的多域数据集 MagDial 来支持我们的方案。它引入了三个对话建模子任务：指令匹配、参数填充和响应生成。对这些子任务进行建模与人类代理的行为模式一致。实验表明，手动引导的对话方案提高了构建对话系统的数据效率和领域可扩展性。数据集和基准将公开以促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对话与手册数据的新型手动引导对话方案，以解决任务导向型对话系统在数据效率和跨领域适应性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统依赖细粒度领域本体，导致数据效率低下且难以扩展至新领域，需更灵活的建模方法。
AI.method: 通过融合非结构化手册文本与对话数据，设计包含指令匹配、参数填充和响应生成的三阶段子任务建模框架，并构建多领域标注数据集MagDial。
AI.result: 实验验证该方案提升数据效率与领域适应性，公开的数据集和基准为后续研究提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 手动引导对话框架有效降低对领域本体的依赖，多任务建模方式符合人类交互逻辑，推动对话系统向通用化发展。

motivation: 现有对话系统依赖细粒度领域本体，导致数据效率低下且难以扩展至新领域，需更灵活的建模方法。
method: 通过融合非结构化手册文本与对话数据，设计包含指令匹配、参数填充和响应生成的三阶段子任务建模框架，并构建多领域标注数据集MagDial。
result: 实验验证该方案提升数据效率与领域适应性，公开的数据集和基准为后续研究提供支持。
conclusion: 手动引导对话框架有效降低对领域本体的依赖，多任务建模方式符合人类交互逻辑，推动对话系统向通用化发展。
search_text: Manual-Guided Dialogue for Flexible Conversational Agents 灵活对话代理的手动引导对话 How to build and use dialogue data efficiently, and how to deploy models in different domains at scale can be two critical issues in building a task-oriented dialogue system. In this paper, we propose a novel manual-guided dialogue scheme to alleviate these problems, where the agent learns the tasks from both dialogue and manuals. The manual is an unstructured textual document that guides the agent in interacting with users and the database during the conversation. Our proposed scheme reduces the dependence of dialogue models on fine-grained domain ontology, and makes them more flexible to adapt to various domains. We then contribute a fully-annotated multi-domain dataset MagDial to support our scheme. It introduces three dialogue modeling subtasks: instruction matching, argument filling, and response generation. Modeling these subtasks is consistent with the human agent's behavior patterns. Experiments demonstrate that the manual-guided dialogue scheme improves data efficiency and domain scalability in building dialogue systems. The dataset and benchmark will be publicly available for promoting future research. 如何高效地构建和使用对话数据，以及如何在不同领域大规模部署模型，可能是构建面向任务的对话系统的两个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的手动引导对话方案来缓解这些问题，其中代理从对话和手册中学习任务。手册是一种非结构化文本文档，指导代理在对话过程中与用户和数据库进行交互。我们提出的方案减少了对话模型对细粒度领域本体的依赖，并使它们更灵活地适应各种领域。然后，我们贡献一个完整注释的多域数据集 MagDial 来支持我们的方案。它引入了三个对话建模子任务：指令匹配、参数填充和响应生成。对这些子任务进行建模与人类代理的行为模式一致。实验表明，手动引导的对话方案提高了构建对话系统的数据效率和领域可扩展性。数据集和基准将公开以促进未来的研究。 本文提出一种结合对话与手册数据的新型手动引导对话方案，以解决任务导向型对话系统在数据效率和跨领域适应性方面的挑战。 Ryuichi Takanobu,Hao Zhou,Yankai Lin,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Minlie Huang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Subhankar Roy,Martin Trapp,Andrea Pilzer,Juho Kannala,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci,Arno Solin
title: Uncertainty-guided Source-free Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 不确定性引导的无源域适应
abstract: Source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) aims to adapt a classifier to an unlabelled target data set by only using a pre-trained source model. However, the absence of the source data and the domain shift makes the predictions on the target data unreliable. We propose quantifying the uncertainty in the source model predictions and utilizing it to guide the target adaptation. For this, we construct a probabilistic source model by incorporating priors on the network parameters inducing a distribution over the model predictions. Uncertainties are estimated by employing a Laplace approximation and incorporated to identify target data points that do not lie in the source manifold and to down-weight them when maximizing the mutual information on the target data. Unlike recent works, our probabilistic treatment is computationally lightweight, decouples source training and target adaptation, and requires no specialized source training or changes of the model architecture. We show the advantages of uncertainty-guided SFDA over traditional SFDA in the closed-set and open-set settings and provide empirical evidence that our approach is more robust to strong domain shifts even without tuning.
summary: Source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) aims to adapt a classifier to an unlabelled target data set by only using a pre-trained source model. However, the absence of the source data and the domain shift makes the predictions on the target data unreliable. We propose quantifying the uncertainty in the source model predictions and utilizing it to guide the target adaptation. For this, we construct a probabilistic source model by incorporating priors on the network parameters inducing a distribution over the model predictions. Uncertainties are estimated by employing a Laplace approximation and incorporated to identify target data points that do not lie in the source manifold and to down-weight them when maximizing the mutual information on the target data. Unlike recent works, our probabilistic treatment is computationally lightweight, decouples source training and target adaptation, and requires no specialized source training or changes of the model architecture. We show the advantages of uncertainty-guided SFDA over traditional SFDA in the closed-set and open-set settings and provide empirical evidence that our approach is more robust to strong domain shifts even without tuning.
abstract_zh: 无源域适应（SFDA）旨在仅使用预先训练的源模型来使分类器适应未标记的目标数据集。然而，源数据的缺失和域转移使得对目标数据的预测不可靠。我们建议量化源模型预测中的不确定性，并利用它来指导目标适应。为此，我们通过将先验纳入网络参数来构建概率源模型，从而诱导模型预测的分布。通过采用拉普拉斯近似来估计不确定性，并将其合并以识别不在源流形中的目标数据点，并在最大化目标数据的互信息时降低它们的权重。与最近的工作不同，我们的概率处理在计算上是轻量级的，将源训练和目标适应解耦，并且不需要专门的源训练或模型架构的更改。我们在封闭集和开放集设置中展示了不确定性引导的 SFDA 相对于传统 SFDA 的优势，并提供了经验证据，证明我们的方法即使在没有调整的情况下对于强域转移也更加鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的无源域适应方法，通过量化源模型预测的不确定性来提升目标领域的分类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统源自由域适应（SFDA）在缺乏源数据和面对领域差异时，目标数据预测结果不可靠，需设计无需源数据且鲁棒的适应方法。
AI.method: 构建概率源模型并引入参数先验，利用拉普拉斯近似估计预测不确定性，通过降低源流形外数据的权重优化目标领域互信息。
AI.result: 在闭集和开集场景下优于传统SFDA方法，且对强领域偏移具有更强鲁棒性，无需参数调整即可实现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性引导实现高效域适应，计算轻量且无需源数据或模型结构修改，适用于多种领域偏移场景。

authors_text: Licai Sun,Zheng Lian,Bin Liu,Jianhua Tao
title: Efficient Multimodal Transformer with Dual-Level Feature Restoration for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 具有双级特征恢复的高效多模态变压器，用于稳健的多模态情感分析
comment: Accepted by TAC. The code is available at https://github.com/sunlicai/EMT-DLFR
comments: Accepted by TAC. The code is available at https://github.com/sunlicai/EMT-DLFR
abstract: With the proliferation of user-generated online videos, Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) has attracted increasing attention recently. Despite significant progress, there are still two major challenges on the way towards robust MSA: 1) inefficiency when modeling cross-modal interactions in unaligned multimodal data; and 2) vulnerability to random modality feature missing which typically occurs in realistic settings. In this paper, we propose a generic and unified framework to address them, named Efficient Multimodal Transformer with Dual-Level Feature Restoration (EMT-DLFR). Concretely, EMT employs utterance-level representations from each modality as the global multimodal context to interact with local unimodal features and mutually promote each other. It not only avoids the quadratic scaling cost of previous local-local cross-modal interaction methods but also leads to better performance. To improve model robustness in the incomplete modality setting, on the one hand, DLFR performs low-level feature reconstruction to implicitly encourage the model to learn semantic information from incomplete data. On the other hand, it innovatively regards complete and incomplete data as two different views of one sample and utilizes siamese representation learning to explicitly attract their high-level representations. Comprehensive experiments on three popular datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in both complete and incomplete modality settings.
summary: With the proliferation of user-generated online videos, Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) has attracted increasing attention recently. Despite significant progress, there are still two major challenges on the way towards robust MSA: 1) inefficiency when modeling cross-modal interactions in unaligned multimodal data; and 2) vulnerability to random modality feature missing which typically occurs in realistic settings. In this paper, we propose a generic and unified framework to address them, named Efficient Multimodal Transformer with Dual-Level Feature Restoration (EMT-DLFR). Concretely, EMT employs utterance-level representations from each modality as the global multimodal context to interact with local unimodal features and mutually promote each other. It not only avoids the quadratic scaling cost of previous local-local cross-modal interaction methods but also leads to better performance. To improve model robustness in the incomplete modality setting, on the one hand, DLFR performs low-level feature reconstruction to implicitly encourage the model to learn semantic information from incomplete data. On the other hand, it innovatively regards complete and incomplete data as two different views of one sample and utilizes siamese representation learning to explicitly attract their high-level representations. Comprehensive experiments on three popular datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in both complete and incomplete modality settings.
abstract_zh: 随着用户生成的在线视频的激增，多模态情感分析（MSA）最近引起了越来越多的关注。尽管取得了重大进展，但在实现稳健的 MSA 的道路上仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）在未对齐的多模态数据中建模跨模态交互时效率低下； 2）随机模态特征缺失的脆弱性，这通常发生在现实环境中。在本文中，我们提出了一个通用且统一的框架来解决这些问题，名为具有双级特征恢复的高效多模态变压器（EMT-DLFR）。具体来说，EMT 采用每种模态的话语级表示作为全局多模态上下文，与局部单模态特征交互并相互促进。它不仅避免了先前局部-局部跨模态交互方法的二次缩放成本，而且还带来了更好的性能。为了提高模型在不完整模态设置中的鲁棒性，一方面，DLFR 进行低级特征重建，以隐式鼓励模型从不完整数据中学习语义信息。另一方面，它创新性地将完整和不完整数据视为一个样本的两种不同视图，并利用孪生表示学习来明确吸引它们的高级表示。对三个流行数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在完整和不完整模态设置中均取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EMT-DLFR的高效多模态Transformer框架，用于解决多模态情感分析中的跨模态交互效率低下和模态特征缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未对齐的多模态数据时存在计算效率低的问题，且对真实场景中常见的模态特征缺失情况鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过使用话语级表示作为全局上下文与局部单模态特征交互，避免二次方复杂度；同时采用双级特征恢复机制，结合低层特征重建和孪生表示学习应对缺失模态。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集上均取得优于现有方法的性能，完整与缺失模态设置下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: EMT-DLFR通过双级特征恢复和高效交互机制，有效解决了多模态情感分析中的效率与鲁棒性挑战。

Comprehensive experiments on three popular datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance in both complete and incomplete modality settings. 随着用户生成的在线视频的激增，多模态情感分析（MSA）最近引起了越来越多的关注。尽管取得了重大进展，但在实现稳健的 MSA 的道路上仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）在未对齐的多模态数据中建模跨模态交互时效率低下； 2）随机模态特征缺失的脆弱性，这通常发生在现实环境中。在本文中，我们提出了一个通用且统一的框架来解决这些问题，名为具有双级特征恢复的高效多模态变压器（EMT-DLFR）。具体来说，EMT 采用每种模态的话语级表示作为全局多模态上下文，与局部单模态特征交互并相互促进。它不仅避免了先前局部-局部跨模态交互方法的二次缩放成本，而且还带来了更好的性能。为了提高模型在不完整模态设置中的鲁棒性，一方面，DLFR 进行低级特征重建，以隐式鼓励模型从不完整数据中学习语义信息。另一方面，它创新性地将完整和不完整数据视为一个样本的两种不同视图，并利用孪生表示学习来明确吸引它们的高级表示。对三个流行数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在完整和不完整模态设置中均取得了优异的性能。 本文提出了一种名为EMT-DLFR的高效多模态Transformer框架，用于解决多模态情感分析中的跨模态交互效率低下和模态特征缺失问题。 Licai Sun,Zheng Lian,Bin Liu,Jianhua Tao cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Anna Reithmeir,Luis Figueredo,Sami Haddadin
title: Human-to-Robot Manipulability Domain Adaptation with Parallel Transport and Manifold-Aware ICP
title_zh: 具有并行传输和流形感知 ICP 的人机可操作性域适应
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, to be published in 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, to be published in 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Manipulability ellipsoids efficiently capture the human pose and reveal information about the task at hand. Their use in task-dependent robot teaching - particularly their transfer from a teacher to a learner - can advance emulation of human-like motion. Although in recent literature focus is shifted towards manipulability transfer between two robots, the adaptation to the capabilities of the other kinematic system is to date not addressed and research in transfer from human to robot is still in its infancy. This work presents a novel manipulability domain adaptation method for the transfer of manipulability information to the domain of another kinematic system. As manipulability matrices/ellipsoids are symmetric positive-definite (SPD) they can be viewed as points on the Riemannian manifold of SPD matrices. We are the first to address the problem of manipulability transfer from the perspective of point cloud registration. We propose a manifold-aware Iterative Closest Point algorithm (ICP) with parallel transport initialization. Furthermore, we introduce a correspondence matching heuristic for manipulability ellipsoids based on inherent geometric features. We confirm our method in simulation experiments with 2-DoF manipulators as well as 7-DoF models representing the human-arm kinematics.

Furthermore, we introduce a correspondence matching heuristic for manipulability ellipsoids based on inherent geometric features. We confirm our method in simulation experiments with 2-DoF manipulators as well as 7-DoF models representing the human-arm kinematics.
abstract_zh: 可操纵性椭球有效地捕捉人体姿势并揭示有关手头任务的信息。它们在任务相关的机器人教学中的使用——特别是从教师到学习者的转移——可以促进类人运动的模拟。尽管最近的文献重点转向两个机器人之间的可操纵性转移，但迄今为止尚未解决对其他运动系统功能的适应，并且从人类到机器人的转移研究仍处于起步阶段。这项工作提出了一种新颖的可操纵性域自适应方法，用于将可操纵性信息传输到另一个运动系统的域。由于可操作性矩阵/椭球体是对称正定 (SPD) 的，因此它们可以被视为 SPD 矩阵黎曼流形上的点。我们是第一个从点云配准的角度解决可操作性转移问题的人。我们提出了一种具有并行传输初始化的流形感知迭代最近点算法（ICP）。此外，我们引入了基于固有几何特征的可操纵性椭球体的对应匹配启发式。我们在 2-DoF 操纵器以及代表人臂运动学的 7-DoF 模型的模拟实验中证实了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平行传输和流形感知ICP算法的人机可操作性领域自适应方法，实现人类姿态可操作性信息向机器人运动学系统的迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于机器人间的可操作性迁移，但人类到机器人的能力适配问题尚未解决，需开发跨运动学系统的能力迁移方法。
AI.method: 将SPD矩阵视为黎曼流形上的点，提出结合平行传输初始化的流形感知ICP算法，并设计基于几何特征的椭球体对应匹配策略。
AI.result: 通过2-DoF机械臂和7-DoF人臂模型的仿真验证，证明方法在跨领域可操作性迁移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为人类到机器人的可操作性迁移提供了新框架，实验验证了其可行性，未来可拓展至更复杂运动学系统。

authors_text: Zhaoxia Yin,Heng Yin,Xinpeng Zhang
title: Neural network fragile watermarking with no model performance degradation
title_zh: 神经网络脆弱水印，模型性能不会下降
comment: Published in 2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: Published in 2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to malicious fine-tuning attacks such as data poisoning and backdoor attacks. Therefore, in recent research, it is proposed how to detect malicious fine-tuning of neural network models. However, it usually negatively affects the performance of the protected model. Thus, we propose a novel neural network fragile watermarking with no model performance degradation. In the process of watermarking, we train a generative model with the specific loss function and secret key to generate triggers that are sensitive to the fine-tuning of the target classifier. In the process of verifying, we adopt the watermarked classifier to get labels of each fragile trigger. Then, malicious fine-tuning can be detected by comparing secret keys and labels. Experiments on classic datasets and classifiers show that the proposed method can effectively detect model malicious fine-tuning with no model performance degradation.
summary: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to malicious fine-tuning attacks such as data poisoning and backdoor attacks. Therefore, in recent research, it is proposed how to detect malicious fine-tuning of neural network models. However, it usually negatively affects the performance of the protected model. Thus, we propose a novel neural network fragile watermarking with no model performance degradation. In the process of watermarking, we train a generative model with the specific loss function and secret key to generate triggers that are sensitive to the fine-tuning of the target classifier. In the process of verifying, we adopt the watermarked classifier to get labels of each fragile trigger. Then, malicious fine-tuning can be detected by comparing secret keys and labels. Experiments on classic datasets and classifiers show that the proposed method can effectively detect model malicious fine-tuning with no model performance degradation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络容易受到数据中毒和后门攻击等恶意微调攻击。因此，在最近的研究中，提出了如何检测神经网络模型的恶意微调。然而，它通常会对受保护模型的性能产生负面影响。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络脆弱水印，不会降低模型性能。在水印过程中，我们使用特定的损失函数和密钥训练生成模型，以生成对目标分类器的微调敏感的触发器。在验证过程中，我们采用水印分类器来获取每个脆弱触发器的标签。然后，可以通过比较密钥和标签来检测恶意微调。在经典数据集和分类器上的实验表明，该方法可以有效检测模型恶意微调，并且不会降低模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无模型性能退化的神经网络脆弱水印方法，用于检测恶意微调攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有恶意微调检测方法通常会损害模型性能，亟需一种既能有效检测攻击又不降低模型性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 训练带特定损失函数的生成模型生成敏感触发器，通过水印分类器标签与密钥比对实现攻击检测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在经典数据集和分类器上能有效检测恶意微调且无模型性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的脆弱水印方法为神经网络模型安全防护提供了新思路，兼具检测有效性与性能保持性。

authors_text: Jian Jin,Yuan Xue,Xingxing Zhang,Lili Meng,Yao Zhao,Weisi Lin
title: HVS-Inspired Signal Degradation Network for Just Noticeable Difference Estimation
title_zh: 受 HVS 启发的信号退化网络，用于估计显着差异
comment: Submit to IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
comments: Submit to IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
abstract: Significant improvement has been made on just noticeable difference (JND) modelling due to the development of deep neural networks, especially for the recently developed unsupervised-JND generation models. However, they have a major drawback that the generated JND is assessed in the real-world signal domain instead of in the perceptual domain in the human brain. There is an obvious difference when JND is assessed in such two domains since the visual signal in the real world is encoded before it is delivered into the brain with the human visual system (HVS). Hence, we propose an HVS-inspired signal degradation network for JND estimation. To achieve this, we carefully analyze the HVS perceptual process in JND subjective viewing to obtain relevant insights, and then design an HVS-inspired signal degradation (HVS-SD) network to represent the signal degradation in the HVS. On the one hand, the well learnt HVS-SD enables us to assess the JND in the perceptual domain. On the other hand, it provides more accurate prior information for better guiding JND generation. Additionally, considering the requirement that reasonable JND should not lead to visual attention shifting, a visual attention loss is proposed to control JND generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves the SOTA performance for accurately estimating the redundancy of the HVS. Source code will be available at https://github.com/jianjin008/HVS-SD-JND.
summary: Significant improvement has been made on just noticeable difference (JND) modelling due to the development of deep neural networks, especially for the recently developed unsupervised-JND generation models. However, they have a major drawback that the generated JND is assessed in the real-world signal domain instead of in the perceptual domain in the human brain. There is an obvious difference when JND is assessed in such two domains since the visual signal in the real world is encoded before it is delivered into the brain with the human visual system (HVS). Hence, we propose an HVS-inspired signal degradation network for JND estimation. To achieve this, we carefully analyze the HVS perceptual process in JND subjective viewing to obtain relevant insights, and then design an HVS-inspired signal degradation (HVS-SD) network to represent the signal degradation in the HVS. On the one hand, the well learnt HVS-SD enables us to assess the JND in the perceptual domain. On the other hand, it provides more accurate prior information for better guiding JND generation. Additionally, considering the requirement that reasonable JND should not lead to visual attention shifting, a visual attention loss is proposed to control JND generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves the SOTA performance for accurately estimating the redundancy of the HVS. Source code will be available at https://github.com/jianjin008/HVS-SD-JND.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络的发展，特别是最近开发的无监督 JND 生成模型，在显着差异（JND）建模方面取得了显着的进步。然而，它们有一个主要缺点，即生成的 JND 是在现实世界的信号域而不是人脑的感知域中评估的。在这两个领域评估 JND 时存在明显的差异，因为现实世界中的视觉信号在通过人类视觉系统 (HVS) 传递到大脑之前进行了编码。因此，我们提出了一种 HVS 启发的信号退化网络用于 JND 估计。为了实现这一目标，我们仔细分析了 JND 主观观看中的 HVS 感知过程以获得相关见解，然后设计一个受 HVS 启发的信号退化（HVS-SD）网络来表示 HVS 中的信号退化。一方面，经过充分学习的 HVS-SD 使我们能够评估感知领域的 JND。另一方面，它提供了更准确的先验信息，以更好地指导JND生成。此外，考虑到合理的JND不应导致视觉注意力转移的要求，提出了视觉注意力损失来控制JND的生成。实验结果表明，该方法实现了准确估计 HVS 冗余的 SOTA 性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/jianjin008/HVS-SD-JND 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类视觉系统启发的信号退化网络，用于更准确地估计视觉感知中的可察觉差异（JND）。
AI.motivation: 现有JND模型在真实信号域而非人脑感知域评估差异，导致与人类视觉系统（HVS）处理后的信号存在显著差异，影响准确性。
AI.method: 设计HVS-SD网络模拟HVS信号退化过程，结合感知域评估与视觉注意力损失函数，生成符合感知特性的JND并提供更精确的先验信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在HVS冗余估计任务中达到最先进水平（SOTA），代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模HVS信号退化机制，该方法在感知域实现了更精准的JND估计，为视觉质量评估提供了新思路。

search_text: HVS-Inspired Signal Degradation Network for Just Noticeable Difference Estimation 受 HVS 启发的信号退化网络，用于估计显着差异 Significant improvement has been made on just noticeable difference (JND) modelling due to the development of deep neural networks, especially for the recently developed unsupervised-JND generation models. However, they have a major drawback that the generated JND is assessed in the real-world signal domain instead of in the perceptual domain in the human brain. There is an obvious difference when JND is assessed in such two domains since the visual signal in the real world is encoded before it is delivered into the brain with the human visual system (HVS). Hence, we propose an HVS-inspired signal degradation network for JND estimation. To achieve this, we carefully analyze the HVS perceptual process in JND subjective viewing to obtain relevant insights, and then design an HVS-inspired signal degradation (HVS-SD) network to represent the signal degradation in the HVS. On the one hand, the well learnt HVS-SD enables us to assess the JND in the perceptual domain. On the other hand, it provides more accurate prior information for better guiding JND generation. Additionally, considering the requirement that reasonable JND should not lead to visual attention shifting, a visual attention loss is proposed to control JND generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves the SOTA performance for accurately estimating the redundancy of the HVS. Source code will be available at https://github.com/jianjin008/HVS-SD-JND. 由于深度神经网络的发展，特别是最近开发的无监督 JND 生成模型，在显着差异（JND）建模方面取得了显着的进步。然而，它们有一个主要缺点，即生成的 JND 是在现实世界的信号域而不是人脑的感知域中评估的。在这两个领域评估 JND 时存在明显的差异，因为现实世界中的视觉信号在通过人类视觉系统 (HVS) 传递到大脑之前进行了编码。因此，我们提出了一种 HVS 启发的信号退化网络用于 JND 估计。为了实现这一目标，我们仔细分析了 JND 主观观看中的 HVS 感知过程以获得相关见解，然后设计一个受 HVS 启发的信号退化（HVS-SD）网络来表示 HVS 中的信号退化。一方面，经过充分学习的 HVS-SD 使我们能够评估感知领域的 JND。另一方面，它提供了更准确的先验信息，以更好地指导JND生成。此外，考虑到合理的JND不应导致视觉注意力转移的要求，提出了视觉注意力损失来控制JND的生成。实验结果表明，该方法实现了准确估计 HVS 冗余的 SOTA 性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/jianjin008/HVS-SD-JND 获取。 本文提出一种受人类视觉系统启发的信号退化网络，用于更准确地估计视觉感知中的可察觉差异（JND）。 Jian Jin,Yuan Xue,Xingxing Zhang,Lili Meng,Yao Zhao,Weisi Lin cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Paul Dütting,Federico Fusco,Silvio Lattanzi,Ashkan Norouzi-Fard,Morteza Zadimoghaddam
title: Deletion Robust Non-Monotone Submodular Maximization over Matroids
title_zh: 拟阵上的删除鲁棒非单调子模最大化
comment: Preliminary versions of this work appeared as arXiv:2201.13128 and in ICML'22. The main difference with respect to these versions consists in extending our results to non-monotone submodular functions
comments: Preliminary versions of this work appeared as arXiv:2201.13128 and in ICML'22. The main difference with respect to these versions consists in extending our results to non-monotone submodular functions
abstract: Maximizing a submodular function is a fundamental task in machine learning and in this paper we study the deletion robust version of the problem under the classic matroids constraint. Here the goal is to extract a small size summary of the dataset that contains a high value independent set even after an adversary deleted some elements. We present constant-factor approximation algorithms, whose space complexity depends on the rank $k$ of the matroid and the number $d$ of deleted elements. In the centralized setting we present a $(4.597+O(\varepsilon))$-approximation algorithm with summary size $O( \frac{k+d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$ that is improved to a $(3.582+O(\varepsilon))$-approximation with $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$ summary size when the objective is monotone. In the streaming setting we provide a $(9.435 + O(\varepsilon))$-approximation algorithm with summary size and memory $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$; the approximation factor is then improved to $(5.582+O(\varepsilon))$ in the monotone case.
summary: Maximizing a submodular function is a fundamental task in machine learning and in this paper we study the deletion robust version of the problem under the classic matroids constraint. Here the goal is to extract a small size summary of the dataset that contains a high value independent set even after an adversary deleted some elements. We present constant-factor approximation algorithms, whose space complexity depends on the rank $k$ of the matroid and the number $d$ of deleted elements. In the centralized setting we present a $(4.597+O(\varepsilon))$-approximation algorithm with summary size $O( \frac{k+d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$ that is improved to a $(3.582+O(\varepsilon))$-approximation with $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$ summary size when the objective is monotone. In the streaming setting we provide a $(9.435 + O(\varepsilon))$-approximation algorithm with summary size and memory $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$; the approximation factor is then improved to $(5.582+O(\varepsilon))$ in the monotone case.
abstract_zh: 最大化子模函数是机器学习中的一项基本任务，在本文中，我们研究了经典拟阵约束下问题的删除鲁棒版本。这里的目标是提取数据集的小规模摘要，即使在对手删除了一些元素之后，该数据集也包含高值独立集。我们提出了常数因子近似算法，其空间复杂度取决于拟阵的秩 $k$ 和删除元素的数量 $d$。在集中式设置中，我们提出了一种 $(4.597+O(\varepsilon))$ 近似算法，其汇总大小为 $O( \frac{k+d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$，该算法改进为 $(3.582+O(\varepsilon))$ 近似算法 $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$ 当目标是单调时的摘要大小。在流式传输设置中，我们提供了一个 $(9.435 + O(\varepsilon))$ 近似算法，其摘要大小和内存为 $O(k + \frac{d}{\varepsilon^2}\log \frac{k}{\varepsilon})$；在单调情况下，近似因子改进为 $(5.582+O(\varepsilon))$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对抗性元素删除情况下，对子模函数在拟阵约束下的删除鲁棒非单调最大化问题，并提出了相关算法。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习中，数据可能面临恶意删除的威胁，需设计能在元素被删除后仍能保持高价值独立集的算法，以确保数据摘要的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出基于拟阵秩k和删除数d的常数近似算法，分别针对集中式和流式场景设计不同复杂度的算法，利用近似因子与摘要大小的权衡策略。
AI.result: 集中式场景下非单调问题取得4.597近似比，单调问题优化至3.582；流式场景下非单调问题近似比为9.435，单调问题优化至5.582，摘要大小均与k、d及ε相关。
AI.conclusion: 本文为删除鲁棒子模最大化问题提供了理论保证的高效算法，平衡了近似精度与存储开销，在对抗性数据环境下具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jinhwan Seo,Wonho Bae,Danica J. Sutherland,Junhyug Noh,Daijin Kim
title: Object Discovery via Contrastive Learning for Weakly Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 通过对比学习进行弱监督对象检测的对象发现
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022. For project page, see https://jinhseo.github.io/research/wsod.html For code, see https://github.com/jinhseo/OD-WSCL
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022. For project page, see https://jinhseo.github.io/research/wsod.html For code, see https://github.com/jinhseo/OD-WSCL
abstract: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) is a task that detects objects in an image using a model trained only on image-level annotations. Current state-of-the-art models benefit from self-supervised instance-level supervision, but since weak supervision does not include count or location information, the most common ``argmax'' labeling method often ignores many instances of objects. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel multiple instance labeling method called object discovery. We further introduce a new contrastive loss under weak supervision where no instance-level information is available for sampling, called weakly supervised contrastive loss (WSCL). WSCL aims to construct a credible similarity threshold for object discovery by leveraging consistent features for embedding vectors in the same class. As a result, we achieve new state-of-the-art results on MS-COCO 2014 and 2017 as well as PASCAL VOC 2012, and competitive results on PASCAL VOC 2007.
summary: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) is a task that detects objects in an image using a model trained only on image-level annotations. Current state-of-the-art models benefit from self-supervised instance-level supervision, but since weak supervision does not include count or location information, the most common ``argmax'' labeling method often ignores many instances of objects. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel multiple instance labeling method called object discovery. We further introduce a new contrastive loss under weak supervision where no instance-level information is available for sampling, called weakly supervised contrastive loss (WSCL). WSCL aims to construct a credible similarity threshold for object discovery by leveraging consistent features for embedding vectors in the same class. As a result, we achieve new state-of-the-art results on MS-COCO 2014 and 2017 as well as PASCAL VOC 2012, and competitive results on PASCAL VOC 2007.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象检测 (WSOD) 是一项使用仅在图像级注释上训练的模型来检测图像中的对象的任务。当前最先进的模型受益于自监督实例级监督，但由于弱监督不包括计数或位置信息，因此最常见的“argmax”标记方法通常会忽略许多对象实例。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多实例标记方法，称为对象发现。我们进一步引入了弱监督下的新对比损失，其中没有实例级信息可用于采样，称为弱监督对比损失（WSCL）。 WSCL 旨在通过利用一致的特征在同一类中嵌入向量，为对象发现构建可信的相似性阈值。因此，我们在 MS-COCO 2014 和 2017 以及 PASCAL VOC 2012 上取得了最新的结果，并在 PASCAL VOC 2007 上取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督目标检测方法，通过对象发现和对比学习解决现有方法忽略实例的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测中，argmax标签方法因缺乏实例级信息导致大量对象被忽略，需改进实例标记策略。
AI.method: 提出对象发现的多重实例标记方法，并设计弱监督对比损失（WSCL），利用类内一致特征构建相似性阈值。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO 2014/2017和PASCAL VOC 2012上达到新SOTA，在PASCAL VOC 2007上表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过对象发现与对比学习结合，有效提升了弱监督目标检测的实例识别能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督目标检测方法，通过对象发现和对比学习解决现有方法忽略实例的问题。

ai_content.method: 提出对象发现的多重实例标记方法，并设计弱监督对比损失（WSCL），利用类内一致特征构建相似性阈值。

search_text: Object Discovery via Contrastive Learning for Weakly Supervised Object Detection 通过对比学习进行弱监督对象检测的对象发现 Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) is a task that detects objects in an image using a model trained only on image-level annotations. Current state-of-the-art models benefit from self-supervised instance-level supervision, but since weak supervision does not include count or location information, the most common ``argmax'' labeling method often ignores many instances of objects. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel multiple instance labeling method called object discovery. We further introduce a new contrastive loss under weak supervision where no instance-level information is available for sampling, called weakly supervised contrastive loss (WSCL). WSCL aims to construct a credible similarity threshold for object discovery by leveraging consistent features for embedding vectors in the same class. As a result, we achieve new state-of-the-art results on MS-COCO 2014 and 2017 as well as PASCAL VOC 2012, and competitive results on PASCAL VOC 2007. 弱监督对象检测 (WSOD) 是一项使用仅在图像级注释上训练的模型来检测图像中的对象的任务。当前最先进的模型受益于自监督实例级监督，但由于弱监督不包括计数或位置信息，因此最常见的“argmax”标记方法通常会忽略许多对象实例。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多实例标记方法，称为对象发现。我们进一步引入了弱监督下的新对比损失，其中没有实例级信息可用于采样，称为弱监督对比损失（WSCL）。 WSCL 旨在通过利用一致的特征在同一类中嵌入向量，为对象发现构建可信的相似性阈值。因此，我们在 MS-COCO 2014 和 2017 以及 PASCAL VOC 2012 上取得了最新的结果，并在 PASCAL VOC 2007 上取得了有竞争力的结果。 本文提出一种弱监督目标检测方法，通过对象发现和对比学习解决现有方法忽略实例的问题。 Jinhwan Seo,Wonho Bae,Danica J. Sutherland,Junhyug Noh,Daijin Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Monika Henzinger,Ami Paz,A. R. Sricharan
title: Fine-Grained Complexity Lower Bounds for Families of Dynamic Graphs
title_zh: 动态图族的细粒度复杂性下界
abstract: A dynamic graph algorithm is a data structure that answers queries about a property of the current graph while supporting graph modifications such as edge insertions and deletions. Prior work has shown strong conditional lower bounds for general dynamic graphs, yet graph families that arise in practice often exhibit structural properties that the existing lower bound constructions do not possess. We study three specific graph families that are ubiquitous, namely constant-degree graphs, power-law graphs, and expander graphs, and give the first conditional lower bounds for them. Our results show that even when restricting our attention to one of these graph classes, any algorithm for fundamental graph problems such as distance computation or approximation or maximum matching, cannot simultaneously achieve a sub-polynomial update time and query time. For example, we show that the same lower bounds as for general graphs hold for maximum matching and ($s,t$)-distance in constant-degree graphs, power-law graphs or expanders. Namely, in an $m$-edge graph, there exists no dynamic algorithms with both $O(m^{1/2 - ε})$ update time and $ O(m^{1 -ε})$ query time, for any small $ε> 0$. Note that for ($s,t$)-distance the trivial dynamic algorithm achieves an almost matching upper bound of constant update time and $O(m)$ query time. We prove similar bounds for the other graph families and for other fundamental problems such as densest subgraph detection and perfect matching.
summary: A dynamic graph algorithm is a data structure that answers queries about a property of the current graph while supporting graph modifications such as edge insertions and deletions. Prior work has shown strong conditional lower bounds for general dynamic graphs, yet graph families that arise in practice often exhibit structural properties that the existing lower bound constructions do not possess. We study three specific graph families that are ubiquitous, namely constant-degree graphs, power-law graphs, and expander graphs, and give the first conditional lower bounds for them. Our results show that even when restricting our attention to one of these graph classes, any algorithm for fundamental graph problems such as distance computation or approximation or maximum matching, cannot simultaneously achieve a sub-polynomial update time and query time. For example, we show that the same lower bounds as for general graphs hold for maximum matching and ($s,t$)-distance in constant-degree graphs, power-law graphs or expanders. Namely, in an $m$-edge graph, there exists no dynamic algorithms with both $O(m^{1/2 - ε})$ update time and $ O(m^{1 -ε})$ query time, for any small $ε> 0$. Note that for ($s,t$)-distance the trivial dynamic algorithm achieves an almost matching upper bound of constant update time and $O(m)$ query time. We prove similar bounds for the other graph families and for other fundamental problems such as densest subgraph detection and perfect matching.
abstract_zh: 动态图算法是一种数据结构，它可以回答有关当前图属性的查询，同时支持图修改，例如边插入和删除。先前的工作已经显示了一般动态图的强条件下界，但实践中出现的图族通常表现出现有下界构造所不具备的结构特性。我们研究了三种普遍存在的特定图族，即常度图、幂律图和扩展图，并给出了它们的第一个条件下界。我们的结果表明，即使将我们的注意力限制在这些图类之一上，任何用于基本图问题（例如距离计算或近似或最大匹配）的算法也无法同时实现次多项式更新时间和查询时间。例如，我们表明，与一般图相同的下界适用于常度图、幂律图或扩展器中的最大匹配和 ($s,t$) 距离。也就是说，在$m$边图中，对于任何小的$ε> 0$，不存在具有$O(m^{1/2 - ε})$更新时间和$O(m^{1 -ε})$查询时间的动态算法。请注意，对于 ($s,t$) 距离，普通动态算法实现了恒定更新时间和 $O(m)$ 查询时间几乎匹配的上限。我们证明了其他图族和其他基本问题（例如最密集子图检测和完美匹配）的类似界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态图算法在特定图族（如常数度图、幂律图和扩展图）中的精细复杂度下界，证明了即使在这些结构化图中，某些基础图问题仍无法同时实现次多项式更新时间和查询时间。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有针对一般动态图的强条件性下界，但实际应用中常见的图族具有现有下界构造未考虑的结构特性，需针对性分析其复杂度限制。
AI.method: 通过条件性复杂度理论，结合图族的结构性质，构建针对最大匹配、距离计算等基础问题的下界证明，利用已知的复杂度假设推导时间复杂度限制。
AI.result: 证明了在常数度图、幂律图和扩展图中，最大匹配、(s,t)-距离等问题无法同时达到O(m^{1/2−ε})更新时间和O(m^{1−ε})查询时间（对任意小ε>0），且结果与一般图的下界一致。
AI.conclusion: 特定图族的结构性质无法突破现有条件性下界，动态图算法在这些场景下的效率瓶颈与一般图类似，需探索新的算法设计思路或复杂度假设。

authors_text: Koyu Mizutani,Haruki Mitarai,Kakeru Miyazaki,Ryugo Shimamura,Soichiro Kumano,Toshihiko Yamasaki
title: Prediction of Seismic Intensity Distributions Using Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用神经网络预测地震烈度分布
abstract: The ground motion prediction equation is commonly used to predict the seismic intensity distribution. However, it is not easy to apply this method to seismic distributions affected by underground plate structures, which are commonly known as abnormal seismic distributions. This study proposes a hybrid of regression and classification approaches using neural networks. The proposed model treats the distributions as 2-dimensional data like an image. Our method can accurately predict seismic intensity distributions, even abnormal distributions.
summary: The ground motion prediction equation is commonly used to predict the seismic intensity distribution. However, it is not easy to apply this method to seismic distributions affected by underground plate structures, which are commonly known as abnormal seismic distributions. This study proposes a hybrid of regression and classification approaches using neural networks. The proposed model treats the distributions as 2-dimensional data like an image. Our method can accurately predict seismic intensity distributions, even abnormal distributions.
abstract_zh: 地震动预测方程通常用于预测地震烈度分布。然而，将该方法应用于受地下板块结构影响的地震分布（通常称为异常地震分布）并不容易。这项研究提出了使用神经网络的回归和分类方法的混合。所提出的模型将分布视为像图像一样的二维数据。我们的方法可以准确预测地震烈度分布，甚至异常分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的混合模型，用于准确预测包括异常地震分布在内的地震强度分布。
AI.motivation: 传统地面运动预测方程难以处理受地下板块结构影响的异常地震分布，需开发新方法提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 结合回归与分类任务的神经网络模型，将地震分布数据视为二维图像进行处理。
AI.result: 该方法能够准确预测常规及异常地震强度分布，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合神经网络模型有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为地震强度预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kun Qiu,Harry Chang,Ying Wang,Xiahui Yu,Wenjun Zhu,Yingqi Liu,Jianwei Ma,Weigang Li,Xiaobo Liu,Shuo Dai
title: Traffic Analytics Development Kits (TADK): Enable Real-Time AI Inference in Networking Apps
title_zh: 流量分析开发套件 (TADK)：在网络应用程序中启用实时 AI 推理
comment: Published in: 2022 Thirteenth International Conference on Ubiquitous and Future Networks (ICUFN)
comments: Published in: 2022 Thirteenth International Conference on Ubiquitous and Future Networks (ICUFN)
abstract: Sophisticated traffic analytics, such as the encrypted traffic analytics and unknown malware detection, emphasizes the need for advanced methods to analyze the network traffic. Traditional methods of using fixed patterns, signature matching, and rules to detect known patterns in network traffic are being replaced with AI (Artificial Intelligence) driven algorithms. However, the absence of a high-performance AI networking-specific framework makes deploying real-time AI-based processing within networking workloads impossible. In this paper, we describe the design of Traffic Analytics Development Kits (TADK), an industry-standard framework specific for AI-based networking workloads processing. TADK can provide real-time AI-based networking workload processing in networking equipment from the data center out to the edge without the need for specialized hardware (e.g., GPUs, Neural Processing Unit, and so on). We have deployed TADK in commodity WAF and 5G UPF, and the evaluation result shows that TADK can achieve a throughput up to 35.3Gbps per core on traffic feature extraction, 6.5Gbps per core on traffic classification, and can decrease SQLi/XSS detection down to 4.5us per request with higher accuracy than fixed pattern solution.
summary: Sophisticated traffic analytics, such as the encrypted traffic analytics and unknown malware detection, emphasizes the need for advanced methods to analyze the network traffic. Traditional methods of using fixed patterns, signature matching, and rules to detect known patterns in network traffic are being replaced with AI (Artificial Intelligence) driven algorithms. However, the absence of a high-performance AI networking-specific framework makes deploying real-time AI-based processing within networking workloads impossible. In this paper, we describe the design of Traffic Analytics Development Kits (TADK), an industry-standard framework specific for AI-based networking workloads processing. TADK can provide real-time AI-based networking workload processing in networking equipment from the data center out to the edge without the need for specialized hardware (e.g., GPUs, Neural Processing Unit, and so on). We have deployed TADK in commodity WAF and 5G UPF, and the evaluation result shows that TADK can achieve a throughput up to 35.3Gbps per core on traffic feature extraction, 6.5Gbps per core on traffic classification, and can decrease SQLi/XSS detection down to 4.5us per request with higher accuracy than fixed pattern solution.
abstract_zh: 复杂的流量分析，例如加密流量分析和未知恶意软件检测，强调需要先进的方法来分析网络流量。使用固定模式、签名匹配和规则来检测网络流量中已知模式的传统方法正在被 AI（人工智能）驱动的算法所取代。然而，由于缺乏高性能人工智能网络特定框架，因此无法在网络工作负载中部署基于人工智能的实时处理。在本文中，我们描述了流量分析开发套件 (TADK) 的设计，这是一个专门用于基于人工智能的网络工作负载处理的行业标准框架。 TADK 可以在从数据中心到边缘的网络设备中提供基于人工智能的实时网络工作负载处理，而无需专用硬件（例如 GPU、神经处理单元等）。我们已在商用WAF和5G UPF中部署了TADK，评估结果表明，TADK在流量特征提取方面可实现每核高达35.3Gbps的吞吐量，在流量分类方面可实现每核6.5Gbps的吞吐量，并且可以将SQLi/XSS检测降低至每个请求4.5us，并且比固定模式解决方案具有更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了Traffic Analytics Development Kits (TADK)，一个用于网络设备的AI驱动框架，实现实时流量分析和恶意软件检测，无需专用硬件。
AI.motivation: 传统网络流量分析方法依赖固定模式匹配，难以应对加密流量和未知恶意软件，而现有AI框架缺乏高性能且无需专用硬件的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发TADK框架，针对网络工作负载优化AI推理流程，支持在通用硬件（如WAF、5G UPF）上部署实时AI处理。
AI.result: TADK在单核上实现35.3Gbps流量特征提取、6.5Gbps流量分类，SQLi/XSS检测延迟降至4.5微秒，准确率优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: TADK验证了无需专用硬件即可高效部署AI网络处理的可行性，为数据中心和边缘设备提供高性能解决方案。

authors_text: Juhyung Park,Dongwon Park,Sooyeon Ji,Hyeong-Geol Shin,Se Young Chun,Jongho Lee
title: Self-supervised training of deep denoisers in multi-coil MRI considering noise correlations
title_zh: 考虑噪声相关性的多线圈 MRI 深度降噪器的自监督训练
abstract: Deep learning-based denoising methods have shown powerful results for improving the signal-to-noise ratio of magnetic resonance (MR) images, mostly by leveraging supervised learning with clean ground truth. However, acquiring clean ground truth images is often expensive and time-consuming. Self supervised methods have been widely investigated to mitigate the dependency on clean images, but mostly rely on the suboptimal splitting of K-space measurements of an image to yield input and target images for ensuring statistical independence. In this study, we investigate an alternative self-supervised training method for deep denoisers in multi-coil MRI, dubbed Coil2Coil (C2C), that naturally split and combine the multi-coil data among phased array coils, generating two noise-corrupted images for training. This novel approach allows exploiting multi-coil redundancy, but the images are statistically correlated and may not have the same clean image. To mitigate these issues, we propose the methods to pproximately decorrelate the statistical dependence of these images and match the underlying clean images, thus enabling them to be used as the training pairs. For synthetic denoising experiments, C2C yielded the best performance against prior self-supervised methods, reporting outcome comparable even to supervised methods. For real-world denoising cases, C2C yielded consistent performance as synthetic cases, removing only noise structures.
summary: Deep learning-based denoising methods have shown powerful results for improving the signal-to-noise ratio of magnetic resonance (MR) images, mostly by leveraging supervised learning with clean ground truth. However, acquiring clean ground truth images is often expensive and time-consuming. Self supervised methods have been widely investigated to mitigate the dependency on clean images, but mostly rely on the suboptimal splitting of K-space measurements of an image to yield input and target images for ensuring statistical independence. In this study, we investigate an alternative self-supervised training method for deep denoisers in multi-coil MRI, dubbed Coil2Coil (C2C), that naturally split and combine the multi-coil data among phased array coils, generating two noise-corrupted images for training. This novel approach allows exploiting multi-coil redundancy, but the images are statistically correlated and may not have the same clean image. To mitigate these issues, we propose the methods to pproximately decorrelate the statistical dependence of these images and match the underlying clean images, thus enabling them to be used as the training pairs. For synthetic denoising experiments, C2C yielded the best performance against prior self-supervised methods, reporting outcome comparable even to supervised methods. For real-world denoising cases, C2C yielded consistent performance as synthetic cases, removing only noise structures.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的去噪方法在提高磁共振 (MR) 图像的信噪比方面显示出强大的结果，主要是通过利用具有干净基础事实的监督学习来实现。然而，获取干净的地面实况图像通常既昂贵又耗时。自监督方法已被广泛研究，以减轻对干净图像的依赖，但主要依赖于图像的 K 空间测量的次优分割来产生输入和目标图像，以确保统计独立性。在本研究中，我们研究了一种用于多线圈 MRI 深度降噪器的替代自监督训练方法，称为 Coil2Coil (C2C)，该方法自然地分割和组合相控阵线圈之间的多线圈数据，生成两个噪声损坏的图像用于训练。这种新颖的方法允许利用多线圈冗余，但图像在统计上是相关的，并且可能不具有相同的干净图像。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一些方法来近似去相关这些图像的统计依赖性并匹配底层的干净图像，从而使它们能够用作训练对。对于合成去噪实验，C2C 相对于之前的自监督方法产生了最佳性能，报告的结果甚至可以与监督方法相媲美。对于现实世界的去噪案例，C2C 产生了与合成案例一致的性能，仅去除了噪声结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多线圈MRI的自监督去噪方法Coil2Coil（C2C），通过利用线圈间噪声相关性生成训练数据，无需依赖干净图像。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖昂贵的干净图像，而现有自监督方法通过K空间分割生成训练对，但存在统计独立性不足的问题。
AI.method: C2C方法通过多线圈数据自然分割生成两个噪声图像，利用线圈冗余性并提出统计去相关和清洁图像匹配策略，构建训练对。
AI.result: 合成数据实验中C2C性能优于现有自监督方法且接近监督方法，真实场景去噪效果保持一致，仅去除噪声结构。
AI.conclusion: C2C通过有效利用多线圈噪声相关性，实现了无需干净图像的高质量自监督去噪，为MRI图像处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Songpengcheng Xia,Lei Chu,Ling Pei,Wenxian Yu,Robert C. Qiu
title: Multi-level Contrast Network for Wearables-based Joint Activity Segmentation and Recognition
title_zh: 基于可穿戴设备的联合活动分割和识别的多级对比网络
abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) with wearables is promising research that can be widely adopted in many smart healthcare applications. In recent years, the deep learning-based HAR models have achieved impressive recognition performance. However, most HAR algorithms are susceptible to the multi-class windows problem that is essential yet rarely exploited. In this paper, we propose to relieve this challenging problem by introducing the segmentation technology into HAR, yielding joint activity segmentation and recognition. Especially, we introduce the Multi-Stage Temporal Convolutional Network (MS-TCN) architecture for sample-level activity prediction to joint segment and recognize the activity sequence. Furthermore, to enhance the robustness of HAR against the inter-class similarity and intra-class heterogeneity, a multi-level contrastive loss, containing the sample-level and segment-level contrast, has been proposed to learn a well-structured embedding space for better activity segmentation and recognition performance. Finally, with comprehensive experiments, we verify the effectiveness of the proposed method on two public HAR datasets, achieving significant improvements in the various evaluation metrics.
summary: Human activity recognition (HAR) with wearables is promising research that can be widely adopted in many smart healthcare applications. In recent years, the deep learning-based HAR models have achieved impressive recognition performance. However, most HAR algorithms are susceptible to the multi-class windows problem that is essential yet rarely exploited. In this paper, we propose to relieve this challenging problem by introducing the segmentation technology into HAR, yielding joint activity segmentation and recognition. Especially, we introduce the Multi-Stage Temporal Convolutional Network (MS-TCN) architecture for sample-level activity prediction to joint segment and recognize the activity sequence. Furthermore, to enhance the robustness of HAR against the inter-class similarity and intra-class heterogeneity, a multi-level contrastive loss, containing the sample-level and segment-level contrast, has been proposed to learn a well-structured embedding space for better activity segmentation and recognition performance. Finally, with comprehensive experiments, we verify the effectiveness of the proposed method on two public HAR datasets, achieving significant improvements in the various evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴设备的人体活动识别 (HAR) 是一项很有前途的研究，可以广泛应用于许多智能医疗保健应用中。近年来，基于深度学习的HAR模型取得了令人印象深刻的识别性能。然而，大多数 HAR 算法都容易受到多类窗口问题的影响，该问题很重要但很少被利用。在本文中，我们建议通过将分割技术引入 HAR 来缓解这一具有挑战性的问题，产生联合活动分割和识别。特别是，我们引入了多阶段时间卷积网络（MS-TCN）架构，用于样本级活动预测，以联合分割和识别活动序列。此外，为了增强 HAR 针对类间相似性和类内异质性的鲁棒性，提出了一种包含样本级和片段级对比度的多级对比损失，以学习结构良好的嵌入空间，以获得更好的活动分割和识别性能。最后，通过综合实验，我们在两个公共 HAR 数据集上验证了所提出方法的有效性，在各种评估指标上实现了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级对比网络，用于可穿戴设备的人类活动识别，通过联合活动分割与识别解决多类窗口问题。
AI.motivation: 传统HAR模型在处理多类窗口问题时表现不足，导致活动分割与识别精度下降，需提升模型对类间相似性和类内异质性的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入多阶段时间卷积网络（MS-TCN）进行样本级活动预测，并设计包含样本级和段级对比的多级对比损失，构建结构化嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在两个公开HAR数据集上实验验证，多项评估指标显著提升，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解多类窗口问题，提升活动分割与识别性能，为智能健康应用提供新思路。

search_text: Multi-level Contrast Network for Wearables-based Joint Activity Segmentation and Recognition 基于可穿戴设备的联合活动分割和识别的多级对比网络 Human activity recognition (HAR) with wearables is promising research that can be widely adopted in many smart healthcare applications. In recent years, the deep learning-based HAR models have achieved impressive recognition performance. However, most HAR algorithms are susceptible to the multi-class windows problem that is essential yet rarely exploited. In this paper, we propose to relieve this challenging problem by introducing the segmentation technology into HAR, yielding joint activity segmentation and recognition. Especially, we introduce the Multi-Stage Temporal Convolutional Network (MS-TCN) architecture for sample-level activity prediction to joint segment and recognize the activity sequence. Furthermore, to enhance the robustness of HAR against the inter-class similarity and intra-class heterogeneity, a multi-level contrastive loss, containing the sample-level and segment-level contrast, has been proposed to learn a well-structured embedding space for better activity segmentation and recognition performance. Finally, with comprehensive experiments, we verify the effectiveness of the proposed method on two public HAR datasets, achieving significant improvements in the various evaluation metrics. 可穿戴设备的人体活动识别 (HAR) 是一项很有前途的研究，可以广泛应用于许多智能医疗保健应用中。近年来，基于深度学习的HAR模型取得了令人印象深刻的识别性能。然而，大多数 HAR 算法都容易受到多类窗口问题的影响，该问题很重要但很少被利用。在本文中，我们建议通过将分割技术引入 HAR 来缓解这一具有挑战性的问题，产生联合活动分割和识别。特别是，我们引入了多阶段时间卷积网络（MS-TCN）架构，用于样本级活动预测，以联合分割和识别活动序列。此外，为了增强 HAR 针对类间相似性和类内异质性的鲁棒性，提出了一种包含样本级和片段级对比度的多级对比损失，以学习结构良好的嵌入空间，以获得更好的活动分割和识别性能。最后，通过综合实验，我们在两个公共 HAR 数据集上验证了所提出方法的有效性，在各种评估指标上实现了显着改进。 本文提出一种多级对比网络，用于可穿戴设备的人类活动识别，通过联合活动分割与识别解决多类窗口问题。 Songpengcheng Xia,Lei Chu,Ling Pei,Wenxian Yu,Robert C. authors_text: Robin Kothari,Ryan O'Donnell
title: Mean estimation when you have the source code; or, quantum Monte Carlo methods
title_zh: 当你有源代码时的平均估计；或者，量子蒙特卡罗方法
abstract: Suppose $\boldsymbol{y}$ is a real random variable, and one is given access to ``the code'' that generates it (for example, a randomized or quantum circuit whose output is $\boldsymbol{y}$). We give a quantum procedure that runs the code $O(n)$ times and returns an estimate $\widehat{\boldsymbolμ}$ for $μ= \mathrm{E}[\boldsymbol{y}]$ that with high probability satisfies $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/n$, where $σ= \mathrm{stddev}[\boldsymbol{y}]$. This dependence on $n$ is optimal for quantum algorithms. One may compare with classical algorithms, which can only achieve the quadratically worse $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/\sqrt{n}$. Our method improves upon previous works, which either made additional assumptions about $\boldsymbol{y}$, and/or assumed the algorithm knew an a priori bound on $σ$, and/or used additional logarithmic factors beyond $O(n)$. The central subroutine for our result is essentially Grover's algorithm but with complex phases.ally Grover's algorithm but with complex phases.
summary: Suppose $\boldsymbol{y}$ is a real random variable, and one is given access to ``the code'' that generates it (for example, a randomized or quantum circuit whose output is $\boldsymbol{y}$). We give a quantum procedure that runs the code $O(n)$ times and returns an estimate $\widehat{\boldsymbolμ}$ for $μ= \mathrm{E}[\boldsymbol{y}]$ that with high probability satisfies $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/n$, where $σ= \mathrm{stddev}[\boldsymbol{y}]$. This dependence on $n$ is optimal for quantum algorithms. One may compare with classical algorithms, which can only achieve the quadratically worse $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/\sqrt{n}$. Our method improves upon previous works, which either made additional assumptions about $\boldsymbol{y}$, and/or assumed the algorithm knew an a priori bound on $σ$, and/or used additional logarithmic factors beyond $O(n)$. The central subroutine for our result is essentially Grover's algorithm but with complex phases.ally Grover's algorithm but with complex phases.
abstract_zh: 假设 $\boldsymbol{y}$ 是一个真正的随机变量，并且可以访问生成它的“代码”（例如，输出为 $\boldsymbol{y}$ 的随机或量子电路）。我们给出一个运行代码 $O(n)$ 次的量子程序，并返回 $μ= \mathrm{E}[\boldsymbol{y}]$ 的估计值 $\widehat{\boldsymbolμ}$，该估计值很有可能满足 $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/n$，其中 $σ= \mathrm{stddev}[\boldsymbol{y}]$。这种对 $n$ 的依赖对于量子算法来说是最佳的。可以与经典算法进行比较，经典算法只能实现更差的二次方 $|\widehat{\boldsymbolμ} - μ| \leq σ/\sqrt{n}$。我们的方法改进了以前的工作，这些工作要么对 $\boldsymbol{y}$ 做出额外的假设，和/或假设算法知道 $σ$ 的先验界限，和/或使用超出 $O(n)$ 的额外对数因子。我们的结果的中心子程序本质上是 Grover 算法，但具有复杂的阶段。ally Grover 的算法，但具有复杂的阶段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量子算法，用于在已知生成随机变量的代码时高效估计其均值。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在估计均值时误差随样本量呈平方根关系，而量子算法可实现更优的线性关系，且无需先验信息。
AI.method: 方法基于改进的Grover算法，利用复数相位进行量子搜索，从而更高效地估计均值。
AI.result: 该算法以O(n)次运行代码即可获得误差界为σ/n的均值估计，优于经典算法的σ/√n，并且无需先验标准差信息。
AI.conclusion: 该量子算法在均值估计中达到最优复杂度，无需先验假设且优于经典方法，为量子蒙特卡洛方法提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenshuo Wang,Letian Wang,Chengyuan Zhang,Changliu Liu,Lijun Sun
title: Social Interactions for Autonomous Driving: A Review and Perspectives
title_zh: 自动驾驶的社交互动：回顾与展望
abstract: No human drives a car in a vacuum; she/he must negotiate with other road users to achieve their goals in social traffic scenes. A rational human driver can interact with other road users in a socially-compatible way through implicit communications to complete their driving tasks smoothly in interaction-intensive, safety-critical environments. This paper aims to review the existing approaches and theories to help understand and rethink the interactions among human drivers toward social autonomous driving. We take this survey to seek the answers to a series of fundamental questions: 1) What is social interaction in road traffic scenes? 2) How to measure and evaluate social interaction? 3) How to model and reveal the process of social interaction? 4) How do human drivers reach an implicit agreement and negotiate smoothly in social interaction? This paper reviews various approaches to modeling and learning the social interactions between human drivers, ranging from optimization theory and graphical models to social force theory and behavioral & cognitive science. We also highlight some new directions, critical challenges, and opening questions for future research.
summary: No human drives a car in a vacuum; she/he must negotiate with other road users to achieve their goals in social traffic scenes. A rational human driver can interact with other road users in a socially-compatible way through implicit communications to complete their driving tasks smoothly in interaction-intensive, safety-critical environments. This paper aims to review the existing approaches and theories to help understand and rethink the interactions among human drivers toward social autonomous driving. We take this survey to seek the answers to a series of fundamental questions: 1) What is social interaction in road traffic scenes? 2) How to measure and evaluate social interaction? 3) How to model and reveal the process of social interaction? 4) How do human drivers reach an implicit agreement and negotiate smoothly in social interaction? This paper reviews various approaches to modeling and learning the social interactions between human drivers, ranging from optimization theory and graphical models to social force theory and behavioral & cognitive science. We also highlight some new directions, critical challenges, and opening questions for future research.
abstract_zh: 没有人可以在真空中驾驶汽车；她/他必须与其他道路使用者协商以实现他们在社交交通场景中的目标。理性的人类驾驶员可以通过隐式通信以社交兼容的方式与其他道路使用者进行交互，从而在交互密集、安全关键的环境中顺利完成驾驶任务。本文旨在回顾现有的方法和理论，以帮助理解和重新思考人类驾驶员与社会自动驾驶之间的相互作用。我们进行这次调查是为了寻求一系列基本问题的答案：1）道路交通场景中的社交互动是什么？ 2）如何衡量和评价社交互动？ 3）如何建模和揭示社交互动的过程？ 4）人类驾驶员如何在社交互动中达成隐性协议并顺利协商？本文回顾了对人类驾驶员之间的社会互动进行建模和学习的各种方法，从优化理论和图模型到社会力理论以及行为和认知科学。我们还强调了一些新的方向、关键的挑战以及未来研究的开放性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶中社会交互的研究方法与理论，旨在为未来研究提供方向。
AI.motivation: 人类驾驶员通过隐式沟通与道路使用者互动以确保交通安全，自动驾驶需借鉴此类社会交互机制以提升复杂场景下的决策能力。
AI.method: 通过回顾优化理论、图模型、社会力理论及行为认知科学等方法，分析社会交互的建模与学习技术。
AI.result: 系统梳理了社会交互的定义、评估方法及建模过程，明确了人类驾驶员隐式协商的机制，并指出了当前研究的挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 社会交互建模对自动驾驶安全至关重要，未来需结合多学科理论突破交互机制的动态建模与实时决策难题。
