search_text: Social Interactions for Autonomous Driving: A Review and Perspectives 自动驾驶的社交互动：回顾与展望 No human drives a car in a vacuum; she/he must negotiate with other road users to achieve their goals in social traffic scenes. A rational human driver can interact with other road users in a socially-compatible way through implicit communications to complete their driving tasks smoothly in interaction-intensive, safety-critical environments. This paper aims to review the existing approaches and theories to help understand and rethink the interactions among human drivers toward social autonomous driving. We take this survey to seek the answers to a series of fundamental questions: 1) What is social interaction in road traffic scenes? 2) How to measure and evaluate social interaction? 3) How to model and reveal the process of social interaction? 4) How do human drivers reach an implicit agreement and negotiate smoothly in social interaction? This paper reviews various approaches to modeling and learning the social interactions between human drivers, ranging from optimization theory and graphical models to social force theory and behavioral & cognitive science. We also highlight some new directions, critical challenges, and opening questions for future research. 没有人可以在真空中驾驶汽车；她/他必须与其他道路使用者协商以实现他们在社交交通场景中的目标。理性的人类驾驶员可以通过隐式通信以社交兼容的方式与其他道路使用者进行交互，从而在交互密集、安全关键的环境中顺利完成驾驶任务。本文旨在回顾现有的方法和理论，以帮助理解和重新思考人类驾驶员与社会自动驾驶之间的相互作用。我们进行这次调查是为了寻求一系列基本问题的答案：1）道路交通场景中的社交互动是什么？ 2）如何衡量和评价社交互动？ 3）如何建模和揭示社交互动的过程？ 4）人类驾驶员如何在社交互动中达成隐性协议并顺利协商？本文回顾了对人类驾驶员之间的社会互动进行建模和学习的各种方法，从优化理论和图模型到社会力理论以及行为和认知科学。我们还强调了一些新的方向、关键的挑战以及未来研究的开放性问题。 本文综述了自动驾驶中社会交互的研究方法与理论，旨在为未来研究提供方向。 Wenshuo Wang,Letian Wang,Chengyuan Zhang,Changliu Liu,Lijun Sun cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Harmanpreet Kaur,Doug Downey,Amanpreet Singh,Evie Yu-Yen Cheng,Daniel S. Weld,Jonathan Bragg
title: FeedLens: Polymorphic Lenses for Personalizing Exploratory Search over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: FeedLens：用于个性化知识图探索性搜索的多态镜头
abstract: The vast scale and open-ended nature of knowledge graphs (KGs) make exploratory search over them cognitively demanding for users. We introduce a new technique, polymorphic lenses, that improves exploratory search over a KG by obtaining new leverage from the existing preference models that KG-based systems maintain for recommending content. The approach is based on a simple but powerful observation: in a KG, preference models can be re-targeted to recommend not only entities of a single base entity type (e.g., papers in the scientific literature KG, products in an e-commerce KG), but also all other types (e.g., authors, conferences, institutions; sellers, buyers). We implement our technique in a novel system, FeedLens, which is built over Semantic Scholar, a production system for navigating the scientific literature KG. FeedLens reuses the existing preference models on Semantic Scholar -- people's curated research feeds -- as lenses for exploratory search. Semantic Scholar users can curate multiple feeds/lenses for different topics of interest, e.g., one for human-centered AI and another for document embeddings. Although these lenses are defined in terms of papers, FeedLens re-purposes them to also guide search over authors, institutions, venues, etc. Our system design is based on feedback from intended users via two pilot surveys (n=17 and n=13, respectively). We compare FeedLens and Semantic Scholar via a third (within-subjects) user study (n=15) and find that FeedLens increases user engagement while reducing the cognitive effort required to complete a short literature review task. Our qualitative results also highlight people's preference for this more effective exploratory search experience enabled by FeedLens.

abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）的巨大规模和开放性使得对其进行探索性搜索对用户的认知要求很高。我们引入了一种新技术，即多态透镜，它通过从基于知识图谱的系统为推荐内容而维护的现有偏好模型中获得新的杠杆作用，来改进对知识图谱的探索性搜索。该方法基于一个简单但有力的观察：在知识图谱中，偏好模型可以重新定位，不仅可以推荐单一基本实体类型的实体（例如，科学文献知识图谱中的论文、电子商务知识图谱中的产品），还可以推荐所有其他类型（例如，作者、会议、机构；卖家、买家）。我们在一个新颖的系统 FeedLens 中实施我们的技术，该系统建立在 Semantic Sc​​holar 之上，Semantic Sc​​holar 是一个用于导航科学文献 KG 的生产系统。 FeedLens 重用 Semantic Sc​​holar 上现有的偏好模型（人们策划的研究提要）作为探索性搜索的镜头。 Semantic Sc​​holar 用户可以针对不同的兴趣主题策划多个提要/镜头，例如，一个用于以人为中心的人工智能，另一个用于文档嵌入。尽管这些镜头是根据论文定义的，但 FeedLens 重新调整了它们的用途，以指导对作者、机构、场所等的搜索。我们的系统设计基于预期用户通过两次试点调查（分别为 n=17 和 n=13）提供的反馈。我们通过第三次（受试者内）用户研究 (n=15) 对 FeedLens 和 Semantic Sc​​holar 进行比较，发现 FeedLens 提高了用户参与度，同时减少了完成简短文献综述任务所需的认知工作。我们的定性结果还突显了人们对 FeedLens 提供的这种更有效的探索性搜索体验的偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FeedLens系统，通过多态镜头技术利用知识图谱中已有的偏好模型，实现个性化探索式搜索。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱规模庞大且开放，用户探索时认知负担重，现有系统难以跨实体类型个性化推荐。
AI.method: 基于语义学者知识图谱，将原有针对论文的偏好模型重构为多态镜头，扩展至作者、机构等实体类型，并通过用户调研和实验验证效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示FeedLens提升参与度，降低完成文献综述任务的认知负担，用户偏好其探索体验。
AI.conclusion: FeedLens通过复用偏好模型实现跨实体类型的个性化搜索，有效提升知识图谱探索效率与用户体验。

authors_text: Zhenan Fan,Zirui Zhou,Jian Pei,Michael P. Friedlander,Jiajie Hu,Chengliang Li,Yong Zhang
title: Knowledge-Injected Federated Learning
title_zh: 知识注入的联邦学习
abstract: Federated learning is an emerging technique for training models from decentralized data sets. In many applications, data owners participating in the federated learning system hold not only the data but also a set of domain knowledge. Such knowledge includes human know-how and craftsmanship that can be extremely helpful to the federated learning task. In this work, we propose a federated learning framework that allows the injection of participants' domain knowledge, where the key idea is to refine the global model with knowledge locally. The scenario we consider is motivated by a real industry-level application, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach to this application.
summary: Federated learning is an emerging technique for training models from decentralized data sets. In many applications, data owners participating in the federated learning system hold not only the data but also a set of domain knowledge. Such knowledge includes human know-how and craftsmanship that can be extremely helpful to the federated learning task. In this work, we propose a federated learning framework that allows the injection of participants' domain knowledge, where the key idea is to refine the global model with knowledge locally. The scenario we consider is motivated by a real industry-level application, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach to this application.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种利用分散数据集训练模型的新兴技术。在许多应用中，参与联邦学习系统的数据所有者不仅拥有数据，还拥有一组领域知识。这些知识包括人类的专业知识和工艺，对联邦学习任务非常有帮助。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个联邦学习框架，允许注入参与者的领域知识，其关键思想是用本地知识完善全局模型。我们考虑的场景是由真实的行业级应用程序激发的，并且我们证明了我们对该应用程序的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种注入领域知识的联邦学习框架，通过本地知识优化全局模型。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习未充分利用参与者持有的领域知识，而这些知识对模型训练有重要帮助。
AI.method: 设计允许参与者在本地注入领域知识的框架，通过知识精炼改进全局模型。
AI.result: 在工业级应用中验证了该方法的有效性，证明其能提升联邦学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 整合领域知识的联邦学习框架可有效提升模型效果，尤其适用于实际工业场景。

authors_text: Jiaye Li,Minghao Li,Zikai Alex Wen,Wei Cai
title: Understanding the Challenges of Team-Based Live Streaming for First-person Shooter Games
title_zh: 了解第一人称射击游戏团队直播的挑战
comment: Accepted by The IEEE CTSoc International Conference on Games Entertainment & Media 2022 (GEM 2022)
comments: Accepted by The IEEE CTSoc International Conference on Games Entertainment & Media 2022 (GEM 2022)
abstract: First-person shooter (FPS) game tournaments take place across the globe. A growing number of people choose to watch FPS games online instead of attending the game events in person. However, live streaming might miss critical highlight moments in the game, including kills and tactics. We identify how and why the live streaming team fails to capture highlight moments to reduce such live streaming mistakes. We named such mistakes jarring observations. We conducted a field study of live streaming competitions of Game For Peace, a popular FPS mobile game, to summarize five typical jarring observations and identify three primary reasons that caused the issues. We further studied how to improve the live streaming system to prevent jarring observations from happening by doing semi-structured interviews with two professional streaming teams for Game For Peace. The study showed that a better system should (1) add a new sub-team role to share the director's responsibility of managing observers; (2) provide interfaces customized for three roles of live streamers in the team; (3) abstract more geographical info; (4) predict the priority of observation targets; and (5) provide non-verbal interfaces for sync-up between sub-teams. Our work provides insights for esports streaming system researchers and developers to improve the system for a smoother audience experience.
summary: First-person shooter (FPS) game tournaments take place across the globe. A growing number of people choose to watch FPS games online instead of attending the game events in person. However, live streaming might miss critical highlight moments in the game, including kills and tactics. We identify how and why the live streaming team fails to capture highlight moments to reduce such live streaming mistakes. We named such mistakes jarring observations. We conducted a field study of live streaming competitions of Game For Peace, a popular FPS mobile game, to summarize five typical jarring observations and identify three primary reasons that caused the issues. We further studied how to improve the live streaming system to prevent jarring observations from happening by doing semi-structured interviews with two professional streaming teams for Game For Peace. The study showed that a better system should (1) add a new sub-team role to share the director's responsibility of managing observers; (2) provide interfaces customized for three roles of live streamers in the team; (3) abstract more geographical info; (4) predict the priority of observation targets; and (5) provide non-verbal interfaces for sync-up between sub-teams. Our work provides insights for esports streaming system researchers and developers to improve the system for a smoother audience experience.
abstract_zh: 第一人称射击 (FPS) 游戏锦标赛在全球各地举行。越来越多的人选择在线观看 FPS 游戏，而不是亲自参加游戏活动。然而，直播可能会错过比赛中的关键精彩时刻，包括击杀和战术。我们找出直播团队未能捕捉精彩瞬间的方式和原因，以减少此类直播错误。我们将此类错误命名为“不和谐的观察”。我们对热门FPS手游《和平精英》的直播比赛进行了实地研究，总结了五个典型的不和谐现象，并找出了导致问题的三个主要原因。我们通过对《和平精英》的两个专业直播团队进行半结构化采访，进一步研究了如何改进直播系统，以防止出现不和谐的观察结果。研究表明，一个更好的系统应该（1）增加一个新的小组角色来分担主任管理观察员的责任； （2）提供针对团队内三种主播角色定制的接口； (3)提取更多的地理信息； (4)预测观测目标的优先级； (5) 为子团队之间的同步提供非语言界面。我们的工作为电子竞技流媒体系统研究人员和开发人员提供了见解，以改进系统以获得更流畅的观众体验。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了第一人称射击游戏赛事直播中的挑战，识别了导致关键瞬间遗漏的问题并提出改进方案。
AI.motivation: 赛事直播可能遗漏关键游戏时刻（如击杀和战术），影响观众体验，需优化直播系统以提升观赛流畅度。
AI.method: 通过田野调查分析《和平精英》赛事直播案例，结合对两支专业直播团队的半结构化访谈，总结问题并提出改进方向。
AI.result: 发现五类典型问题及三大根源，提出增设子团队角色、定制化界面、地理信息抽象化、观察目标优先级预测及非语言同步接口等五项系统优化方案。
AI.conclusion: 研究为电竞直播系统开发提供了改进框架，有助于减少直播失误并提升观众体验。

search_text: Understanding the Challenges of Team-Based Live Streaming for First-person Shooter Games 了解第一人称射击游戏团队直播的挑战 First-person shooter (FPS) game tournaments take place across the globe. A growing number of people choose to watch FPS games online instead of attending the game events in person. However, live streaming might miss critical highlight moments in the game, including kills and tactics. We identify how and why the live streaming team fails to capture highlight moments to reduce such live streaming mistakes. We named such mistakes jarring observations. We conducted a field study of live streaming competitions of Game For Peace, a popular FPS mobile game, to summarize five typical jarring observations and identify three primary reasons that caused the issues. We further studied how to improve the live streaming system to prevent jarring observations from happening by doing semi-structured interviews with two professional streaming teams for Game For Peace. The study showed that a better system should (1) add a new sub-team role to share the director's responsibility of managing observers; (2) provide interfaces customized for three roles of live streamers in the team; (3) abstract more geographical info; (4) predict the priority of observation targets; and (5) provide non-verbal interfaces for sync-up between sub-teams. Our work provides insights for esports streaming system researchers and developers to improve the system for a smoother audience experience. 第一人称射击 (FPS) 游戏锦标赛在全球各地举行。越来越多的人选择在线观看 FPS 游戏，而不是亲自参加游戏活动。然而，直播可能会错过比赛中的关键精彩时刻，包括击杀和战术。我们找出直播团队未能捕捉精彩瞬间的方式和原因，以减少此类直播错误。我们将此类错误命名为“不和谐的观察”。我们对热门FPS手游《和平精英》的直播比赛进行了实地研究，总结了五个典型的不和谐现象，并找出了导致问题的三个主要原因。我们通过对《和平精英》的两个专业直播团队进行半结构化采访，进一步研究了如何改进直播系统，以防止出现不和谐的观察结果。研究表明，一个更好的系统应该（1）增加一个新的小组角色来分担主任管理观察员的责任； （2）提供针对团队内三种主播角色定制的接口； (3)提取更多的地理信息； (4)预测观测目标的优先级； (5) 为子团队之间的同步提供非语言界面。我们的工作为电子竞技流媒体系统研究人员和开发人员提供了见解，以改进系统以获得更流畅的观众体验。 本文分析了第一人称射击游戏赛事直播中的挑战，识别了导致关键瞬间遗漏的问题并提出改进方案。 Jiaye Li,Minghao Li,Zikai Alex Wen,Wei Cai cs.HC

authors_text: Saurav Agarwal,Srinivas Akella
title: The Correlated Arc Orienteering Problem
title_zh: 关联弧定向问题
abstract: This paper introduces the correlated arc orienteering problem (CAOP), where the task is to find routes for a team of robots to maximize the collection of rewards associated with features in the environment. These features can be one-dimensional or points in the environment, and can have spatial correlation, i.e., visiting a feature in the environment may provide a portion of the reward associated with a correlated feature. A robot incurs costs as it traverses the environment, and the total cost for its route is limited by a resource constraint such as battery life or operation time. As environments are often large, we permit multiple depots where the robots must start and end their routes. The CAOP generalizes the correlated orienteering problem (COP), where the rewards are only associated with point features, and the arc orienteering problem (AOP), where the rewards are not spatially correlated. We formulate a mixed integer quadratic program (MIQP) that formalizes the problem and gives optimal solutions. However, the problem is NP-hard, and therefore we develop an efficient greedy constructive algorithm. We illustrate the problem with two different applications: informative path planning for methane gas leak detection and coverage of road networks.
summary: This paper introduces the correlated arc orienteering problem (CAOP), where the task is to find routes for a team of robots to maximize the collection of rewards associated with features in the environment. These features can be one-dimensional or points in the environment, and can have spatial correlation, i.e., visiting a feature in the environment may provide a portion of the reward associated with a correlated feature. A robot incurs costs as it traverses the environment, and the total cost for its route is limited by a resource constraint such as battery life or operation time. As environments are often large, we permit multiple depots where the robots must start and end their routes. The CAOP generalizes the correlated orienteering problem (COP), where the rewards are only associated with point features, and the arc orienteering problem (AOP), where the rewards are not spatially correlated. We formulate a mixed integer quadratic program (MIQP) that formalizes the problem and gives optimal solutions. However, the problem is NP-hard, and therefore we develop an efficient greedy constructive algorithm. We illustrate the problem with two different applications: informative path planning for methane gas leak detection and coverage of road networks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了相关弧定向问题（CAOP），其任务是为一组机器人找到路线，以最大限度地收集与环境特征相关的奖励。这些特征可以是一维的或环境中的点，并且可以具有空间相关性，即，访问环境中的特征可以提供与相关特征相关联的一部分奖励。机器人在穿越环境时会产生成本，其路线的总成本受到电池寿命或操作时间等资源限制的限制。由于环境通常很大，我们允许有多个站点，机器人必须在其中开始和结束其路线。 CAOP 概括了相关定向问题 (COP)，其中奖励仅与点特征相关，以及弧定向问题 (AOP)，其中奖励在空间上不相关。我们制定了混合整数二次规划 (MIQP)，将问题形式化并给出最优解决方案。然而，该问题是 NP 困难的，因此我们开发了一种高效的贪婪构造算法。我们用两种不同的应用来说明这个问题：甲烷气体泄漏检测的信息路径规划和道路网络的覆盖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的相关弧定向问题（CAOP），旨在为机器人团队规划路线以最大化环境特征奖励收集，同时考虑空间相关性和资源限制。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划问题未充分考虑环境特征的空间相关性及多仓库部署需求，导致在复杂场景下奖励收集效率低下。
AI.method: 建立混合整数二次规划（MIQP）模型以精确描述问题，并设计高效贪心算法应对NP难特性，适用于大规模环境。
AI.result: 通过甲烷气体泄漏检测与道路网络覆盖两个案例验证了方法的有效性，展示了空间相关性建模的优势。
AI.conclusion: CAOP模型有效扩展了现有问题框架，提出的算法在保证解质量的同时显著提升了计算效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yunhong Li,Yuandong Bi,Weichuan Zhang,Jie Ren,Jinni Chen
title: Color Image Edge Detection using Multi-scale and Multi-directional Gabor filter
title_zh: 使用多尺度和多方向 Gabor 滤波器的彩色图像边缘检测
abstract: In this paper, a color edge detection method is proposed where the multi-scale Gabor filter are used to obtain edges from input color images. The main advantage of the proposed method is that high edge detection accuracy is attained while maintaining good noise robustness. The proposed method consists of three aspects: First, the RGB color image is converted to CIE L*a*b* space because of its wide coloring area and uniform color distribution. Second, a set of Gabor filters are used to smooth the input images and the color edge strength maps are extracted, which are fused into a new ESM with the noise robustness and accurate edge extraction. Third, Embedding the fused ESM in the route of the Canny detector yields a noise-robust color edge detector. The results show that the proposed detector has the better experience in detection accuracy and noise-robustness.
summary: In this paper, a color edge detection method is proposed where the multi-scale Gabor filter are used to obtain edges from input color images. The main advantage of the proposed method is that high edge detection accuracy is attained while maintaining good noise robustness. The proposed method consists of three aspects: First, the RGB color image is converted to CIE L*a*b* space because of its wide coloring area and uniform color distribution. Second, a set of Gabor filters are used to smooth the input images and the color edge strength maps are extracted, which are fused into a new ESM with the noise robustness and accurate edge extraction. Third, Embedding the fused ESM in the route of the Canny detector yields a noise-robust color edge detector. The results show that the proposed detector has the better experience in detection accuracy and noise-robustness.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种颜色边缘检测方法，其中使用多尺度Gabor滤波器从输入彩色图像中获取边缘。该方法的主要优点是在保持良好的噪声鲁棒性的同时获得了高边缘检测精度。该方法包括三个方面：首先，由于RGB彩色图像的着色区域较宽且颜色分布均匀，因此将其转换为CIE L*a*b*空间。其次，使用一组 Gabor 滤波器对输入图像进行平滑，并提取颜色边缘强度图，将其融合到具有噪声鲁棒性和精确边缘提取的新 ESM 中。第三，将融合的 ESM 嵌入 Canny 检测器的路径中，产生抗噪声的颜色边缘检测器。结果表明，所提出的检测器在检测精度和噪声鲁棒性方面具有更好的体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度Gabor滤波器和Canny检测器的彩色图像边缘检测方法，通过颜色空间转换和边缘强度图融合提升检测精度与抗噪性。
AI.motivation: 传统边缘检测方法在噪声环境下面临精度下降问题，而Gabor滤波器在多尺度多方向特征提取方面具有优势，需结合其与经典检测算法改进性能。
AI.method: 三步法：1) 将RGB图像转为CIE L*a*b*颜色空间；2) 使用多尺度Gabor滤波器生成多方向边缘强度图并融合为增强边缘强度图(ESM)；3) 将ESM嵌入Canny检测流程构建抗噪检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在边缘检测准确率和噪声鲁棒性方面优于传统方法，尤其在复杂纹理与噪声干扰场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合Gabor滤波器的多尺度特征提取能力与Canny检测器的边缘追踪机制，提出的方法有效平衡了检测精度与抗噪性能，适用于实际图像处理场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度Gabor滤波器和Canny检测器的彩色图像边缘检测方法，通过颜色空间转换和边缘强度图融合提升检测精度与抗噪性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统边缘检测方法在噪声环境下面临精度下降问题，而Gabor滤波器在多尺度多方向特征提取方面具有优势，需结合其与经典检测算法改进性能。
ai_content.method: 三步法：1) 将RGB图像转为CIE L*a*b*颜色空间；2) 使用多尺度Gabor滤波器生成多方向边缘强度图并融合为增强边缘强度图(ESM)；3) 将ESM嵌入Canny检测流程构建抗噪检测器。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在边缘检测准确率和噪声鲁棒性方面优于传统方法，尤其在复杂纹理与噪声干扰场景下表现突出。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过融合Gabor滤波器的多尺度特征提取能力与Canny检测器的边缘追踪机制，提出的方法有效平衡了检测精度与抗噪性能，适用于实际图像处理场景。

search_text: Color Image Edge Detection using Multi-scale and Multi-directional Gabor filter 使用多尺度和多方向 Gabor 滤波器的彩色图像边缘检测 In this paper, a color edge detection method is proposed where the multi-scale Gabor filter are used to obtain edges from input color images. The main advantage of the proposed method is that high edge detection accuracy is attained while maintaining good noise robustness. The proposed method consists of three aspects: First, the RGB color image is converted to CIE L*a*b* space because of its wide coloring area and uniform color distribution. Second, a set of Gabor filters are used to smooth the input images and the color edge strength maps are extracted, which are fused into a new ESM with the noise robustness and accurate edge extraction. Third, Embedding the fused ESM in the route of the Canny detector yields a noise-robust color edge detector. The results show that the proposed detector has the better experience in detection accuracy and noise-robustness. 本文提出了一种颜色边缘检测方法，其中使用多尺度Gabor滤波器从输入彩色图像中获取边缘。该方法的主要优点是在保持良好的噪声鲁棒性的同时获得了高边缘检测精度。该方法包括三个方面：首先，由于RGB彩色图像的着色区域较宽且颜色分布均匀，因此将其转换为CIE L*a*b*空间。其次，使用一组 Gabor 滤波器对输入图像进行平滑，并提取颜色边缘强度图，将其融合到具有噪声鲁棒性和精确边缘提取的新 ESM 中。第三，将融合的 ESM 嵌入 Canny 检测器的路径中，产生抗噪声的颜色边缘检测器。结果表明，所提出的检测器在检测精度和噪声鲁棒性方面具有更好的体验。 本文提出一种基于多尺度Gabor滤波器和Canny检测器的彩色图像边缘检测方法，通过颜色空间转换和边缘强度图融合提升检测精度与抗噪性。 Yunhong Li,Yuandong Bi,Weichuan Zhang,Jie Ren,Jinni Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Lu,Yong-Pan Gao,Kai Wen,Chuan Wang
title: Combinatorial optimization solving by coherent Ising machines based on spiking neural networks
title_zh: 基于尖峰神经网络的相干伊辛机组合优化求解
abstract: Spiking neural network is a kind of neuromorphic computing that is believed to improve the level of intelligence and provide advantages for quantum computing. In this work, we address this issue by designing an optical spiking neural network and find that it can be used to accelerate the speed of computation, especially on combinatorial optimization problems. Here the spiking neural network is constructed by the antisymmetrically coupled degenerate optical parametric oscillator pulses and dissipative pulses. A nonlinear transfer function is chosen to mitigate amplitude inhomogeneities and destabilize the resulting local minima according to the dynamical behavior of spiking neurons. It is numerically shown that the spiking neural network-coherent Ising machines have excellent performance on combinatorial optimization problems, which is expected to offer new applications for neural computing and optical computing.
summary: Spiking neural network is a kind of neuromorphic computing that is believed to improve the level of intelligence and provide advantages for quantum computing. In this work, we address this issue by designing an optical spiking neural network and find that it can be used to accelerate the speed of computation, especially on combinatorial optimization problems. Here the spiking neural network is constructed by the antisymmetrically coupled degenerate optical parametric oscillator pulses and dissipative pulses. A nonlinear transfer function is chosen to mitigate amplitude inhomogeneities and destabilize the resulting local minima according to the dynamical behavior of spiking neurons. It is numerically shown that the spiking neural network-coherent Ising machines have excellent performance on combinatorial optimization problems, which is expected to offer new applications for neural computing and optical computing.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络是一种神经拟态计算，被认为可以提高智能水平并为量子计算提供优势。在这项工作中，我们通过设计光学尖峰神经网络来解决这个问题，并发现它可以用来加速计算速度，特别是在组合优化问题上。这里的尖峰神经网络是由反对称耦合的简并光学参量振荡器脉冲和耗散脉冲构建的。根据尖峰神经元的动态行为，选择非线性传递函数来减轻幅度不均匀性并破坏所产生的局部最小值的稳定性。数值结果表明，脉冲神经网络相干伊辛机在组合优化问题上具有优异的性能，有望为神经计算和光学计算提供新的应用。

AI.tldr: 设计光学脉冲神经网络以加速解决组合优化问题
AI.motivation: 提升计算效率和解决复杂优化问题的需求，以及脉冲神经网络在智能和量子计算中的潜力
AI.method: 构建基于反对称耦合光学参量振荡器和耗散脉冲的脉冲神经网络，并采用非线性传递函数优化计算稳定性
AI.result: 数值结果表明该网络在组合优化问题上具有优异性能
AI.conclusion: 为神经计算和光学计算在组合优化领域的应用提供新思路

authors_text: Michael Klamkin,Mathieu Tanneau,Terrence W. K. Mak,Pascal Van Hentenryck
title: Bucketized Active Sampling for Learning ACOPF
title_zh: 用于学习 ACOPF 的分桶主动采样
abstract: This paper considers optimization proxies for Optimal Power Flow (OPF), i.e., machine-learning models that approximate the input/output relationship of OPF. Recent work has focused on showing that such proxies can be of high fidelity. However, their training requires significant data, each instance necessitating the (offline) solving of an OPF. To meet the requirements of market-clearing applications, this paper proposes Bucketized Active Sampling (BAS), a novel active learning framework that aims at training the best possible OPF proxy within a time limit. BAS partitions the input domain into buckets and uses an acquisition function to determine where to sample next. By applying the same partitioning to the validation set, BAS leverages labeled validation samples in the selection of unlabeled samples. BAS also relies on an adaptive learning rate that increases and decreases over time. Experimental results demonstrate the benefits of BAS.
summary: This paper considers optimization proxies for Optimal Power Flow (OPF), i.e., machine-learning models that approximate the input/output relationship of OPF. Recent work has focused on showing that such proxies can be of high fidelity. However, their training requires significant data, each instance necessitating the (offline) solving of an OPF. To meet the requirements of market-clearing applications, this paper proposes Bucketized Active Sampling (BAS), a novel active learning framework that aims at training the best possible OPF proxy within a time limit. BAS partitions the input domain into buckets and uses an acquisition function to determine where to sample next. By applying the same partitioning to the validation set, BAS leverages labeled validation samples in the selection of unlabeled samples. BAS also relies on an adaptive learning rate that increases and decreases over time. Experimental results demonstrate the benefits of BAS.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了最佳潮流 (OPF) 的优化代理，即近似 OPF 输入/输出关系的机器学习模型。最近的工作重点是表明此类代理可以具有高保真度。然而，他们的训练需要大量数据，每个实例都需要（离线）求解 OPF。为了满足市场出清应用的要求，本文提出了桶化主动采样（BAS），这是一种新颖的主动学习框架，旨在在一段时间内训练出最好的OPF代理。 BAS 将输入域划分为多个桶，并使用采集函数来确定下一步在哪里采样。通过对验证集应用相同的划分，BAS 在选择未标记样本时利用标记的验证样本。 BAS 还依赖于随时间增加和减少的自适应学习率。实验结果证明了 BAS 的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bucketized Active Sampling（BAS）的主动学习框架，用于在时间限制内高效训练高保真的最优潮流（OPF）代理模型。
AI.motivation: 现有OPF代理模型的训练需要大量数据且耗时，难以满足电力市场实时清算的应用需求，需开发更高效的采样方法。
AI.method: BAS将输入域划分为多个桶，通过获取函数选择采样位置，并利用验证集的划分指导未标记样本的选择，结合自适应学习率调整策略。
AI.result: 实验验证了BAS在减少训练时间与提升模型性能上的有效性，相较于传统方法具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: BAS框架能在有限时间内生成高质量OPF代理，为电力市场实时应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Qing Song,Wenfeng Sun,Donghan Yang,Mengjie Hu,Chun Liu
title: SGM-Net: Semantic Guided Matting Net
title_zh: SGM-Net：语义引导抠图网络
abstract: Human matting refers to extracting human parts from natural images with high quality, including human detail information such as hair, glasses, hat, etc. This technology plays an essential role in image synthesis and visual effects in the film industry. When the green screen is not available, the existing human matting methods need the help of additional inputs (such as trimap, background image, etc.), or the model with high computational cost and complex network structure, which brings great difficulties to the application of human matting in practice. To alleviate such problems, most existing methods (such as MODNet) use multi-branches to pave the way for matting through segmentation, but these methods do not make full use of the image features and only utilize the prediction results of the network as guidance information. Therefore, we propose a module to generate foreground probability map and add it to MODNet to obtain Semantic Guided Matting Net (SGM-Net). Under the condition of only one image, we can realize the human matting task. We verify our method on the P3M-10k dataset. Compared with the benchmark, our method has significantly improved in various evaluation indicators.
summary: Human matting refers to extracting human parts from natural images with high quality, including human detail information such as hair, glasses, hat, etc. This technology plays an essential role in image synthesis and visual effects in the film industry. When the green screen is not available, the existing human matting methods need the help of additional inputs (such as trimap, background image, etc.), or the model with high computational cost and complex network structure, which brings great difficulties to the application of human matting in practice. To alleviate such problems, most existing methods (such as MODNet) use multi-branches to pave the way for matting through segmentation, but these methods do not make full use of the image features and only utilize the prediction results of the network as guidance information. Therefore, we propose a module to generate foreground probability map and add it to MODNet to obtain Semantic Guided Matting Net (SGM-Net). Under the condition of only one image, we can realize the human matting task. We verify our method on the P3M-10k dataset. Compared with the benchmark, our method has significantly improved in various evaluation indicators.
abstract_zh: 人体抠图是指从自然图像中高质量地提取人体部位，包括头发、眼镜、帽子等人体细节信息。这项技术在电影行业的图像合成和视觉效果中发挥着至关重要的作用。当绿屏不可用时，现有的人体抠图方法需要借助额外的输入（如三元图、背景图像等），或者需要计算成本高、网络结构复杂的模型，这给人体抠图在实际中的应用带来了很大的困难。为了缓解此类问题，大多数现有方法（例如MODNet）使用多分支通过分割为抠图铺平道路，但这些方法没有充分利用图像特征，仅利用网络的预测结果作为指导信息。因此，我们提出了一个模块来生成前景概率图并将其添加到MODNet中以获得语义引导抠图网络（SGM-Net）。在只有一张图像的情况下，我们可以实现人体抠图任务。我们在 P3M-10k 数据集上验证了我们的方法。与基准相比，我们的方法在各项评价指标上都有显着提高。

AI.tldr: 提出SGM-Net模型，实现单张图像下高质量的人体细节抠图
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖额外输入或复杂结构，且未充分利用图像特征，导致实际应用困难
AI.method: 设计前景概率图生成模块并集成至MODNet，通过语义引导提升单图抠图效果
AI.result: 在P3M-10k数据集上显著超越基准模型，多项评估指标表现优异
AI.conclusion: SGM-Net有效解决了单图像人像抠图难题，具有实际应用价值

search_text: SGM-Net: Semantic Guided Matting Net SGM-Net：语义引导抠图网络 Human matting refers to extracting human parts from natural images with high quality, including human detail information such as hair, glasses, hat, etc. This technology plays an essential role in image synthesis and visual effects in the film industry. When the green screen is not available, the existing human matting methods need the help of additional inputs (such as trimap, background image, etc.), or the model with high computational cost and complex network structure, which brings great difficulties to the application of human matting in practice. To alleviate such problems, most existing methods (such as MODNet) use multi-branches to pave the way for matting through segmentation, but these methods do not make full use of the image features and only utilize the prediction results of the network as guidance information. Therefore, we propose a module to generate foreground probability map and add it to MODNet to obtain Semantic Guided Matting Net (SGM-Net). Under the condition of only one image, we can realize the human matting task. We verify our method on the P3M-10k dataset. Compared with the benchmark, our method has significantly improved in various evaluation indicators. 人体抠图是指从自然图像中高质量地提取人体部位，包括头发、眼镜、帽子等人体细节信息。这项技术在电影行业的图像合成和视觉效果中发挥着至关重要的作用。当绿屏不可用时，现有的人体抠图方法需要借助额外的输入（如三元图、背景图像等），或者需要计算成本高、网络结构复杂的模型，这给人体抠图在实际中的应用带来了很大的困难。为了缓解此类问题，大多数现有方法（例如MODNet）使用多分支通过分割为抠图铺平道路，但这些方法没有充分利用图像特征，仅利用网络的预测结果作为指导信息。因此，我们提出了一个模块来生成前景概率图并将其添加到MODNet中以获得语义引导抠图网络（SGM-Net）。在只有一张图像的情况下，我们可以实现人体抠图任务。我们在 P3M-10k 数据集上验证了我们的方法。与基准相比，我们的方法在各项评价指标上都有显着提高。 提出SGM-Net模型，实现单张图像下高质量的人体细节抠图 Qing Song,Wenfeng Sun,Donghan Yang,Mengjie Hu,Chun Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Zan Gao,Xinglei Cui,Tao Zhuo,Zhiyong Cheng,An-An Liu,Meng Wang,Shenyong Chen
title: Temporal Action Localization with Multi-temporal Scales
title_zh: 多时间尺度的时间动作定位
abstract: Temporal action localization plays an important role in video analysis, which aims to localize and classify actions in untrimmed videos. The previous methods often predict actions on a feature space of a single-temporal scale. However, the temporal features of a low-level scale lack enough semantics for action classification while a high-level scale cannot provide rich details of the action boundaries. To address this issue, we propose to predict actions on a feature space of multi-temporal scales. Specifically, we use refined feature pyramids of different scales to pass semantics from high-level scales to low-level scales. Besides, to establish the long temporal scale of the entire video, we use a spatial-temporal transformer encoder to capture the long-range dependencies of video frames. Then the refined features with long-range dependencies are fed into a classifier for the coarse action prediction. Finally, to further improve the prediction accuracy, we propose to use a frame-level self attention module to refine the classification and boundaries of each action instance. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method can outperform state-of-the-art approaches on the THUMOS14 dataset and achieves comparable performance on the ActivityNet1.3 dataset. Compared with A2Net (TIP20, Avg\{0.3:0.7\}), Sub-Action (CSVT2022, Avg\{0.1:0.5\}), and AFSD (CVPR21, Avg\{0.3:0.7\}) on the THUMOS14 dataset, the proposed method can achieve improvements of 12.6\%, 17.4\% and 2.2\%, respectively
summary: Temporal action localization plays an important role in video analysis, which aims to localize and classify actions in untrimmed videos. The previous methods often predict actions on a feature space of a single-temporal scale. However, the temporal features of a low-level scale lack enough semantics for action classification while a high-level scale cannot provide rich details of the action boundaries. To address this issue, we propose to predict actions on a feature space of multi-temporal scales. Specifically, we use refined feature pyramids of different scales to pass semantics from high-level scales to low-level scales. Besides, to establish the long temporal scale of the entire video, we use a spatial-temporal transformer encoder to capture the long-range dependencies of video frames. Then the refined features with long-range dependencies are fed into a classifier for the coarse action prediction. Finally, to further improve the prediction accuracy, we propose to use a frame-level self attention module to refine the classification and boundaries of each action instance. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method can outperform state-of-the-art approaches on the THUMOS14 dataset and achieves comparable performance on the ActivityNet1.3 dataset. Compared with A2Net (TIP20, Avg\{0.3:0.7\}), Sub-Action (CSVT2022, Avg\{0.1:0.5\}), and AFSD (CVPR21, Avg\{0.3:0.7\}) on the THUMOS14 dataset, the proposed method can achieve improvements of 12.6\%, 17.4\% and 2.2\%, respectively
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位在视频分析中起着重要作用，其目的是对未修剪视频中的动作进行定位和分类。以前的方法通常预测单时间尺度的特征空间上的动作。然而，低级尺度的时间特征缺乏足够的动作分类语义，而高级尺度无法提供动作边界的丰富细节。为了解决这个问题，我们建议在多时间尺度的特征空间上预测动作。具体来说，我们使用不同尺度的细化特征金字塔将语义从高级尺度传递到低级尺度。此外，为了建立整个视频的长时间尺度，我们使用时空变换器编码器来捕获视频帧的长程依赖性。然后，具有长程依赖性的细化特征被输入到分类器中以进行粗略动作预测。最后，为了进一步提高预测精度，我们建议使用帧级自注意力模块来细化每个动作实例的分类和边界。大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以在 THUMOS14 数据集上优于最先进的方法，并在 ActivityNet1.3 数据集上实现可比的性能。与 THUMOS14 数据集上的 A2Net (TIP20, Avg\{0.3:0.7\})、Sub-Action (CSVT2022, Avg\{0.1:0.5\}) 和 AFSD (CVPR21, Avg\{0.3:0.7\}) 相比，该方法可实现 12.6\%、17.4\% 和分别为2.2\%

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多时序尺度的时序动作定位方法，通过融合不同尺度特征提升视频中动作分类与定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统单尺度特征空间在动作分类时语义不足（低尺度）或缺乏动作边界细节（高尺度），需多尺度特征融合以兼顾语义与细节。
AI.method: 构建多尺度特征金字塔传递高层语义至低层，结合时空Transformer编码器捕捉长时依赖，最后通过帧级自注意力模块优化动作分类与边界预测。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14数据集上相较A2Net、Sub-Action、AFSD分别提升12.6%、17.4%、2.2%，在ActivityNet1.3表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合与长时依赖建模有效提升动作定位性能，验证了方法在复杂视频场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Xumeng Wang,Wei Chen,Jiazhi Xia,Zhen Wen,Rongchen Zhu,Tobias Schreck
title: HetVis: A Visual Analysis Approach for Identifying Data Heterogeneity in Horizontal Federated Learning
title_zh: HetVis：一种识别水平联邦学习中数据异构性的可视化分析方法
abstract: Horizontal federated learning (HFL) enables distributed clients to train a shared model and keep their data privacy. In training high-quality HFL models, the data heterogeneity among clients is one of the major concerns. However, due to the security issue and the complexity of deep learning models, it is challenging to investigate data heterogeneity across different clients. To address this issue, based on a requirement analysis we developed a visual analytics tool, HetVis, for participating clients to explore data heterogeneity. We identify data heterogeneity through comparing prediction behaviors of the global federated model and the stand-alone model trained with local data. Then, a context-aware clustering of the inconsistent records is done, to provide a summary of data heterogeneity. Combining with the proposed comparison techniques, we develop a novel set of visualizations to identify heterogeneity issues in HFL. We designed three case studies to introduce how HetVis can assist client analysts in understanding different types of heterogeneity issues. Expert reviews and a comparative study demonstrate the effectiveness of HetVis.
summary: Horizontal federated learning (HFL) enables distributed clients to train a shared model and keep their data privacy. In training high-quality HFL models, the data heterogeneity among clients is one of the major concerns. However, due to the security issue and the complexity of deep learning models, it is challenging to investigate data heterogeneity across different clients. To address this issue, based on a requirement analysis we developed a visual analytics tool, HetVis, for participating clients to explore data heterogeneity. We identify data heterogeneity through comparing prediction behaviors of the global federated model and the stand-alone model trained with local data. Then, a context-aware clustering of the inconsistent records is done, to provide a summary of data heterogeneity. Combining with the proposed comparison techniques, we develop a novel set of visualizations to identify heterogeneity issues in HFL. We designed three case studies to introduce how HetVis can assist client analysts in understanding different types of heterogeneity issues. Expert reviews and a comparative study demonstrate the effectiveness of HetVis.
abstract_zh: 横向联合学习 (HFL) 使分布式客户端能够训练共享模型并保护其数据隐私。在训练高质量的 HFL 模型时，客户之间的数据异构性是主要问题之一。然而，由于深度学习模型的安全问题和复杂性，调查不同客户端之间的数据异构性具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，基于需求分析，我们开发了可视化分析工具HetVis，供参与的客户探索数据异构性。我们通过比较全局联合模型和使用本地数据训练的独立模型的预测行为来识别数据异质性。然后，对不一致记录进行上下文感知聚类，以提供数据异构性的摘要。结合所提出的比较技术，我们开发了一套新颖的可视化方法来识别 HFL 中的异质性问题。我们设计了三个案例研究来介绍HetVis如何帮助客户分析师理解不同类型的异质性问题。专家评审和比较研究证明了 HetVis 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HetVis工具，通过可视化分析识别横向联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 横向联邦学习中数据异质性影响模型质量，但因隐私限制和模型复杂性难以直接分析，需开发可视化工具辅助诊断。
AI.method: 基于全局联邦模型与本地独立模型的预测行为差异，结合上下文感知聚类和定制化可视化技术，构建HetVis工具进行异质性分析。
AI.result: 通过三个案例研究和专家评审验证，HetVis能有效识别不同类型的异质性问题并辅助客户端优化数据分布。
AI.conclusion: HetVis为联邦学习中的数据异质性分析提供了直观的可视化解决方案，有助于提升模型训练效果和隐私保护能力。

tldr: 本文提出HetVis工具，通过可视化分析识别横向联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。
motivation: 横向联邦学习中数据异质性影响模型质量，但因隐私限制和模型复杂性难以直接分析，需开发可视化工具辅助诊断。
method: 基于全局联邦模型与本地独立模型的预测行为差异，结合上下文感知聚类和定制化可视化技术，构建HetVis工具进行异质性分析。
result: 通过三个案例研究和专家评审验证，HetVis能有效识别不同类型的异质性问题并辅助客户端优化数据分布。
conclusion: HetVis为联邦学习中的数据异质性分析提供了直观的可视化解决方案，有助于提升模型训练效果和隐私保护能力。
search_text: HetVis: A Visual Analysis Approach for Identifying Data Heterogeneity in Horizontal Federated Learning HetVis：一种识别水平联邦学习中数据异构性的可视化分析方法 Horizontal federated learning (HFL) enables distributed clients to train a shared model and keep their data privacy. In training high-quality HFL models, the data heterogeneity among clients is one of the major concerns. However, due to the security issue and the complexity of deep learning models, it is challenging to investigate data heterogeneity across different clients. To address this issue, based on a requirement analysis we developed a visual analytics tool, HetVis, for participating clients to explore data heterogeneity. We identify data heterogeneity through comparing prediction behaviors of the global federated model and the stand-alone model trained with local data. Then, a context-aware clustering of the inconsistent records is done, to provide a summary of data heterogeneity. Combining with the proposed comparison techniques, we develop a novel set of visualizations to identify heterogeneity issues in HFL. We designed three case studies to introduce how HetVis can assist client analysts in understanding different types of heterogeneity issues. Expert reviews and a comparative study demonstrate the effectiveness of HetVis. 横向联合学习 (HFL) 使分布式客户端能够训练共享模型并保护其数据隐私。在训练高质量的 HFL 模型时，客户之间的数据异构性是主要问题之一。然而，由于深度学习模型的安全问题和复杂性，调查不同客户端之间的数据异构性具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，基于需求分析，我们开发了可视化分析工具HetVis，供参与的客户探索数据异构性。我们通过比较全局联合模型和使用本地数据训练的独立模型的预测行为来识别数据异质性。然后，对不一致记录进行上下文感知聚类，以提供数据异构性的摘要。结合所提出的比较技术，我们开发了一套新颖的可视化方法来识别 HFL 中的异质性问题。我们设计了三个案例研究来介绍HetVis如何帮助客户分析师理解不同类型的异质性问题。专家评审和比较研究证明了 HetVis 的有效性。 本文提出HetVis工具，通过可视化分析识别横向联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。 Xumeng Wang,Wei Chen,Jiazhi Xia,Zhen Wen,Rongchen Zhu,Tobias Schreck cs.HC

authors_text: Gur-Eyal Sela,Ionel Gog,Justin Wong,Kumar Krishna Agrawal,Xiangxi Mo,Sukrit Kalra,Peter Schafhalter,Eric Leong,Xin Wang,Bharathan Balaji,Joseph Gonzalez,Ion Stoica
title: Context-Aware Streaming Perception in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 动态环境中的上下文感知流感知
comment: 26 pages, 10 figures, to be published in ECCV 2022
comments: 26 pages, 10 figures, to be published in ECCV 2022
abstract: Efficient vision works maximize accuracy under a latency budget. These works evaluate accuracy offline, one image at a time. However, real-time vision applications like autonomous driving operate in streaming settings, where ground truth changes between inference start and finish. This results in a significant accuracy drop. Therefore, a recent work proposed to maximize accuracy in streaming settings on average. In this paper, we propose to maximize streaming accuracy for every environment context. We posit that scenario difficulty influences the initial (offline) accuracy difference, while obstacle displacement in the scene affects the subsequent accuracy degradation. Our method, Octopus, uses these scenario properties to select configurations that maximize streaming accuracy at test time. Our method improves tracking performance (S-MOTA) by 7.4% over the conventional static approach. Further, performance improvement using our method comes in addition to, and not instead of, advances in offline accuracy.
summary: Efficient vision works maximize accuracy under a latency budget. These works evaluate accuracy offline, one image at a time. However, real-time vision applications like autonomous driving operate in streaming settings, where ground truth changes between inference start and finish. In this paper, we propose to maximize streaming accuracy for every environment context. We posit that scenario difficulty influences the initial (offline) accuracy difference, while obstacle displacement in the scene affects the subsequent accuracy degradation. Our method, Octopus, uses these scenario properties to select configurations that maximize streaming accuracy at test time. Our method improves tracking performance (S-MOTA) by 7.4% over the conventional static approach. Further, performance improvement using our method comes in addition to, and not instead of, advances in offline accuracy.
abstract_zh: 高效的视觉可以在延迟预算下最大限度地提高准确性。这些作品离线评估准确性，一次一张图像。然而，自动驾驶等实时视觉应用程序在流设置中运行，其中地面实况在推理开始和结束之间发生变化。这会导致准确度显着下降。因此，最近的一项工作提出最大限度地提高流媒体设置的平均准确性。在本文中，我们建议最大限度地提高每个环境上下文的流准确性。我们假设场景难度影响初始（离线）精度差异，而场景中的障碍物位移影响后续精度下降。我们的方法 Octopus 使用这些场景属性来选择可在测试时最大化流传输准确性的配置。与传统静态方法相比，我们的方法将跟踪性能 (S-MOTA) 提高了 7.4%。此外，使用我们的方法的性能改进是对离线准确性的提高的补充，而不是替代。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向动态环境的上下文感知流式感知方法，通过考虑场景特性提升实时视觉任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉方法在离线条件下优化准确率，但实时应用中地面真实值会随时间变化，导致准确率显著下降，需针对流式场景动态调整策略。
AI.method: 提出Octopus方法，通过分析场景难度和障碍物位移等上下文特征，在测试时动态选择最优配置以最大化流式准确率。
AI.result: 在跟踪任务中，S-MOTA指标相比传统静态方法提升7.4%，且该改进可与离线准确率优化方法协同使用。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合场景上下文特性，本文方法有效提升了动态环境下的流式感知性能，为实时视觉应用提供了新的优化方向。

authors_text: Chuyen Nguyen,Caleb Morgan,Sudip Mittal
title: CTI4AI: Threat Intelligence Generation and Sharing after Red Teaming AI Models
title_zh: CTI4AI：红队人工智能模型后的威胁情报生成和共享
abstract: As the practicality of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) based techniques grow, there is an ever increasing threat of adversarial attacks. There is a need to red team this ecosystem to identify system vulnerabilities, potential threats, characterize properties that will enhance system robustness, and encourage the creation of effective defenses. A secondary need is to share this AI security threat intelligence between different stakeholders like, model developers, users, and AI/ML security professionals. In this paper, we create and describe a prototype system CTI4AI, to overcome the need to methodically identify and share AI/ML specific vulnerabilities and threat intelligence.
summary: As the practicality of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) based techniques grow, there is an ever increasing threat of adversarial attacks. There is a need to red team this ecosystem to identify system vulnerabilities, potential threats, characterize properties that will enhance system robustness, and encourage the creation of effective defenses. A secondary need is to share this AI security threat intelligence between different stakeholders like, model developers, users, and AI/ML security professionals. In this paper, we create and describe a prototype system CTI4AI, to overcome the need to methodically identify and share AI/ML specific vulnerabilities and threat intelligence.
abstract_zh: 随着基于人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 的技术的实用性不断增长，对抗性攻击的威胁也越来越大。需要对这个生态系统进行红队识别，以识别系统漏洞、潜在威胁、表征可增强系统稳健性的属性，并鼓励创建有效的防御。第二个需求是在模型开发人员、用户和 AI/ML 安全专业人员等不同利益相关者之间共享 AI 安全威胁情报。在本文中，我们创建并描述了一个原型系统 CTI4AI，以克服系统地识别和共享 AI/ML 特定漏洞和威胁情报的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTI4AI原型系统，用于系统化生成和共享AI模型红队测试后的威胁情报。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术应用增多，对抗攻击威胁上升，需通过红队测试识别漏洞并建立跨利益相关方的威胁情报共享机制。
AI.method: 设计CTI4AI原型系统，整合红队测试流程与威胁情报生成模块，支持AI/ML漏洞的标准化记录与多方共享。
AI.result: 验证了CTI4AI在生成可操作威胁情报及促进模型开发者、安全专家间协作的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTI4AI为AI安全领域提供了系统化威胁情报共享框架，有助于提升AI系统的整体防御能力。

authors_text: Yunge Cui,Xieyuanli Chen,Yinlong Zhang,Jiahua Dong,Qingxiao Wu,Feng Zhu
title: BoW3D: Bag of Words for Real-Time Loop Closing in 3D LiDAR SLAM
title_zh: BoW3D：3D LiDAR SLAM 中实时闭环的词袋
comment: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)/ICRA 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)/ICRA 2023
abstract: Loop closing is a fundamental part of simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) for autonomous mobile systems. In the field of visual SLAM, bag of words (BoW) has achieved great success in loop closure. The BoW features for loop searching can also be used in the subsequent 6-DoF loop correction. However, for 3D LiDAR SLAM, the state-of-the-art methods may fail to effectively recognize the loop in real time, and usually cannot correct the full 6-DoF loop pose. To address this limitation, we present a novel Bag of Words for real-time loop closing in 3D LiDAR SLAM, called BoW3D. Our method not only efficiently recognizes the revisited loop places, but also corrects the full 6-DoF loop pose in real time. BoW3D builds the bag of words based on the 3D LiDAR feature LinK3D, which is efficient, pose-invariant and can be used for accurate point-to-point matching. We furthermore embed our proposed method into 3D LiDAR odometry system to evaluate loop closing performance. We test our method on public dataset, and compare it against other state-of-the-art algorithms. BoW3D shows better performance in terms of F1 max and extended precision scores on most scenarios. It is noticeable that BoW3D takes an average of 48 ms to recognize and correct the loops on KITTI 00 (includes 4K+ 64-ray LiDAR scans), when executed on a notebook with an Intel Core i7 @2.2 GHz processor. We release the implementation of our method here: https://github.com/YungeCui/BoW3D.

Our method not only efficiently recognizes the revisited loop places, but also corrects the full 6-DoF loop pose in real time. BoW3D builds the bag of words based on the 3D LiDAR feature LinK3D, which is efficient, pose-invariant and can be used for accurate point-to-point matching. We furthermore embed our proposed method into 3D LiDAR odometry system to evaluate loop closing performance. We test our method on public dataset, and compare it against other state-of-the-art algorithms. BoW3D shows better performance in terms of F1 max and extended precision scores on most scenarios. It is noticeable that BoW3D takes an average of 48 ms to recognize and correct the loops on KITTI 00 (includes 4K+ 64-ray LiDAR scans), when executed on a notebook with an Intel Core i7 @2.2 GHz processor. We release the implementation of our method here: https://github.com/YungeCui/BoW3D.
abstract_zh: 闭环是自主移动系统同步定位与地图构建 (SLAM) 的基本组成部分。在视觉SLAM领域，词袋（BoW）在回环方面取得了巨大成功。用于环路搜索的BoW特征也可以用于后续的6-DoF环路校正。然而，对于 3D LiDAR SLAM，最先进的方法可能无法有效地实时识别环路，并且通常无法校正完整的 6-DoF 环路姿态。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的词袋，用于 3D LiDAR SLAM 中的实时循环闭合，称为 BoW3D。我们的方法不仅有效地识别重新访问的循环位置，而且还实时校正完整的 6-DoF 循环姿势。 BoW3D 基于 3D LiDAR 特征 LinK3D 构建词袋，该词袋高效、姿态不变，可用于精确的点对点匹配。我们进一步将我们提出的方法嵌入到 3D LiDAR 里程计系统中以评估闭环性能。我们在公共数据集上测试我们的方法，并将其与其他最先进的算法进行比较。在大多数情况下，BoW3D 在 F1 max 和扩展精度分数方面表现出更好的性能。值得注意的是，在配备 Intel Core i7 @2.2 GHz 处理器的笔记本电脑上执行时，BoW3D 平均需要 48 毫秒来识别和纠正 KITTI 00 上的循环（包括 4K+ 64 射线 LiDAR 扫描）。我们在这里发布了我们方法的实现：https://github.com/YungeCui/BoW3D。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于3D LiDAR SLAM的实时回环检测方法BoW3D，通过改进的Bag of Words模型实现高效回环识别与6自由度位姿校正。
AI.motivation: 现有3D LiDAR SLAM方法在实时回环检测和全6-DoF位姿校正方面存在性能不足，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于LinK3D特征构建3D LiDAR的Bag of Words模型，结合点对点匹配实现高效回环检测，并嵌入到3D LiDAR里程计系统中进行验证。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，BoW3D平均48ms完成回环识别与校正，F1 max和扩展精度指标优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: BoW3D通过优化特征表示和匹配策略，有效解决了3D LiDAR SLAM中的实时回环检测难题，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: BoW3D: Bag of Words for Real-Time Loop Closing in 3D LiDAR SLAM BoW3D：3D LiDAR SLAM 中实时闭环的词袋 Loop closing is a fundamental part of simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) for autonomous mobile systems. In the field of visual SLAM, bag of words (BoW) has achieved great success in loop closure. The BoW features for loop searching can also be used in the subsequent 6-DoF loop correction. However, for 3D LiDAR SLAM, the state-of-the-art methods may fail to effectively recognize the loop in real time, and usually cannot correct the full 6-DoF loop pose. To address this limitation, we present a novel Bag of Words for real-time loop closing in 3D LiDAR SLAM, called BoW3D. Our method not only efficiently recognizes the revisited loop places, but also corrects the full 6-DoF loop pose in real time. BoW3D builds the bag of words based on the 3D LiDAR feature LinK3D, which is efficient, pose-invariant and can be used for accurate point-to-point matching. We furthermore embed our proposed method into 3D LiDAR odometry system to evaluate loop closing performance. We test our method on public dataset, and compare it against other state-of-the-art algorithms. BoW3D shows better performance in terms of F1 max and extended precision scores on most scenarios. It is noticeable that BoW3D takes an average of 48 ms to recognize and correct the loops on KITTI 00 (includes 4K+ 64-ray LiDAR scans), when executed on a notebook with an Intel Core i7 @2.2 GHz processor. We release the implementation of our method here: https://github.com/YungeCui/BoW3D. 闭环是自主移动系统同步定位与地图构建 (SLAM) 的基本组成部分。在视觉SLAM领域，词袋（BoW）在回环方面取得了巨大成功。用于环路搜索的BoW特征也可以用于后续的6-DoF环路校正。然而，对于 3D LiDAR SLAM，最先进的方法可能无法有效地实时识别环路，并且通常无法校正完整的 6-DoF 环路姿态。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的词袋，用于 3D LiDAR SLAM 中的实时循环闭合，称为 BoW3D。我们的方法不仅有效地识别重新访问的循环位置，而且还实时校正完整的 6-DoF 循环姿势。 BoW3D 基于 3D LiDAR 特征 LinK3D 构建词袋，该词袋高效、姿态不变，可用于精确的点对点匹配。我们进一步将我们提出的方法嵌入到 3D LiDAR 里程计系统中以评估闭环性能。我们在公共数据集上测试我们的方法，并将其与其他最先进的算法进行比较。在大多数情况下，BoW3D 在 F1 max 和扩展精度分数方面表现出更好的性能。值得注意的是，在配备 Intel Core i7 @2.2 GHz 处理器的笔记本电脑上执行时，BoW3D 平均需要 48 毫秒来识别和纠正 KITTI 00 上的循环（包括 4K+ 64 射线 LiDAR 扫描）。我们在这里发布了我们方法的实现：https://github.com/YungeCui/BoW3D。 本文提出一种用于3D LiDAR SLAM的实时回环检测方法BoW3D，通过改进的Bag of Words模型实现高效回环识别与6自由度位姿校正。 Yunge Cui,Xieyuanli Chen,Yinlong Zhang,Jiahua Dong,Qingxiao Wu,Feng Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Saba Akhyani,Mehryar Abbasi Boroujeni,Mo Chen,Angelica Lim
title: Towards Inclusive HRI: Using Sim2Real to Address Underrepresentation in Emotion Expression Recognition
title_zh: 迈向包容性 HRI：使用 Sim2Real 解决情绪表达识别中的代表性不足问题
abstract: Robots and artificial agents that interact with humans should be able to do so without bias and inequity, but facial perception systems have notoriously been found to work more poorly for certain groups of people than others. In our work, we aim to build a system that can perceive humans in a more transparent and inclusive manner. Specifically, we focus on dynamic expressions on the human face, which are difficult to collect for a broad set of people due to privacy concerns and the fact that faces are inherently identifiable. Furthermore, datasets collected from the Internet are not necessarily representative of the general population. We address this problem by offering a Sim2Real approach in which we use a suite of 3D simulated human models that enables us to create an auditable synthetic dataset covering 1) underrepresented facial expressions, outside of the six basic emotions, such as confusion; 2) ethnic or gender minority groups; and 3) a wide range of viewing angles that a robot may encounter a human in the real world. By augmenting a small dynamic emotional expression dataset containing 123 samples with a synthetic dataset containing 4536 samples, we achieved an improvement in accuracy of 15% on our own dataset and 11% on an external benchmark dataset, compared to the performance of the same model architecture without synthetic training data. We also show that this additional step improves accuracy specifically for racial minorities when the architecture's feature extraction weights are trained from scratch.
summary: Robots and artificial agents that interact with humans should be able to do so without bias and inequity, but facial perception systems have notoriously been found to work more poorly for certain groups of people than others. In our work, we aim to build a system that can perceive humans in a more transparent and inclusive manner. Specifically, we focus on dynamic expressions on the human face, which are difficult to collect for a broad set of people due to privacy concerns and the fact that faces are inherently identifiable. Furthermore, datasets collected from the Internet are not necessarily representative of the general population. We address this problem by offering a Sim2Real approach in which we use a suite of 3D simulated human models that enables us to create an auditable synthetic dataset covering 1) underrepresented facial expressions, outside of the six basic emotions, such as confusion; 2) ethnic or gender minority groups; and 3) a wide range of viewing angles that a robot may encounter a human in the real world. By augmenting a small dynamic emotional expression dataset containing 123 samples with a synthetic dataset containing 4536 samples, we achieved an improvement in accuracy of 15% on our own dataset and 11% on an external benchmark dataset, compared to the performance of the same model architecture without synthetic training data. We also show that this additional step improves accuracy specifically for racial minorities when the architecture's feature extraction weights are trained from scratch.
abstract_zh: 与人类互动的机器人和人工智能体应该能够在没有偏见和不平等的情况下做到这一点，但众所周知，面部感知系统对于某些人群的效果比其他人群更差。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是建立一个能够以更加透明和包容的方式感知人类的系统。具体来说，我们专注于人脸的动态表情，由于隐私问题和人脸本质上是可识别的这一事实，很难收集广泛的人脸动态表情。此外，从互联网收集的数据集不一定代表一般人群。我们通过提供 Sim2Real 方法来解决这个问题，在该方法中，我们使用一套 3D 模拟人体模型，使我们能够创建一个可审核的合成数据集，涵盖 1) 代表性不足的面部表情，除了六种基本情绪（例如困惑）之外； 2) 少数族裔或性别群体； 3）机器人在现实世界中可能遇到人类的广泛视角。通过使用包含 4536 个样本的合成数据集来扩充包含 123 个样本的小型动态情绪表达数据集，与没有合成训练数据的相同模型架构的性能相比，我们在自己的数据集上实现了 15% 的准确率提高，在外部基准数据集上实现了 11% 的准确率提高。我们还表明，当从头开始训练架构的特征提取权重时，这一额外步骤可以提高针对少数族裔的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Sim2Real的方法，通过生成合成数据集来解决情感表达识别中的群体代表性不足问题，提升人机交互的包容性。
AI.motivation: 现有面部感知系统对某些群体（如少数族裔、性别少数群体）表现较差，且公开数据集难以覆盖多样化场景和表情，导致模型存在偏见。
AI.method: 利用3D仿真人体模型生成包含少数群体、非基本情绪（如困惑）及多视角的合成数据集，与少量真实数据结合训练模型。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上准确率提升15%，在外部基准数据集上提升11%，且对少数族裔群体的识别效果显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据增强方法能有效提升模型包容性，为构建公平的人机交互系统提供可行方案。

By augmenting a small dynamic emotional expression dataset containing 123 samples with a synthetic dataset containing 4536 samples, we achieved an improvement in accuracy of 15% on our own dataset and 11% on an external benchmark dataset, compared to the performance of the same model architecture without synthetic training data. authors_text: Prasanna Date,Shruti Kulkarni,Aaron Young,Catherine Schuman,Thomas Potok,Jeffrey Vetter
title: Encoding Integers and Rationals on Neuromorphic Computers using Virtual Neuron
title_zh: 使用虚拟神经元在神经形态计算机上编码整数和有理数
abstract: Neuromorphic computers perform computations by emulating the human brain, and use extremely low power. They are expected to be indispensable for energy-efficient computing in the future. While they are primarily used in spiking neural network-based machine learning applications, neuromorphic computers are known to be Turing-complete, and thus, capable of general-purpose computation. However, to fully realize their potential for general-purpose, energy-efficient computing, it is important to devise efficient mechanisms for encoding numbers. Current encoding approaches have limited applicability and may not be suitable for general-purpose computation. In this paper, we present the virtual neuron as an encoding mechanism for integers and rational numbers. We evaluate the performance of the virtual neuron on physical and simulated neuromorphic hardware and show that it can perform an addition operation using 23 nJ of energy on average using a mixed-signal memristor-based neuromorphic processor. We also demonstrate its utility by using it in some of the mu-recursive functions, which are the building blocks of general-purpose computation.
summary: Neuromorphic computers perform computations by emulating the human brain, and use extremely low power. They are expected to be indispensable for energy-efficient computing in the future. While they are primarily used in spiking neural network-based machine learning applications, neuromorphic computers are known to be Turing-complete, and thus, capable of general-purpose computation. However, to fully realize their potential for general-purpose, energy-efficient computing, it is important to devise efficient mechanisms for encoding numbers. Current encoding approaches have limited applicability and may not be suitable for general-purpose computation. In this paper, we present the virtual neuron as an encoding mechanism for integers and rational numbers. We evaluate the performance of the virtual neuron on physical and simulated neuromorphic hardware and show that it can perform an addition operation using 23 nJ of energy on average using a mixed-signal memristor-based neuromorphic processor. We also demonstrate its utility by using it in some of the mu-recursive functions, which are the building blocks of general-purpose computation.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算机通过模拟人脑来执行计算，并且使用极低的功耗。预计它们将成为未来节能计算不可或缺的一部分。虽然神经形态计算机主要用于基于尖峰神经网络的机器学习应用，但众所周知，神经形态计算机是图灵完备的，因此能够进行通用计算。然而，为了充分发挥其通用、节能计算的潜力，设计有效的数字编码机制非常重要。当前的编码方法的适用性有限，并且可能不适合通用计算。在本文中，我们提出虚拟神经元作为整数和有理数的编码机制。我们评估了虚拟神经元在物理和模拟神经形态硬件上的性能，并表明它可以使用基于混合信号忆阻器的神经形态处理器平均使用 23 nJ 的能量执行加法运算。我们还通过在一些 mu 递归函数中使用它来展示它的实用性，这些函数是通用计算的构建块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为虚拟神经元的编码机制，用于在神经形态计算机上高效表示整数和有理数，以支持通用计算。
AI.motivation: 现有神经形态计算机的数字编码方法适用性有限，难以满足通用计算需求，而其图灵完备性尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计虚拟神经元编码方案，通过物理和模拟神经形态硬件验证其性能，测试加法操作能耗及在μ-递归函数中的应用。
AI.result: 在混合信号忆阻器神经形态处理器上实现加法操作平均能耗23 nJ，并成功应用于通用计算基础函数μ-递归函数。

search_text: Encoding Integers and Rationals on Neuromorphic Computers using Virtual Neuron 使用虚拟神经元在神经形态计算机上编码整数和有理数 Neuromorphic computers perform computations by emulating the human brain, and use extremely low power. They are expected to be indispensable for energy-efficient computing in the future. While they are primarily used in spiking neural network-based machine learning applications, neuromorphic computers are known to be Turing-complete, and thus, capable of general-purpose computation. However, to fully realize their potential for general-purpose, energy-efficient computing, it is important to devise efficient mechanisms for encoding numbers. Current encoding approaches have limited applicability and may not be suitable for general-purpose computation. In this paper, we present the virtual neuron as an encoding mechanism for integers and rational numbers. We evaluate the performance of the virtual neuron on physical and simulated neuromorphic hardware and show that it can perform an addition operation using 23 nJ of energy on average using a mixed-signal memristor-based neuromorphic processor. We also demonstrate its utility by using it in some of the mu-recursive functions, which are the building blocks of general-purpose computation. 神经形态计算机通过模拟人脑来执行计算，并且使用极低的功耗。预计它们将成为未来节能计算不可或缺的一部分。虽然神经形态计算机主要用于基于尖峰神经网络的机器学习应用，但众所周知，神经形态计算机是图灵完备的，因此能够进行通用计算。然而，为了充分发挥其通用、节能计算的潜力，设计有效的数字编码机制非常重要。当前的编码方法的适用性有限，并且可能不适合通用计算。在本文中，我们提出虚拟神经元作为整数和有理数的编码机制。我们评估了虚拟神经元在物理和模拟神经形态硬件上的性能，并表明它可以使用基于混合信号忆阻器的神经形态处理器平均使用 23 nJ 的能量执行加法运算。我们还通过在一些 mu 递归函数中使用它来展示它的实用性，这些函数是通用计算的构建块。 本文提出一种名为虚拟神经元的编码机制，用于在神经形态计算机上高效表示整数和有理数，以支持通用计算。 Prasanna Date,Shruti Kulkarni,Aaron Young,Catherine Schuman,Thomas Potok,Jeffrey Vetter cs.NE,cs.AR,cs.ET

authors_text: Hao Chen,Ran Tao,Han Zhang,Yidong Wang,Xiang Li,Wei Ye,Jindong Wang,Guosheng Hu,Marios Savvides
title: Conv-Adapter: Exploring Parameter Efficient Transfer Learning for ConvNets
title_zh: Conv-Adapter：探索 ConvNet 的参数高效迁移学习
abstract: While parameter efficient tuning (PET) methods have shown great potential with transformer architecture on Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, their effectiveness with large-scale ConvNets is still under-studied on Computer Vision (CV) tasks. This paper proposes Conv-Adapter, a PET module designed for ConvNets. Conv-Adapter is light-weight, domain-transferable, and architecture-agnostic with generalized performance on different tasks. When transferring on downstream tasks, Conv-Adapter learns tasks-specific feature modulation to the intermediate representations of backbones while keeping the pre-trained parameters frozen. By introducing only a tiny amount of learnable parameters, e.g., only 3.5% full fine-tuning parameters of ResNet50. It can also be applied for transformer-based backbones. Conv-Adapter outperforms previous PET baseline methods and achieves comparable or surpasses the performance of full fine-tuning on 23 classification tasks of various domains. It also presents superior performance on the few-shot classification with an average margin of 3.39%. Beyond classification, Conv-Adapter can generalize to detection and segmentation tasks with more than 50% reduction of parameters but comparable performance to the traditional full fine-tuning.
summary: While parameter efficient tuning (PET) methods have shown great potential with transformer architecture on Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, their effectiveness with large-scale ConvNets is still under-studied on Computer Vision (CV) tasks. This paper proposes Conv-Adapter, a PET module designed for ConvNets. Conv-Adapter is light-weight, domain-transferable, and architecture-agnostic with generalized performance on different tasks. When transferring on downstream tasks, Conv-Adapter learns tasks-specific feature modulation to the intermediate representations of backbones while keeping the pre-trained parameters frozen. By introducing only a tiny amount of learnable parameters, e.g., only 3.5% full fine-tuning parameters of ResNet50. It can also be applied for transformer-based backbones. Conv-Adapter outperforms previous PET baseline methods and achieves comparable or surpasses the performance of full fine-tuning on 23 classification tasks of various domains. It also presents superior performance on the few-shot classification with an average margin of 3.39%. Beyond classification, Conv-Adapter can generalize to detection and segmentation tasks with more than 50% reduction of parameters but comparable performance to the traditional full fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 虽然参数高效调优 (PET) 方法在自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务上的 Transformer 架构中显示出巨大潜力，但它们在计算机视觉 (CV) 任务上对大规模 ConvNet 的有效性仍没有得到充分研究。本文提出了 Conv-Adapter，一个为 ConvNets 设计的 PET 模块。 Conv-Adapter 是轻量级的、可迁移的、与架构无关的，在不同任务上具有通用的性能。当传输下游任务时，Conv-Adapter 学习到骨干网的中间表示的特定于任务的特征调制，同时保持预训练参数冻结。通过仅引入少量可学习参数，例如 ResNet50 仅引入 3.5% 的完全微调参数。它还可以应用于基于变压器的骨干网。 Conv-Adapter 优于之前的 PET 基线方法，并在各个领域的 23 个分类任务上实现了可比或超过完全微调的性能。它还在少样本分类上表现出优异的性能，平均裕度为 3.39%。除了分类之外，Conv-Adapter 还可以推广到检测和分割任务，参数减少了 50% 以上，但性能与传统的完全微调相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Conv-Adapter，一种为卷积网络设计的参数高效迁移学习方法，通过引入少量可学习参数实现跨任务特征调制。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法在NLP的Transformer架构中表现优异，但针对计算机视觉任务的大规模卷积网络研究不足，需探索轻量且通用的迁移学习方案。
AI.method: Conv-Adapter通过冻结预训练网络参数，在中间特征层引入任务特定的可学习调制模块，仅需3.5%的ResNet50参数量，支持卷积和Transformer主干网络。
AI.result: 在23个分类任务中超越全微调基线，少样本分类平均提升3.39%；检测与分割任务参数量减少50%以上仍保持性能。
AI.conclusion: Conv-Adapter验证了参数高效迁移学习在卷积网络中的有效性，为视觉任务提供轻量、通用且高性能的微调方案。

authors_text: Chunlei Zhang,Dong Yu
title: C3-DINO: Joint Contrastive and Non-contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Speaker Verification
title_zh: C3-DINO：用于说话人验证的联合对比和非对比自监督学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing
comments: Accepted to IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has drawn an increased attention in the field of speech processing. Recent studies have demonstrated that contrastive learning is able to learn discriminative speaker embeddings in a self-supervised manner. However, base contrastive self-supervised learning (CSSL) assumes that the pairs generated from a view of anchor instance and any view of other instances are all negative, which introduces many false negative pairs in constructing the loss function. The problem is referred as $class$-$collision$, which remains as one major issue that impedes the CSSL based speaker verification (SV) systems from achieving better performances. In the meanwhile, studies reveal that negative sample free SSL frameworks perform well in learning speaker or image representations. In this study, we investigate SSL techniques that lead to an improved SV performance. We first analyse the impact of false negative pairs in the CSSL systems. Then, a multi-stage Class-Collision Correction (C3) method is proposed, which leads to the state-of-the-art CSSL based speaker embedding system. On the basis of the pretrained CSSL model, we further propose to employ a negative sample free SSL objective (i.e., DINO) to fine-tune the speaker embedding network. The resulting speaker embedding system (C3-DINO) achieves 2.5% EER with a simple Cosine Distance Scoring method on Voxceleb1 test set, which outperforms the previous SOTA SSL system (4.86%) by a significant +45% relative improvement. With speaker clustering and pseudo labeling on Voxceleb2 training set, a LDA/CDS back-end applying on the C3-DINO speaker embeddings is able to further push the EER to 2.2%. Comprehensive experimental investigations of the Voxceleb benchmarks and our internal dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, and the performance gap between the SSL SV and the supervised counterpart narrows further.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has drawn an increased attention in the field of speech processing. Recent studies have demonstrated that contrastive learning is able to learn discriminative speaker embeddings in a self-supervised manner. However, base contrastive self-supervised learning (CSSL) assumes that the pairs generated from a view of anchor instance and any view of other instances are all negative, which introduces many false negative pairs in constructing the loss function. The problem is referred as $class$-$collision$, which remains as one major issue that impedes the CSSL based speaker verification (SV) systems from achieving better performances. In the meanwhile, studies reveal that negative sample free SSL frameworks perform well in learning speaker or image representations. In this study, we investigate SSL techniques that lead to an improved SV performance. We first analyse the impact of false negative pairs in the CSSL systems. Then, a multi-stage Class-Collision Correction (C3) method is proposed, which leads to the state-of-the-art CSSL based speaker embedding system. On the basis of the pretrained CSSL model, we further propose to employ a negative sample free SSL objective (i.e., DINO) to fine-tune the speaker embedding network. The resulting speaker embedding system (C3-DINO) achieves 2.5% EER with a simple Cosine Distance Scoring method on Voxceleb1 test set, which outperforms the previous SOTA SSL system (4.86%) by a significant +45% relative improvement. With speaker clustering and pseudo labeling on Voxceleb2 training set, a LDA/CDS back-end applying on the C3-DINO speaker embeddings is able to further push the EER to 2.2%. Comprehensive experimental investigations of the Voxceleb benchmarks and our internal dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, and the performance gap between the SSL SV and the supervised counterpart narrows further.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）在语音处理领域引起了越来越多的关注。最近的研究表明，对比学习能够以自我监督的方式学习有区别的说话人嵌入。然而，基础对比自监督学习（CSSL）假设从锚实例的视图和其他实例的任何视图生成的对都是负的，这在构造损失函数时引入了许多假负对。该问题被称为 $class$-$collision$，它仍然是阻碍基于 CSSL 的说话人验证 (SV) 系统实现更好性能的一个主要问题。与此同时，研究表明，无负样本 SSL 框架在学习说话人或图像表示方面表现良好。在本研究中，我们研究了可提高 SV 性能的 SSL 技术。我们首先分析 CSSL 系统中假阴性对的影响。然后，提出了一种多阶段类冲突校正（C3）方法，从而产生了最先进的基于 CSSL 的说话人嵌入系统。在预训练的 CSSL 模型的基础上，我们进一步建议采用无负样本的 SSL 目标（即 DINO）来微调说话人嵌入网络。由此产生的扬声器嵌入系统 (C3-DINO) 在 Voxceleb1 测试集上通过简单的余弦距离评分方法实现了 2.5% 的 EER，其性能比之前的 SOTA SSL 系统 (4.86%) 显着提高了 45%。通过 Voxceleb2 训练集上的说话人聚类和伪标记，应用于 C3-DINO 说话人嵌入的 LDA/CDS 后端能够将 EER 进一步推至 2.2%。对 Voxceleb 基准和我们的内部数据集的全面实验研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并且 SSL SV 和监督对应物之间的性能差距进一步缩小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C3-DINO方法，结合对比和非对比自监督学习，解决说话人验证中的类碰撞问题并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比自监督学习（CSSL）因类碰撞导致大量虚假负样本，影响性能；非对比自监督框架（如DINO）无需负样本且表现优异，需探索两者结合的改进方案。
AI.method: 提出多阶段类碰撞修正（C3）方法优化CSSL，并基于预训练模型引入DINO目标进行微调，形成C3-DINO系统。
AI.result: 在Voxceleb1测试集上，C3-DINO使用余弦距离评分达到2.5% EER，较之前SOTA提升45%；结合聚类与伪标签后进一步降至2.2%。
AI.conclusion: C3-DINO有效缓解类碰撞问题，显著提升自监督说话人验证性能，缩小与监督方法的差距。

search_text: C3-DINO: Joint Contrastive and Non-contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Speaker Verification C3-DINO：用于说话人验证的联合对比和非对比自监督学习 Self-supervised learning (SSL) has drawn an increased attention in the field of speech processing. Recent studies have demonstrated that contrastive learning is able to learn discriminative speaker embeddings in a self-supervised manner. However, base contrastive self-supervised learning (CSSL) assumes that the pairs generated from a view of anchor instance and any view of other instances are all negative, which introduces many false negative pairs in constructing the loss function. The problem is referred as $class$-$collision$, which remains as one major issue that impedes the CSSL based speaker verification (SV) systems from achieving better performances. In the meanwhile, studies reveal that negative sample free SSL frameworks perform well in learning speaker or image representations. In this study, we investigate SSL techniques that lead to an improved SV performance. We first analyse the impact of false negative pairs in the CSSL systems. Then, a multi-stage Class-Collision Correction (C3) method is proposed, which leads to the state-of-the-art CSSL based speaker embedding system. On the basis of the pretrained CSSL model, we further propose to employ a negative sample free SSL objective (i.e., DINO) to fine-tune the speaker embedding network. The resulting speaker embedding system (C3-DINO) achieves 2.5% EER with a simple Cosine Distance Scoring method on Voxceleb1 test set, which outperforms the previous SOTA SSL system (4.86%) by a significant +45% relative improvement. With speaker clustering and pseudo labeling on Voxceleb2 training set, a LDA/CDS back-end applying on the C3-DINO speaker embeddings is able to further push the EER to 2.2%. Comprehensive experimental investigations of the Voxceleb benchmarks and our internal dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, and the performance gap between the SSL SV and the supervised counterpart narrows further. 自监督学习（SSL）在语音处理领域引起了越来越多的关注。最近的研究表明，对比学习能够以自我监督的方式学习有区别的说话人嵌入。然而，基础对比自监督学习（CSSL）假设从锚实例的视图和其他实例的任何视图生成的对都是负的，这在构造损失函数时引入了许多假负对。该问题被称为 $class$-$collision$，它仍然是阻碍基于 CSSL 的说话人验证 (SV) 系统实现更好性能的一个主要问题。与此同时，研究表明，无负样本 SSL 框架在学习说话人或图像表示方面表现良好。在本研究中，我们研究了可提高 SV 性能的 SSL 技术。我们首先分析 CSSL 系统中假阴性对的影响。然后，提出了一种多阶段类冲突校正（C3）方法，从而产生了最先进的基于 CSSL 的说话人嵌入系统。在预训练的 CSSL 模型的基础上，我们进一步建议采用无负样本的 SSL 目标（即 DINO）来微调说话人嵌入网络。由此产生的扬声器嵌入系统 (C3-DINO) 在 Voxceleb1 测试集上通过简单的余弦距离评分方法实现了 2.5% 的 EER，其性能比之前的 SOTA SSL 系统 (4.86%) 显着提高了 45%。通过 Voxceleb2 训练集上的说话人聚类和伪标记，应用于 C3-DINO 说话人嵌入的 LDA/CDS 后端能够将 EER 进一步推至 2.2%。对 Voxceleb 基准和我们的内部数据集的全面实验研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并且 SSL SV 和监督对应物之间的性能差距进一步缩小。 本文提出C3-DINO方法，结合对比和非对比自监督学习，解决说话人验证中的类碰撞问题并提升性能。 Chunlei Zhang,Dong Yu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Amin Rezasoltani,Ehsa Saffari,Farzam Tajdari
title: Viability of Robot-supported Flipped Classes in English for Medical Use Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 机器人支持的医学英语阅读理解翻转课程的可行性
abstract: This study delved into the viability of Robot-supported flipped classes in English for Medical Purposes reading comprehension. In a 16-session course, the reading comprehension and then workspace performance of 444 students, with Commercially-Off-The-Shelf and Self-Generated robot flipped classes were compared. The results indicated that the flipped classes brought about a good instructional-learning ambience in postsecondary education for English for Medical Purposes (EMP) reading comprehension and adopting proactive approach for workspace performance. In tandem, the Mixed Effect Model revealed that student participation in the self-generated robot-supported flipped classes yielded a larger effect size (+17.6%) than Commercially-Off-The-Shelf robot-supported flipped classes. Analyses produced five contributing moderators of EMP reading comprehension and workspace performance: reading proficiency, attitude, manner of practicing, as well as student and teacher role.
summary: This study delved into the viability of Robot-supported flipped classes in English for Medical Purposes reading comprehension. In a 16-session course, the reading comprehension and then workspace performance of 444 students, with Commercially-Off-The-Shelf and Self-Generated robot flipped classes were compared. The results indicated that the flipped classes brought about a good instructional-learning ambience in postsecondary education for English for Medical Purposes (EMP) reading comprehension and adopting proactive approach for workspace performance. In tandem, the Mixed Effect Model revealed that student participation in the self-generated robot-supported flipped classes yielded a larger effect size (+17.6%) than Commercially-Off-The-Shelf robot-supported flipped classes. Analyses produced five contributing moderators of EMP reading comprehension and workspace performance: reading proficiency, attitude, manner of practicing, as well as student and teacher role.
abstract_zh: 这项研究深入探讨了机器人支持的医学英语阅读理解翻转课程的可行性。在一个 16 节课的课程中，对 444 名学生的阅读理解能力和工作空间表现进行了比较，其中包括商业现成的和自制的机器人翻转课程。结果表明，翻转课堂为医学英语（EMP）阅读理解和采取积极主动的工作空间表现等高等教育带来了良好的教学氛围。与此同时，混合效应模型显示，学生参与自主生成的机器人支持的翻转课程比商业现成的机器人支持的翻转课程产生了更大的效应（+17.6%）。分析得出了 EMP 阅读理解和工作空间表现的五个贡献因素：阅读能力、态度、练习方式以及学生和教师的角色。

AI.tldr: 探讨机器人支持的翻转课堂在医学用途英语阅读理解教学中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统医学英语教学存在效率低、互动性差等问题，需验证机器人支持的翻转课堂能否提升阅读理解与实践能力。
AI.method: 通过16节课程对比444名学生在商用机器人与自动生成机器人翻转课堂中的阅读理解及工作表现，采用混合效应模型分析数据。
AI.result: 翻转课堂显著提升教学氛围与工作表现，自动生成模式比商用模式提升17.6%，阅读能力、态度等五因素为关键调节变量。
AI.conclusion: 机器人支持的翻转课堂在医学英语教学中具有可行性，自动生成模式效果更优，教学效果受多因素影响需针对性优化。

authors_text: Jibran Ali Abbasi,Navid Mohammad Imran,Lokesh Chandra Das,Myounggyu Won
title: WatchPed: Pedestrian Crossing Intention Prediction Using Embedded Sensors of Smartwatch
title_zh: WatchPed：使用智能手表嵌入式传感器预测行人过路意图
abstract: The pedestrian crossing intention prediction problem is to estimate whether or not the target pedestrian will cross the street. State-of-the-art techniques heavily depend on visual data acquired through the front camera of the ego-vehicle to make a prediction of the pedestrian's crossing intention. Hence, the efficiency of current methodologies tends to decrease notably in situations where visual input is imprecise, for instance, when the distance between the pedestrian and ego-vehicle is considerable or the illumination levels are inadequate. To address the limitation, in this paper, we present the design, implementation, and evaluation of the first-of-its-kind pedestrian crossing intention prediction model based on integration of motion sensor data gathered through the smartwatch (or smartphone) of the pedestrian. We propose an innovative machine learning framework that effectively integrates motion sensor data with visual input to enhance the predictive accuracy significantly, particularly in scenarios where visual data may be unreliable. Moreover, we perform an extensive data collection process and introduce the first pedestrian intention prediction dataset that features synchronized motion sensor data. The dataset comprises 255 video clips that encompass diverse distances and lighting conditions. We trained our model using the widely-used JAAD and our own datasets and compare the performance with a state-of-the-art model. The results demonstrate that our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art method, particularly in cases where the distance between the pedestrian and the observer is considerable (more than 70 meters) and the lighting conditions are inadequate.
summary: The pedestrian crossing intention prediction problem is to estimate whether or not the target pedestrian will cross the street. State-of-the-art techniques heavily depend on visual data acquired through the front camera of the ego-vehicle to make a prediction of the pedestrian's crossing intention. Hence, the efficiency of current methodologies tends to decrease notably in situations where visual input is imprecise, for instance, when the distance between the pedestrian and ego-vehicle is considerable or the illumination levels are inadequate. To address the limitation, in this paper, we present the design, implementation, and evaluation of the first-of-its-kind pedestrian crossing intention prediction model based on integration of motion sensor data gathered through the smartwatch (or smartphone) of the pedestrian. We propose an innovative machine learning framework that effectively integrates motion sensor data with visual input to enhance the predictive accuracy significantly, particularly in scenarios where visual data may be unreliable. Moreover, we perform an extensive data collection process and introduce the first pedestrian intention prediction dataset that features synchronized motion sensor data. The dataset comprises 255 video clips that encompass diverse distances and lighting conditions. We trained our model using the widely-used JAAD and our own datasets and compare the performance with a state-of-the-art model. The results demonstrate that our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art method, particularly in cases where the distance between the pedestrian and the observer is considerable (more than 70 meters) and the lighting conditions are inadequate.
abstract_zh: 行人过马路意图预测问题是估计目标行人是否会过马路。最先进的技术在很大程度上依赖于通过自我车辆的前置摄像头获取的视觉数据来预测行人过马路的意图。因此，在视觉输入不精确的情况下，例如，当行人和自我车辆之间的距离相当大或照明水平不足时，当前方法的效率往往会显着降低。为了解决这一限制，在本文中，我们提出了第一个行人过路意图预测模型的设计、实现和评估，该模型基于通过行人智能手表（或智能手机）收集的运动传感器数据的集成。我们提出了一种创新的机器学习框架，可以有效地将运动传感器数据与视觉输入相集成，以显着提高预测准确性，特别是在视觉数据可能不可靠的情况下。此外，我们执行了广泛的数据收集过程，并引入了第一个具有同步运动传感器数据的行人意图预测数据集。该数据集包含 255 个视频剪辑，涵盖不同的距离和照明条件。我们使用广泛使用的 JAAD 和我们自己的数据集来训练我们的模型，并将性能与最先进的模型进行比较。结果表明，我们的模型优于当前最先进的方法，特别是在行人与观察者之间的距离相当大（超过 70 米）且照明条件不足的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手表嵌入式传感器数据的行人过街意图预测模型WatchPed，以解决传统视觉数据在远距离和低光照条件下的预测局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖车辆前视摄像头的视觉数据，在行人距离较远（＞70米）或光照不足时预测精度显著下降，亟需新的数据源和算法改进。
AI.method: 融合行人智能设备的运动传感器数据与视觉输入，构建机器学习框架；采集包含255个视频片段的同步传感器数据集，并在JAAD和自建数据集上训练验证模型。
AI.result: 模型在远距离（＞70米）和低光照场景下相较现有方法提升显著，验证了传感器数据融合的有效性，尤其在视觉数据不可靠时保持较高预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态数据融合有效提升了行人意图预测鲁棒性，提出的传感器数据集为未来研究提供了重要基准，验证了非视觉数据在复杂场景中的关键作用。
